  - [x] **5b-2 Backend resolver refactor**：`backend/agents/llm.py::get_llm()` 原本 `api_key = getattr(settings, f"{provider}_api_key")` 改成 `api_key = await get_llm_credential(provider, tenant_id)`；resolver 讀 `llm_credentials` table → fallback 到 `settings.{provider}_api_key`（legacy `.env` read-only）→ fallback 到 missing→raise `LLMCredentialMissingError`；`list_providers()` 的 `configured` 欄位也走 resolver、不再直接 `bool(settings.{provider}_api_key)` <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5b-2 shipped: (1) new module `backend/llm_credential_resolver.py` — `async get_llm_credential(provider, tenant_id=None) -> LLMCredential` (DB-first chain: `llm_credentials` row → `settings.{provider}_api_key` legacy fallback → raise `LLMCredentialMissingError`), `get_llm_credential_sync(...)` (Settings-only sibling for the sync LangChain factory path in `get_llm`), `is_provider_configured(...)` (sync boolean helper for `list_providers`), `LLMCredentialMissingError(LookupError)` domain exception, frozen `LLMCredential` dataclass (`provider`/`tenant_id`/`api_key`/`source`/`metadata`/`id`). Resolution chain decrypts `encrypted_value` via `secret_store.decrypt`, decrypt-fail per-row degrades to `None` + log-warn so a single bad row can't take down the resolver, only enabled rows are returned, ordering `is_default DESC, last_used_at DESC NULLS LAST, id` — first enabled row wins per (tenant, provider). One-shot deprecation warn per worker (module-global `_LEGACY_WARN_EMITTED` bool, SOP rubric #1 — each worker derives same value from same source). Tenant scope: explicit kwarg → `db_context.current_tenant_id()` contextvar → `t-default` fallback (matches Phase 5-2 convention). Why sync variant reads Settings only: `get_llm` is synchronous and called from dozens of sync LangChain call sites (agent step fns, LCEL chains, tool wrappers) — making it async would cascade `await` across the whole agent runtime; row 5b-5's future lifespan auto-migration will mirror DB writes into `settings.{provider}_api_key` (matching `llm_secrets.load_into_settings` pattern) so the sync path stays in lock-step with the canonical table. (2) `backend/agents/llm.py::_create_llm` — swapped `getattr(settings, f"{provider}_api_key", None)` for `get_llm_credential_sync(provider)` inside try/except; `LLMCredentialMissingError` translates to `None` so the existing failover cascade in `get_llm()` is untouched (primary init fail → chain walk → rule-based fallback); keyless providers (Ollama) carry empty `api_key` + `metadata.base_url` from Settings; `_PROVIDER_CREDS` dict renamed to `_PROVIDER_EXTRA_KWARGS` (just the build_chat_model extras — OpenRouter aggregator headers + Ollama base_url); historical `logger.info("No OMNISIGHT_*_API_KEY set")` log kept so operator grep workflows unchanged. (3) `backend/agents/llm.py::list_providers` — all 9 `"configured"` fields (8 key-based + ollama keyless) go through `is_provider_configured(provider)` instead of `bool(settings.{provider}_api_key)` / hardcoded `True`; Ollama `configured=True` now derived from resolver (keyless providers always resolve). (4) `backend/tests/test_llm_credential_resolver.py` — 27 tests across 4 layers: 9 sync unit (missing → raises / legacy settings read / whitespace-strip / ollama keyless always resolves / ollama_base_url threads into metadata / explicit tenant_id kwarg overrides contextvar / unknown provider raises / empty provider raises / deprecation-warn emits once per worker), 4 `is_provider_configured` unit (True when key set / False when empty / Ollama True even without base_url / unknown provider False), 3 async-no-pool (falls back to Settings / missing still raises / unknown provider raises), 7 live-PG contract gated on `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL` (DB row wins over Settings / empty table falls back / decrypt failure falls through to Settings / tenant isolation A≠B / JSONB metadata round-trip / disabled row skipped / is_default beats LRU), 4 integration with `backend.agents.llm` (`list_providers` "configured" flag flows through resolver — regression guard against re-inlining Settings read / `_create_llm` returns None when missing without reaching adapter / `_create_llm` threads resolved key into build_chat_model + preserves OpenRouter headers / Ollama base_url flows from resolver metadata with api_key=None at adapter boundary). **Verification**: `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=postgresql://omni_test:omni_test_pw@127.0.0.1:5434/omni_test pytest backend/tests/test_llm_credential_resolver.py` → **27/27 passed in 0.99s**; neighbour sweep `pytest test_llm_credential_resolver + test_phase2_ollama_model_routing + test_get_cheapest_model + test_token_budget + test_session_title_matrix` → **48 passed, 16 PG-live skipped** (zero regressions, `git stash` verified 2 pre-existing `test_llm_credentials_schema::test_migration_0029_revision_chain` + `test_circuit_breaker::test_open_and_close_appear_in_audit` failures predate this row). **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on `backend/llm_credential_resolver.py` + `backend/tests/test_llm_credential_resolver.py` + `backend/agents/llm.py` diff → **0 hits** — FINGERPRINT-CLEAN (resolver uses `async with pool.acquire()` + asyncpg auto-commit + $N placeholders; test file's SQL is PG-only via `$N` too). **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #1)**: one new module-global (`_LEGACY_WARN_EMITTED` bool) — each worker sees identical boolean flag emission pattern from identical deprecation-log source; the async path holds no cache (every call round-trips to PG, table is O(<10 rows/tenant) — caching not worth staleness risk, matches Phase 5-2 async-no-cache contract); sync path inherits `settings.*` which every worker loads from the same `.env` or (future) from `load_into_settings`. No new shared mutable state needing PG/Redis coordination. **Read-after-write audit**: zero new write paths — resolver is read-only. Row 5b-3's CRUD will add writes under SP-4.6 `ON CONFLICT ... DO UPDATE` atomic upsert (schema already ready via row 5b-1's partial unique index). No serialisation boundary moved. **Scope discipline**: strictly row 5b-2 only — 0 lines CRUD endpoint (5b-3) / 0 UI rewrite (5b-4) / 0 lifespan auto-migration (5b-5) / 0 deprecation (5b-6). `backend/llm_secrets.py` (bootstrap wizard's separate `.llm_secrets.enc` Fernet file, L3 Step 2) untouched — it already mirrors its decrypted values into `settings.{provider}_api_key` so the resolver's sync fallback path just works without this row needing to know about it. **Production status: dev-only** — code merged + 27 tests green; resolver reads `llm_credentials` when row exists, otherwise behaves identically to pre-5b-2 (reads `settings.*_api_key`). Deployment needs `docker compose build backend-a backend-b` + rolling recreate; zero operator action — `llm_credentials` table is empty until row 5b-3 CRUD or row 5b-5 auto-migration populates it, so the resolver falls through to legacy Settings on first boot and behaviour is bit-for-bit identical to pre-5b-2 except for one deprecation log line per worker. **Next gate**: dev-only until row 5b-3 (CRUD surface); Phase 5b overall flips to `deployed-active` only once 5b-4 (UI) + 5b-6 (soak) both land + operator observes 24h clean rotation drill. **Rollback**: revert commit — restores `_create_llm` to `getattr(settings, f"{provider}_api_key")` + `list_providers` to `bool(settings.*_api_key)`; no schema / no data changes (row 5b-1's table stays, but nothing reads it again). -->

  - [x] **5b-3 CRUD endpoint**：`GET /api/v1/llm-credentials` (list masked) / `POST` (create，body 進 Fernet 後寫 DB) / `PATCH {id}` / `DELETE {id}` / `POST {id}/test` (呼叫該 provider 的 ping API 驗 key 有效)；tenant RLS via `tenant_where_pg`；audit_log 每個 mutation；response 用 fingerprint (`sk-…abc4`) 不回 plain <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5b-3 shipped: new `backend/llm_credentials.py` service module (~530 LOC) + new `backend/routers/llm_credentials.py` router (~350 LOC) + `backend/main.py` include_router wire-up + new `backend/tests/test_llm_credentials_crud.py` (31 tests). **Service module**: `list_credentials / get_credential / get_plaintext_value (internal) / create_credential / update_credential / delete_credential` + `LLMCredentialConflict` (HTTP 409) + `LLMCredentialNotFound` (HTTP 404) domain exceptions; mirrors Phase-5-4 `git_accounts.py` shape with domain-specific simplifications — single `encrypted_value` column (one API key, not 3), no `url_patterns` / `ssh_host` / `ssh_port` / `project`, `metadata` JSONB carries `base_url` (ollama) + `org_id` (OpenAI) + `notes`. `_row_to_public_dict` returns `value_fingerprint` only (never plaintext, never ciphertext). ID scheme `lc-{12hex}`. Partial-unique index `uq_llm_credentials_default_per_provider` serialises concurrent `is_default=TRUE` writes at the PG layer (UniqueViolationError → 409); `is_default` flip done in transaction (clear-then-set) so index never sees 2 TRUEs; delete-default path offers auto-elect-new-default (LRU-ranked next enabled row) vs refuse-without-replacement via `auto_elect_new_default` kwarg. Every mutator writes `audit_log` row (`llm_credential.create` / `.update` / `.delete`) via `backend.audit.log`; best-effort (audit failure warns but does not abort the mutation). **Router**: 6 endpoints — `GET /llm-credentials` list + `GET /{id}` detail + `POST` create + `PATCH {id}` partial-update (rotate key via `value` field: empty-str clears, None leaves alone) + `DELETE {id}?auto_elect_new_default=` + `POST {id}/test` live-probe the provider's list-models endpoint. Probe dispatcher `_probe_llm_credential` threads the decrypted plaintext key into provider-specific auth shape: Bearer (openai/xai/groq/deepseek/together/openrouter), `x-api-key` header + `anthropic-version: 2023-06-01` (anthropic), query-param `?key=` (google gemini), keyless + `metadata.base_url` (ollama); uses `asyncio.create_subprocess_exec("curl", ...)` with `-w '\n%{http_code}'` for status capture, 15s timeout. Plaintext never echoes into the response — only `{status, provider, model_count, http_status?, message?}`. Auth: `Depends(require_admin)` + `set_tenant_id(user.tenant_id)` at every endpoint edge. **Tests (31/31 passed in 2.67s)**: 7 create/list/get (fingerprint never plaintext, filter by provider + enabled_only, ollama keyless path, unknown provider + unknown auth_type raise), 8 partial-update/default-flip/rotate (is_default flip unsets prior default atomically, rotate key changes fingerprint + bumps version, empty-str clears key, metadata replace-not-merge, unknown field raises ValueError, empty updates returns existing, not-found raises), 5 delete semantics (non-default just deletes, default auto-elects next, refuse-without-replacement raises Conflict, sole-default allows defaultless, missing raises NotFound), 1 tenant isolation (A cannot list/get/update/delete B's row — full RLS round-trip), 2 audit (each mutation writes a row, **plaintext never leaks into before_json/after_json** — this is the rotation-drill safety gate), 8 probe-dispatcher unit (unknown provider → error, keyed providers require value → error, ollama requires base_url → error, drift guard that `_VALID_PROVIDERS - {ollama} == _PROBE_SPECS.keys()` to prevent silent probe gaps when adding a new provider, bearer header wiring for openai, x-api-key + anthropic-version wiring for anthropic, query-param wiring for google, non-2xx surfaces upstream error message). **Verification**: `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=... pytest backend/tests/test_llm_credentials_crud.py --no-cov` → 31/31 passed; neighbour regression `pytest test_llm_credentials_schema + test_llm_credential_resolver + test_git_accounts_crud + test_git_accounts_schema` → 82/82 passed 0 regression. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on 3 touched files (service + router + test) **0 hits** — FINGERPRINT-CLEAN (asyncpg pool path + $N placeholders throughout). Runtime smoke: module imports + router wired at `/api/v1/llm-credentials` (TestClient confirms 503 bootstrap-gate behind unauthenticated request — same gating as `/git-accounts`). **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #2 — PG coordination)**: zero new module-globals; `secret_store._fernet` stays per-worker (flock-serialised first-boot from SP-B.3); races on `is_default` / version serialised by PG partial-unique index + row-level UPDATE/DELETE locking — identical pattern to Phase-5-4 `git_accounts`. **Read-after-write audit**: all 3 parallel-handler hazard points (concurrent POST with is_default, concurrent PATCH flipping is_default, DELETE of default) handled inside `conn.transaction()` on the same pool conn the caller owns — UniqueViolationError → 409 on the loser, never an observer state with 2 defaults. **Scope 紀律**: strictly row 5b-3 only — 0 UI rewrite (5b-4) / 0 auto-migration (5b-5) / 0 deprecation (5b-6); `PUT /runtime/settings` legacy path still accepts `{provider}_api_key` field writes (to be removed in 5b-6), `backend.agents.llm` still reads through `get_llm_credential_sync` → Settings fallback (to be replaced once 5b-5 lifespan auto-migration pre-populates `llm_credentials` so the resolver's DB-first chain surfaces stored values). **Production status: dev-only** — code merged + tests green; router live at `/api/v1/llm-credentials`; operator needs `docker compose build backend-a backend-b` + rolling recreate + to create the first row via `POST` (UI for this lands in 5b-4). **Next gate**: dev-only until 5b-4 (UI) or 5b-6 (soak + rotation drill); Phase 5b overall flips to `deployed-active` only after 5b-4 + 5b-6 both land + operator observes 24h clean rotation drill. **Rollback**: `git revert` — restores pre-5b-3 state (no `backend/llm_credentials.py`, no `backend/routers/llm_credentials.py`, no include_router); schema stays (row 5b-1), no data loss because row 5b-5 auto-migration has not run. -->
  - [x] **5b-4 UI rewrite — LLM PROVIDERS section**：`integration-settings.tsx` 的 LLM PROVIDERS 區塊現在打 `PUT /runtime/settings`、改成打 `POST /api/v1/llm-credentials` 或 `PATCH`；移除 banner 裡「runtime-only and will reset on backend restart」的 caveat（因為不再是 runtime-only）；每個 provider row 多加「rotate key」+「delete key」affordance；支援同一 provider 多 account（e.g. 兩組 Anthropic key 用 label 區分） <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5b-4 shipped: 1 legacy grid deleted (8 password inputs + ollama_base_url text input in LLM PROVIDERS section, -50 lines) + 1 new component `LLMCredentialManagerSection` (~480 lines inside `components/omnisight/integration-settings.tsx`) + 5 new lib/api.ts client functions (listLlmCredentials / getLlmCredential / createLlmCredential / updateLlmCredential / deleteLlmCredential / testLlmCredentialById) + `LLMCredential` / `LLMCredentialCreate` / `LLMCredentialUpdate` / `LLMCredentialListResponse` / `LLMCredentialTestResult` interfaces + 13 vitest cases + removed "runtime-only and will reset on backend restart" caveat from the SaveFeedback banner. **Component**: drives the `/api/v1/llm-credentials` REST surface (Phase-5b-3) end-to-end — `listLlmCredentials` on mount, nine provider tabs (anthropic / openai / google / openrouter / xai / groq / deepseek / together / ollama — mirrors backend `_PROVIDER_PATTERN` in `backend/routers/llm_credentials.py:52-55`), per-platform-shaped ADD form (keyed providers get Label + API Key password input; Ollama gets Label + Base URL text input), `is_default` toggle, per-row TEST calling `testLlmCredentialById` which decrypts the stored key server-side and probes the provider's list-models endpoint (plaintext never crosses the wire in either direction), per-row ★ SET calling `updateLlmCredential({is_default: true})` — backend's partial-unique index `uq_llm_credentials_default_per_provider` serialises the cross-credential demotion atomically (Phase-5b-1 guarantee), per-row ROTATE opens an orange dialog calling `updateLlmCredential({value: newKey})` (old ciphertext replaced, version bumped; dialog NOT rendered for keyless Ollama rows since there's no key to rotate), per-row DELETE opens a confirm dialog with a "default — backend will auto-elect next" warning if `is_default`, confirm calls `deleteLlmCredential(id, {auto_elect_new_default: true})`. Plaintext keys never render — only `…last4` fingerprints from backend `secret_store.fingerprint`. **lib/api.ts additions**: `LLMCredentialProvider` union (9 values matching backend regex), `LLMCredentialAuthType` ("pat" | "oauth"), all 5 fetchers go through the existing `request<T>` helper (CSRF + tenant-id header + retry ladder + 15s abort timeout inherited). No `LLMCredentialResolveResponse` / no `resolveLlmCredentialForUrl` sibling (unlike git-accounts: LLM resolution is provider-based, not URL-based). **Save-feedback banner**: removed the 2-line "note: changes are runtime-only and will reset on backend restart" footer from the SaveFeedback ok-state block; LLM keys are now persistent per Phase 5b-1/5b-3 so the caveat is misleading even for the residual runtime-only fields (provider/model/fallback_chain dropdowns — user-visible consequence is that those three still reset on restart, but that's the minority case and fixing them would be Phase 5b scope creep; a narrower "note: provider/model selection is runtime-only" caveat can be added later if operators hit it). **Tests**: `test/components/llm-credential-manager-section.test.tsx` 13 tests — 3 list+filter (tab filtering with masked fingerprints + ★ DEFAULT badge + empty-state hint) / 2 add form (anthropic shape + ollama metadata.base_url shape) / 6 per-row actions (TEST + ★ SET + ROTATE with PATCH value + ROTATE NOT rendered for keyless Ollama + DELETE confirm with is_default warning + DELETE cancel). **驗證**: `pnpm vitest run test/components/llm-credential-manager-section.test.tsx test/components/account-manager-section.test.tsx test/components/integration-settings.test.tsx` → **75/75 passed in 4.92s** (13 new + 43 existing account-manager + 19 existing gerrit-wizard). `pnpm tsc --noEmit` shows the 3 pre-existing TS2322 errors at GitHub/GitLab/Gerrit `onTest` overrides (offset 3665/3712/3786 → 4101/4148/4222 matches +~480 line delta from component addition; `git stash` confirmed identical errors without my changes). `pnpm eslint` shows the 1 pre-existing `set-state-in-effect` error at JiraRotateDialog (offset 2939 → 3413 same +~480 delta; `git stash` confirmed pre-existing). Zero new typecheck / lint errors. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on 3 touched files (`integration-settings.tsx` + `lib/api.ts` + new test file) **0 hits** — FINGERPRINT-CLEAN. **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer N/A — frontend only, no Python workers)**: pure React component state via `useState`/`useEffect` — per-component-instance, not module-global. Re-fetch after every mutation (`refresh()`) gives canonical PG state — no read-after-write timing concerns. **Read-after-write audit**: `handleSubmitNew` / `handleSetDefault` / `handleConfirmRotate` / `handleConfirmDelete` all `await refresh()` after the mutating call returns 2xx — `refresh` re-issues `GET /llm-credentials` which the Phase-5b-3 backend confirms commits-before-return. **Scope discipline**: strictly row 5b-4 only — 0 lines of Phase-5b-5 auto-migration / 0 of Phase-5b-6 deprecation / 0 of Phase-5b-6 docs. Kept intact: provider/model/fallback_chain dropdowns (routing knobs, not credentials — still go through `PUT /runtime/settings`); CircuitBreakerSection; the 3 pre-existing `onTest` TS2322 overrides and the pre-existing JiraRotateDialog lint error (both out of Phase 5b-4 scope). **Production status: dev-only** — code merged + tests 綠; Operator needs `pnpm build` + frontend image rebuild + rolling recreate + `docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml restart frontend` for the new UI to surface; backend image is unchanged (the `/llm-credentials` routes already shipped in Phase-5b-3). Empty `llm_credentials` table deployments will show empty provider tabs + the "No <provider> credentials yet" hint — operator can either let Phase-5b-5 auto-migration (pending) pick up legacy `.env` keys on next backend boot or manually create credentials via the new ADD form today. **Next gate**: dev-only → operator live verify (open the modal in a real browser, navigate to LLM PROVIDERS, pick a provider tab, hit ADD, paste a test key, SAVE, see row appear with fingerprint, hit TEST → OK with model_count, hit ROTATE → paste new key → see fingerprint change, hit DELETE → CANCEL then DELETE → CONFIRM) — Phase 5b overall flips to deployed-active only once 5b-5 (auto-migration) + 5b-6 (soak + rotation drill) both land + operator observes 24h clean. **Rollback**: revert this commit — restores the legacy 8-password-field + ollama_base_url grid in the LLM PROVIDERS section + restores the "runtime-only" caveat + removes the new component + removes new lib/api.ts fetchers. The `/llm-credentials` backend REST endpoints stay live (they were Phase-5b-3) but no UI consumes them; old `PUT /runtime/settings` path works as before. -->
  - [x] **5b-5 Legacy `.env` → `llm_credentials` auto-migration**：lifespan startup hook `migrate_legacy_llm_credentials_once()` — 偵測 `llm_credentials` 空 且 `settings.*_api_key` 任一有值 → 逐一建 row（tenant = `t-default`、label = `"Legacy .env migration"`、`is_default=true`）、寫 audit.log；idempotent；kill-switch env `OMNISIGHT_LLM_CREDENTIAL_MIGRATE=skip`；`.env` key 本身不刪、留給 operator 自己清 <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5b-5 shipped: new module `backend/legacy_llm_credential_migration.py` (~330 LOC) + `backend/main.py` lifespan wire-up (+42 lines, mirrors Phase-5-5 `_cred_migrate` hook, PG-gated + try/except best-effort) + `backend/config.py::Settings.llm_credential_migrate: str = ""` declaration (SP-3.1 `.env` surface; reads still go through `os.environ[_KILL_SWITCH_ENV]` at hook entry) + new `backend/tests/test_legacy_llm_credential_migration.py` (17 tests three-layer). **Module**: `_plan_rows()` iterates `_PROVIDER_LEGACY_FIELDS` (8 keyed providers + ollama keyless branch); each non-empty `settings.{provider}_api_key` yields a row with `id=f"lc-legacy-{provider}"`, `is_default=True`, `label="Legacy .env migration"`, `value=plaintext`, `metadata={}`, `source=f"settings.{provider}_api_key"`. Ollama keyless branch emits a row only when `settings.ollama_base_url` is non-empty AND differs from module default `http://localhost:11434` (otherwise resolver's fallback already synthesises the same value, row carries no signal); that row has `value=""`, `metadata={"base_url": <custom>}`. `_table_has_any_row` idempotency guard (LIMIT 1 — cheaper than COUNT); `_insert_one` uses `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING RETURNING id` + Fernet-encrypt via `backend.secret_store.encrypt` (same key as row 5b-3 CRUD — byte-compatible so ciphertext produced here decrypts cleanly from the UI). `migrate_legacy_llm_credentials_once()` returns `{migrated, candidates, skipped_reason, sources}` summary; kill-switch (`OMNISIGHT_LLM_CREDENTIAL_MIGRATE=skip`) / no-pool (SQLite dev) / no-legacy-creds / non-empty-table / per-insert-exception all log + return structured skip reason; audit row emitted per successful insert with `actor=system/migration`, `action=llm_credential_auto_migrate`, `entity_kind=llm_credential`, `after={provider, label, is_default, has_key, metadata_keys, source}` — **plaintext key never in audit payload** (only `has_key` boolean + `metadata_keys` list so a leaked audit snapshot cannot be replayed). Kill-switch + idempotency + audit-best-effort contracts all 1:1 mirror Phase-5-5 `backend/legacy_credential_migration.py`. **Wire-up**: `backend/main.py` adds the hook after the Phase-5-5 `_cred_migrate` block, inside `if _pg_dsn:` guard + try/except envelope so a migration fault never blocks startup (legacy Settings read path still covers LLM credential reads). Three log paths: migrated>0 → WARNING with sources list / skipped_reason set → INFO with reason + candidate count / raised → WARNING with exception type. **Tests 17 顆 three-layer**: Layer 1 (8 sync `_plan_rows`) — empty settings no-op / anthropic key → default row / whitespace-only stripped / all 8 keyed providers at once deterministic ids lock / ollama default base_url no row / ollama custom base_url keyless metadata row / ollama empty base_url no row / mixed keyed + custom ollama. Layer 2 (3 async kill-switch + stub pool) — `OMNISIGHT_LLM_CREDENTIAL_MIGRATE=skip` short-circuits even with creds present / no-pool (RuntimeError on `get_pool`) → `skipped_reason=no_pool` / empty Settings → `skipped_reason=no_legacy_credentials` + asserts pool.acquire is NOT called in this branch via `_StubPool` that raises on acquire. Layer 3 (6 PG-live via `pg_test_pool` fixture + `_live_db` slate) — end-to-end 2 keyed + custom ollama → 3 rows with ciphertext / `secret_store.decrypt` round-trips to plaintext / metadata JSONB parses to `{"base_url": ...}` / per-row audit with `actor=system/migration` + **plaintext-never-in-audit-payload grep guard** / second run is no-op with `skipped_reason=llm_credentials_non_empty` / `asyncio.gather` two concurrent calls collapse to exactly 1 row (first-line: table-non-empty guard) / `_table_has_any_row` monkeypatched false → ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING still blocks duplicate (second-line) / resolver integration: after migration, blank `settings.anthropic_api_key` and `get_llm_credential('anthropic')` still returns `source="db"` + decrypted plaintext + `id="lc-legacy-anthropic"` (proves DB-first chain wired correctly). **驗證**: `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=postgresql://omni_test:omni_test_pw@127.0.0.1:5434/omni_test pytest backend/tests/test_legacy_llm_credential_migration.py --no-cov` → **17/17 passed in 1.32s**; local-no-PG → 11 passed + 6 PG-live skipped. Neighbour regression sweep `pytest test_legacy_llm_credential_migration + test_legacy_credential_migration + test_llm_credentials_crud + test_llm_credentials_schema + test_llm_credential_resolver --no-cov` → **120/120 passed in 7.00s** zero regression. Lifespan-adjacent `pytest test_db_pool_lifespan + test_api_keys_legacy_migration --no-cov` → 7 passed + 2 skipped zero regression. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on new module + test 檔 **0 命中** — FINGERPRINT-CLEAN (全走 `async with pool.acquire() as conn` + asyncpg auto-commit + $N placeholders throughout). **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #2 — PG coordination)**: zero new module-globals; deterministic primary keys (`lc-legacy-{provider}`) + `ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING` make multi-worker lifespan fire race-safe — winner emits audit+log, loser silently skips (mirror answer #2 pattern from `backend.api_keys.migrate_legacy_bearer` + `backend.legacy_credential_migration`); `_PROVIDER_LEGACY_FIELDS` + `_OLLAMA_DEFAULT_BASE_URL` are frozen module constants (cross-worker identical by construction, qualified answer #1). **Read-after-write audit (SOP Step 1, 2026-04-21 rule)**: hook executes inside lifespan `startup` before uvicorn opens the listening socket — no handler observes partial-write state. Resolver's sync path (`get_llm_credential_sync`) reads `settings.*_api_key` directly so migration-written rows are invisible until process reload (intentional per row 5b-2 docstring — async DB read from sync context across every LangChain call would block event loop or cross-thread). Future row 5b-6 deprecation removes scalar writes + relies on `load_into_settings` to mirror DB → Settings on lifespan init, which is the moment sync reads pick up DB state; this row leaves that path alone. **Scope 紀律**: strictly row 5b-5 only — 0 行 deprecation (5b-6) / 0 行 UI change / 0 行 docs/ops/llm_credentials.md runbook (5b-6) / 0 行 `PUT /runtime/settings` `_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` removal (5b-6) / 0 行 soak (5b-6). Phase-5-5 `backend/legacy_credential_migration.py` completely untouched. **Production status: dev-only** — code merged + 17 tests green; operator `docker compose build backend-a backend-b` + rolling recreate 後生效；第一次 PG-backed boot 自動跑、log 出 `[LLM-CRED-MIGRATE] migrated N legacy LLM credential(s) ...` 或 `nothing to migrate` 或 `llm_credentials already has rows; skipping`；`.env` keys intentionally left in place for operator review (resolver still falls back to them if `llm_credentials` is cleared, which is a safety net not a design goal). **Next gate**: dev-only until row 5b-6 (deprecation + docs + soak); Phase 5b overall flips to deployed-active only after 5b-6 lands + operator observes 24h clean rotation drill. **Rollback**: `git revert` removes module + lifespan hook + Settings declaration + test file; migrated rows NOT auto-deleted (operator-managed); soft rollback is `OMNISIGHT_LLM_CREDENTIAL_MIGRATE=skip` in `.env` which preserves existing rows but bypasses future hook runs. -->
  - [x] **5b-6 Deprecation + docs**：`config.py` 標 8 個 `{provider}_api_key` 為 `deprecated=True`；`PUT /runtime/settings` 的 `_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` 把它們移除（逼 UI 改走新 endpoint）；`docs/ops/llm_credentials.md` runbook：新增 key / rotate / disable / 查哪個 tenant 用哪個 key / fallback chain 跟 per-tenant 互動；soak test（rotate anthropic key 驗仍運作 + audit 有 trace、backend restart 後 key 還在） <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5b-6 shipped: (1) `backend/config.py` adds `LEGACY_LLM_CREDENTIAL_FIELDS: dict[str, str]` registry (9 entries: 8 `{provider}_api_key` + `ollama_base_url` → `llm_credentials(...)` replacement hints) + `is_legacy_llm_credential_field(name)` helper — kept SEPARATE from Phase-5-10's `LEGACY_CREDENTIAL_FIELDS` so the `test_phase5_10::test_registry_excludes_non_credential_fields` invariant (which asserts LLM keys are NOT in the forge registry) stays intact. Rationale: mixing the two would either break that test or force an "LLM vs forge" discriminator on every `is_legacy_credential_field` caller. Deliberate per-field rationale in config.py header comment — routing knobs (`llm_provider`/`llm_model`/`llm_temperature`/`llm_fallback_chain`) + token budget knobs NOT listed (not credentials). Did NOT use Pydantic `Field(deprecated=True)` because it fires `DeprecationWarning` on every Settings attribute read and would violate the "read still OK" contract that the resolver's legacy-fallback path depends on. (2) `backend/routers/integration.py::_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` removed the 9 LLM fields (whitelist pattern mirrors Phase-5-10 WRITE-WARN but with stronger semantics: REJECT instead of warn-and-write, because the whole point of 5b-1..5b-5 was to get keys out of process memory; keeping them writable would silently undo Phase 5b). `update_settings` handler enhanced: when a rejected key is a deprecated LLM field, rejection reason rewrites from generic "not updatable" → `"deprecated: use POST /api/v1/llm-credentials (→ <hint>)"`; batch-collect rejects into `deprecated_llm_rejects` dict; post-loop emit one `logger.warning("Phase-5b-6 deprecated-write rejected: settings.%s ...")` per field + one `audit.log(action="settings.legacy_llm_credential_write", entity_kind="settings_legacy_llm_field", entity_id=field, after={field, replacement, note})` row per field (plaintext NEVER in `after` — only field metadata); response carries a separate `llm_deprecations` block (distinct key from Phase-5-10's `deprecations` block) with `{fields, migrate_to: "llm_credentials", endpoint: "/api/v1/llm-credentials", doc: "/docs/ops/llm_credentials.md"}` so the UI can render a dedicated "migrated to llm_credentials" banner independent of any forge-credential banner that may also fire in a mixed-write. setattr NEVER runs for rejected LLM fields — the rejection short-circuits at the `if key not in _UPDATABLE_FIELDS:` branch, so the Settings attribute is not mutated (read-OK contract still preserved via the resolver's legacy-fallback path). (3) `docs/ops/llm_credentials.md` NEW ~480-line operator runbook — 11 sections: TL;DR table / conceptual model (schema + resolver 3-step DB→Settings→raise chain) / Add new API key (UI + REST) / Rotate a key (with post-rotation test checklist + soak test pointer) / Disable without deleting / Delete (auto-elect-new-default semantics) / Find which credential resolves for a (tenant, provider) / **Fallback chain + per-tenant interaction** (covers the per-provider resolve in chain, missing-skips-not-aborts semantics, legacy Settings fallback per-provider, Ollama as last-chance keyless) / 5 troubleshooting symptoms / Audit trail with 5 action types (`llm_credential.create`/`update`/`delete`/`llm_credential_auto_migrate`/`settings.legacy_llm_credential_write`) / Legacy `.env` deprecation with the rejection response shape / See-also cross-links. (4) `backend/tests/test_phase5b_6_deprecation.py` NEW 24 tests four layers: **Registry invariants** (7) — dict-of-hints shape, all 9 TODO-row-enumerated fields present, no unexpected entries, DISJOINT from Phase-5-10 registry (explicit guard via `set & set` overlap check), fields exist on Settings, helper contract, `_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` no longer lists LLM keys, routing knobs stayed. **Write-reject contract** (9) — rejection reason carries `/api/v1/llm-credentials` pointer + "deprecated" token, audit row has correct action/entity_kind/entity_id/after.field/after.replacement + plaintext grep guard, response has `llm_deprecations` block with migrate_to/endpoint/doc, **setattr did NOT mutate** (read sentinel preserved — the key load-bearing contract that separates 5b-6 from Phase-5-10), ollama_base_url rejected same as api_keys, multiple fields one audit row each, warn log fires with plaintext grep guard, non-LLM writes don't fabricate the block, mixed Phase-5-10 + Phase-5b-6 write surfaces BOTH blocks under DIFFERENT dict keys (critical for dual-banner UI). **Rotation soak drill** (4, PG-live) — create anthropic → resolve returns old key → PATCH rotates → resolve returns NEW key + version bumped + fingerprint changed; `audit_log` has `llm_credential.create/.update` rows and **NEITHER before_json NOR after_json contains original OR rotated plaintext** (acceptance-critical regression guard); simulated-restart via monkeypatching resolver module-globals then verifying Fernet round-trip from a fresh pool conn + post-restart `get_llm_credential` still returns rotated key; `audit.verify_chain()` green across rotation (hash-chain integrity). **Doc drift guards** (4) — runbook exists + references `LEGACY_LLM_CREDENTIAL_FIELDS` symbol + `/api/v1/llm-credentials`, covers 5 operator flow headings (Add/Rotate/Disable/Delete/Fallback chain), mentions every registry field (so adding a new provider to registry without runbook update = CI red), mentions `settings.legacy_llm_credential_write` grep-key. **Verification**: `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=... pytest test_phase5b_6_deprecation.py` → **24/24 passed in 5.08s**; broader neighbour sweep `test_phase5b_6_deprecation + test_phase5_10_deprecation + test_llm_credentials_crud + test_llm_credentials_schema + test_llm_credential_resolver + test_legacy_llm_credential_migration + test_integration_settings + test_llm_adapter + test_get_cheapest_model` → **295/295 passed in 35.83s zero regression**. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on 4 touched files (config.py + routers/integration.py + test file + runbook) → **0 hits** FINGERPRINT-CLEAN. **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #1)**: `LEGACY_LLM_CREDENTIAL_FIELDS` is a module-level frozen `dict` constant; every worker derives identical value from the same source code — cross-worker coherence by construction. No new shared mutable state. **Read-after-write audit**: the rejection path short-circuits BEFORE `setattr`, so there is zero write-path serialisation change for deprecated LLM fields; audit emission runs on its own pool conn via `audit.log`; a failed audit cannot leave Settings half-applied because Settings weren't mutated at all. Phase-5-10's existing warn-and-write path (still for forge fields) is untouched. **Scope discipline**: strictly row 5b-6 — 0 lines touched outside `config.py`/`routers/integration.py`/new docs/new tests; did NOT add scalar-write path back in / did NOT touch resolver / did NOT touch CRUD / did NOT touch lifespan auto-migration / did NOT touch UI (already migrated in 5b-4). **Production status: dev-only** — code merged + 24 tests green; operator needs `docker compose build backend-a backend-b` + rolling recreate for the rejection path to surface on the deployed backend; the UI (Phase 5b-4) already POSTs to the new endpoint, so legitimate operator flows see zero change. Scripts / third-party callers still PUT-ing the legacy fields will start receiving the rejection + audit row — which is the intended migration-signal. **Next gate**: dev-only → `[D]` once operator rolls the backend image and verifies the rejection response surface via a curl test against prod + the runbook is linked from the UI's `llm_deprecations` banner; Phase 5b overall flips to `deployed-observed` after 24h of zero regression metric post-deploy. **Rollback**: revert this commit — restores the 9 LLM fields to `_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` + removes registry + helper + runbook + tests; no schema/data changes (row 5b-1's table + row 5b-3's CRUD + row 5b-5's auto-migration all stay — rolling back 5b-6 just re-opens the legacy scalar write path without touching the new primary path). -->

Auth flow (admin login → API key → Bearer) + DAG submission path validated. See `data/smoke-test-report-a2.md`.)*
- [~] Verify steps complete, artifacts persist, audit log hash-chain intact *(PARTIAL 2026-04-24: **audit hash-chain PASS** via `/api/v1/audit/verify`; **steps did NOT complete** — run stuck at `status=running step_count=0` for 13+ min with single 28.8s `gemma4:e4b` LLM call and no progress. Finding #3 in report = likely prod LLM orchestration hang, needs dedicated debug session — separate ticket, not a Blueprint blocker.)*
- [x] Attach run report to HANDOFF *(done 2026-04-24: `data/smoke-test-report-a2.md` 3 findings documented + HANDOFF 2026-04-24 entry written.)*

- [x] ~~Follow-up ticket: 調查 prod LLM orchestration hang~~ *(ROOT CAUSE FOUND + RESOLVED 2026-04-24: Anthropic API credit balance 耗盡 → HTTP 400 `credit_low` → fallback silently 降到 gemma4:e4b 卡死。Operator 已充值 → Haiku 4.5 ping 回 HTTP 200 "Pong! 🏓" 8+10 tokens，primary path 恢復。詳見 `docs/ops/smoke-test-a2-2026-04-24.md` Finding #3 updated section.)*
- [x] **Follow-up ticket**: `scripts/*.py` bulk UA audit — Cloudflare Bot Fight Mode 擋 `Python-urllib/*` default UA *(done 2026-04-24: audited all 32 `scripts/*.py` files, found 5 that call `urllib.request.Request(...)` — 4 already ship named-tool UAs (`prod_smoke_test.py` / `check_eol.py` / `check_fallback_freshness.py` / `soak_rolling_deploy.py`), only `scripts/usage_report.py::_rows_http` was naked → added `User-Agent: OmniSight-UsageReport/1.0 (+...)` + `OMNISIGHT_USAGE_REPORT_UA` env override matching the `prod_smoke_test.py` pattern. Landed a **drift-guard test** `backend/tests/test_scripts_user_agent_drift_guard.py` — static AST scan over every `scripts/*.py` that asserts each `urllib.request.Request(...)` call site either sets `headers={User-Agent: ...}`, calls `.add_header("User-Agent", ...)`, or is whitelisted with a reason; parametrized so next regression names the offending file+line. 2 new `test_usage_report.py` cases lock the positive path (named UA sent, no `Python-urllib/*`, `OMNISIGHT_USAGE_REPORT_UA` override honoured). Verification: `pytest backend/tests/test_usage_report.py backend/tests/test_scripts_user_agent_drift_guard.py` → 17 passed + 27 skipped (skips are scripts without urllib Request sites, expected); neighbour `test_db_token_usage + test_token_usage_shared` 0 regression; fingerprint grep 0 hits; `python3 scripts/usage_report.py --help` smoke OK. Why only usage_report regressed: CF edge only kicks in when `--api-url` points at `ai.sora-dev.app` (operator-triggered remote billing path); `--live` mode bypasses HTTP entirely, so the omission slipped through all dev testing.)*
- [O] A2 full retry（`--subset both`）after all follow-ups 收尾（auth_baseline Bearer fix 完 + Phase F hard-error classification 完）— 低優先，下次 DAG submit 自然會走 Anthropic happy path *(OPERATOR-BLOCKED 2026-04-24: 此 retry 需要 operator 親自執行，卡在 3 個前置條件：(1) **Operator-only secret** — `python3 scripts/prod_smoke_test.py https://ai.sora-dev.app --subset both` 需要 `OMNISIGHT_API_TOKEN` 才能過 Bearer 驗證，該 token 是 admin 登入後 POST `/api/v1/api-keys` 建立的 operator 個人憑證，不存在於 agent env / repo / `.env` — 任何方式提供給 AI agent 都會違反 CLAUDE.md「NEVER store API keys, tokens, or secrets in source code or commits」。(2) **Phase F BP.F.8-F.10 未實作** — `backend/llm_error_classifier.py` + `backend/tests/test_llm_error_classifier.py` 尚未存在（`ls backend/llm_error_classifier.py` → No such file）；Phase F 未完成前 retry 即使成功也無法驗證「hard-error vs soft-fallback 區分」這條 acceptance criteria（見 `docs/design/blueprint-v2-implementation-plan.md` Phase F）。(3) **低優先 + 自然驗證路徑** — TODO 項目自述「低優先，下次 DAG submit 自然會走 Anthropic happy path」：Anthropic 充值後 Haiku 4.5 ping 已驗 HTTP 200 8+10 tokens (Finding #3 resolved)，operator 下次實際提交 DAG 時即會自然走過 happy path，不需專門 smoke retry burn 額外 API budget。**Handoff 給 operator**：(a) 等 Phase F BP.F.8-F.10 landed；(b) 然後執行 `OMNISIGHT_API_TOKEN=<token> python3 scripts/prod_smoke_test.py https://ai.sora-dev.app --subset both`；或 (c) 跳過專門 retry，觀察下個自然 DAG run 即可。預計 Anthropic console 也需 operator 設 spend alert（line 107 follow-up）。)*
- [O] **NEW Follow-up**: LLM fallback hard-error vs soft-fallback 區分（Finding #3 residual design flaw）→ **已 fold 到 Phase F BP.F.8-F.10**（見 ADR §Phase F）；operator 也建議在 Anthropic console 設 spend alert 避免再撞牆 *(OPERATOR-BLOCKED 2026-04-24: 此 row 兩個 deliverable 皆 agent 不可代勞。(1) **技術實作**：ADR `docs/design/blueprint-v2-implementation-plan.md` §Phase F L273-275 + TODO.md L170/174/175 已將 `backend/llm_error_classifier.py` (BP.F.8) / Notification 整合 (BP.F.9) / `backend/tests/test_llm_error_classifier.py` ~25 test (BP.F.10) 明確 scope 到 Phase F，本 row 本身是 forward-pointer 不是 implementation spec；Phase F 整塊（BP.F.1-F.10）目前全 `[ ]` 未開工，預估 1.5 週，前置需 Phase B（Guild 存在）— 提前開 BP.F.8-F.10 會違反 ADR §1 Window 0 順序 `Q.2-Q.8 → Phase 4 → Phase 5 → Phase 5b → Z → Y-prep` + Phase B 未 ship 條件依賴；驗證：`ls backend/llm_error_classifier.py backend/tests/test_llm_error_classifier.py` → No such file (2026-04-24)。(2) **Operator action — Anthropic spend alert**：需登入 Anthropic console (https://console.anthropic.com/settings/billing) 的 admin account 設定 Spending limit + Email alert threshold（例 $50 warning / $80 hard-cap），該操作在 Anthropic 後台 UI、完全不經 repo code、agent 無 credential 且 CLAUDE.md「NEVER store API keys, tokens, or secrets」禁止 agent 持有 console session；這是 Finding #3 根因 (credit 耗盡→silent fallback→gemma4:e4b 卡死) 的防再犯手段，與 hard-error classifier 互補不互替 — classifier 偵測 `credit_low` 後還是會 refuse new DAG submit，但 spend alert 讓 operator 在撞牆前先收到 email，不用等 DAG fail。**Handoff 給 operator**：(a) 現在就可做 — Anthropic console Spending limit + alert threshold 設定（10 分鐘操作、無 code deploy）；(b) Phase F BP.F.8-F.10 排程進 Phase F 自然 land，不需單獨 expedite。**為何 mark `[O]` 而非 `[x]`**：ADR fold 只是「設計決策已 documented」，deliverable 本身（classifier module + spend alert）還沒完成；mark `[x]` 會誤導下游讀者以為已 ship。`[O]` 準確反映「agent 不可再推進、剩下的全在 operator 手上」。Cross-ref: L106 同檔 row 2 個 blocker 之一即是「Phase F BP.F.8-F.10 未實作」，兩 row 綁在一起由 operator 一次性推進。)*

## 🆐 Priority BP — Blueprint V2 (Enterprise Multi-Agent Software Factory)

> **ADR**：[`docs/design/blueprint-v2-implementation-plan.md`](docs/design/blueprint-v2-implementation-plan.md) — Accepted 2026-04-24
> **藍圖**：[`docs/design/enterprise-level-multi-agent-software-factory-architecture.md`](docs/design/enterprise-level-multi-agent-software-factory-architecture.md)
> **執行模式**：**單序不平行**（operator 決策 2026-04-24）
> **預估**：Window 0 ~7-9 週 / 主線 ~14-20 週 / 含 backlog 9-12 月 wall-clock
> **Window 0 順序**（operator-confirmed）：`Q.2-Q.8 → Phase 4 → Phase 5 → Phase 5b → Z → Y-prep`
> **Phase E**（GraphRAG / Neo4j）：**延後到 v1.0 後**
> **6 項已決策**：見 ADR §2

- [ ] BP.A.6 `backend/template_validator.py` — FastAPI 驗證中介層（Pydantic ValidationError → 認知懲罰 prompt）

### BP 風險登記簿 v2（2026-04-25 D' path 擴充）
- [x] R1-R9（原 ADR §8）— 詳見 ADR
- [ ] **R10** RLM library 整合誘惑（implements: BP.A.5b decision-branch + BP.H.2.b subcall budget + BP.W3.9 future eval + ADR Appendix C trigger）
- [ ] **R11** RTK install `\|\| true` swallow → context overflow 變相風險（implements: BP.R.1 + BP.R.6 monitor）
- [ ] **R12** gVisor cost-weight only 不是 actual runtime → 誤導 claim（implements: BP.S.5 文件警告 + BP.W3.13 真正 prod adoption）
- [ ] **R13** Hardware Bridge daemon (Tier 3) 缺失（implements: BP.W3.12 ship FastAPI daemon）
- [ ] **R14** self-improvement L1-L4 設計-實作 gap 數月未追（implements: BP.M L1 主線 + BP.W3.10/11 L2/L3 + BP.W4 L4）
- [ ] **R15** Operator Deploy SOP 漏 `build frontend` 步驟（**2026-04-25 prod live forensic 發現** — frontend image 自 ZZ 38 commits 起 stale，累計 25+ frontend commits 沒 surface：ZZ TurnTimeline / BurnRate / SessionHeatmap / PromptVersion / Z.4 ProviderRollup / 5b-4 LLMCredentialManager / V7-V9 workspace / H3/H4a Ops panel）；三層 mitigation：(a) ADR §7.3 SOP 強制 deploy gate 必含 `build frontend` + rolling recreate `frontend` service ✅ **已 ship 2026-04-25**；(b) BP.W3.14 stale-bundle CI detector；(c) Bootstrap Wizard L7 freshness check
- [x] **R16** `useEngine` SSE subscribe 被綁進 `Promise.all([listAgents, listTasks])` try block（**2026-04-25 operator 報「ACTIVE DEVICE 永遠 0」forensic 發現**）— transient API 失敗 → 整個 init() catch → SSE 永不 subscribe → DevTools 看不到 `/api/v1/events` request → backend 無 heartbeat → presence 永遠 0；連帶 push-based UX（agent / task / scratchpad / semantic-entropy / Q.5 presence）全失效 *(done 2026-04-25: `hooks/use-engine.ts::init()` 拆 3 phase 各自 try/catch — agents+tasks seed / chat history / **SSE subscribe** — phase 1 failure 不擋 phase 3；console.warn 不再吞 SSE 錯誤；rebuild + redeploy frontend 完成。)*
- [ ] **R17** alembic migrations 不在 lifespan startup 自動跑（**2026-04-25 prod live forensic 發現** — backend rebuild 後 12 migrations (0019-0031) 全 pending、`/readyz=not_ready`、operator 必須手動 `python3 -m alembic upgrade head` 才能 ready；`backend/platform.py` 與 stdlib `platform` 命名衝突使 `cd /app/backend && python3 -m alembic` 永遠 fail）；mitigation：(a) lifespan startup hook 加 `alembic.command.upgrade(head)` with retry/log；(b) `backend/platform.py` rename 到 `backend/hw_platform.py` 解 stdlib shadowing；(c) Operator deploy SOP 加 `alembic upgrade head` 步驟 + 必驗 `/readyz=ready`
- [ ] **R24** Catalog forward-compat — 訂閱第三方 catalog feed / metadata JSONB 未來新欄位 / shipped schema 演進 三個面向都可能讓 entry 與 OmniSight 既有 validator 不一致；deep-copy 模式（operator fork shipped → 改）會讓 upstream `shell_script → docker_pull` 安全升級被 operator 那份永久擋住、operator 完全不知 upstream 改了。Mitigation 由 BS.0.1 ADR §3.4 三條 forward-compat 規則凍結：(a) `metadata` JSONB 對 top-level 欄位 closed list、對子鍵 open list（unknown 欄位摺疊顯示 raw JSON、不退驗）；(b) `catalog_entries.schema_version SMALLINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1`、走 `SCHEMA_VALIDATORS[schema_version]` versioned validator dict、舊 schema_version entry 永遠可讀但 admin UI 顯 deprecation banner；(c) `source='subscription'` 第四層預留 enum、優先序 `override > operator > subscription > shipped`、本 epic 不開但結構就緒。實作層面：`override` row 只存 sparse JSONB diff、PG 端走 `jsonb || jsonb` operator merge（implements: BS.1.1 `(id, source)` 複合主鍵 + schema_version 欄位 + subscription enum 預留 + BS.1.3 `_schema.yaml` versioned validator + BS.1.5 `test_yaml_seed_matches_alembic_seed` drift guard test + BS.2.1 PATCH endpoint 走 partial diff 而非 deep-copy）
- [ ] **R25** Motion accessibility (WCAG 2.3.3 Level AAA) — Reduce-motion violation 是 production bug、不是 enhancement（一位 vestibular / migraine 患者打開頁面立刻頭暈閉頁）。三個子風險由 BS.0.1 ADR §6.5 凍結：**R25.1** `useEffectiveMotionLevel()` 只讀 `prefers-reduced-motion` 首次值、OS 設定切換後 stale → mitigation：hook 內 attach `MediaQueryList.addEventListener('change', ...)`、unmount 時 cleanup；**R25.2** CSS-only 動畫（`<style>` 直接內嵌 / `className="float-drift-a"` 寫死）繞過 hook → mitigation：`@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; } }` 全域 fallback 寫進 `app/globals.css` 作為 hook miss 的 last line of defense + CI AST scan 禁 `<motion.*>` framer-motion API + keyframe class 必須來自 `lib/motion-classes.ts` 常數匯出；**R25.3** 第三方組件（`@tanstack/react-virtual` 等）內建動畫忽略偏好 → mitigation：`useEffectiveMotionLevel === 'off'` 時 prop 設為 `disable`，套用所有第三方 motion-bearing component（implements: BS.3.5 `useEffectiveMotionLevel()` 整合 hook + ADR §6.2 硬規則優先序 + BS.3.7 `test_motion_a11y.py` AST + class scan + Storybook prefers-reduced-motion screenshot diff + BS.6.5 react-virtual disable smooth-transition + BS.11.1 reduce-motion 全鏈驗證 + BS.11.7 Lighthouse a11y ≥ 90）
- [ ] **R26** Sidecar protocol versioning — BS.4 ship v1 protocol 之後若想改 progress payload 格式 / endpoint URL / auth 機制，舊版 sidecar 已 deploy 在 operator 機器上、運維可能 lag 數天到數週才 `docker-compose pull`；如果 backend 升級後立刻 break 舊 sidecar、operator 在升級窗口內**完全無法裝任何東西**（包括「升級 sidecar 自己」如果走 catalog → 也走不通）。Mitigation 由 BS.0.1 ADR §4.3 凍結：(a) sidecar 第一次 poll 必須帶 `?protocol_version=N` query param 走 handshake、不在 `SUPPORTED_VERSIONS` 回 426 Upgrade Required + JSON body 帶 `min_version` / `max_version` / `download_url`；(b) backend 同時支援 N 與 N-1（最多兩個版本並存、避免 protocol matrix 爆炸）、N-2 broken；(c) sidecar image tag 永遠 `:bs-vN`（不用 `:latest`）— `docker-compose.yml` 釘版本、operator 走 `docker-compose pull` 看到 SHA 變動才會升；(d) protocol breaking change 觸發定義：progress payload schema 移除 / 改型 / 必填欄位增加 / endpoint URL 變動 / auth 機制變動，**不**觸發：增加 optional 欄位、新增 endpoint、新增可選 query param（implements: BS.2.2 `/installer/jobs/poll` 接 protocol_version handshake + 426 response + BS.4.2 sidecar `installer/main.py` 第一次 connect 帶 `protocol_version` + BS.4.6 `docker-compose.yml` 釘 `:bs-v1` tag + `install_jobs.protocol_version SMALLINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1` 欄位（BS.0.1 §7.1）+ BS.4.7 `test_long_poll_loop.py` 含 protocol mismatch 426 case）
- [ ] **R27** Install job idempotency — sidecar 跑到 90% 時 docker container 被 SIGKILL（OOM / `docker restart`）/ frontend 雙擊 install button 建兩個 job / 多個 sidecar 同時 long-poll 同 job 三個場景都會造成 install 結果不可重現或重複扣資源。Mitigation 由 BS.0.1 ADR §4.4 凍結：(a) Job claim 一次寫死、backend `POST /installer/jobs/poll` 走 `SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 1` + `UPDATE ... SET state='running', sidecar_id=$1, claimed_at=now()` 同 transaction、一個 job 只可能被一個 sidecar 拿到；(b) sidecar 每次 startup 第一件事 query `GET /installer/jobs?sidecar_id=self&state=running`、看到「我認領但沒回報結果」的 job → 自動回報 `failed` + reason `sidecar_restart_recovered`，retry 決定權留給 operator（不自動 retry 因為 vendor `shell_script` 不保證冪等）；(c) Install method 自身的冪等性分流：`docker_pull` 重跑無害（image 已存在 → noop）、`shell_script` / `vendor_installer` 由 vendor 寫不保證冪等→ sidecar **不**自動 retry 這兩類的 `failed` job；(d) `install_jobs.idempotency_key UUID UNIQUE NOT NULL` 由 frontend 在 `POST /installer/jobs` 時帶上、backend 走 `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING RETURNING id`、同 key 重發回上次 ID、避免雙擊建兩個 job；對應 threat model T12（sidecar OOM mid-install dirty state）。延伸 mitigation：sidecar 跑 install 時用 scratch dir + atomic rename 確保半完成的 tarball 不污染最終路徑（BS.4.3 install methods 共用 pattern）（implements: BS.1.1 `install_jobs.idempotency_key UUID UNIQUE` 欄位 + `state` enum 含 `cancelled` + `error_reason` 欄位 + BS.2.2 `POST /installer/jobs` 走 `ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING` + `/poll` 走 `SELECT FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED` + BS.4.2 sidecar startup 第一件事認領 running job + BS.4.3 install methods 走 scratch dir + atomic rename + BS.7.6 retry button 建新 job 保留歷史 row + BS.7.7 cancel 寫 PG / sidecar 下輪 poll 看 cancel flag 中止）

### B12. UX-CF-TUNNEL-WIZARD — Cloudflare Tunnel 一鍵自動配置（新）
> 目標：取代現行手動 4 步驟（`cloudflared tunnel login` → `create` → `route dns` → 編輯 `config.yml`）。使用者在 UI 只輸入 CF API Token + 選 Zone + 填 hostname，其餘由系統自動完成。

**Backend**
- [x] `backend/cloudflare_client.py`：CF API v4 wrapper（tunnels / dns / zones / accounts）+ 錯誤映射（401 invalid token / 403 missing scope / 409 conflict / 429 rate limit）
- [x] `backend/routers/cloudflare_tunnel.py`：
  - `POST /api/v1/cloudflare/validate-token` — 驗 token 並回傳可用 accounts
  - `GET  /api/v1/cloudflare/zones?account_id=` — 列使用者可選 zone
  - `POST /api/v1/cloudflare/provision` — 建 tunnel + ingress config + DNS CNAME（冪等、失敗自動回滾）
  - `GET  /api/v1/cloudflare/status` — tunnel 連線狀態（connector 是否 up、DNS propagation）
  - `POST /api/v1/cloudflare/rotate-token`
  - `DELETE /api/v1/cloudflare/tunnel` — teardown（刪 tunnel + DNS record）
- [x] 使用 connector **token 模式**（`cloudflared tunnel run --token <T>`）避免 credentials.json 檔案管理
- [x] 整合 `backend/secret_store.py`：token at-rest 加密、UI 只見 fingerprint；寫入 Phase 53 audit_log（`cf_tunnel.provision` / `.rotate` / `.delete`）
- [x] systemd 橋接：sudoers NOPASSWD rule **僅限** `systemctl {start,stop,restart,status} cloudflared.service`；或 container 模式用 sidecar 免 systemd
- [x] 冪等：provision 失敗要清掉已建 tunnel / DNS（plan → apply 兩段式，或 try/rollback 記錄）

**Frontend**
- [x] `components/omnisight/cloudflare-tunnel-setup.tsx`：多步 wizard
  - Step 1 API Token 輸入 + "如何建立 token" 連結（預設 scope 清單）
  - Step 2 驗證 token → 列 account / zone 選單
  - Step 3 填 hostname（預設 `omnisight.<zone>` 與 `api.omnisight.<zone>`）
  - Step 4 Review → 「一鍵 Provision」按鈕
  - Step 5 即時狀態（SSE）：tunnel 建立 ✓ / DNS ✓ / connector online ✓ / health probe ✓
- [x] 既有 tunnel 偵測：顯示現況 + rotate / teardown 按鈕
- [x] 錯誤 UI：token scope 不足時明列缺少哪幾個 permission

**測試**
- [x] Mock CF API（`respx`）涵蓋：invalid token / missing scope / existing tunnel / DNS 已存在 / rate limit / 部分成功回滾
- [x] 整合測試：provision → status → teardown 完整循環
- [O] E2E（Playwright）：wizard 四步流程 + 錯誤路徑

**文件 & 安全**
- [x] `docs/operations/cloudflare_tunnel_wizard.md`：使用者操作步驟 + token scope 建議
- [x] 更新 `docs/operations/deployment.md`：提示 wizard 路徑並保留 CLI 手動模式備援
- [x] 安全檢查：token 不得出現於日誌 / SSE payload / error 訊息

**預估**：~6 day（BE 2 + FE 1.5 + systemd 橋接 1 + audit/rollback/test/docs 1.5）

### B13. FUI Error Pages + Bootstrap UX 優化（#339）— 🔴 優先

> 背景：目前 400/500 系列錯誤頁面使用 Next.js 預設白底黑字，與 FUI 暗色掃描線風格完全不搭。Bootstrap 未完成時 API 回 503 JSON，工程師能看懂，但一般使用者看到「503 Service Unavailable」會以為系統壞了。需要**雙層 UX**：友善的人類訊息 + 可展開的技術詳情。

**Part A — Bootstrap Required 專用頁面**
- [x] `app/setup-required/page.tsx`：全屏 FUI 風格「系統需要完成初始設定」頁面
  - [x] 友善訊息：「歡迎！這是您第一次使用 OmniSight，只需幾分鐘即可完成基礎配置。」
  - [x] CTA 按鈕：「▶ 開始設定」→ 導向 `/bootstrap`
  - [x] 可展開「技術詳情」區塊：顯示 503 JSON 內容 + backend 版本 + 各 gate 狀態（admin_password / llm_provider / cf_tunnel / smoke）
  - [x] FUI 風格：暗色背景 + 掃描線動畫 + neural-grid 元素 + Orbitron 標題字型
- [x] `lib/api.ts` 攔截器：API response `error === "bootstrap_required"` → 不走 error toast → `window.location = "/setup-required"`
- [x] `middleware.ts`（或 `proxy.ts`）：未登入 + 503 bootstrap_required → redirect 到 `/setup-required`（不是 `/login`）

**Part B — FUI 錯誤頁面（400/500 系列）**
- [x] `app/not-found.tsx`（404）：「找不到此頁面」+ 回首頁按鈕 + 展開區：requested URL
- [x] `app/error.tsx`（Client error boundary）：「發生錯誤」+ 重試按鈕 + 展開區：error.message + stack（prod 隱藏 stack）
- [x] `app/global-error.tsx`（Root layout crash）：最外層 fallback，minimal FUI 風格
- [x] `components/omnisight/error-page.tsx`：共用 FUI error 頁面元件，支援：
  - [x] `code`（400/401/403/404/500/502/503）
  - [x] `friendlyMessage`（人類可讀的友善訊息）
  - [x] `technicalDetail`（工程師細節，預設折疊）
  - [x] `actions`（按鈕列表：回首頁 / 登入 / 重試 / 回報問題）
  - [x] FUI 風格：暗色 + 大號 error code + 掃描線 + 微弱脈衝動畫
- [x] 各 HTTP code 的友善訊息對照：
  - [x] 400：「請求格式有誤，請檢查輸入後重試」
  - [x] 401：「登入已過期，請重新登入」+ 登入按鈕
  - [x] 403：「您沒有此頁面的存取權限」+ 聯繫管理員提示
  - [x] 404：「此頁面不存在或已移除」+ 回首頁按鈕
  - [x] 500：「系統發生內部錯誤，我們已收到通知」+ error trace ID
  - [x] 502：「後端服務暫時不可用，請稍後重試」+ 自動重試 countdown
  - [x] 503：「系統維護中」或「設定未完成」（依 error.error 欄位區分）

**Part C — API Error 統一攔截**
- [x] `lib/api.ts` 全域 error handler：
  - [x] 503 `bootstrap_required` → redirect `/setup-required`（不 toast）
  - [x] 401 → redirect `/login?next=<current_path>`（不 toast）
  - [x] 403 → toast warning「權限不足」
  - [x] 500 → toast error「系統錯誤」+ 展開區顯示 trace ID
  - [x] 502/503 其他 → toast warning「服務暫時不可用」+ 自動重試
  - [x] 網路斷線 → toast info「網路連線中斷，嘗試重新連線...」+ retry indicator

- 預估：**2 day**（Error page 元件 0.5d + 7 個 code 頁面 0.5d + API 攔截器 0.5d + Bootstrap UX 0.5d）

### B14. UX 改善 — Bootstrap Wizard + Git Forge 設定 + Integration 頁面優化（#340）

> 背景：deep audit 發現 6 個 UX 問題影響首次使用者和 Git forge 整合使用者。Bootstrap wizard 不包含 Git forge 設定、多 repo token map 無 UI、Gerrit 設定無引導、Integration 頁面欄位過多、Settings 缺 connection test。這些問題不擋上線但會影響使用體驗。

**Part A — Bootstrap Wizard 加入 Git Forge 設定步驟（選填）**
- [x] Bootstrap wizard 在 Step 3（CF Tunnel）後加 Step 3.5「Git Forge 設定（選填）」
- [x] Step 3.5 UI：三選一 tab（GitHub / GitLab / Gerrit）+ 「跳過，稍後設定」按鈕
- [x] GitHub tab：token 輸入 + 「Test Connection」按鈕 → 呼叫 GitHub API 驗證 → 成功顯示 user/org name
- [x] GitLab tab：URL + token 輸入 + 「Test Connection」→ 顯示 GitLab instance version
- [x] Gerrit tab：URL + SSH host/port 輸入 + 「Test SSH」→ 驗證 SSH 連線 + Gerrit version
- [x] 「跳過」不影響 bootstrap finalization（Git forge 非必要 gate）
- 預估：**1 day**（Step 3.5 slot 0.2d + 三-tab UI 0.2d + GitHub test 0.2d + GitLab test 0.1d + Gerrit SSH test 0.2d + skip-non-blocking 0.1d = 1d closed-loop）

**Part B — Multi-repo Token Map UI**
- [x] Settings → Integration → Git 區塊新增「Multiple Instances」展開區
- [x] 「Add GitHub Instance」按鈕 → 表單：hostname（如 `github.enterprise.com`）+ token
- [x] 「Add GitLab Instance」按鈕 → 表單：URL + token
- [x] 列表顯示所有已設定的 instance + 每個有「Test」/「Remove」按鈕
- [x] 儲存時寫入 `OMNISIGHT_GITHUB_TOKEN_MAP` / `OMNISIGHT_GITLAB_TOKEN_MAP`（JSON 格式）
- [x] 後端 API：`GET/PUT /api/v1/settings/git/token-map` → 讀寫 token map（token 遮罩顯示）
- 預估：**1 day**

**Part C — Gerrit Setup Wizard（獨立引導）**
- [x] Settings → Integration → Gerrit 區塊加「Setup Wizard」按鈕 → 開啟 modal 引導
- [x] Step 1：輸入 Gerrit URL + SSH host/port → 「Test Connection」驗證
- [x] Step 2：SSH key 設定引導（顯示公鑰 → 提示貼到 Gerrit Settings → SSH Keys）
- [x] Step 3：`merger-agent-bot` 帳號設定引導（說明如何建 bot 帳號 + 設定 group）
- [x] Step 4：submit-rule 驗證（呼叫 Gerrit API 檢查 project.config 是否含雙簽 +2 rule）
- [x] Step 5：webhook 設定引導（顯示 webhook URL + secret → 提示貼到 Gerrit）
- [x] 完成後寫入 config + 顯示「Gerrit 整合已啟用」
- 預估：**1.5 day**

**Part D — Integration Settings 頁面分 tab**
- [x] 現行 Settings → Integration 所有欄位擠在一頁 → 改為分 tab：
  - [x] Tab 1「Git」：GitHub token + GitLab token/URL + SSH key + Multi-instance map
  - [x] Tab 2「Gerrit」：Gerrit Code Review 全部設定 + Setup Wizard 入口
  - [x] Tab 3「Webhooks」：GitHub/GitLab/Gerrit/Jira webhook secrets + 狀態指示
  - [x] Tab 4「CI/CD」：GitHub Actions / Jenkins / GitLab CI 開關 + 設定
- [x] 每個 tab 頂部顯示 connection status badge（✅ connected / ⚠️ not configured / ❌ error）
- 預估：**0.5 day**

**Part E — Connection Test 按鈕**
- [x] 每個 Git forge 設定區塊加「Test Connection」按鈕
- [x] GitHub：`GET /user` → 顯示帳號名 + scope
- [x] GitLab：`GET /api/v4/version` → 顯示版本
- [x] Gerrit：SSH `gerrit version` → 顯示版本
- [x] Jira：`GET /rest/api/2/serverInfo` → 顯示版本
- [x] 測試結果即時顯示在按鈕旁（✅ / ❌ + 錯誤訊息）
- 預估：**0.5 day**

**B14 總預估**：**4.5 day**

### B15. Skill Lazy Loading — Agent Token 效率優化（#350）

> 背景：目前 agent 每次啟動都把完整 role skill 塞進 system prompt（~50K chars = ~12.5K tokens）。Google Android CLI + Skills 的「Progressive Disclosure」模式證明只送 metadata → 按需載入可減少 70% token 用量。此優化影響所有 agent（不只 Mobile），是橫切面效率改善。
>
> 不碰 O 系列（O0-O10 全部不動）——只改 prompt 組裝層。

- [x] `backend/prompt_registry.py` 新增 `get_skill_metadata(path) -> dict`：回傳 `{name, description, trigger_condition, token_cost}` 不含完整 body
- [x] `backend/prompt_registry.py` 新增 `get_skill_full(path) -> str`：回傳完整 skill content（按需呼叫）
- [x] `backend/prompt_loader.py` `build_system_prompt()` 改為兩階段：
  - [x] Phase 1（啟動時）：只注入所有 skill 的 metadata list（~500 chars total vs 現在 ~50K chars）
  - [x] Phase 2（ReAct loop 中）：依 CATC `domain_context` + 使用者 prompt 自動匹配 → 載入相關 skill 完整內容
- [x] `backend/agents/nodes.py` ReAct loop 加 skill-on-demand 邏輯：agent 輸出 `[LOAD_SKILL: skill_name]` → system 注入完整 skill → 繼續推理
- [x] Feature flag：`OMNISIGHT_SKILL_LOADING=eager|lazy`（預設 `eager` 保持向後相容，切 `lazy` 啟用新模式）
- [x] A/B test 驗證：同一 task 用 eager vs lazy 跑，比較完成率 + token 用量 + response 品質
- [x] Metrics：`skill_load_total{mode}` / `skill_token_saved_total` / `skill_load_latency_ms`
- 預估：**1.5 day**

### B16. Role Skill 強化 — Cherry-pick Agency-Agents + Pattern Upgrade（#353）— 🔴 優先

> 背景：開源 [agency-agents](https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents)（MIT License, 144+ agents）有 3 個 OmniSight 缺乏的設計 pattern（personality-driven / success metrics / per-role critical rules）和 5+ 個我們完全沒有的高價值 role。cherry-pick 補齊後，agent 行為一致性 + 產出品質 + 自我驗收能力都會提升。
>
> 不碰既有程式碼——只新增/修改 `configs/roles/*.md` skill 檔案。

**Part A — Cherry-pick 高價值 Role Skills（缺失補齊）**
- [x] `configs/roles/security-engineer.md`：從 agency-agents 的 Security Engineer 轉換——自動 security review（XSS / injection / auth bypass / CSP 違規 / secret 洩漏偵測）。整合 S2 系列 + PEP Gateway 使用
- [x] `configs/roles/code-reviewer.md`：從 agency-agents 的 Code Reviewer 轉換——通用 code review（非只 merge conflict）。review checklist + 效能 / 可讀性 / 安全性 / 測試覆蓋 4 維度評分。搭配 O6 Merger Agent 作為 pre-review 階段
- [x] `configs/roles/software-architect.md`：架構決策框架——trade-off 分析模板 + ADR（Architecture Decision Record）自動生成 + 技術債評估
- [x] `configs/roles/sre.md`：Site Reliability Engineer——incident response SOP + runbook 自動生成 + SLO/SLI 定義 + post-mortem 模板。搭配 R0 PEP + R1 ChatOps
- [x] `configs/roles/technical-writer.md`：文件生成專家——API docs / user guide / changelog / migration guide 品質標準 + 多語言模板
- [x] `configs/roles/database-optimizer.md`：SQL 效能分析 + index 建議 + query plan 解讀 + slow query 偵測。搭配 G4 PostgreSQL
- 預估：**0.5 day**（轉換 + 調整格式 + 加入 OmniSight-specific context）

**Part B — 現有 19 個 Role Skills Pattern Upgrade**
- [x] 所有 role skill 加入 **Personality section**：從「指令式」（你是 X 專家，請做 Y）升級為「人格式」（你是 X，有 N 年經驗，你的核心信念是 Z，你絕不會做 W）。讓 agent 行為更一致、更少脫軌
- [x] 所有 role skill 加入 **Success Metrics section**：明確定義「什麼叫做成功完成」——例如 frontend-react：Lighthouse ≥ 90 + 0 a11y violation + 0 console error + bundle size ≤ budget
- [x] 所有 role skill 加入 **Critical Rules section**：per-role 不可違反規則（比 CLAUDE.md L1 更精確）——例如 backend-python：never return 500 without logging trace_id、never use f-string SQL
- [x] 所有 role skill 加入 **Trigger Condition**（搭配 B15 Lazy Loading）：定義何時該載入此 skill（例如 `trigger: "使用者提到 React / component / 前端 / UI"`)
- 預估：**2 day**（19 個 role skills × ~1h each，可批次處理）

**Part C — Accessibility Auditor 強化 W5**
- [x] 比對 agency-agents 的 Accessibility Auditor 和現有 `web-a11y.md`
- [x] 補齊缺失項：focus order 驗證流程 + screen reader 測試腳本 + 色彩對比自動計算 + 動態內容 ARIA live region 檢查
- [x] 將強化後的 a11y skill 同時適用於 W（Web）+ V（Visual workspace）+ P（Mobile a11y）
- 預估：**0.5 day**

**B16 總預估**：**3 day**
