gate: deployed-active —— 等 Y3 完成後 super-admin 可實際透過 API 創建並登入、本 row 的 RBAC 矩陣可在 prod 真 super-admin vs 真 tenant-admin 雙 user fixture 下重跑驗證。詳見 HANDOFF.md 該日期 entry。

預估：**2 day**

### Y3. Admin REST API — User / Membership / Invite 生命週期 (#279)

multi-user 的管理面：邀請進 tenant、調整 role、踢人、跨 tenant membership。

- [x] `POST /api/v1/tenants/{tid}/invites` — tenant admin 以上。body: `{email, role}`. 產生 one-time token 並寄 email（先接 `notification_*` 既有通道 / 後續可切 SMTP）。回 `{invite_id, token_plaintext, expires_at}`（token_plaintext 僅此一次）。
- [x] `GET /api/v1/tenants/{tid}/invites?status=pending` — 列當前待接受。 **(2026-04-25)** 1 prod file edit (`backend/routers/tenant_invites.py` +~210 行 `@router.get("/tenants/{tenant_id}/invites")` handler、`LISTABLE_INVITE_STATUSES` / `INVITES_LIST_DEFAULT_LIMIT` / `INVITES_LIST_MAX_LIMIT` 三常數、3 個 read-only SQL 常數 `_LIST_INVITES_PENDING_SQL` + `_LIST_INVITES_BY_STATUS_SQL` + `_LIST_INVITES_ALL_SQL`、`Query` import) + 1 新 test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_invites_list.py` 32 tests / 18 PASS pure-unit / 14 SKIP no-PG)。**Status filter 設計**: 5 值 enum (`pending` / `accepted` / `revoked` / `expired` / `all`) — 前 4 對應 DB CHECK constraint、`all` sentinel 跳過 status WHERE。**`pending` 防腐設計**: 加 `expires_at > $now` 過濾、housekeeping sweep 還沒翻 status 之前 (status='pending' AND wall-clock > expires_at) 的 dead row 不算「待接受」、UX 一致。`accepted/revoked/expired` 直接 verbatim match status 欄；`all` 不 filter。**Response shape**: `{tenant_id, status_filter, count, invites[]}`、每筆 `{invite_id, email, role, status, invited_by, created_at, expires_at}` — **token_hash 刻意 omit**（無 operator value、broaden 任何未來 logging 意外的 leak surface），plaintext 本來就不存（只在 POST 那一刻回 caller 一次）。**Auth model**: 沿用 row 1 的 `_user_can_invite_into` helper、tenant-admin-or-above on target tenant or platform super_admin、member/viewer 收 403（email 列表是 PII、洩漏 admin 招募 pipeline）。**Limit clamps**: default 100 / max 500 (`Query(ge=1, le=500)`、超過收 422)、admin 端用戶端分頁。**ORDER BY**: `created_at DESC, id DESC` 最新優先 + 同秒 stable ordering。**錯誤碼**: 200 success / 403 RBAC / 404 well-formed unknown id / 422 (id pattern fail / unknown status / oversized limit)。**SOP 強制檢查**: (1) Module-global state 稽核合格答案 #1（3 SQL + 5-value tuple + 2 int 都 module-level immutable、每 worker 從同樣 source 推導同樣值）+ #2（DB state 走 PG）+ 不引新 in-memory cache。(2) Read-after-write timing：純 read endpoint、不引入新 write path、`expires_at > $now` filter 用 request-time clock、並發 POST+GET 之下 GET 看不看得見新 row 取決於哪個 transaction 先 commit、是 PG read-committed 標準行為非 regression。(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` → 0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN。**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 新 wheel（FastAPI / asyncpg 既有）、0 schema migration（純讀既有 `tenant_invites` 表）、0 新 env knob、0 docker change、route 已 mounted 確認 `GET /api/v1/tenants/{tenant_id}/invites`。**Drift guard test 七族 32 條**: (a) `LISTABLE_INVITE_STATUSES` exact tuple shape + `INVITES_LIST_DEFAULT_LIMIT` ≤ `INVITES_LIST_MAX_LIMIT`、(b) 3 SQL × 3 sentinel (no-destructive-keyword / `$N` placeholder / no-token_hash) + pending 含 expires_at + all 不 filter status + 全 ORDER BY 統一、(c) router GET endpoint mounted + main app full-prefix mounted + handler 用 `auth.current_user` dependency、(d) HTTP happy 6 條 (default empty / default lists only pending / pending excludes expired-pending / status=accepted / status=all / order-newest-first)、(e) HTTP token_hash leak guard (response field 都不是 64-hex-char) + limit 2 條 (limit=2 截斷 + limit=999999 收 422)、(f) HTTP error 3 條 (malformed id 422 / unknown status 422 / unknown tenant 404)、(g) RBAC 2 條 (tenant member 403 / tenant admin 200) + self-fingerprint guard 1 條。**50/50 ancestor + 18 本 row pure-unit tests 0 regression**（POST row 1 = 50 PASS / 40 SKIP no-PG + GET row 2 = 18 PASS / 14 SKIP no-PG）。Production status: dev-only → next gate deployed-inactive（prod image rebuild 自動拿到、operator 0 動作）。詳見 HANDOFF.md 該日期 entry。
- [x] `DELETE /api/v1/tenants/{tid}/invites/{id}` — 撤銷邀請。 **(2026-04-25)** 1 prod file edit (`backend/routers/tenant_invites.py` +~270 行 `@router.delete("/tenants/{tenant_id}/invites/{invite_id}")` handler、`INVITE_ID_PATTERN` / `_INVITE_ID_RE` / `_is_valid_invite_id` 三個 module-level constants/helpers、2 個 SQL 常數 `_REVOKE_INVITE_SQL` (atomic UPDATE…RETURNING、scope by `id + tenant_id + status='pending'`) + `_FETCH_INVITE_FOR_REVOKE_SQL` (UPDATE-miss 時 disambiguate 用、不 project token_hash)) + 1 新 test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_invites_revoke.py` 24 tests / 11 PASS pure-unit / 13 SKIP no-PG)。**State machine 設計**: `pending → revoked` happy path / `revoked → revoked` idempotent (200 + `already_revoked=True` 給 UI 抑制重複 toast) / `accepted → 409` (membership 已 materialise、admin 改走 membership management) / `expired → 409` (distinct terminal state、不 silent transmute)。**Defence-in-depth**: 持久 `status='pending'` but `expires_at < now` 的 stale-pending row 仍可 revoke——admin 已點下 revoke、housekeeping sweep 還沒翻 status 不該影響 UX。**Atomic check-and-flip**: 用 `UPDATE … WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2 AND status='pending' RETURNING id, ...` 一行原子翻轉避開 SELECT-then-UPDATE TOCTOU；UPDATE-miss 時才 issue 第二支 SELECT 區分「row 不存在」vs「row 存在但非 pending」，common happy path 一次 round-trip。**Tenant scoping**: `WHERE tenant_id=$2` 防止跨 tenant id 猜測攻擊（A tenant 的 invite 不能從 B tenant URL 撤銷）。**Auth model**: 沿用 row 1/2 的 `_user_can_invite_into` helper、tenant-admin-or-above on target tenant or platform super_admin、member/viewer 收 403、RBAC reject 不 silently flip row（tested）。**Response shape**: `{invite_id, tenant_id, status, already_revoked, email, role, created_at, expires_at}` — token_hash 刻意 omit（沿襲 row 2 的 leak surface 防護）。**Audit emission**: `tenant_invite_revoked` action / before `{status: pending}` / after `{status: revoked, email, role}` / actor=actor.email / token_hash 既不在 row 也不在 audit blob、self-test grep `[0-9a-f]{64}` 抓任何 sha256-shaped leak。**錯誤碼**: 200 happy + idempotent / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant 或 well-formed unknown invite / 409 terminal-state guard / 422 (tenant id pattern fail / invite id pattern fail)。**SOP 強制檢查**: (1) Module-global state 稽核合格答案 #1（2 SQL + 1 regex string + 1 compiled regex 都 module-level immutable、每 worker 從同樣 source 推導同樣值）+ #2（DB state 走 PG）+ 不引新 in-memory cache。(2) Read-after-write timing：DELETE 是 write path、用 single-statement UPDATE…RETURNING serialised by PG row-lock、follow-up SELECT only on UPDATE-miss、idempotent revoke 是刻意 design（同 admin 重 click 同樣 terminal state）。(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` → 0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN。**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 新 wheel（FastAPI / asyncpg 既有）、0 schema migration（純改既有 `tenant_invites.status` 欄）、0 新 env knob、0 docker change、route 已 mounted 確認 `DELETE /api/v1/tenants/{tenant_id}/invites/{invite_id}`。**Drift guard test 七族 24 條**: (a) `INVITE_ID_PATTERN` shape + `_is_valid_invite_id` accept POST shape + reject 大小寫 / 太短 / unanchored 7 條、(b) `_REVOKE_INVITE_SQL` pending-only + tenant-scoped + RETURNING + no-token_hash 4 條、(c) `_FETCH_INVITE_FOR_REVOKE_SQL` SELECT-only + no-token_hash + PG-placeholder 4 條（× 2 sql parametrise）、(d) router DELETE endpoint mounted + main app full-prefix mounted + handler 用 `auth.current_user` dependency 3 條、(e) HTTP happy 3 條 (pending→revoked、revoked→already_revoked idem、stale-pending 仍 revocable)、(f) HTTP terminal-state 2 條 (accepted 409、expired 409)、(g) HTTP scope 1 條 (跨 tenant 404 + persisted state untouched)、(h) HTTP error 4 條 (malformed tid 422 / malformed iid 422 / unknown tenant 404 / unknown invite 404)、(i) RBAC 2 條 (tenant member 403 + state untouched / tenant admin 200 + state flipped)、(j) audit chain 1 條 (`tenant_invite_revoked` row + before/after no token_hash + no sha256 hex)、(k) self-fingerprint guard 1 條。**79/79 ancestor + 11 本 row pure-unit tests 0 regression**（POST row 1 = 18 PASS、GET row 2 = 18 PASS、schema = 32 PASS、本 row revoke = 11 PASS pure-unit / 13 SKIP no-PG）。Production status: dev-only → next gate deployed-inactive（prod image rebuild 自動拿到、operator 0 動作）。詳見 HANDOFF.md 該日期 entry。
- [x] `POST /api/v1/invites/{id}/accept` — 未登入 / 已登入皆可呼叫。未登入時同時建 user + 加 membership；已登入時只加 membership（one user → N memberships）。 **(2026-04-25)** 1 prod file edit (`backend/routers/tenant_invites.py` +~440 行 `@router.post("/invites/{invite_id}/accept")` handler、`AcceptInviteRequest` pydantic schema (token min_length=16 max_length=512 + optional name/password)、3 個 SQL 常數 `_FETCH_INVITE_FOR_ACCEPT_SQL` (SELECT…FOR UPDATE 行鎖) + `_MARK_INVITE_ACCEPTED_SQL` (atomic flip) + `_UPSERT_MEMBERSHIP_SQL` (ON CONFLICT (user_id, tenant_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING)、2 個 rate-limit 常數 `ACCEPT_FAIL_RATE_LIMIT_CAP=10` + `ACCEPT_FAIL_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_SECONDS=60.0`) + 1 新 test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_invites_accept.py` 29 tests / 13 PASS pure-unit / 16 SKIP no-PG)。**雙分支設計**: 未登入 (cookie 缺 / session 失效) → users 表查既有 row by lower(email)；無 row 則 `INSERT INTO users` (uid=`u-<token_hex(5)>`、role='viewer' 帳戶層、tenant role 走 invite.role)、有 row 則接管既有 user 帳戶；隨後 INSERT memberships。已登入 → optional-auth 探測拿到 session_user、`session.email lower-strip == invite.email lower-strip` 必須相等 (RFC 5321 mailbox 大小寫敏感、但 real-world MTA 都大小寫無關、所以 normalise 比對；不等則 409 拒絕、不 silently bind invite to wrong account)、不建新 user、僅 upsert membership。**One-user-N-memberships**: `_UPSERT_MEMBERSHIP_SQL` ON CONFLICT (user_id, tenant_id) DO NOTHING、admin 重 invite 同一 user 同一 tenant 不會 bump role (得走 membership management endpoint 改 role)、accept 仍視為成功 (admin 意圖 = user 進來這個 tenant)、response 帶 `already_member=true` 給 UI 抑制重複 toast。同 user 接 N 個不同 tenant 的 invite → 第一次建 user + memberships row、後續每 invite 重用 user + 加 membership row、test 驗證 `test_one_user_can_accept_invites_into_multiple_tenants` 兩 tenants 各拿到 admin / viewer membership。**Optional auth 設計** (重要!): handler 刻意 **不** `Depends(auth.current_user)` — current_user 在 session/strict mode 對 anon caller 直接 raise 401、阻斷 「沒帳戶才要建帳戶」 的合法 flow；改用 inline `auth.get_session(cookie)` + `auth.get_user(sess.user_id)` 探測、failure 視為 anonymous。`test_accept_handler_does_not_depend_on_current_user` 是 contract guard、未來 refactor 加 Depends 會 CI red。**Token verification 安全**: `secrets.compare_digest(sha256(plaintext), invite.token_hash)` 常數時間比對抗 timing oracle、token plaintext 永遠不入 row 也不入 audit、wrong-token → 403。**State machine + replay 防護**: `pending → accepted` 唯一 happy path、`accepted` 重 POST 同 token → 409 (不 200 silently confirm leaked plaintext valid、攻擊者 leak 後 replay 看不出 token 是否 valid)、`revoked` → 409、`expired` (persisted) → 410、`pending AND expires_at < now` (sweep gap) → 410 防腐。**Atomic transaction**: 整段 `SELECT…FOR UPDATE → token check → INSERT users (anon-new) → INSERT memberships → UPDATE invites SET status='accepted'` 包在一個 `async with conn.transaction()` 內、PG row-lock 序列化兩個 anon caller 同 token 的 race、loser 在 FOR UPDATE 阻塞、retry-read 看到 status='accepted' 後 409、不會 double-flip。**Rate-limit 設計**: 失敗 attempts 才扣 token (capacity 10 / window 60s、TODO row 7 literal)、key=`invite_accept_fail:{invite_id}` (per-invite 防穿、不 per-IP 防穿不同 IP)、success 不 decrement (admin 把 link mail 給 recipient、recipient 多裝置 click 不算 abuse)、auth-branch email-mismatch 不扣 token (caller 已 prove session、非 brute force)。429 帶 Retry-After。**錯誤碼**: 200 happy / 403 token mismatch / 404 unknown invite / 409 not-pending or auth email mismatch / 410 expired (persisted or wallclock) / 422 (malformed iid / missing token / token < 16 char) / 429 brute-force shield。**Audit emission**: `tenant_invite_accepted` action / before `{status: pending}` / after `{status: accepted, user_id, role, user_was_created, already_member}` / actor=session.email 或 'anonymous'、token_hash 既不在 row 也不在 blob、test grep `[0-9a-f]{64}` 抓任何 sha256 leak、token plaintext substring 也不入 blob。**SOP 強制檢查**: (1) Module-global state 稽核合格答案 #1 (3 SQL + 2 int 都 module-level immutable、AcceptInviteRequest pydantic class 也是) + #2 (DB state 走 PG、SELECT…FOR UPDATE 行鎖序列化) + rate-limit 走 `backend.rate_limit.get_limiter` (Redis prod / per-replica in-memory dev、qualifying answer #2/#3 已 documented)、不引新 in-memory cache。(2) Read-after-write timing：accept 是 write path、整段 `async with conn.transaction()` + SELECT…FOR UPDATE 序列化 concurrent accept、UPDATE / INSERT 都在 lock 後執行、PG 標準 read-committed 行為。(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` → 0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN (prod file + test file 都 clean)。**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 新 wheel (FastAPI / asyncpg / argon2-cffi 既有)、0 schema migration (純讀 / 寫既有 `tenant_invites` + `users` + `user_tenant_memberships` 三表)、0 新 env knob、0 docker change、route 已 mounted 確認 `POST /api/v1/invites/{invite_id}/accept`。**Drift guard test 11 族 29 條**: (a) `ACCEPT_FAIL_RATE_LIMIT_CAP=10` + `_WINDOW_SECONDS=60.0` 對應 TODO row 7 literal 1 條、(b) `_FETCH_INVITE_FOR_ACCEPT_SQL` `FOR UPDATE` 鎖 + read-only-verb sentinel 1 條 + 必須 project token_hash 1 條 (不像 list / revoke、accept 要驗 hash)、(c) `_MARK_INVITE_ACCEPTED_SQL` set status='accepted' + by-id-only + no-token_hash 1 條、(d) `_UPSERT_MEMBERSHIP_SQL` ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING + RETURNING 1 條、(e) 3 SQL × pg-placeholder fingerprint 3 條 (parametrize)、(f) router endpoint mounted 1 條 + main app full-prefix mounted 1 條、(g) handler **不** depend on auth.current_user 的 contract guard 1 條 (anonymous flow 防止)、(h) AcceptInviteRequest schema 1 條 (token required + min-length 16)、(i) HTTP 整段 (不過 SKIP no-PG): anon-creates-user happy 1 / anon-existing-user happy 1 / multi-tenant-N-memberships 1 / wrong-token 403 1 / replay 409 1 / revoked 409 1 / expired persisted 410 1 / wallclock-expired 410 1 / malformed iid 422 1 / unknown invite 404 1 / missing token 422 1 / authed match-email happy 1 / authed mismatch-email 409 1 / already-member upsert 1 / rate-limit 11 attempts 10×403 + 1×429 1 / audit row no leak 1、(j) self-fingerprint guard 1 條。**108/108 ancestor + 13 本 row pure-unit tests 0 regression** (POST row 1 = 18 PASS、GET row 2 = 18 PASS、DELETE row 3 = 11 PASS、schema = 32 PASS + 各 SKIP no-PG / 本 row accept = 13 PASS pure-unit / 16 SKIP no-PG)。Production status: dev-only → next gate deployed-inactive (prod image rebuild 自動拿到、operator 0 動作)。詳見 HANDOFF.md 該日期 entry。
- [x] `POST /api/v1/admin/super-admins` + `DELETE /.../{user_id}` — 平台維運團隊提升 / 撤銷 super-admin（僅 existing super-admin 可做；首任 super-admin 由 bootstrap wizard 指定）。 **(2026-04-25)** 1 新 prod file (`backend/routers/admin_super_admins.py` ~370 行 `POST /admin/super-admins` + `DELETE /admin/super-admins/{user_id}` handler、`PromoteSuperAdminRequest` pydantic schema、`USER_ID_PATTERN=r"^u-[a-z0-9]{4,64}$"` + `_USER_ID_RE` + `_is_valid_user_id` helper、`DEMOTION_TARGET_ROLE="admin"` const、`_DEMOTE_LOCK_KEY_NAME="omnisight_super_admin_demote"` advisory-lock key、5 SQL constants `_FETCH_USER_SQL` / `_FETCH_USER_FOR_DEMOTE_SQL` (FOR UPDATE 行鎖) / `_PROMOTE_USER_SQL` (UPDATE…WHERE role!='super_admin' RETURNING、idempotent silent no-op) / `_DEMOTE_USER_SQL` (UPDATE…WHERE role='super_admin' RETURNING、parameterised target role) / `_COUNT_OTHER_ENABLED_SUPER_ADMINS_SQL` (excludes target id + enabled=1 + role='super_admin' 三 filter)) + 1 main.py wire-up edit (`from backend.routers import admin_super_admins as _admin_super_admins_router; app.include_router(...)` Y3 row 5 註解) + 1 新 test file (`backend/tests/test_admin_super_admins.py` 59 tests / 43 PASS pure-unit + ASGI / 16 SKIP no-PG)。**Promotion 設計**: `POST /admin/super-admins` body `{user_id}`、idempotent (already_super_admin=True 第二次回 200 + 不 emit audit、UI 抑制重複 toast)、refuse 提升 disabled user 409 (footgun: 不能 login 的 super-admin row 是 typo 或 dormant-account 攻擊)、handler 全程包在 `async with conn.transaction()` 內、`_PROMOTE_USER_SQL` `WHERE id=$1 AND role!='super_admin' RETURNING` 一次原子翻轉避開 SELECT-then-UPDATE TOCTOU、RETURNING None 表示 no-op (race fallback re-read)。**Revoke 設計**: `DELETE /admin/super-admins/{user_id}`、idempotent (already_revoked=True、target 已是 admin/operator/viewer 仍 200 + 不 emit audit)、demoted 一律落 `role='admin'` (一階下、保留 tenant-admin 抓力、移除 platform-tier；`user_tenant_memberships` 不動、那是 per-tenant scope)。**Last-super-admin 防鎖死**: `_COUNT_OTHER_ENABLED_SUPER_ADMINS_SQL` 排除 target id + 限 enabled=1 + role='super_admin'、count==0 → 409 with `would_leave_zero_super_admins=True` + `other_enabled_super_admin_count=0` 給 UI render；disabled super-admin 跳過 floor check (不能 login、不算 live operator)。**並發 demote race 防護**: tx 內第一句 `SELECT pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext('omnisight_super_admin_demote'))` 序列化 platform-wide demote attempts—— A demote B 同時 B demote A 的雙殺場景 (各自獨立 count > 0 → 各自 commit → 0 left) 在 advisory lock 下強制串行、loser 在 lock 阻塞、winner commit 後 loser 重 count 看到 0 → 走 409 branch。**錯誤碼**: 200 happy + idempotent / 403 caller 非 super-admin (`require_super_admin` dependency) / 404 unknown user / 409 promotion-of-disabled-user OR last-super-admin-floor / 422 (id pattern fail / missing user_id field)。**Audit emission**: `super_admin_granted` action / before `{role:<prev>}` / after `{role:'super_admin'}`、`super_admin_revoked` action / before `{role:'super_admin'}` / after `{role:'admin'}`、actor=actor.email；idempotent no-op 不 emit (no state change)、409 last-super-admin 路徑也不 emit (no mutation)、所有 audit blob 都不含 password_hash / oidc_subject / oidc_provider (test 檔有 SQL projection guard)。**SOP 強制檢查**: (1) Module-global state 稽核合格答案 #1 (5 SQL + USER_ID_PATTERN + _USER_ID_RE + DEMOTION_TARGET_ROLE + _DEMOTE_LOCK_KEY_NAME + PromoteSuperAdminRequest 都 module-level immutable、每 worker 從同樣 source 推導同樣值) + #2 (DB state 走 PG、advisory lock 跨 worker 序列化) + 不引新 in-memory cache。(2) Read-after-write timing：兩個 endpoint 都包在 single tx 內、DELETE 額外有 advisory lock 序列化 concurrent demote、POST race surface benign (兩 super-admin 並行 promote 同 target 收斂同 state)。(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` → 0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN (prod + test file 都 clean)。**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 新 wheel (FastAPI / asyncpg / Pydantic 既有)、0 schema migration (純讀寫既有 `users.role` 欄、CHECK constraint 不存在於 DB 層、auth.ROLES 應用層 enforce)、0 新 env knob、0 docker change、route 已 mounted 確認 `POST /api/v1/admin/super-admins` + `DELETE /api/v1/admin/super-admins/{user_id}` 兩 path × method 在 main app routes 表內。**Drift guard test 10 族 59 條**: (a) `USER_ID_PATTERN` shape + `_is_valid_user_id` accept 5 條 / reject 12 條 = 17 條、(b) `PromoteSuperAdminRequest` 1 happy + 7 reject pydantic case = 8 條、(c) `DEMOTION_TARGET_ROLE='admin'` + role_at_least 雙向斷言 1 條、(d) 5 SQL × pg-placeholder fingerprint + users-table-only 5 條 (parametrize) + `_FETCH_USER_FOR_DEMOTE_SQL` 含 FOR UPDATE 1 條 + `_FETCH_USER_SQL` read-only 1 條 + `_PROMOTE_USER_SQL` UPDATE+SET role+WHERE+RETURNING 1 條 + `_DEMOTE_USER_SQL` 同 1 條 + `_COUNT_OTHER_ENABLED_SUPER_ADMINS_SQL` excludes target+enabled=1+super_admin 1 條 + 5 SQL × no-password_hash/oidc 5 條 = 15 條、(e) router POST + DELETE method 1 條 + handler dependency 對 `require_super_admin` 2 條 = 3 條、(f) main app full-prefix mount 1 條、(g) HTTP POST 6 條 PG-skip (happy / idempotent already-super / disabled-409 / 404 / 422 missing+pattern / 403 RBAC)、(h) HTTP DELETE 7 條 PG-skip (happy / idempotent already-not-super / last-super-admin 409 + state-untouched / disabled-super-admin bypasses floor / 404 / 422 / 403 RBAC)、(i) Audit 3 條 PG-skip (granted row + before/after 足跡；硬刪只在 tenant 被刪時 cascade）。 **(2026-04-25)** 1 新 prod file (`backend/routers/tenant_members.py` ~620 行 `GET /tenants/{tid}/members` + `PATCH /tenants/{tid}/members/{user_id}` + `DELETE CHECK、`_TENANT_ADMIN_TIER_ROLES=frozenset({"owner","admin"})` floor-check 集合、`LIST_MEMBERS_DEFAULT_LIMIT=100/MAX=500` 兩限額、`_MEMBERSHIP_DEMOTE_LOCK_PREFIX="omnisight_membership_demote:"` advisory-lock key 前綴 (per-tenant 不 platform-wide、跨 tenant 不互鎖)、9 SQL constants `_FETCH_TENANT_SQL` + `_LIST_MEMBERS_ACTIVE_SQL` (`m.status='active'` filter) + `_LIST_MEMBERS_BY_STATUS_SQL` ($2 status param) + `_LIST_MEMBERS_ALL_SQL` (no status filter) + `_FETCH_MEMBERSHIP_SQL` (read-only) + `_FETCH_MEMBERSHIP_FOR_UPDATE_SQL` (`FOR UPDATE OF m` 行鎖) + `_UPDATE_MEMBERSHIP_ROLE_SQL` + `_UPDATE_MEMBERSHIP_STATUS_SQL` + `_UPDATE_MEMBERSHIP_ROLE_AND_STATUS_SQL` (atomic UPDATE…RETURNING、各參數化) + `_COUNT_OTHER_ACTIVE_ADMINS_SQL` (excludes target id + role IN (owner,admin) + status='active' + u.enabled=1 四 filter)) + 1 main.py wire-up edit (`from backend.routers import tenant_members as _tenant_members_router; app.include_router(...)` Y3 row 6 註解) + 1 新 test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_members.py` 108 tests / 82 PASS pure-unit + ASGI / 26 SKIP no-PG)。**RBAC 設計**: 沿用 row 1/2/3 的 `_user_can_invite_into` 同模式新寫一份 `_user_can_manage_members` (super_admin 直通、否則必須 active membership + role∈{owner,admin}、查 `user_tenant_memberships` 表、不採信 `users.role` cache)、tenant-admin-or-above on target tenant or platform super_admin、member/viewer 收 403、email 列表是 PII 不公開。**Soft-delete 設計**: DELETE 實際是把 status 從 active 翻 suspended、row 保留、audit 足跡保留、follow-up GET 用 status=suspended/all 仍見 row；硬刪只在 Y2 admin tenants DELETE 帶 cascade 才發生 (admin_tenants.py `tenant_deletion_cleanup` 已 chain 過)。**Last-admin floor 防鎖死**: 任何 tenant 永遠至少要有 1 個 active admin-tier (owner|admin) member with `users.enabled=1`、降出 admin-tier 或 suspend 該唯一 member 違反 floor → 409 with `would_leave_zero_admin_members=True` + `other_active_admin_member_count=0` 給 UI render。member/viewer 任何狀態變更不觸發 floor。disabled (users.enabled=0) target 跳過 floor (不能 login、不算 live operator、disabled-admin → suspended 視為 row tidy)。**並發 demote race 防護**: PATCH/DELETE 全程 `async with conn.transaction()` 內第一句 `SELECT pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext('omnisight_membership_demote:' || tenant_id))` 序列化 per-tenant demote attempts。雙殺場景 (admin A suspend admin B 同時 admin B suspend admin A、各自獨立 count > 0 → 各自 commit → 0 left) 在 advisory lock 下強制串行、loser 在 lock 阻塞、winner commit 後 loser 重 SELECT FOR UPDATE 讀到新 state 重 count 看到 0 → 走 409 branch。lock 鍵 per-tenant 不 platform-wide、跨 tenant 不互鎖、減少 contention。**FOR UPDATE OF m**: SELECT 行鎖只鎖 membership 那一 row、JOIN 出來的 users row 不鎖 (避免影響其他 user-level 操作)、PG 8.4+ syntax。**Atomic UPDATE…RETURNING**: 三 UPDATE SQL 各對應 role-only / status-only / role+status 三變化、`RETURNING` 回 post-update row、handler 把 before_state + new_row 同時用於 audit 與 response、單一 source of truth。**Idempotent**: PATCH 相同 state → `no_change=True` + 不 emit audit (no state change)、DELETE 已 suspended → `already_suspended=True` + 不 emit audit、UI 抑制重複 toast。**錯誤碼**: GET 200 / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant / 422 (id pattern fail / unknown status / oversized limit)。PATCH 200 happy + idempotent / 400 不存在 (pydantic 422 替代) / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant 或 unknown membership / 409 last-admin floor / 422 (id pattern fail / unknown enum / empty body)。DELETE 200 happy + idempotent / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant 或 unknown membership / 409 last-admin floor / 422 (id pattern fail)。**Audit emission**: `tenant_member_updated` 統一 action / before `{tenant_id, user_id, role:<prev_role>, status:<prev_status>}` / after `{tenant_id, user_id, role:<new_role>, status:<new_status>}` / actor=actor.email、idempotent no-op + 409 floor-block 都不 emit audit (no state change)、所有 audit blob 都不含 password_hash / oidc_subject / oidc_provider / token_hash (test SQL projection guard 過 9 SQL × no-secret-leak parametrize)、entity_kind='tenant_membership' 跟 entity_id=user_id 對齊 audit 慣例、tenant_id 落在 before/after dict 內。**Response shape**: 三 endpoint 都回 `{tenant_id, user_id, role, status, ..., email, name, user_enabled, joined_at, last_active_at}`；GET 額外有 `{tenant_id, status_filter, count, members:[…]}` 包裝。**SOP 強制檢查**: (1) Module-global state 稽核合格答案 #1 (9 SQL + 4 enum/set + 4 pattern/regex + 3 limit/lock 常數 + PatchMemberRequest pydantic class 都 module-level immutable、每 worker 從同樣 source 推導同樣值) + #2 (DB state 走 PG、advisory lock per-tenant 序列化跨 worker、FOR UPDATE 行鎖序列化同 tenant 內 demote) + 不引新 in-memory cache。(2) Read-after-write timing：GET 純 read 不引入新 write path、PATCH/DELETE 都 single tx 內完成 SELECT FOR UPDATE → floor count → UPDATE…RETURNING、advisory lock 額外序列化 concurrent demote、PG read-committed 標準行為、無新 timing 可見 regression。(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` → 0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN (prod + test file 都 clean)。**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 新 wheel (FastAPI / asyncpg / Pydantic 既有)、0 schema migration (純讀寫既有 `user_tenant_memberships` + `users` + `tenants` 三表、CHECK constraint 已在 alembic 0032 強制 role + status enum)、0 新 env knob、0 docker change、route 已 mounted 確認 `GET /api/v1/tenants/{tenant_id}/members` + `PATCH /api/v1/tenants/{tenant_id}/members/{user_id}` + `DELETE /api/v1/tenants/{tenant_id}/members/{user_id}` 三 path × method 在 main app routes 表內。**Drift guard test 11 族 108 條**: (a) `TENANT_ID_PATTERN` + `USER_ID_PATTERN` + 兩 validator accept/reject parametrize 22 條、(b) 4 enum/set 常數 shape match alembic 0032 CHECK + DEFAULT/MAX 關係 + lock prefix shape 6 條、(c) `PatchMemberRequest` 1 happy role-only + 1 happy status-only + 1 happy both + 1 reject empty + 4 reject bad role + 4 reject bad status = 11 條、(d) 9 SQL × pg-placeholder fingerprint + no-secret-leak parametrize 18 條 + `_FETCH_TENANT_SQL` read-only 1 條 + active-only filter 1 條 + all-no-filter 1 條 + by-status param 1 條 + FOR UPDATE 鎖 1 條 + 非鎖版本 1 條 + 三 UPDATE atomic+RETURNING 3 條 + count 排 target+filter active+enabled+admin-tier 1 條 = 28 條、(e) 3 router endpoint 路徑 1 條 + 3 handler depend on member-role 403)、(h) PATCH HTTP 9 條 PG-skip (role-change happy / status-change happy / no-change idem / empty-body 422 / last-admin demote 409 / last-admin suspend 409 / with-other-admin OK / unknown _tenant_projects_router; app.include_router(...)` Y4 row 1 註解) + 1 新 test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_projects_create.py` 41 tests / 28 PASS pure-unit + ASGI / 13 SKIP no-PG)。**RBAC 設計**: 沿用 row Y3 invite/member 同模式新寫 `_user_can_create_project_in` (super_admin 直通、否則必須 active membership + role∈{owner,admin}、查 `user_tenant_memberships`、不採信 `users.role` cache)、tenant-admin-or-above on target tenant or platform super_admin、member/viewer 收 403。**Slug uniqueness**: 走 alembic 0033 `UNIQUE (tenant_id, product_line, slug)` 複合索引、`ON CONFLICT … DO NOTHING RETURNING None` 表示 dup、handler 跑第二支 SELECT 撈 existing_project_id 寫進 409 body、UI 可直接導航既存 row。**跨 product_line 同 slug 允許**: `(tenant_id="t-x", product_line="embedded", slug="isp-tuning")` 與 `(tenant_id="t-x", product_line="web", slug="isp-tuning")` 共存 (test 檔 `test_post_project_same_slug_different_product_line_allowed` 驗證)、產品線命名空間獨立。**Parent linkage 驗證**: 兩階段 — (1) pydantic regex 拒非 `p-*` shape (422)、(2) handler SELECT id+tenant_id from projects、`row is None` → 422 + detail "does not exist"、`row.tenant_id != tenant_id` → 422 + 帶 `parent_tenant_id` 給 UI 解釋；同 tenant parent 走過 → 落 row、test `test_post_project_parent_same_tenant_creates_subtree` 證明 sub-project 樹可建。**Cross-tenant guard 設計**: 用 422 而非 403——caller 在 target tenant 上是合法 admin (RBAC 已通過)、parent 屬不同 tenant 是 input validation 錯不是權限錯、422 表「body 引用了無效的 parent_id」。**Atomic INSERT 設計**: 單條 `INSERT … ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING` 解決「插入或偵測重複」原子性問題、避開 SELECT-then-INSERT TOCTOU、兩個 admin 同時 create 同 slug 必恰一個成功 (RETURNING populated) 一個 None (走 409 branch)、PG `UNIQUE` constraint 自帶序列化。**Project ID shape**: `p-{secrets.token_hex(8)}` = 16 hex chars after `p-` 共 18 chars total、64-bit entropy、生命週期 collision probability 可忽略、與 `inv-{token_hex(8)}` / `u-{token_hex(...)}` 既有慣例對齊、self-validate `_is_valid_project_id` accept。**FK 防護 created_by**: anonymous (open mode) / `apikey:*` 沒有對應 `users.id` row、resolver 落 `NULL`、避免 FK violation；正常認證 user 落 actor.id、配合 alembic 0033 `ON DELETE SET NULL` (project 比 user 長壽、user 帳號刪除不該牽連 project)。**錯誤碼**: 201 happy / 403 RBAC (tenant member 非 admin) / 404 unknown tenant / 409 slug 重複於 (tenant, product_line) 含 existing_project_id / 422 (malformed tenant_id pattern / unknown product_line / unknown plan / negative budget / oversize name / oversize slug / malformed parent_id pattern / parent 不存在 / parent 跨 tenant)。**Audit emission**: `tenant_project_created` action / before=None / after dict 含 project_id+tenant_id+product_line+name+slug+parent_id+plan_override+disk_budget_bytes+created_by 9 欄、entity_kind='project' entity_id=project_id、actor=actor.email、idempotent (no idempotent path on POST create — 重 POST 同 slug 走 409 + 不 emit audit)、所有 audit blob 都不含 password_hash / oidc_subject / token_hash (test SQL projection guard + audit row blob grep)。**SOP 強制檢查**: (1) Module-global state 稽核合格答案 #1 (4 SQL + 3 regex string + 3 compiled regex + 2 enum tuple + 1 frozenset 都 module-level immutable、每 worker 從同樣 source 推導同樣值) + #2 (DB state 走 PG、UNIQUE constraint + ON CONFLICT 跨 worker 序列化) + 不引新 in-memory cache。(2) Read-after-write timing：POST 是 write path、單 INSERT…RETURNING 在 transactional context 內、parent existence 檢查 → INSERT 之間 race 由 FK ON DELETE SET NULL 容錯 (parent 在 probe 後 INSERT 前被刪、INSERT 仍落 row 但 parent_id=NULL、符合 migration 0033 documented semantics)、無新 timing 可見 regression。(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` → prod file 0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN、test file 兩個命中都在 docstring 中討論 fingerprint pattern 自身 (跟 row Y3 既有 routers 一樣設計、不掃 test file 自身)。**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 新 wheel (FastAPI / asyncpg / Pydantic 既有)、0 schema migration (純讀寫既有 alembic 0033 `projects` 表 + `tenants` + `user_tenant_memberships`)、0 新 env knob、0 docker change、route 已 mounted 確認 `POST /api/v1/tenants/{tenant_id}/projects` 在 main app routes 表內。**Drift-guard 8 族 41 條**: (a) `TENANT_ID_PATTERN` 與 admin_tenants 對齊 1 條 + `PRODUCT_LINE_ENUM` literal 1 條 + `PROJECT_PLAN_ENUM` literal 1 條 + `PROJECT_ID_PATTERN` shape 1 條 + `SLUG_PATTERN` shape 1 條 + `_is_valid_tenant_id` accept/reject parametrize 12 條 + `_is_valid_project_id` accept/reject parametrize 14 條 + `_mint_project_id` 50 唯一 + 16-hex-shape + self-validate 1 條 = 32 條、(b) `CreateProjectRequest` happy 1 + 5 product_line accept + 7 product_line reject + 7 slug reject + 5 slug accept + name empty/oversize 2 + plan accept 4 + plan reject 5 + budget reject neg / accept 0/positive 2 + parent_id reject 5 = 43 條、(c) 4 SQL × pg-placeholder + no-secret-leak parametrize 8 條 + INSERT atomic+ON CONFLICT+RETURNING shape 1 條 + FETCH_TENANT read-only 1 條 + FETCH_PARENT projects tenant_id 1 條 = 11 條、(d) router POST endpoint 1 條 + handler 用 auth.current_user dependency 1 條 = 2 條、(e) main app full-prefix mount 1 條、(f) HTTP 9 條 PG-skip (happy / optional fields / slug-dup 409 + existing_project_id / 跨 product_line 同 slug 允許 / unknown tenant 404 / malformed tid 422 / unknown product_line 422 / parent 不存在 422 / parent 跨 tenant 422 / parent 同 tenant sub-tree)、(g) RBAC 2 條 PG-skip (member 403 + 0 row inserted / admin 201)、(h) Audit 1 條 PG-skip (tenant_project_created row + after_json grep 64-hex-char no leak)、(i) self-fingerprint guard 1 條。**ancestor 353/353 known-infra teardown errors)。**Visibility 三段設計（per TODO row + alembic 0034 默認解析）**: super_admin → 看所有；tenant membership role∈{owner,admin} → 看所有 (0034 docstring 明文：admin/owner membership 在每個 project 上預設視為 contributor)；role∈{member,viewer} → 只看有 explicit project_members row 的 project (0034 docstring：member/viewer fall through to no project access by default)；無 active membership 且非 super_admin → 403 (不啟動 list 行為，避免 project ids/slugs 洩漏 product portfolio)；suspended membership row 同 no membership 走 403 path (沿 Y3 row 6 一致)。**Single SQL template + 3 archived branches**: 把 visibility 收斂成一個 boolean 算在 handler 端、SQL 用 `$2::bool OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM project_members ...)` 短路——full-visibility caller PG planner 直接跳過 per-row probe；explicit-only caller 走一次 EXISTS。三 archived 分支因為是 column shape 不是 value (`IS NULL` / `IS NOT NULL` / no filter) 不能 parameterise、所以三條 SQL constant；其他 placeholder 排版完全齊一、handler 一條 args 列傳給三條 SQL 任一條。**Product_line 過濾**: `($4::text IS NULL OR p.product_line = $4)` 同一 SQL 處理「不過濾」與「過濾」、不需另開 SQL constant。**錯誤碼**: 200 happy / 403 (no membership + not super_admin / suspended) / 404 unknown tenant / 422 (malformed tid pattern / unknown product_line / unknown archived value / oversize limit / zero limit)。**Pagination**: `?limit=` ≤ 500、預設 100、與 Y3 invite-list 一致 shape；`?archived=` 預設 false (live only)、`true` archived only、`all` both。**No audit emit**: read endpoint 不寫 audit log。**SOP 強制檢查**: (1) Module-global state 稽核合格答案 #1 (4 常數 + 3 SQL + 1 frozenset 都 module-level immutable、每 worker 同源推導同值) + #2 (DB state 走 PG、tenant_id filter + project_members EXISTS 跨 worker 正確)、不引新 in-memory cache、不引新 module-global state。(2) Read-after-write timing：純讀 endpoint 無 write path、concurrent POST + GET 走 PG read-committed 標準行為、無 timing-visible regression。(3) - [x] `PATCH /api/v1/tenants/{tid}/projects/{pid}` — 改 name / plan_override / budget / parent_id（做 sub-project 樹）。 **(2026-04-25)** 1 prod file edit (`backend/routers/tenant_projects.py` +~330 行 `@router.patch("/tenants/{tenant_id}/projects/{project_id}")` handler、`PatchProjectRequest` pydantic schema (4 nullable Optional fields + `model_fields_set` tri-state semantics)、4 module-level constants `_PROJECT_PATCH_LOCK_PREFIX="omnisight_project_patch:"` (per-tenant advisory lock 不 platform-wide) + `_PROJECT_PATCH_ALLOWED_MEMBERSHIP_ROLES=frozenset({"owner","admin"})` 重用 POST/GET 同 RBAC + `_PATCHABLE_PROJECT_FIELDS=frozenset({"name","plan_override","disk_budget_bytes","parent_id"})` whitelist drift-guard、3 SQL constants `_FETCH_PROJECT_FOR_UPDATE_SQL` (`FOR UPDATE` row lock + tenant-id-scoped) + `_CYCLE_DETECT_SQL` (recursive CTE 從 proposed parent 走 ancestor chain 找 patched project) + `_PATCH_PROJECT_SQL` (single static `UPDATE … SET col = CASE WHEN $flag THEN $val::type ELSE col END` 4 列各帶 boolean flag pair + `RETURNING` 全 12 欄)) + 1 新 test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_projects_patch.py` ~1030 行 / 64 tests / 41 PASS pure-unit + ASGI / 23 SKIP no-PG / 64 PASS HTTP-PG bodies + 21 known-infra teardown errors)。**Tri-state JSON-PATCH semantics**: 透過 Pydantic v2 `model_fields_set` 區分三種 caller intent — (1) field 缺席 → 不動該欄、(2) field 在但非 null → set 為該值、(3) field 在但 explicit JSON null → 清空該欄 (plan_override/budget 變回繼承 tenant、parent_id 變回 top-level)。`name` field 的 explicit null 在 handler 層拒 422 (column NOT NULL、CHECK length>=1)。**Single static UPDATE SQL**: 用 `CASE WHEN $flag THEN $val::cast ELSE col END` per column 模式、每欄帶 boolean flag pair、handler 端 set boolean flag = (field name in model_fields_set)、不需動態 SQL 不需 N×多版本 UPDATE constants、且能精確表達 "set to NULL" 與 "leave alone" 兩種 distinct intent。Cast `::text/::integer` 必要因 asyncpg 從首次非 NULL use 推 type、首 call 全 NULL 會找不到 type info。**Cycle detection**: PATCH 比 POST 多了「re-parent existing project」surface、需要 cycle check 避免 A→B、B.parent_id=A 變 A↔B。`_CYCLE_DETECT_SQL` 用 `WITH RECURSIVE ancestor_chain` 從 proposed new parent 起走 `parent_id` chain (`WHERE c.parent_id IS NOT NULL` 終止 recursive arm 在 root)、若 patched project_id 在 chain 中出現 → 422 cycle detected。Self-loop (`parent_id == project_id`) 在 handler 早期 short-circuit 422 (省 CTE round-trip)。**Concurrent re-parent race 防護**: Worker A patch P1.parent=P2 同時 Worker B patch P2.parent=P1、各自獨立 cycle probe 都過、commit 後 cycle 已成。txn 內第一句 `SELECT pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext('omnisight_project_patch:' || tenant_id))` 序列化 per-tenant re-parent attempts、loser 阻塞、winner commit 後 loser 重 cycle probe 看到新 state、走 422 branch。lock per-tenant (跨 tenant 不互鎖)；只有 `parent_id ∈ set_fields` 時 take lock (name/plan/budget patches 不需要、減 contention)。**FOR UPDATE row lock**: `_FETCH_PROJECT_FOR_UPDATE_SQL` 在 patch txn 內 SELECT…FOR UPDATE 鎖該 project row、concurrent same-row PATCH 阻塞而非 race on stale state、UPDATE 後 RETURNING None 不可能 (FOR UPDATE 同 txn 內保證 row 存在 + assert 文件化)。**RBAC**: `_user_can_create_project_in` 重用 row 1 邏輯 — super_admin 直通 / 否則 active membership ∈ {owner,admin} on target tenant、member/viewer 收 403、不採信 `users.role` cache。**Cross-tenant parent guard**: 若 `parent_id` set non-null、handler 兩階段驗證 — (1) `_FETCH_PARENT_PROJECT_SQL` 探親、`row is None` → 422 unknown parent、(2) `parent_row.tenant_id != tenant_id` → 422 cross-tenant + 帶 `parent_tenant_id` 給 UI。同 row 1 設計、422 (input validation) 不 403 (caller 在 target tenant 上是合法 admin、parent_id 是 body 錯不是權限錯)。**Tenant-scoped UPDATE**: `WHERE id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2` defence-in-depth、stolen project_id pointed at wrong tenant → 404 (caller 不該知道 row 在他處)、`UPDATE` 同樣 scope (即使 SELECT 過了 tenant guard、UPDATE WHERE 仍 tenant-scope 為冗餘保護)。**No-change short-circuit**: handler 比較 set_fields 每一欄 vs cur_row[same field]、若全等 → 200 with `no_change=True` + 不發 UPDATE + 不發 audit、UI 抑制重複 toast。**錯誤碼**: 200 happy + idempotent (no_change=True) / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant or unknown project in this tenant (cross-tenant project 也 404 防洩漏) / 422 (malformed tid/pid pattern / empty body / explicit name=null / parent_id == project_id / parent_id 不存在 / parent 跨 tenant / cycle)。**Audit emission**: `tenant_project_updated` action / before+after dict 各帶 `tenant_id`+`project_id`+each changed field 的 prev/new 值 (僅變更欄、保持 audit blob 緊湊、無 secret 洩漏)、actor=actor.email、entity_kind='project' entity_id=project_id、no_change → 不 emit audit (no state change)、cycle/422/404/403 → 不 emit audit (no mutation)、所有 audit blob 都不含 password_hash / oidc_subject / token_hash (test SQL projection guard + audit blob grep)。**SOP 強制檢查**: (1) Module-global state 稽核合格答案 #1 (4 const + 3 SQL + PatchProjectRequest pydantic class 都 module-level immutable、每 worker 從同樣 source 推導同樣值) + #2 (DB state 走 PG、advisory lock per-tenant 跨 worker 序列化、FOR UPDATE 行鎖序列化同 row、recursive CTE 在 PG transaction 內 atomic) + 不引新 in-memory cache。(2) Read-after-write timing：PATCH 是 write path、整段 `async with conn.transaction()` + FOR UPDATE 行鎖 + 條件 advisory lock 序列化 concurrent re-parent、cycle probe → UPDATE 同 txn 內 atomic、PG read-committed + FOR UPDATE 標準行為、無新 timing 可見 regression。(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` → prod file 0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN、test file 兩個命中都在 docstring 中討論 fingerprint pattern 自身 (跟 row 1/2 既有設計、不掃 test file 自身)。**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 新 wheel (FastAPI / asyncpg / Pydantic 既有)、0 schema migration (純讀寫既有 alembic 0033 `projects` 表、CHECK constraint 已 enforce)、0 新 env knob、0 docker change、route 已 mounted 確認 `PATCH /api/v1/tenants/{tenant_id}/projects/{project_id}` 在 main app routes 表內 (route `_tenant_projects_router` include 已涵蓋 row 1/2/3 全部 endpoint)。**Drift-guard 7 族 64 條**: (a) `_PROJECT_PATCH_LOCK_PREFIX` shape 1 條 + `_PROJECT_PATCH_ALLOWED_MEMBERSHIP_ROLES` admin-tier-only 1 條 + `_PATCHABLE_PROJECT_FIELDS` schema-alignment + TODO-row-literal 2 條 = 4 條、(b) `PatchProjectRequest` happy 4 + 4 plan accept + 4 plan reject + 5 parent_id reject + name oversize/empty 2 + budget reject neg + accept zero/big 2 + minimum-body parses 1 + name-only 1 + explicit-null in fields_set 1 = 24 條、(c) 3 SQL × pg-placeholder 3 條 + 3 SQL × no-secret-leak 3 條 + FOR UPDATE on fetch 1 條 + tenant-id scope on fetch 1 條 + recursive CTE shape 1 條 + CTE terminate at root 1 條 + UPDATE CASE WHEN flag pattern 1 條 + UPDATE RETURNING all cols 1 條 + UPDATE tenant-scope 1 條 = 13 條、(d) router PATCH endpoint 1 條 + handler depend on auth.current_user 1 條 = 2 條、(e) main app full-prefix mount PATCH 1 條、(f) HTTP 19 條 PG-skip (rename happy / set plan / set budget / clear plan via null / clear budget via null / clear parent via null / re-parent to sibling / multi-field / no-change idempotent + no audit / unknown tenant 404 / unknown project 404 / cross-tenant project 404 / malformed tid 422 / malformed pid 422 / empty body 422 / explicit name=null 422 / self-loop 422 / unknown parent 422 / cross-tenant parent 422 / cycle via descendant 422 + state untouched / direct descendant cycle 422 / non-admin member 403 + state untouched)、(g) Audit 1 條 PG-skip (tenant_project_updated row + before/after with changed fields + secret-leak grep)、(h) self-fingerprint guard 1 條。**Pure-unit ancestor 440 PASS / 198 SKIP / 0 FAIL** (test_tenant_projects_patch 64 + 108 + test_admin_tenants_create 6 + test_projects_schema 33 + test_project_members_schema 34 = 578 collected — pure-unit pass with PG, 64 HTTP-PG bodies all PASS plus the 21 documented teardown-only `_PROJECT_GC_RETENTION_DAYS_DEFAULT=90` + `_PROJECT_ARCHIVE_ALLOWED_MEMBERSHIP_ROLES=frozenset({"owner","admin"})`、4 SQL constants `_ARCHIVE_PROJECT_SQL` (`SET archived_at = to_char(now() at time zone 'utc', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE … AND archived_at IS NULL RETURNING …` 12 欄) + `_RESTORE_PROJECT_SQL` (`SET archived_at = NULL WHERE … AND archived_at IS NOT NULL RETURNING …`) + `_LIST_GC_ELIGIBLE_PROJECTS_SQL` (`WHERE archived_at IS NOT NULL AND archived_at < $1 ORDER BY archived_at ASC, id ASC`) + `_DELETE_PROJECT_SQL` (`DELETE FROM projects WHERE id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2`)) + 1 main.py wire-up comment edit (Y4 row 1+2+3 → row 1+2+3+4) + 1 新 test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_projects_archive.py` ~870 行 / 51 tests / 33 PASS pure-unit + ASGI / 18 SKIP no-PG / 51 PASS HTTP-PG bodies + 16 known-infra teardown errors)。**Idempotent precondition pattern**: archive `UPDATE … WHERE … AND archived_at IS NULL` 與 restore `UPDATE … WHERE … AND archived_at IS NOT NULL` 用 SQL 層 precondition 取代 handler 的 if-else state 比較——RETURNING None 一律對應「狀態已是目標值」(no_change=True 200 + 不發 audit)、handler 不需先 SELECT 再決定要不要 UPDATE、避免 SELECT-then-UPDATE TOCTOU。404 vs no_change 的區分仍走 SELECT FOR UPDATE：cur_row=None → 404 (well-formed id but no row in this tenant)、cur_row 存在但 RETURNING None → 200 no_change。**Idempotent design decision**: 沒選 409 / 422 「already archived」是因為 (a) archive 本質是 desired-state 操作、`POST X 兩次 = state X` 與 RESTful 慣例對齊 (b) UI 雙擊或網路重試該收 200 而非 error toast (c) 與 row 3 PATCH 的 no_change=True 慣例對齊。**90-day retention config**: env knob `OMNISIGHT_PROJECT_GC_RETENTION_DAYS`、`_resolve_archive_retention_days()` per-call 讀 env (不是 module-cache、operator 編 .env 後重啟 uvicorn 立刻生效、tests 用 monkeypatch.setenv override)、空值 / 非整數 / ≤0 一律 fallback 到 90 並 log warning (best-effort knob 不 gate)、預設 90 天精確匹配 TODO row literal。**Background GC helper signature**: `async def gc_archived_projects(*, retention_days: int|None = None, now_utc=None) -> list[dict]` — 兩 kw 參數都可注入、`retention_days=None` 走 env-resolver、`now_utc=None` 走 `datetime.utcnow()`；test 用 `retention_days=3` + `_force_archived_at(pool, pid, "5 days ago")` 證明 override 路徑、不需 sleep。`retention_days ≤ 0` 走 `raise ValueError` 防 misconfigured cron 一鍵刪光所有 archive。**Cutoff text comparison**: cutoff 在 Python 端算成 `"YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS"` UTC 字串、SQL 用 `archived_at < $1` 純文字比較——format 是 lexicographically sortable、與 row schema (alembic 0033 `archived_at TEXT`) + create_at 同 format 對齊；不需要 PG `INTERVAL` 算術、不需要 timezone 轉換 (`archived_at` 寫入時已經 `now() at time zone 'utc'`)、不需要 dialect-specific date 函式 (跟 main.py `_startup_cleanup` 同模式)。**Per-row delete ≠ single transaction**: GC tick 不把所有 DELETE 包在一個大 txn (數千 row 的話會 pin table)、改成 enumerate → loop per-row {transaction(DELETE + audit)}、concurrent GC ticks 跨 worker 雙刪同 row 透過 `DELETE … RETURNING command tag` 偵測 (loser 看到 `"DELETE 0"` skip audit)、accuracy 由 `DELETE … WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2` 的 row identity 保證 (CASCADE 在 `project_members.project_id` ON DELETE CASCADE / `projects.parent_id` ON DELETE SET NULL 在 alembic 0033/0034 已 documented)。**Billing event surface**: 沒新建 `billing.emit` 模組、沿用既有 `audit.log` pipeline 發 `tenant_project_billing_gc` action — 理由：(1) audit chain 已有 tamper-evident + tenant-scoped + time-ordered + queryable + per-tenant 序列化 advisory lock、(2) 等真正 billing pipeline 落地時 migration 是一條 `audit.query(action='tenant_project_billing_gc')` projection、(3) 不引新 module 不引新表 不引新 wheel、(4) accountants 立刻可在 audit_log 跑 SQL reconcile freed quota。Audit row 帶 `tenant_id` + `project_id` + `disk_budget_bytes` + `archived_at` + `retention_days` + `gc_at` 6 欄、actor=`system:gc`、entity_kind='project'。**GC 跨 tenant_context 處理**: GC helper 跑在 background (cron / manual ops) 沒 request context、`db_context._tenant_var` 預設 None、`tenant_insert_value()` fallback 到 `t-default` 會把所有 billing event 路到錯 chain。helper 在 audit.log 之前先 `set_tenant_id(tid)` pin 到 deleted project 的 tenant、try/finally 還原 prev_tid (覆蓋層 nested call 不污染 outer context)、test `test_gc_helper_emits_billing_audit_event` 直接驗證 `audit_log.tenant_id == tid` 不是 't-default'。**RBAC**: 沿用 row 1/2/3 同 `_user_can_create_project_in` (super_admin 直通 / 否則 active membership ∈ {owner,admin})、member/viewer 收 403、archive 與 restore 雙端共用同一 role gate (test `test_archive_non_admin_member_gets_403` 同時跑兩 endpoint 驗一致)。**Cross-tenant 隔離**: `WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2` defence-in-depth 在 archive / restore / GC delete 三處都 enforce、stolen project_id pointed at wrong tenant → 404 (defence in depth) + 0 row affected (test `test_archive_cross_tenant_project_returns_404` 驗證 tenant A row archived_at 仍 None)。**錯誤碼**: 200 happy + idempotent (no_change=True) / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant or unknown project in this tenant / 422 (malformed tid/pid pattern)。**SOP 強制檢查**: (1) Module-global state 稽核合格答案 #1 (3 const + 4 SQL + helper functions 都 module-level immutable、每 worker 從同樣 source 推導同樣值；env knob per-call 解析非快取) + #2 (DB state 走 PG、archive/restore precondition WHERE 序列化同 row state 改變、GC 用 row identity 序列化) + 不引新 in-memory cache。(2) Read-after-write timing：archive/restore 是單條 UPDATE…RETURNING with precondition、PG 行鎖序列化、RETURNING None unambiguously signals「狀態 already 是 target」、無新 timing-visible regression；GC 不在事務內、loop per-row delete 容錯 concurrent GC tick。(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` → prod file 0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN。**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 新 wheel (FastAPI / asyncpg 既有)、0 schema migration (純讀寫既有 alembic 0033 `projects.archived_at` 欄)、新增 1 env knob `OMNISIGHT_PROJECT_GC_RETENTION_DAYS` (operator 可選、不設 fallback 90、不影響 dev/CI 預設行為)、0 docker change、route 已 mounted 確認 `POST /api/v1/tenants/{tid}/projects/{pid}/archive` + `.../restore` 在 main app routes 表內 (route `_tenant_projects_router` include 已涵蓋 row 1/2/3/4 全部 endpoint)。**Drift-guard 8 族 51 條**: (a) `_PROJECT_GC_RETENTION_DAYS_ENV` env name 1 條 + `_PROJECT_GC_RETENTION_DAYS_DEFAULT=90` 1 條 + `_PROJECT_ARCHIVE_ALLOWED_MEMBERSHIP_ROLES` admin-tier-only 1 條 = 3 條、(b) retention-resolver default fallback / env override / parametrize 4 invalid fallback / whitespace strip / 4 條共 8 條、(c) 4 SQL × pg-placeholder 4 條 + 4 SQL × no-secret-leak 4 條 + archive precondition `archived_at IS NULL` 1 條 + archive tenant-scope 1 條 + restore precondition `archived_at IS NOT NULL` 1 條 + restore tenant-scope 1 條 + GC enumeration cutoff filter 1 條 + DELETE tenant-scope 1 條 = 14 條、(d) router 兩 endpoint expose 1 條 (parametrize 2) + handler depend on auth.current_user 1 條 (parametrize 2) = 4 條、(e) main app full-prefix mount archive + restore 1 條 = 1 條、(f) HTTP 12 條 PG-skip (archive happy + sets archived_at + format match / archive idempotent no_change + no audit / restore happy + clears archived_at + persisted / restore idempotent on live + no audit / 404 unknown tenant / 404 unknown project / 404 cross-tenant project + state untouched / 422 malformed tenant / 422 malformed project / 422 malformed restore project / 403 non-admin member archive+restore + state untouched)、(g) Audit 2 條 PG-skip (archive audit row + secret-leak grep + retention_days 出現 / restore audit row)、(h) GC helper 5 條 PG-skip (deletes only past-cutoff + recent untouched / leaves live alone with 1d retention / emits billing audit event + tenant_id pinned + retention_days/gc_at 出現 / restore after GC = 404 / retention_days override fires shorter window) + 1 條 pure (rejects 0/-1/-90 ValueError parametrize 3 條) = 8 條、(i) self-fingerprint guard 1 條。**Pure-unit ancestor 491 PASS / 216 SKIP / 0 FAIL** (test_tenant_projects_archive 51 + test_tenant_projects_patch 64 + test_tenant_projects_list 49 + test_tenant_projects_create 75 + test_admin_super_admins 59 + test_tenant_invites_create 47 + _list 32 + _revoke 24 + _accept 29 + _rate_limits 18 + test_tenant_members 108 + test_admin_tenants_create 6 + test_projects_schema 33 + test_project_members_schema 34 = 629 collected — pure-unit pass with PG, 51 HTTP-PG bodies all PASS plus 16 documented teardown-only errors same shape as Y4 row 2/3 既有記錄 db_pool fixture ordering)。Production status: dev-only → next gate deployed-inactive (prod image rebuild 自動拿到、operator 0 動作；GC 背景 helper 需 operator 寫 cron / scheduled task pinged it - 仍是 dev-only API 階段、cron wiring 屬下個 milestone)。詳見 HANDOFF.md 該日期 entry。

(`backend/routers/tenant_projects.py` +~580 行 row 5 區塊：3 handler `@router.post("/tenants/{tid}/projects/{pid}/members")` + `@router.patch(".../members/{user_id}")` + `@router.delete(".../members/{user_id}")`、helper `_user_can_manage_project_members(user, tenant_id, project_id)` (super_admin / 租戶 admin+owner / project owner 三段 RBAC)、2 pydantic schema (`CreateProjectMemberRequest` body=`{user_id pattern + role Literal 3-value}` + `PatchProjectMemberRequest` body=`{role Literal 3-value}` 必填)、3 module-level constants `PROJECT_MEMBER_ROLE_ENUM=("owner","contributor","viewer")` (對齊 alembic 0034 DB CHECK) + `USER_ID_PATTERN=r"^u-[a-z0-9]{4,64}$"` (與 admin_super_admins / tenant_members 同源) + `_PROJECT_MEMBER_MGMT_TENANT_ROLES=frozenset({"owner","admin"})` + `_PROJECT_MEMBER_MGMT_PROJECT_ROLES=frozenset({"owner"})`、6 SQL constants `_FETCH_PROJECT_TENANT_SCOPED_SQL` + `_FETCH_TARGET_USER_TENANT_MEMBERSHIP_SQL` + `_FETCH_PROJECT_MEMBER_SQL` + `_INSERT_PROJECT_MEMBER_SQL` (`ON CONFLICT (user_id, project_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING …`) + `_UPDATE_PROJECT_MEMBER_ROLE_SQL` + `_DELETE_PROJECT_MEMBER_SQL` (`DELETE … RETURNING` 補抓 prior role 給 audit blob)) + 1 main.py wire-up comment edit (Y4 row 1+2+3+4 → row 1+2+3+4+5) + 1 新 test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_projects_members.py` ~1090 行 / 102 tests / 72 PASS pure-unit + ASGI / 30 SKIP no-PG)。**RBAC 三段 (super_admin / tenant admin+owner / project owner)**: 沿用 row 1/2/3/4 的 `_user_can_create_project_in` 邏輯外加 project-owner 分支——`_PROJECT_MEMBER_MGMT_PROJECT_ROLES=frozenset({"owner"})` 只認 project owner，contributor/viewer 仍 403；理由是讓 project owner 真正 mean something（否則只是 contributor 的別名）、又不過度授權（contributor/viewer 不該能改 roster）。member/viewer 收 403、suspended membership = no membership、不採信 `users.role` cache。**Soft-delete via row delete**: alembic 0034 docstring 明文「Suspension at the project layer is achieved by deleting the row, which falls back to the tenant default.」——project_members 沒有 status column；DELETE 是 soft-delete 等價、刪後 fall through 到 tenant default (admin/owner→contributor、member/viewer→無 access)。Idempotent: 第二次 DELETE 走 `RETURNING None` → 200 + already_removed=True + 不發 audit、與 row 4 archive/restore 同 desire-state idempotent posture。**Tenant-membership precondition for target user**: POST 強制 target user 必須有 active tenant membership 在同 tenant、否則 422 + `"invite the user first"`hint；`status="suspended"` 同樣拒 422 + 帶 `tenant_membership_status=suspended`。理由：project_member row dangling at 沒 tenant 身份的 user 是 meaningless state（auth surface 先看 tenant membership 再看 project capability）；POST 的 promote-existing-member 與 `POST /tenants/{tid}/invites` 的 invite-new-user 兩個 surface 故意分離。**錯誤碼**: 201 happy / 200 happy + idempotent (PATCH no_change + DELETE already_removed) / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant or unknown project in this tenant or unknown project_member row (PATCH only — DELETE 走 idempotent) / 409 dup (POST only) + `existing_role` 給 UI 決定 PATCH / DELETE / 422 (malformed tid/pid/uid pattern / unknown role / target user 沒 tenant membership / target user tenant membership suspended)。**Tenant-scoped project lookup**: `_FETCH_PROJECT_TENANT_SCOPED_SQL = "SELECT id FROM projects WHERE id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2"` defence-in-depth、stolen project_id pointed at wrong tenant → 404 (caller 不該知道 row 在他處)、test `test_post_member_cross_tenant_project_returns_404` 驗證 tenant A row 的 roster 不被 tenant B 路徑改動。**ON CONFLICT 原子性**: POST 用 `INSERT … ON CONFLICT (user_id, project_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING` 一條 SQL 解決 insert-or-detect-duplicate、避開 SELECT-then-INSERT TOCTOU、兩個 admin 同時 POST 同 target 必恰一個成功 (RETURNING populated) 一個 None (走 409 branch + 補 SELECT 撈 existing_role)。PG 複合 PK `(user_id, project_id)` 自帶序列化。**PATCH no_change short-circuit**: handler 比較 `cur_row["role"] == body.role` → 200 + no_change=True + 不發 UPDATE + 不發 audit、UI 抑制重複 toast、與 row 3 同模式。PATCH 的 RETURNING None branch 不可能但仍 documented (concurrent DELETE → 404 + concurrent-mutation hint)。**DELETE … RETURNING 補抓 prior role**: 一條 DELETE 帶 RETURNING 同步給 audit blob `before["role"]` + 區分「row already gone」(RETURNING None → already_removed) vs 「row 真的被刪」、不需先 SELECT。**Audit emission**: 3 action — `tenant_project_member_added` / `_updated` / `_removed`、entity_kind='project_member' entity_id=`f"{project_id}:{user_id}"` (複合 PK 文字化)、actor=actor.email、idempotent / no_change / 422 / 404 / 403 / 409 全部不 emit audit (無 mutation)、所有 audit blob 不含 password_hash / oidc_subject / token_hash (test SQL projection guard + audit blob grep)。**SOP 強制檢查**: (1) Module-global state 稽核合格答案 #1 (3 const + 1 frozenset×2 + 6 SQL + 2 pydantic class 都 module-level immutable、每 worker 從同樣 source 推導同樣值) + #2 (DB state 走 PG、INSERT…ON CONFLICT 跨 worker 序列化、UPDATE/DELETE 行鎖序列化) + 不引新 in-memory cache。(2) Read-after-write timing：POST 是單條 INSERT atomic；PATCH 是 SELECT → UPDATE 不在 txn 內 (FOR UPDATE 不必要、role flip 是 single-column write、concurrent PATCH 透過 PG 行鎖序列化)；DELETE 是單條 DELETE … RETURNING、PG 行鎖序列化；無新 timing-visible regression。(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` → prod file 0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN、test file 0 命中 (跟 row 4 同模式)。**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 新 wheel (FastAPI / asyncpg / Pydantic 既有)、0 schema migration (純讀寫既有 alembic 0034 `project_members` 表 + 0033 `projects` + 0032 `user_tenant_memberships` + `tenants`)、0 新 env knob、0 docker change、route 已 mounted 確認 3 endpoint 在 main app routes 表內 (route `_tenant_projects_router` include 已涵蓋 row 1/2/3/4/5 全部 8 endpoint)。**Drift-guard 9 族 102 條**: (a) `PROJECT_MEMBER_ROLE_ENUM` literal 1 條 + 與 tenant role enum distinct 1 條 + `USER_ID_PATTERN` 與 admin_super_admins 對齊 1 條 + `_PROJECT_MEMBER_MGMT_TENANT_ROLES` admin-tier-only 1 條 + `_PROJECT_MEMBER_MGMT_PROJECT_ROLES` owner-only 1 條 + `_is_valid_user_id` accept/reject parametrize 12 條 = 17 條、(b) `CreateProjectMemberRequest` happy 1 + 3 role accept + 6 role reject + 7 user_id reject + 2 missing-field = 19 條、`PatchProjectMemberRequest` happy 1 + 3 role accept + 6 role reject + 1 missing-field = 11 條、(c) 6 SQL × pg-placeholder 6 條 + 6 SQL × no-secret-leak 6 條 + tenant-scoped project lookup 1 條 + target user tenant membership lookup shape 1 條 + INSERT atomic + ON CONFLICT + RETURNING shape 1 條 + UPDATE role atomic + RETURNING 1 條 + DELETE RETURNING shape 1 條 + read-only project_member fetch 1 條 = 18 條、(d) router 3 endpoint expose 1 條 + 3 handler depend on auth.current_user (parametrize 3) = 4 條、(e) main app full-prefix mount 3 endpoint 1 條、(f) HTTP POST 11 條 PG-skip (happy + 3 role accept parametrize / dup 409 + existing_role / unknown tenant 404 / unknown project 404 / cross-tenant project 404 + roster untouched / target without tenant membership 422 / target with suspended membership 422 / malformed tid 422 / malformed pid 422 / malformed uid 422 / unknown role 422)、HTTP PATCH 5 條 PG-skip (role change happy / no_change idempotent + no audit / unknown membership 404 + POST hint / unknown role 422 / malformed uid 422)、HTTP DELETE 5 條 PG-skip (remove + falls back to tenant default / idempotent already_removed + no audit / unknown tenant 404 / unknown project 404 / malformed uid 422)、(g) RBAC 3 條 PG-skip (non-tenant-member 403 across all 3 endpoints + roster untouched / project owner may manage / project contributor cannot manage)、(h) Audit 3 條 PG-skip (POST audit row + secret-leak grep + role 出現 / PATCH audit row + before/after role 轉變 / DELETE audit row + prior role 在 before)、(i) self-fingerprint guard 1 條。**Pure-unit ancestor 545 PASS / 246 SKIP / 0 FAIL** (test_tenant_projects_members 102 + test_tenant_projects_archive 51 + test_tenant_projects_patch 64 + test_tenant_projects_list 49 + test_tenant_projects_create 75 + test_project_members_schema 34 = 731 collected pure-unit pass; HTTP-PG path SKIP no PG locally — handler 完整 ASGI mount 過 + 全 SQL drift-guard 過 + RBAC 與 idempotent 邏輯 pure-unit cover 過)。Production `PROJECT_SHARE_ROLE_ENUM=("viewer","contributor")` (對齊 alembic 0036 DB CHECK、刻意排除 `owner`) + `SHARE_ID_PATTERN=r"^psh-[a-z0-9]{4,64}$"` + `EXPIRES_AT_FORMAT="%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"` + `_PROJECT_SHARE_CREATE_ALLOWED_MEMBERSHIP_ROLES=frozenset({"owner","admin"})`、helpers `_is_valid_share_id` + `_mint_share_id` (`psh-{token_hex(8)}` 16 hex chars 64-bit entropy) + `_validate_expires_at` (parse + future-strict guard) + `_row_to_project_share_dict`、2 SQL constants `_INSERT_PROJECT_SHARE_SQL` (`ON CONFLICT (project_id, guest_tenant_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING …` 7 欄) + `_FETCH_EXISTING_PROJECT_SHARE_SQL` (read-only、409 dup body 體現 existing_share_id+existing_role 用)；既有 `_FETCH_TENANT_SQL` 雙用做 owner-tenant 與 guest-tenant existence probe；既有 `_FETCH_PROJECT_TENANT_SCOPED_SQL` 重用做 cross-tenant project guard) + 1 main.py wire-up 註解編輯 (Y4 row 1+2+3+4+5 → row 1+2+3+4+5+6) + 1 新 test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_projects_shares.py` ~880 行 / 79 tests / 60 PASS pure-unit + ASGI / 19 SKIP no-PG)。**Role enum 排除 owner**: alembic 0036 docstring 明文「A guest tenant fundamentally cannot own a project belonging to a different tenant」、`PROJECT_SHARE_ROLE_ENUM=("viewer","contributor")` 對齊 DB CHECK、test `test_project_share_role_enum_excludes_owner` + `test_project_share_role_enum_distinct_from_project_member_enum` 鎖此差異 (與 `PROJECT_MEMBER_ROLE_ENUM=("owner","contributor","viewer")` 形成對比)。**Self-share 422 guard**: `body.guest_tenant_id == tenant_id` → 422 (caller body validation 不是 RBAC) + detail `"cannot share a project to itself"` + 帶 owning tenant 與 guest_tenant_id 對比、test `test_post_share_self_share_returns_422` 直接驗證。**`expires_at` 三段語義**: NULL = permanent share (granter 顯式選 no TTL)；非 NULL 必須 (a) parse 為 `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS` UTC 否則 422 + `"format"` reason、(b) 嚴格 > `datetime.utcnow()` 否則 422 + `"future"` reason — already-expired share 無意義；同 ISO 字典序與 `created_at`/`archived_at` 對齊、Y4 row 4 archive cutoff 同 pattern。**Atomic ON CONFLICT**: POST 用 `INSERT … ON CONFLICT (project_id, guest_tenant_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING` 一條 SQL 解決 insert-or-detect-duplicate、避開 SELECT-then-INSERT TOCTOU、兩個 admin 同時 POST 同 (project, guest) 必恰一個成功 (RETURNING populated) 一個 None (走 409 branch + 補 SELECT 撈 existing_share_id+existing_role)。PG 複合 UNIQUE `(project_id, guest_tenant_id)` 自帶序列化。**Tenant-scoped project lookup (cross-tenant 隔離)**: 重用 row 5 既有 `_FETCH_PROJECT_TENANT_SCOPED_SQL = "SELECT id FROM projects WHERE id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2"` defence-in-depth、stolen project_id pointed at wrong tenant ⇒ 404 (caller 不該知道 row 在他處)、test `test_post_share_cross_tenant_project_returns_404` 驗證 tenant A 的 project 不被 tenant B 路徑改動 + roster 0 row。**RBAC**: 沿用 row 1/2/3/4 的 `_user_can_create_project_in` (super_admin 直通 / 否則 active membership ∈ {owner,admin})、member/viewer 收 403、project owner 不在 gate 內 (share 是 tenant-level operation、改 project 對外 exposure surface、只 tenant admin 該決定)、test owner gates = 15 assertions、對齊 alembic 0034 fall-through table — tenant admin/owner 預設等價 contributor、tenant member/viewer 無 project access），加碼一個 secrets-router 拒 contributor 的 semantic test archive×oversell 四步往返：(1) free 計畫 LLM 1M cap、project A 占滿 cap → (2) POST B half-cap → 409 oversell + dimension=llm_budget_tokens → (3) archive A → POST B half-cap → 201 (archived rows 不計入 SUM) → (4) restore A → POST C quarter-cap → 409 (A+B 已滿、C 必 overshoot) + 持久 row 數仍是 2 個 live。**Family D** 跨 tenant share RBAC — host 有 P1+P2、guest tenant 經 `POST /shares` 拿到 P1 contributor 權限；guest tenant admin (在 guest 是 admin、在 host 沒有 membership) 呼叫 `GET /api/v1/tenants/{host}/projects` 必須 403 (share row 是 per-project 授權、不買 tenant-list visibility)、呼叫 `GET /api/v1/tenants/{guest}/projects` 200 但 response 不含 host 任何 project；tighter pin: guest admin 對 host 的 PATCH/archive 也都 403、project state 完全不變 (name+archived_at unchanged)。**Family E** budget 超售防線 — PATCH oversell 必 leave row state untouched (name + llm_budget_tokens 兩欄都不變、與 422 同 posture)；PATCH `{"llm_budget_tokens": null}` 清除 reservation 後、subsequent POST B half-cap 必 succeed (跨 row 3 PATCH × row 7 oversell × row 1 POST 三屬合成)；409 body shape 完整鎖 `detail/tenant_id/tenant_plan/dimension/tenant_total/existing_sum_of_other_projects/proposed_value/would_be_total` 8 欄 (UI 直接從這些欄位渲染 toast)。**Pure-unit gate 覆蓋；`test_secrets_router_is_tenant_admin_scoped_not_project_scoped` 鎖 4 個 `/secrets` handlers 都 depend on `auth.require_admin` (不是 `require_project_member`) — Family B 的「contributor 不能改 secrets」narrative 全靠這個 invariant。**Schema int4 workaround**: alembic 0033 把 `disk_budget_bytes` / `llm_budget_tokens` 都宣告為 `INTEGER` (int4 / max 2.1B)、free 計畫 disk cap = 10 GiB > int4 max → live PG 插 在 live PG、屬 row 7 既知 latent bug、不在 row 8 scope 內修)。oversell guard 邏輯本身對 disk 與 llm 兩 dimension 是同一份 code path、family C/E 用 LLM tokens 完整 cover oversell semantics。**Helpers**: ### Y5. Query layer: ContextVar expansion + authorisation middleware (#281)

把 I2 的 `current_tenant_id()` context var 擴充成 `(tenant_id, project_id, user_role)` 三元，讓 RLS + RBAC 自動生效。

- [x] `backend/db_context.py`：加 `current_project_id()` / `current_user_role()` 兩個 ContextVar。
- [x] 新 dependency `require_project_member(project_id, min_role="viewer")`：路由從 URL path 取 project_id，驗 user 對 project 的有效 role（project_members 直接查 + tenant membership fallback）。 **(2026-04-26)** 1 prod file edit (`backend/auth.py` +~210 行 — 新 factory `require_project_member(min_role="viewer")` + helper `project_role_at_least(have, need)` + 2 module-level constants `PROJECT_ROLE_HIERARCHY=("viewer","contributor","owner")` (對齊 alembic 0034 DB CHECK) + `_PROJECT_ROLE_RANK` (rank dict) + `_TENANT_ROLE_DEFAULT_PROJECT_ROLE={"owner":"contributor","admin":"contributor"}` (對齊 alembic 0034 docstring「admin/owner tenant role → contributor on every project」、刻意不放 member/viewer key) + 4 SQL constants `_FETCH_PROJECT_TENANT_SCOPED_FOR_AUTHZ_SQL` (`WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`、cross-tenant 隔離 defence-in-depth) + `_FETCH_PROJECT_BY_ID_FOR_AUTHZ_SQL` (`WHERE id=$1`、僅當路由不含 `{tenant_id}` 時用、tenant 從 row 取) + `_FETCH_PROJECT_MEMBER_FOR_AUTHZ_SQL` (project_members 直接查) + `_FETCH_TENANT_MEMBERSHIP_FOR_AUTHZ_SQL` (fallback 查 + status/role 投影)) + 1 新 test file (`backend/tests/test_require_project_member.py` ~590 行 / 61 tests / 51 PASS pure-unit + ASGI / 10 SKIP no-PG)。**Resolution chain (cheap → expensive)**: (1) `super_admin` short-circuit (`role_at_least(user.role, "super_admin")`) → pin contextvar `current_user_role="super_admin"` + 不查任何 DB row、跨 project audit 由 Y5 row 3 listener 配 `X-Admin-Cross-Project: 1` header 處理。(2) `project_members` 直接查 (`(user_id, project_id)` 複合 PK) → 用 row 的 role。(3) Tenant membership fallback (`(user_id, tenant_id)`) → status='active' + role∈{owner,admin} → contributor; member/viewer/suspended → None → 403。**`request.path_params` 而非 dep signature 取 tenant_id**: 因為 dep signature 寫 `tenant_id: str = None` 會讓 FastAPI 在 `/api/v1/projects/{project_id}/...`(無 tenant_id) 路由綁到 query string、誤觸發；改讀 `request.path_params.get("tenant_id")` 在 nested 路由 `/tenants/{tid}/projects/{pid}/...` 自動取到、flat 路由 fallback 到 None 走 by-id query。**錯誤碼**: 200 happy / 403 (authenticated 但 effective role < min_role 或無 membership) / 404 (project 不存在、或當路由含 `{tenant_id}` 但 project 屬另一 tenant — by intent 不洩漏 cross-tenant 存在性)。**ContextVar 三元 pin**: 通過後 `set_tenant_id(resolved_tenant_id)` + `set_project_id(project_id)` + `set_user_role(effective_role)` 三 ContextVar 同步 set、Y5 row 3 SQLAlchemy listener 將讀此三元自動注入 `WHERE tenant_id=:t AND (project_id=:p OR project_id IS NULL)`。**Factory ValueError**: `min_role` 不在 `("viewer","contributor","owner")` → ValueError、`require_role`-style fail-fast 在 import 時抓 typo (`min_role="admin"` 是常見誤用)。**SOP 強制檢查**: (1) Module-global state 稽核合格答案 #1 (`PROJECT_ROLE_HIERARCHY` 1 tuple + `_PROJECT_ROLE_RANK` dict + `_TENANT_ROLE_DEFAULT_PROJECT_ROLE` dict + 4 SQL strings 都 module-level immutable、每 worker 從同樣 source 推導同樣值) + asyncpg pool 透過 PG 共享、不引新 in-memory cache + 不引新 module-global mutable state。(2) Read-after-write timing：3 條 single-row read (project, project_members, tenant_membership)、無寫、無 transaction、concurrent membership mutation 走自己的 PG 行鎖序列化。(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` → 我新加的程式碼 0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN (auth.py 既有 line 404 docstring 提到 SQLite `DEFAULT (datetime('now'))` 是 pre-Y5 doc citation、test self-fingerprint guard 已 mask 過)。**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 新 wheel (FastAPI / asyncpg 既有)、0 schema migration (純讀既有 alembic 0033 `projects` + 0034 `project_members` + 0032 `user_tenant_memberships`)、0 新 env knob、0 docker change、無新 router / 無新 endpoint exposed (這是 dependency 給 Y5 row 3+ / Y6+ 路由用、目前未 wired 到任何 prod endpoint，所以是 deployed-inactive — 程式碼存在但無生產路徑呼叫它)。**Drift-guard 6 族 61 條**: (a) `PROJECT_ROLE_HIERARCHY` enum 1 + 鋻 rank order 1 + `_TENANT_ROLE_DEFAULT_PROJECT_ROLE` table 1 + distinct from tenant role enum 1 = 4 條、(b) `project_role_at_least` rank-compare parametrize 9 條 + unknown-have parametrize 5 條 + unknown-need parametrize 4 條 = 18 條、(c) 4 SQL × pg-placeholder 4 條 + 4 SQL × no-secret-leak 4 條 + 4 SQL × read-only 4 條 + tenant-scoped filter shape 1 條 + by-id shape 1 條 + project_member shape 1 條 + tenant_membership shape 1 條 = 16 條、(d) factory default min_role 1 條 + 3 role accept parametrize 3 條 + 7 bad-role reject parametrize 7 條 + dep signature shape 1 條 = 12 條、(e) HTTP super_admin bypass + ContextVar pin 1 條 + project owner pass owner gate 1 條 + project viewer fail contributor gate 1 條 + tenant admin fallback to contributor pass viewer/contributor fail owner 1 條 + tenant member 403 1 條 + suspended tenant membership blocks fallback 1 條 + project_member overrides tenant default 1 條 + unknown project 404 1 條 + cross-tenant project 404 1 條 + ContextVars pinned after pass 1 條 = 10 條、(f) self-fingerprint guard 1 條。**Pure-unit 51 PASS / 10 SKIP no-PG / 0 FAIL** (test_require_project_member 61 collected — pure-unit pass with no PG; HTTP-PG path SKIP no PG locally — dependency 完整 mounted on tiny FastAPI test app + 全 SQL drift-guard 過 + role hierarchy 與 fallback 邏輯 pure-unit cover 過)。Production status: dev-only → next gate deployed-inactive (prod image rebuild 自動拿到、operator 0 動作；下一個 row 是 Y5 row 3 — SQLAlchemy listener wire 此 contextvar 三元自動注入 SELECT/INSERT)。詳見 HANDOFF.md 該日期 entry。
- [x] SQLAlchemy event listener（沿 I2 擴充）：所有 SELECT 自動注入 `WHERE tenant_id = :current AND (project_id = :current OR project_id IS NULL)`；INSERT 自動填 `(tenant_id, project_id) = (current, current)`. **(2026-04-26)** 1 新 prod file (`backend/db_rls_listener.py` ~510 行 — 純 additive、無 cross-cutting import) + 1 新 test file (`backend/tests/test_db_rls_listener.py` ~640 行 / 52 tests / 52 PASS pure-unit + in-memory SQLite e2e / 0 FAIL)。**核心 API**: `apply_project_rls(query, *, tenant_id=None, project_id=None, user_role=None) -> RewrittenQuery`（kwargs 預設 `None` → 從 `backend.db_context` ContextVars 讀 — Y5 row 2 `require_project_member` pin 三元 → 此處消費）。**SELECT 重寫**: 偵測 `SELECT … FROM <table>`、若 table 在 allowlist 則 AND-merge `WHERE tenant_id = '<t>' AND (project_id = '<p>' OR project_id IS NULL)`；既有 WHERE 之後 AND-merge、無 WHERE 則插在 `GROUP BY/HAVING/ORDER BY/LIMIT/OFFSET/;` 之前；schema-qualified (`public.artifacts`) + quoted (`"artifacts"` / `` `artifacts` `` / `[artifacts]`) + multiline 都 normalised 成 lowercase bare identifier 對齊 allowlist。**INSERT auto-fill**: 偵測 `INSERT INTO <table> (cols) VALUES (...)`、解析 column list、若 caller 沒名 `tenant_id`/`project_id` 則加進 column list 並對 *每個* VALUES tuple 加 literal（multi-row INSERT 全 tuple walk、paren-depth + string-literal aware；caller 名兩欄 → noop bypass `caller_named_columns` 不靜默覆寫 cross-tenant copy / alembic backfill）。**Allowlist (2 frozenset)**: `PROJECT_SCOPED_TABLES = {workflow_runs, debug_findings, decision_rules, event_log, artifacts, user_preferences}` 嚴格對齊 alembic 0038 `_TABLES_NEEDING_PROJECT_ID` (drift guard test 動態 import alembic 模組 frozenset 等號鎖)；`TENANT_ONLY_SCOPED_TABLES = {audit_log, users}` 對齊 alembic 0012 `TABLES_NEEDING_TENANT_ID` − 0038（audit_log 鏈完整性契約 + users 平台層、刻意 tenant-only）；catalog 表（tenants/projects/project_members/api_keys/sessions/...）一律 `bypass_reason="table_unscoped"` pass-through 防 require_project_member 自身查 projects 時無限遞迴。**4 個 bypass reason 常數**: `super_admin` (BYPASS_ROLES frozenset 含 super_admin、未來可擴 platform_auditor)、`no_tenant_set` (ContextVar None → 寧可不 rewrite 也不要插 `tenant_id='None'` 靜默 mask 全空)、`table_unscoped`、`not_rewritable` (UPDATE/DELETE/CTE/BEGIN/COMMIT 不在本 row 契約裡 — Y5 row 4+ 處理)。**Tenant-only 表跳 project clause**: `audit_log` 沒 project_id 欄、若強加 `project_id='p'` 會 SQL error；listener 對 `TENANT_ONLY_SCOPED_TABLES` 只加 tenant filter。**Project-scoped 表 + project_id 為 None**: tenant-wide route（admin REST 不指定 project）→ 只加 tenant filter、不加 project clause（避免 `'None'` 字面值 zero out）。**SQLAlchemy `before_cursor_execute` event hook**: `install_project_rls_listener(bind)` lazy-import `sqlalchemy.event` 後 register `retval=True` listener、e2e in-memory SQLite test 6 條鎖契約: tenant+project 隔離 / cross-project same-tenant 隔離 / cross-tenant 隔離 / NULL project_id legacy fallthrough / super_admin 全表可見 / no-context pass-through 全表可見 / INSERT auto-fill 後同 ctx 看得到 + cross-project ctx 看不到（不是 NULL fallthrough、是真填 `project_id='p-a-default'`）。**Module-global state 稽核合格答案 #1**: 2 frozenset + 5 SQL/regex constants + 4 bypass token strings 全 module-level immutable、每 uvicorn worker 從同樣 source（alembic 0012/0038）推導同樣值；ContextVars per-asyncio-Task state 不跨 worker；無新 in-memory cache / 無 module-global mutable。**Read-after-write timing**: listener 純 SQL string rewriter、不讀不寫 DB、不改 tx serialisation 屬性；與既有 rule)；其餘 → 403。**ContextVar 三元 pin on success**: `set_tenant_id(resolved_tenant_id)` + `set_project_id(header_pid)` + `set_user_role(effective_role)`、Y5 row 3 SQLAlchemy listener 從這三元自動注入 SELECT ### Y6. Workspace Hierarchy Refactor + GC + Quota (#282)

把前面 audit 列出來的所有 workspace 坑（扁平路徑、無 tenant 分組、無 GC、無 quota、同名 collision）一次收掉。

- [x] 新路徑：`{OMNISIGHT_WORKSPACE_ROOT}/{tenant_id}/{product_line}/{project_id}/{agent_id}/{repo_url_hash}/` 五層階層。`repo_url_hash = sha256(remote_url)[:16]` 防同 agent clone 多個同名 repo 互相覆蓋。
- [x] `backend/config.py` 新增：`OMNISIGHT_WORKSPACE_ROOT`（預設 `./data/workspaces`）/ `OMNISIGHT_WORKSPACE_QUOTA_MB_DEFAULT`.
- [x] `backend/workspace.py` 改 `provision()` 接受 `tenant_id / product_line / project_id / agent_id / remote_url` 五個參數，從 ContextVar 預設讀取。舊 callsite 相容 shim 標記 deprecated 並記 log（下個 release 刪）。
- [x] Migration script：把現有 `.agent_workspaces/{agent_id}/` 都搬到 `data/workspaces/t-default/default/default/{agent_id}/legacy-hash/`；保留 symlink 一個 release，之後移除。
- [x] 納入 tenant_quota：`backend/tenant_quota.py` 的 `check_hard_quota()` 把 `data/workspaces/{tid}/**` 計入 `used_bytes`；workspace 寫入時自動 enforce。
- [x] 背景 GC reaper：新 `backend/workspace_gc.py` async task（lifespan 啟動），每 1 小時跑一次：
  - 找 `mtime > keep_recent_workspaces_stale_days`（config 預設 30）且對應 agent 已結束的 workspace，移到 `_trash/` 暫存 7 天後硬刪。
  - 尊重 `.git/index.lock` + active agent registry，進行中的不刪。
  - 遇 tenant hard quota 超標時，優先刪舊的 workspace（per-project LRU）而非新的。
  - emit SSE `workspace_gc` 事件 + audit 記錄。
- [x] 同名 repo collision：clone 前算 `url_hash`，不同 url 走不同 sub-dir；避免 repo-name 相同時互相覆蓋（audit 找到的 bug）。 **(2026-04-26)** 1 prod file edit (`backend/workspace.py` +~28 行 — 在 `_workspace_path_for()` 解析後、`git worktree add`/`git clone` 之前加 explicit pre-clone `logger.info("Workspace url_hash assigned (Y6 #282 collision-safety leaf): agent=%s remote=%s url_hash=%s leaf=%s")` 把 `(agent_id, source, url_hash, leaf)` 4 元組寫進 operator log；同步把 SSE `workspace.provisioned` event detail 加上 `url_hash=<hex>` token 讓 dashboard 訂閱者不必 scrape full path) + 1 新 test 檔 (`backend/tests/test_y6_row7_url_hash_collision.py` ~440 行 / 14 tests / 14 PASS pure-unit / 0 SKIP — 不需 PG，real local git repos under `tmp_path`)。**收尾的是 audit bug 的明確證據鏈** — row 1 的 5-layer hierarchy 把 `sha256(remote_url)[:16]` 放進 leaf 位置已經實現了「不同 URL 走不同 sub-dir」的核心防護，row 7 再加一層 (a) **pre-clone 顯式 log** 把「在 clone 前算 hash」這個契約變成 operator 可 grep 的證據（forensic 讀者能從 hash leaf 反查產生它的 URL）+ (b) **dedicated 9 群組 / 14 測試** 把 audit bug 的 regression scenario 全鎖死。**Module-global state 稽核** 合格答案 #1：新加的 `_resolved_url_hash` 是函式區域變數、`_repo_url_hash()` 是純函式從同樣 source 推導同樣 sha256；無 cache、無 module-level mutable state；多 worker 從同 URL 推導同 hash 不需協調。**Read-after-write timing 稽核** 不適用：純 logging + 一個欄位 append 到既有 SSE detail string、無 read-after-write contract、無 transaction、無 PG。**Pre-commit `_SELF_REPO_HASH` sentinel)；(2) 1 條 audit-bug regression — 3 個同 basename `foo` 不同 URL (team_a/team_b/team_c) 各自獨立 leaf 不互相覆蓋且 README 內容無 cross-contamination；(3) 5 條 URL pair distinct hash parametrize `OMNISIGHT_WORKSPACE_ROOT` 有效。 **(2026-04-26)** 1 新 test 檔 (`backend/tests/test_y6_row8_workspace_matrix.py` ~720 行 / 17 tests / 17 PASS pure-unit / 0 SKIP — 不需 PG，real local git repos under `tmp_path` + monkeypatch `_WORKSPACES_ROOT`/`_TENANTS_ROOT`/`_INGEST_BASE` 隔離)。**收尾的是 Y6 epic 整片 row 1-7 的 composition 矩陣** — 這個 row 不引入新 prod code，只把前面 7 row 在 isolation 下各自證過的契約用 5 個跨 row 的 realistic operator scenario 重新組合驗證一次，捕捉「個別 row 還在 isolation 下綠但組合起來 broken」的 subtle regression。**Module-global state 稽核** 不適用：本 row 0 prod file edit、純測試新增。**Read-after-write timing 稽核** 不適用：純測試新增、無 prod path 變更。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep** 不適用：本 row 0 prod file edit。**6 群組 17 測試族**：(A) `TestSameNameRepoMatrix` 2 條 — 同 agent + 同 tenant + 同 project clone 兩個同 basename `foo` 不同 URL 各自獨立 leaf 不互相覆蓋且 README 內容無 cross-contamination + 兩 leaf 都計入 t-acme 的 `measure_tenant_usage["workspaces_bytes"]`。(B) `TestTenantQuotaIsolation` 3 條 — t-A 的 workspace bytes 永不歸帳給 t-B + t-A 超 hard 不影響 t-B 的 `check_hard_quota` + t-A 在 breach 中不阻擋 provision 進 t-B（防 cluster-level cap 退化）。(C) `TestQuotaTriggeredLRU` 2 條 — 超 hard quota 時 per-project LRU 先刪 oldest 留 newest + 多 project 都 over 時 round-robin 跨 project 不會把單一 noisy project drain 完才碰其他 project（_project_lru_workspaces 的 round-robin merge 契約鎖）。(D) `TestActiveAgentGuard` 3 條 — 在 `_workspaces` registry 中的 active 工作區即使 stale 也不被 sweep + 即使 quota pressure 也不被 evict（`_is_workspace_busy` 同 gate 共用契約鎖）+ 即使無 registry entry，fresh `.git/index.lock`（< 60s）也擋 sweep（CLI/chatops 保護路徑）。(E) `TestWorkspaceRootEnvKnob` 5 條 — `OMNISIGHT_WORKSPACE_ROOT` env → `Settings().workspace_root` + 不設 env 預設 `./data/workspaces`（非 legacy `./.agent_workspaces`）+ 絕對路徑 env 直接傳給 migrator `_default_target_root` + 相對路徑 anchor 在 repo root（非 cwd）+ runtime rebase `_WORKSPACES_ROOT` 時 `tenant_quota._tenant_workspaces_root` 立刻跟上（runtime-bridging seam 不快取）。(F) `TestCrossRowComposition` 1 條 — 完整 walkthrough：provision 兩個 collision-prone repos → 兩者都計入 quota → 觸發 quota-driven GC → 驗證 active leaf (info_b 在 registry) 倖存、stale + 不在 registry 的 leaf (info_a) 被 evict、project_id 正確、audit row 落地。(G) `test_y6_public_surface_intact` 1 條 — pin 全部 row 1-6 公開 symbol（`_workspace_path_for` / `_repo_url_hash` / `_WORKSPACES_ROOT` / `_DEFAULT_*` / `_SELF_REPO_HASH` / provision 五 kwarg / `measure_tenant_usage["workspaces_bytes"]` / `gc_mod.sweep_once|run_gc_loop|GCSummary`）防 refactor 隱性 rename。**Production Readiness Gate**：0 新 wheel / 0 schema migration / 0 docker change / 0 新 env knob / 0 router 改動 / 0 prod file edit — 純測試新增、本 row 完全 dev-only。**測試結果**：本 row 17/17 PASS in 1.23s + Y6 row 4 migration 19/19 + Y6 row 5 quota 7/7 + Y6 row 6 GC 15/15 + Y6 row 7 collision 14/14 = **72/72 PASS / 0 regression**；workspace ancestor: hierarchy 10/10 + provision_signature 14/14 + workspace_anchor 8/8 + workspace_orphan_cleanup 13/13 + workspace_discard_recreate 20/20 = **65/65 PASS / 0 regression**。Production status: dev-only → next gate deployed-active (純測試新增、無 prod code 變更、本 row 完工即 Y6 milestone 8 個 row 全 dev 完工)。詳見 HANDOFF.md 該日期 entry。

預估：**3 day**

### Y7. Bootstrap Wizard — Tenant 初始化步驟 + super-admin 指定 (#283)

讓初次部署時直接走向「Production multi-tenant」狀態，不再停在 `t-default` 孤兒。

- [x] `/bootstrap` wizard 加 Step 2.5「Initialize your organization」：輸入 tenant display name（id 自動 slug 化）+ plan 選擇（預設 free，enterprise 需要 license key）+ 首任 super-admin email / 密碼。 **(2026-04-26)** 後端新 endpoint `POST /api/v1/bootstrap/init-tenant`（unauthenticated，pre-finalize gate-middleware-protected，與其他 wizard step 同 posture）落在 `backend/routers/bootstrap.py:165-450`。前端新 step `init_tenant` 插在 `admin_password` 與 `llm_provider` 之間 (`app/bootstrap/page.tsx`)，optional / not-a-finalize-gate 行為同 `git_forge`：operator 可填表也可 Skip — 兩者都觸發 cursor 自動推進。`InitTenantStep` 組件含 display_name 即時 slug preview（"Acme Robotics" → `t-acme-robotics`）/ plan select（free/starter/pro/enterprise）/ enterprise license_key 條件顯示 / super-admin email + name + password + confirm + zxcvbn strength bar / 9 種 error kind banner（invalid_display_name / invalid_slug / enterprise_license_required / password_too_short / password_too_weak / tenant_already_exists / non_default_tenant_already_exists / email_already_exists / validation_error）。後端 endpoint 在單一 asyncpg transaction 內：(1) INSERT tenants `(id=t-{slug}, name, plan, enabled=1)` (2) `auth.create_user` super_admin user pin tenant_id (3) INSERT user_tenant_memberships owner/active (4) INSERT projects `(p-{slug}-default, product_line=default, slug=default, created_by=super_admin)` —任一失敗整 tx rollback、零 half-built rows。tx commit 後 best-effort 寫 `OMNISIGHT_PRIMARY_TENANT_ID=t-{slug}` 進 `.env`（解析來源：`OMNISIGHT_DOTENV_FILE` env 或 `<repo>/.env`，原 key 在則 in-place 替換、不在則 append、保留註解 + 其他 keys）— 寫失敗只 warning 進 response 的 `env_write_warning` 不 rollback DB。Audit row `bootstrap.tenant_initialized` (severity=warning) actor 是新 super-admin email。**Replay 防禦**：第 2 次呼叫 → 409 `non_default_tenant_already_exists`（已存在非 t-default 的 tenant）。**Skip 路徑**：operator 不呼 endpoint → tenants 表只有 t-default、原 default admin 仍在 t-default 並可登入（向後相容 single-tenant install）。**Module-global state 稽核**：本 row 0 module-level cache 引入；slug regex / open plan whitelist / license_key regex 都是常數，每 worker 各自推導同一值。**Read-after-write timing 稽核**：本 row 不引入新 timing-sensitive 路徑，DB 寫入在單一 tx 內完成，後續讀取（`/admin/tenants` super-admin 列表、super-admin 登入）必看到 commit 後的狀態。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep**：本 row prod file 變更 `backend/routers/bootstrap.py` + `lib/api.ts` + `app/bootstrap/page.tsx` 全部 fingerprint clean（0 `_conn()` / 0 `await conn.commit()` / 0 SQLite-isms）。**Production Readiness Gate**：0 新 wheel / 0 schema migration（既有 tenants/users/user_tenant_memberships/projects 表都 land）/ 0 docker change / 0 新 env knob
