`monkeypatch.setattr(docker_pull_mod, "_docker_pull", ...)` + `_docker_inspect` 雙模組-private function patch、避開「需要實際 docker daemon + ghcr.io 網路」依賴 — 真實 Popen + ghcr.io call 在 prod 是必要的、在 unit test 為 unwanted 依賴；shell_script 3 個 case 走 file:// 真實 fixture 路徑（已有 BS.4.7 模板可 reuse）但加 env-scrub case 是 BS.7.8 獨家 deeper test、用真實 bash subprocess + tmp_path 寫入 env.dump 驗證 token containment；(4) **threat model 對應**：unauthorized classifier (test #4) → §8 error_reason list / RepoDigest mismatch (test #5) → §5.2 layer 3 / env scrub (test #9) → §4.5 sidecar token containment / http:// reject (test #8) → §5.2 layer 1 — 每個 case 註解都點到對應 threat model 章節。**設計決策（為何不去改 prod 檔）**：替代 = 把 docker_pull.py / shell_script.py 重寫一次 (即「補完真實實作」字面意義)；問題：(a) 兩檔 BS.4.3 已實作 387 + 260 行真實 subprocess 路徑、含 sha256 layer 3 + airgap mode hard-block + run_in_process_group + atomic-promote + cancel kill-tree — 「重寫」會 net-zero 改動或 net-negative regression；(b) `installer/tests/test_methods.py` 13 cases 已通過 (證明 prod 檔可工作)、本 row 加 10 cases 後 29 cases 全綠 — 證據級別已足以宣告「真實實作存在」；(c) BS.7.7 HANDOFF 行尾文字「剩餘 BS.7.8 (docker_pull / shell_script 真實實作) ...」也是繼承自 stale TODO 描述，不是實際工作量。**設計決策（為何 RepoDigest 比對只看 sha256:hex 尾巴而非完整字串）**：docker store `<repo>@sha256:<hex>` 完整 RepoDigest 可能跨 registry 變動（同 image 在 ghcr.io vs docker.io 的 RepoDigest prefix 不同），但 sha256 hex 是 content-addressable、跨 registry 必相同；`_match_digest` (docker_pull.py:353) `endswith("sha256:" + expected)` 邏輯反映此 invariant；test #5 直接用 `f"ghcr.io/vendor/image@sha256:{other_sha}"` 餵入確認非匹配路徑 surface `sha256_layer1_mismatch` 而非 false-positive 把 prefix 當作 mismatch。**設計決策（為何 env scrub test 用真實 bash subprocess vs mock）**：替代 = monkeypatch `subprocess.Popen` + assert env kwarg 不含 OMNISIGHT_INSTALLER_TOKEN；問題：(a) `_scrubbed_env` 邏輯 + `run_in_process_group` 的 env 傳遞鏈是兩個獨立 unit、純 unit-mock 只測一個;  (b) 真 bash + `env > file` 是端到端驗證子進程實際看到的 environment，是 threat model §4.5 想保證的 invariant 級別測試；(c) bash `env` builtin + `>` redirect 不需 vendor 工具鍵、jsdom 等 fragile mock — 在 Linux test runner 上是 zero-dependency 操作；trade-off 為加 ~20ms 跑時、測試強度大幅提升。**Module-global state 稽核**（per `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md` Step 1）：tests 為 stateless function — `_VALID_SHA` 為 module-level immutable const (sha256 of static byte string)；無 in-memory cache / singleton / thread-locals。`monkeypatch` fixture scope 為 function-level、teardown 自動 unwind subprocess + env mock。Autouse `_isolate_installer_env` fixture 已驗證 `OMNISIGHT_INSTALLER_*` env 不跨測試泄漏 (test #10 `test_no_module_level_mutable_state_in_real_methods` 顯式檢查)。Subprocess (test #9 vendor bash) 在 `run_in_process_group` 內走 setsid + new process group、test 執行完即被 reap、無孤兒 process 殘留 — `_isolate_installer_env` 不需要為 PID 進程清理。**Read-after-write timing 稽核**：N/A — tests 走 local filesystem + mocked subprocess、無 PG / Redis / event-bus；`run_in_process_group` 為同步 wait + drain stdout、無並發 race。env scrub test 的 `env > file` redirect 為 bash 內部 sequential write / close-on-exit、test assertion 在 `dispatch` return 後跑、保證 `env.dump` 已 flush。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep**（`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`）對 `installer/tests/test_real_methods.py` 0 命中（純 Python unit test 無 SQL / asyncpg 殘留）。**測試** `python3 -m pytest installer/tests/test_real_methods.py -v` → ✓ 10 passed / 0.55s（8 distinct test functions, 1 parametrized × 2 sub-cases = 10 collected items）。`python3 -m pytest installer/tests/ -q` → ✓ 29 passed / 6.05s（13 既有 test_methods.py + 10 新 test_real_methods.py + 6 既有 test_long_poll_loop.py 全綠零 regression）。`python3 -m pytest backend/tests/test_installer_router_smoke.py backend/tests/test_pep_gateway_install_coaching.py backend/tests/test_pep_gateway.py -q` → ✓ 141 passed / 1.51s（既有 installer smoke + PEP coaching + PEP gateway 全綠、本 row 純 installer-side test 加法、零 backend 影響）。**Production status: dev-only**（純 Python test 加 1 檔、CI 在 standard `pytest installer/tests/` matrix 自動 carry；無 backend 變動 / 無 schema migration / 無新 pip dep / 無 prod image 變動 / 無 env knob / 無 feature flag / 無 frontend 變動）。**Next gate: deployed-active** — `installer/tests/test_real_methods.py` 已在 master CI matrix 上綠跑、即時生效；BS.7 epic 至此 **8/9 row 綠（BS.7.1 + BS.7.2 + BS.7.3 + BS.7.4 + BS.7.5 + BS.7.6 + BS.7.7 + BS.7.8）**；剩餘 BS.7.9 (drawer + hook 額外測試覆蓋) 一 row、frontend-side 工作。 -->

- [x] BS.7.9 `test/components/install-progress-drawer.test.tsx` (~10 cases) + `test/hooks/use-install-jobs.test.ts` (~8 cases)<!-- 2026-04-27 BS.7.9: `test/components/install-progress-drawer.test.tsx`(net +183 行 — 10 new cases across 4 BS.7.9 testblocks: multi-row + lifecycle (3) / log_tail rendering (2) / state pill + cancel-for-queued (2) / ETA derivation + speed corner cases (3)) + `test/hooks/use-install-jobs.test.tsx`(net +201 行 — 8 new cases across 3 testblocks: useInstallJobs (4 — removeJob no-op for unknown id / re-synthesize after removeJob / eta_seconds NOT sticky / log_tail NOT sticky) + mergeInstallJobFromProgress (3 — immutable update / outside-SSE field preservation / error_reason+pep_decision_id preservation) + synthesizeInstallJobFromProgress (1 parametric × 5 InstallJobState values = 5 collected sub-cases)) — BS.7 Install pipeline epic 9/9 row (BS.7 closing). **核心 contract / scope**：(1) **drawer 10 new cases** lock corner cases that BS.7.3 surface contract (17 existing cases) didn't pin: multi-row stable order + chip count math (queued + running combined + completed dropped) / state-flip-to-completed drops the row mid-render / multi-line log_tail surfaces only the last line in the row text but keeps full tail in title attr / empty log_tail suppresses the log row entirely / state pill aria-label echoes job.state verbatim / cancel button works for queued rows too (not running-only) / ETA derives from remaining/speed when backend eta_seconds is null / MIN_SAMPLE_INTERVAL_MS rate-limit guard prevents divide-by-near-zero speed spike (sub-250ms tick keeps prior reading) / negative bytes_done delta (sidecar method retry from 0) yields speed=0 not negative; (2) **hook 8 new cases** lock corner cases BS.7.4/7.5 (32 existing cases) didn't pin: removeJob no-op safety for stale catalog snapshot ids (BS.7.7 cancel path may hand a stale id) / re-synthesize on fresh SSE after removeJob (cancel-race recovery — SSE remains source of truth) / eta_seconds NOT sticky vs bytes_total/sidecar_id/entry_id which ARE sticky (sidecar may legitimately drop ETA mid-install during opaque extraction phase) / log_tail NOT sticky (sidecar may clear at completion — drawer's "—" placeholder must show, not stale multi-line content) / merge returns new object reference (immutability invariant — React relies on Object.is identity diff for setJobs re-render) / merge preserves all 8 "outside-SSE" fields from prev (idempotency_key/requested_by/queued_at/tenant_id/protocol_version/claimed_at/started_at/completed_at — backend doesn't put these in the SSE delta payload, audit modal pulls them from row state) / merge preserves error_reason + pep_decision_id from prev across state transitions (BS.7.6 modal pulls error_reason via REST one-shot getInstallJob and stuffs it onto the row; subsequent SSE retry path emitting state=queued must not clobber it back to null) / synthesize parametric over all 5 InstallJobState values (queued/running/completed/failed/cancelled) — locks that synthesize never filters or remaps state at the wire-format boundary; (3) **3 deliberate non-tests** (intentionally NOT included): "subscribeEvents called exactly once" was already covered by existing test #1 of useInstallJobs / "test that synthesize zero-fills bytes_done numeric fields" was already covered by existing synthesize zero-fill test / "test that hook closes SSE on unmount" was already covered by existing unmount test #9. **設計決策（為何 .test.tsx 而非 .test.ts as TODO row 字面）**：TODO row literally says `use-install-jobs.test.ts` (no x) but the file already existed as `.test.tsx` from BS.7.4 because `renderHook` + React Testing Library require JSX support; the existing 32 cases couldn't run from a `.ts` file. Adding NEW 8 cases to the existing `.tsx` is the right scope-minimal path; renaming to `.ts` would break the 32 frozen cases. Treat the TODO description as a stale typo — the row's intent is clearly "extend existing hook test file" not "create a parallel `.ts` companion". **設計決策（為何 ETA derivation test uses (clock 函數 + rerender) vs vi.useFakeTimers）**：vi.useFakeTimers controls global Date.now but the drawer's nowMs prop accepts a function override and accesses it inside useEffect; useFakeTimers wouldn't intercept the inline closure. The clock-function pattern (mirroring the existing speed-derivation test #8) is the canonical idiom for this drawer. **設計決策（為何 merge mutability test compares against snapshot vs deep-freeze）**：Object.freeze deep-frozen would throw on mutation (clear failure signal) but Object.freeze isn't recursive on nested objects (e.g. result_json) and freezing primitive object literals doesn't catch the more subtle "merge accidentally pushes a value into prev" bug. snapshot-via-spread + toEqual catches both shallow + nested mutations and is the React-test idiom. **設計決策（為何 synthesize parametric test uses it.each vs explicit forEach）**：vitest it.each generates one collected case per array entry → CI test count is 5 (one per InstallJobState), each with its own pass/fail signal; forEach inside a single `it` would collapse all 5 into one pass/fail. Per-state granularity matters for catching "synthesize accidentally drops 'cancelled' but keeps the other four". **Module-global state 稽核**（per `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md` Step 1）：tests are stateless function bodies — `mkProgress` / `mkJob` / `mkJobRow` are pure factories with no closure state, no module-level cache, no thread-locals. `vi.clearAllMocks()` in afterEach unwinds the `vi.fn()` `subscribeEvents` mock between tests. `primeSSE(api)` returns a per-test-instance `listeners[]` + `closed` counter; no cross-test pollution. The drawer + hook themselves were already audited (BS.7.3 + BS.7.4 HANDOFF) — both store all state per-component-instance via React useState/useRef. Answer #1 (per-worker stateless derivation) applies — each test worker re-imports the test module and re-runs the same factory code. **Read-after-write timing 稽核**：N/A — tests run synchronously inside `act(...)` blocks; SSE events emitted via `sse.emit(...)` are synchronously dispatched to the registered listener (single-threaded JS event loop); no asyncio.gather / no parallel writes / no Postgres / no Redis. The hook's internal setState callback runs inside act → React 18 functional update batching is observed before the next assertion. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep**（`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`）對 2 個變動檔（test/components/install-progress-drawer.test.tsx + test/hooks/use-install-jobs.test.tsx）0 命中（純前端 TSX test 無 SQL/asyncpg compat 殘留）。**測試** `npx vitest run test/components/install-progress-drawer.test.tsx` → ✓ **27 passed**（17 既有 + 10 新）/ ~743ms。`npx vitest run test/hooks/use-install-jobs.test.tsx` → ✓ **45 passed**（32 既有 + 8 新 + 5 it.each sub-cases collected as separate items）/ ~616ms。`npx vitest run test/components/install-progress-drawer.test.tsx test/hooks/use-install-jobs.test.tsx test/components/catalog-install-state-wiring.test.tsx test/components/catalog-install-wiring.test.tsx test/components/catalog-failure-wiring.test.tsx test/components/install-cancel-wiring.test.tsx test/components/install-log-modal.test.tsx test/lib/installer-api.test.ts test/components/catalog-card.test.tsx test/components/catalog-tab.test.tsx test/components/catalog-detail-panel.test.tsx` → ✓ **179 passed across 11 files**（BS.6.x + BS.7.1-7.7 frozen 零 regression）/ ~1.27s。`npx tsc --noEmit` → 0 新錯誤（僅 BS.6.x HANDOFF 紀錄過的 3 個 `integration-settings.tsx` GitForgeTokenTestResult pre-existing 仍在）。**Production status: dev-only**（純前端 TSX test 加法、CI 在 standard vitest matrix 上自動 carry；無 prod 檔變動 / 無 backend 變動 / 無 schema migration / 無新 npm dep / 無 prod image 變動 / 無 env knob / 無 feature flag / 無 frontend prod component 變動）。**Next gate: deployed-active** — test 進 master 後立即在 CI matrix 上綠跑；保護 BS.7.3 drawer 27-case contract + BS.7.4 hook 45-case contract 不被未來 refactor 偷偷破壞；**BS.7 epic 至此 9/9 row 全綠 — install pipeline 完整收網（BS.7.1 + BS.7.2 + BS.7.3 + BS.7.4 + BS.7.5 + BS.7.6 + BS.7.7 + BS.7.8 + BS.7.9）**；下一步可進 BS.8 (Installed tab + Sources & Custom tab) epic。 -->

useState、Radix dropdown 開關狀態自管理；browser-only，uvicorn `--workers N` 不適用（answer #1: 每 tab 從同一 SSE/REST snapshot 推導出同一 view）。**Read-after-write timing audit**：純展示，無 API 寫入；action callbacks 觸發後 page wrapper 擁有 round-trip 但 InstalledTab 本身從不從任何來源讀取，故無 timing race。**Production status: dev-only** — code 在 main，僅 jsdom + lint 跑過；BS.8.7 將補完整 RTL 測試（~10 cases），BS.8.2 落 `useInstalledEntries()` 真實 hook 後才會 deployed-active。**Next gate: dev-only → deployed-inactive** — 需 BS.8.2 ship `useInstalledEntries()` hook + page wrapper 把 empty-array placeholder 換成真 hook，才 active。 -->

`test/components/cleanup-unused-modal.test.tsx`(285 行新增 — 10 cases) — BS.8 Installed tab + Sources & Custom tab epic 2/7 — cleanup-unused flow + useInstalledEntries hook 完整收網。**核心 contract**：(1) **`GET /installer/installed`** — operator-only REST endpoint、derive 「currently installed」set from install_jobs via `DISTINCT ON (entry_id) ORDER BY queued_at DESC` + LEFT JOIN LATERAL catalog_entries (priority override > operator > subscription > shipped、hidden=FALSE filter)、Python-side filter excludes rows where latest install_jobs row is `state != 'completed'` OR `result_json.kind == 'uninstall'`；response shape carries 9 fields (entry_id / display_name / vendor / family / version / description / disk_usage_bytes / used_by_workspace_count / last_used_at / installed_at / update_available / available_version / source) — used_by_workspace_count + last_used_at + update_available 是 BS.8.x 後續 row 才會 wire 真值的 placeholder fields，今天 default 0 / null / false / null 但已 surface 在 wire format 上避免日後 schema drift；(2) **`POST /installer/uninstall`** — operator + PEP HOLD、body `{entry_ids: string[], reason?: string}`、 `BULK_UNINSTALL_MAX_ENTRIES=200` cap + `_ENTRY_ID_RE` per-id validation + dedupe via Python set 去重複 entry_ids 後 ONE 次 PEP HOLD `tool="uninstall_entry"` （`tier_unlisted` → HOLD branch）、on approve → INSERT install_jobs row per entry with `state='completed' + result_json={"kind": "uninstall", "entry_id": ..., "actor": ..., "reason": ...} + pep_decision_id`、on deny → INSERT row with `state='cancelled' + error_reason='pep_<rule>'`、HTTPException 403 with `{error: "pep_denied", reason, count, items}` shape mirroring `create_job`；(3) **Sidecar isolation 設計**：uninstall rows 永遠以 `state='completed'` 或 `'cancelled'` INSERT (不是 `'queued'`)、sidecar long-poll 的 `WHERE state='queued'` 子句永遠不會 claim 這些 rows、避免 sidecar 試圖跑一個 install method on uninstall row；actual on-disk cleanup (toolchain 目錄移除 / docker image GC / vendor script tear-down) 推遲到 follow-up sidecar handler row、今天的 row 是 audit + state-of-truth marker (operator 決定要 remove the entry)；(4) **`useInstalledEntries()` hook** — 純 REST poll on mount + `refresh()` 手動 trigger；無 SSE 訂閱（與 BS.7.4 `useInstallJobs` 對比 — 後者需要 sub-second 即時 lifecycle ticks、前者只在 install / uninstall 完成後變動、operator 已 initiate 動作後再 `refresh()` 即足夠 freshness）；hook 暴露 `entries: InstalledEntry[]` (camelCase UI shape) + `loading` + `error` + `refresh()`；`installedEntryFromRow` 是 exported pure marshaller、把 wire snake_case → UI camelCase；`_coerceFamily` 把 backend 7-bucket family (mobile / embedded / web / software / rtos / cross-toolchain / custom) collapse 到 UI 5-bucket palette (rtos + cross-toolchain → embedded、unknown → custom)；(5) **`<CleanupUnusedModal />` component** — Radix Dialog wrapper、`open` / `entries` / `now?` / `onClose` / `onUninstallSelected?` / `onCompleted?` 6 props；內建 `pickCleanupCandidates` filter via `isCleanupCandidate` (lib/api.ts) — exposes idle threshold (`INSTALLED_ENTRY_IDLE_THRESHOLD_MS = 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000`) + 排除 entries with `usedByWorkspaceCount > 0` (workspace dependants 永遠不為 cleanup candidate、不論 idle 多久) + 排除 lastUsedAt OR installedAt 在 30d 內的 + 兩 timestamp 都 missing 視為 candidate (operator 自決) + 支援 malformed timestamp defence-in-depth；UI 包含 master `Select all` toggle + per-row checkbox + result/error 雙 banner + Close/Confirm 按鈕；on submit 拿 selected ids array 呼叫 `bulkUninstallEntries` (or override fn) → on success 顯示「Uninstalled X / rejected Y」banner + 清空 selection + 呼叫 `onCompleted` (page wrapper refresh hook) + KEEPS modal open (operator 確認結果)；on failure 顯示 inline error + 保留 selection (operator 可 retry)；(6) **page wrapper integration** — `useInstalledEntries()` 取代 `useMemo(() => [], [])` empty placeholder + `pickCleanupCandidates(installedEntries)` 計算 toolbar badge count + `installed-tab-cleanup-button` testid 點擊開 modal + `installed-tab-extras` toolbar slot 在 InstalledTab 上方 (對 BS.8.1 contract 零侵入 — InstalledTab 本身未變)；onCleanupCompleted callback 觸發 `refreshInstalledEntries()` → 下個 render 沒了剛 uninstall 的 rows；(7) **每 row testid 規範**：`cleanup-unused-modal` / `cleanup-unused-modal-title` / `cleanup-unused-modal-count` / `cleanup-unused-modal-empty` / `cleanup-unused-modal-toolbar` / `cleanup-unused-modal-list` / `cleanup-unused-modal-toggle-all` / `cleanup-unused-modal-row-{id}` + per-row `cleanup-unused-modal-checkbox-{id}` + `cleanup-unused-modal-disk-{id}` / `cleanup-unused-modal-result` / `cleanup-unused-modal-error` / `cleanup-unused-modal-close` / `cleanup-unused-modal-confirm` — 對齊 BS.6 / BS.8.1 catalog-tab + installed-tab 命名規範。**設計決策（為何 reuse install_jobs vs 新 uninstall_jobs table）**：替代 = 新增 alembic 0054 + uninstall_jobs table；問題：(a) zero schema migration cost vs 全新 table + indexes + foreign keys + audit_log 的 entity_kind discriminator；(b) audit-log 統一: 一個 entity_kind="install_job" 涵蓋 install + uninstall lifecycle、operator forensics 在一個 query 內；(c) result_json JSONB 已存在、`{"kind": "uninstall"}` discriminator 是純加值不破壞既有 schema；(d) `state='completed'` 的語意天然 isolate sidecar long-poll (它只 claim `state='queued'`)、無 race；(e) BS.8.4 dependency-check 落地時、per-row uninstall 也走同 INSERT 路徑、scope 自然延展。**設計決策（為何 ONE PEP HOLD per batch vs N HOLDs）**：替代 = N 個 coaching cards (一個 entry 一個 PEP evaluate 呼叫)；問題：(a) operator 點 cleanup-unused 是 single 意圖 (「all of these」)、N 個 cards 是 hostile UX (大概 always 全 approve 或全 deny)；(b) one-shot HOLD 的 audit trail 仍 N 個 rows (per-entry forensics 保留)；(c) 序列 N 個 `pep.evaluate()` 各自 await、最壞 case operator 等 N × 10min；(d) batch HOLD 的 coaching card arguments 帶 `entry_ids: string[] + count: int + actor + reason` — 未來的 `uninstall_intercept` dedicated card (BS.8.4) 可 render 這些 fields、今天的 `tier_unlisted` 通用 copy 也 OK。**設計決策（為何 bulk uninstall 不需要 idempotency_key）**：每個 uninstall row 拿 fresh `_new_uninstall_idempotency_key()` (32 hex chars) — 對 backend UNIQUE constraint 來說是 fresh row；frontend 防 double-click 透過 modal 的 `submitting=true` 把 button disable、不需要 server-side dedupe；audit-log 角度: 兩次 cleanup-unused click 的兩組 audit rows 是兩個事件、合理 (operator 真的 click 了兩次)。**設計決策（為何 useInstalledEntries 是 REST not SSE）**：替代 = 訂閱 `installer_progress` channel + 用 state 做客戶端 derivation；問題：(a) BS.7.4 `useInstallJobs` 已訂閱 `installer_progress`、再加 listener 是 listener-fanout (兩個 hook 收同 stream)；(b) installed list 變動點少 (一次 install 完成 / 一次 uninstall 批次)、不需要 sub-second freshness、operator 已 initiate 完動作 的 caller-driven `refresh()` 簡單；(c) avoid SSE event-shape coupling — installer_progress 帶 install_jobs row delta、不天然 carry 「entry 從 catalog 角度看現在是不是 installed」 這個 derived view；(d) BS.8.x follow-up 真需要 cross-tenant live signalling 時、可獨立加 SSE listener row。**Module-global state audit**（per `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md` Step 1）：(1) Backend: `_is_uninstall_record` / `_new_uninstall_idempotency_key` 為 stateless function；`bulk_uninstall` / `list_installed_entries` 都走 `db_pool.get_pool()` (cross-worker via asyncpg pool + PG MVCC)、無 module-level mutable state；PEP gateway 仍 own 自己的 `_held_registry` / `_recent` rings、本 row 只 consume `evaluate()` return value。Multi-worker model: 每 worker 獨立 acquire pool conn、SELECT 看到的是相同 PG snapshot、INSERT 走 PG transaction、PG MVCC 處理 concurrent uninstall race (UNIQUE constraint on idempotency_key 防同一 row 重複 INSERT)。Answer #2 (透過 PG 協調)。 (2) Frontend: `useInstalledEntries` 內部 state 為 per-component-instance React useState + useRef、無 module-level cache；`<CleanupUnusedModal />` selected/submitting/result/lastError 全 per-instance；`isCleanupCandidate` / `pickCleanupCandidates` / `installedEntryFromRow` / `_coerceFamily` 全 stateless pure functions；無 cross-render mutation。Answer #1 (per-tab stateless derivation)。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) `bulk_uninstall` 兩 transactions: PEP HOLD evaluate (separate tx、conn 釋放在 wait 期間) → bulk INSERT in single tx after HOLD resolve；frontend GET `/installer/installed` between (1) 和 (2) 看到 entry 仍 installed (no uninstall row yet)、GET after (2) 看 entry filtered out — `optimistic` modal-side hide-then-refresh 在 commit 一瞬間自動 reconcile (PG MVCC 保證)。 (2) `listInstalledEntries` 為 read-only、無 R-A-W race。 (3) `useInstalledEntries.refresh()` 在 `bulkUninstallEntries` 的 promise resolve 後 fire、PG commit 已發生在 HTTP 200 return 之前、refresh 看到 post-commit state — frontend 與 backend 收斂同一 state 在一個 tick 內。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep**（`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`）對 10 個變動檔（installer.py + 2 backend test files + lib/api.ts + use-installed-entries.ts + cleanup-unused-modal.tsx + page.tsx + 3 frontend test files）0 命中。**測試** `python3 -m pytest backend/tests/test_installer_router_smoke.py -q` → ✓ **72 passed** (64 既有 + 8 新)/ 1.41s。`python3 -m pytest backend/tests/test_installer_router_smoke.py backend/tests/test_installer_api.py backend/tests/test_pep_gateway_install_coaching.py backend/tests/test_pep_gateway.py -q` → ✓ **151 passed + 25 skipped** (PG-gated 含 5 BS.8.2 新 cases) / 1.60s — 既有 install pipeline 全綠零 regression。`npx vitest run test/components/cleanup-unused-modal.test.tsx test/hooks/use-installed-entries.test.tsx test/lib/installer-api.test.ts` → ✓ **62 passed** (10 modal + 9 hook + 43 lib total — 30 既有 + 13 新 BS.8.2 cases) / 1.06s。`npx vitest run test/lib/installer-api.test.ts test/components/cleanup-unused-modal.test.tsx test/hooks/use-installed-entries.test.tsx test/hooks/use-install-jobs.test.tsx test/components/install-progress-drawer.test.tsx test/components/install-log-modal.test.tsx test/components/catalog-install-state-wiring.test.tsx test/components/catalog-install-wiring.test.tsx test/components/catalog-failure-wiring.test.tsx test/components/install-cancel-wiring.test.tsx test/components/catalog-card.test.tsx test/components/catalog-tab.test.tsx test/components/catalog-detail-panel.test.tsx` → ✓ **214 passed across 13 files** (180 既有 + 34 新)/ 1.47s — BS.6.x + BS.7.x + BS.8.1 frozen 零 regression。`npx tsc --noEmit` → 0 新錯誤（仍 BS.6.x HANDOFF 紀錄過的 3 個 `integration-settings.tsx` GitForgeTokenTestResult pre-existing 仍在）。`npx eslint hooks/use-installed-entries.ts components/omnisight/cleanup-unused-modal.tsx app/settings/platforms/page.tsx test/lib/installer-api.test.ts test/hooks/use-installed-entries.test.tsx test/components/cleanup-unused-modal.test.tsx` → 0 errors / 0 warnings。**Production status: dev-only**（前端 TS/TSX + 後端 Python 純 additive、Next.js dev/prod build 自動 carry frontend、uvicorn worker restart 即生效；無 backend image 重 build 需求；無 schema migration / 無 alembic / 無 catalog_entries / install_jobs DDL 變動 (route + body model + RBAC dep + result_json discriminator 全部既有 schema 之內)；無新 pip dep / npm dep / prod image 變動；無 env knob / feature flag）。**Next gate: deployed-active** — 前端打包進 master + 後端 worker restart 後立即接通：Installed tab 從空 placeholder 變成從 PG 拉真實 installed entries (`GET /installer/installed`) + Cleanup-unused button 開 modal + bulk select + Confirm 觸發 PEP HOLD coaching card + on approve INSERT N uninstall rows + on deny 403 + 前端 refresh hook → InstalledTab 沒了 uninstalled rows。**注意事項 / follow-up rows**: (a) `usedByWorkspaceCount` / `lastUsedAt` 今天 wire 為 placeholder 0 / null — BS.8.x follow-up row 接 workspace activity 表時自然 wire 真值、本 row 已準備好 schema slot；(b) 實際 on-disk uninstall (toolchain dir 移除 / docker image GC / vendor script tear-down) 推遲到 sidecar handler row (BS.8.4 dependency-check 之後或單獨 row)、今天的 row 是 audit + state-of-truth marker；(c) BS.8.4 dependency check 落地後、per-row InstalledTab `onUninstall` (BS.8.1 留空 disabled menu item) 接 wire；bulk cleanup-unused 路徑可選擇是否同 dependency check (cleanup 通常已 imply 「沒人用」、但 defence-in-depth 加 check 也 OK — BS.8.4 row 自決)；(d) PEP `tier_unlisted` 預設 coaching card 對 uninstall 場景文案稍弱、BS.8.4 可加 `uninstall_intercept` dedicated card (mirror `install_intercept` 邏輯)；(e) BS.8.7 unit test row 仍會補 `<InstalledTab />` 自身 ~10 cases (本 row 落 9 hook + 10 modal + 13 lib helper cases、未動 InstalledTab 主檔)。 -->

treemap + family legend + unknown-size footer) + `app/settings/platforms/page.tsx`(net +35 行 — Disk-breakdown button on InstalledTab toolbar + modal mount + open/close handlers) + `test/components/disk-breakdown-modal.test.tsx`(290 行新增 — 15 cases) — BS.8 epic 3/7 row — disk-breakdown report flow 完整收網。**核心 contract**：(1) `<DiskBreakdownModal />` 純展示 Radix Dialog wrapper、3 props (`open` / `entries` / `onClose`)、無 fetch / 無 SSE 訂閱、page wrapper 透過 `useInstalledEntries()` snapshot 喂入 entries；(2) **slice-and-dice treemap 算法**：top-level `flex-row` 一個 family 一格、`flexGrow: bucket.totalBytes`；每格內部 `flex-col`、entry cell `flexGrow: bytes`。CSS flex 內建 normalisation 讓 rectangles 自動成比例、無 D3 / 無 ResizeObserver / 無 DOM measure；(3) **暴露 4 個 pure helper**：`entryDiskBytes(entry)` (finite non-negative bytes 或 null) / `computeFamilyTotals(entries)` (return `{ totalBytes, byFamily: FamilyTotal[], unknownEntries }` — 按 family 群組 + 聚合 + 排序 family 依總 bytes 降序、entry 在每 family 內依 bytes 降序) / `groupByFamilyForTreemap(entries)` (convenience wrapper) / `formatShare(bytes, totalBytes)` (`"50%"` / `"<1%"` / `"0%"` 三種格式)；(4) **Family palette**：5-bucket (mobile / embedded / web / software / custom) 依 BS.8.1 既有 chip palette；treemap cell 用 filled tint (`bg-emerald-500/35` 等) + hover deepen；legend swatch `bg-emerald-500/55` square；(5) **Unknown-size footer**：`diskUsageBytes === null/undefined/NaN/<0` 的 entries 不放 treemap (無 area 可分)、改放 footer list (`disk-breakdown-modal-unknown-list` + `disk-breakdown-modal-unknown-item-{id}`)、防止 silent drop；(6) **Empty state 兩種**：`entries.length === 0` 顯示「install something from the Catalog tab」/ `entries.length > 0 但全 unknown` 顯示「try again after the next sidecar bookkeeping pass」；(7) **Page wrapper integration**：`installed-tab-extras` toolbar slot 加第 2 個 button (`installed-tab-disk-breakdown-button`、緊鄰 cleanup button 左側)、disabled 當 `installedEntries.length === 0`、`diskBreakdownOpen` useState + `handleDiskBreakdownOpen` / `handleDiskBreakdownClose` + `<DiskBreakdownModal />` mount 在 main 標籤底部；(8) **每 row testid 規範**：`disk-breakdown-modal` / `disk-breakdown-modal-title` / `disk-breakdown-modal-total` / `disk-breakdown-modal-empty` / `disk-breakdown-modal-treemap` (role="img" + aria-label) / per-family `disk-breakdown-modal-family-{family}` 帶 `data-family-bytes` + `data-family-share` / per-cell `disk-breakdown-modal-cell-{entryId}` 帶 `data-entry-id` + `data-entry-family` + `data-entry-bytes` + `data-entry-share` / `disk-breakdown-modal-legend` + `disk-breakdown-modal-legend-item-{family}` / `disk-breakdown-modal-unknown` + `disk-breakdown-modal-unknown-list` + `disk-breakdown-modal-unknown-item-{id}` / `disk-breakdown-modal-close`。**設計決策（為何 BS.8.3 不需要新後端 route）**：BS.8.2 已 ship `GET /installer/installed`、response 已含 `disk_usage_bytes` per row (placeholder 0/null 但 wire format 完備)；整個視覺化純前端 derivation、`computeFamilyTotals` 是 client-side 純函式、無 PG round-trip；等 BS.8.x follow-up row 接 sidecar 真實 disk-bookkeeping、本 modal 自然 surface 真值 (無需任何 frontend / hook 改動)。**設計決策（為何 slice-and-dice 不是 squarified）**：squarified treemap 需要 container measure + 動態 partition 演算法 (~150 行 layout code)；typical OmniSight tenant <50 toolchains、treemap 寬度 ~720 px (max-w-3xl) — slice-and-dice 已能產生明顯比例、人眼能讀；CSS `flex-grow: <bytes>` 一行就完成 proportional sizing、無 ResizeObserver；留升級空間：未來可換 react-treemap / d3-hierarchy.treemap、`computeFamilyTotals` API 不變。**設計決策（為何 unknown-size 走 footer 而非合併進 custom 家族）**：替代 = 視 null 為 0 → flex-grow 0 → cell 0px wide → 完全不渲染、operator 看不到；替代 = 假設 average → 編造數字、誤導 operator；選 footer list — 顯式告訴 operator「這些 entries 還沒 bookkeeping」、預期 BS.8.x sidecar handler 落地後該 list 自然清空。**Module-global state audit**：(1) Frontend disk-breakdown-modal: 0 module-level mutable state、4 個 pure helpers 全 stateless deterministic、component 全 useMemo / 無 useState、FAMILY_LABEL / FAMILY_FILL / FAMILY_SWATCH 為 frozen const records；(2) Frontend page.tsx: `diskBreakdownOpen` 為 per-instance useState、handlers 為 useCallback 閉包、無 module-level state；(3) Backend: 0 changes、BS.8.2 既有 route + asyncpg pool reuse。Answer #1 (per-tab stateless derivation)。**Read-after-write timing audit**：純展示 component、無 API write、無 R-A-W race possible。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep**（`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`）對 3 個變動檔 0 命中。**測試** `npx vitest run test/components/disk-breakdown-modal.test.tsx` → ✓ **15 passed** / 1.48s。`npx vitest run test/components/disk-breakdown-modal.test.tsx list; SQL 基於 BS.8.2 `list_installed_entries` 的 DISTINCT ON pattern、加 JOIN LATERAL `catalog_entries` 的 `depends_on @> $2::jsonb` JSONB 包含 filter (PG planner 可 use GIN 若日後加 — 今天小 dataset 無需); response `entry: InstalledEntry | null` (null noop) + 4 optional callbacks (`onClose` / `onFetchDependents?` / `onUninstallConfirmed?` / `onCompleted?` — optional 是測試注入點、預設打到真 API); 內建 mountedRef + cancelled flag 雙 guard 防 strict-mode 雙 mount 與 fast close-then-reopen 不 leak stale state; submit 走 `bulkUninstallEntries([entry.id])` 單 entry batch (reuse BS.8.2 path、不重新發明 PEP gate); (3) **兩段式 confirm gate**: dependents > 0 強制 acknowledge → destructive；dependents = 0 直接 destructive；acknowledge state per-modal-instance、close-then-reopen 強制再 acknowledge (與 GitHub repo delete idiom 一致); (4) **每 row testid 規範**: `uninstall-confirm-modal` / `uninstall-confirm-modal-title` / `uninstall-confirm-modal-description` / `uninstall-confirm-modal-loading` / `uninstall-confirm-modal-fetch-error` / `uninstall-confirm-modal-dependents-warning` + `-headline` + `-list` + per-row `-dependent-{id}` (帶 `data-dependent-id`) / `uninstall-confirm-modal-no-dependents` / `uninstall-confirm-modal-result` / `uninstall-confirm-modal-error` / `uninstall-confirm-modal-close` / `uninstall-confirm-modal-acknowledge` / `uninstall-confirm-modal-confirm` / Modal root attrs `data-entry-id` / `data-dependent-count` / `data-data-state` ∈ {`loading`, `fetch-error`, `idle`, `has-dependents`, `no-dependents`} / `data-confirmed`. **設計決策（為何 BS.8.4 是純加 endpoint + 純 frontend modal、不動 BS.8.2 bulk_uninstall）**: (a) bulk-cleanup 30d idle entries 通常 imply 「沒人用」、加 dependency check 是 noise；BS.8.2 row comment 已說「BS.8.4 row 自決」；本 row 不動 cleanup batch 路徑、保 BS.8.2 frozen contract; (b) 把 dependency check 放 frontend = operator UI affordance、不是 backend gate；admin curl 直接 POST `/installer/uninstall` 仍走 PEP gate (gate 永遠存在) 但不會看到 dependent 警告 — by design：dependency check 是 *operator UX* 的 fail-safe、不是 *系統* 的 fail-stop; (c) 純加 GET endpoint 對既有 audit-log / PEP gateway / sidecar long-poll claim 零 surface 影響. **設計決策（為何 fetch 失敗仍允許 destructive submit）**: 真實環境網路抖動可能 fetch 失敗但實際 PG 仍可 SELECT；強制 retry 是 hostile UX；即使 fetch 永久失敗 operator 仍可走 PEP gate — frontend dependency check 從來不是 *最後一道防線*；amber「Proceed with extra caution」copy 顯式告訴 operator. **設計決策（為何 `entry_id <> $3` 排除 self-reference）**: catalog feed 是第三方、subscription / operator 上傳的 row 可能 misconfigured；如果 entry X 的 `depends_on` 包含 X 自己、本 endpoint 會把 X 列為 X 自己的 dependent → modal 顯示「1 entry depends on this — itself」是 nonsensical UX；SQL 加 `j.entry_id <> $3` 是 cheap defence-in-depth、零成本. **Module-global state audit**（per `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md` Step 1）：(1) Backend `list_entry_dependents`: 純 SELECT 路徑、無共享 in-memory state；每 worker 獨立 acquire `db_pool.get_pool()` conn、SQL 走 PG MVCC snapshot、tenant-scope 透過 `WHERE j.tenant_id = $1`；Multi-worker 模型: 每 worker 看到相同 PG snapshot — Answer #1。(2) Frontend `<UninstallConfirmModal />`: 所有 state 皆 per-component-instance React state；無 module-level cache；browser-only；Answer #1。(3) Frontend page.tsx: `uninstallTarget` 為 per-instance useState；handlers 為 useCallback 閉包；Answer #1。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) GET 是 read-only 無 R-A-W race; (2) Stale-dependents window: 兩 round-trips 之間另一 operator 可能 install 新 dependent；T2 看到的 dependents 集合可能比 modal 顯示的多。處理: PEP gate 仍在 T2 攔、destructive proceed-anyway 是顯式選擇；worst case = operator 在 stale 資料上 confirm，這是 race 不是 bug; (3) `bulkUninstallEntries` POST 在 PG commit 之後 return HTTP 200、`onCompleted()` 觸發 page wrapper refresh、新 GET 看 post-commit state — optimistic frontend 在 commit 一瞬間自動 reconcile. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep**（`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`）對 8 個變動檔 0 命中。**測試** `python3 -m pytest backend/tests/test_installer_router_smoke.py -q` → ✓ **73 passed** (72 既有 + 1 new dependents auth gate test) / 1.40s。`OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=... python3 -m pytest backend/tests/test_installer_api.py backend/tests/test_installer_router_smoke.py -q` → ✓ **105 passed** (含 5 new BS.8.4 PG-live cases) / 4.00s。`OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=... python3 -m pytest backend/tests/test_installer_router_smoke.py backend/tests/test_installer_api.py backend/tests/test_pep_gateway_install_coaching.py (a) `depends_on` 真值今天 catalog feed 可能尚未 populate 完整 — modal 在 dependents=0 時的「safe to proceed」copy 仍適用、後續 catalog populate 完整後 modal 自然開始顯示警告、無前端 / hook 改動；(b) Dependency 是 single-level；transitive `A → B → C` 警告 BS.8.x follow-up 可加 `transitive=true` query flag + recursive CTE — 今天 single-level 已是大部分操作員實際 mental model；(c) PEP `tier_unlisted` 通用 coaching card 對 dependency 場景仍無 dedicated copy — endpoint; pure SQL UPDATE that stamps `last_sync_status='pending_manual'` + clears `last_synced_at` (jumps row to top of `idx_catalog_subscriptions_due` `NULLS FIRST` queue) + bumps `updated_at`; tenant-scoped via `WHERE tenant_id = $tid` + 404 if not found; emits audit log `catalog_source_sync_requested`; (2) **`<SourcesTab />`** — purely presentational (page wrapper owns the data flow via `useCatalogSources` hook + per-action callbacks); list view sorted newest-first by `created_at` desc; per-row layout = feed_url + auth method + refresh interval + last-synced relative chip + sync-status chip; per-row buttons = Sync now (calls `onSync` with the source) + Remove (opens inline confirm overlay; only after confirm calls `onRemove`); toolbar = source count + `Add source` button; (3) **Add-source form** — inline (no Dialog) collapsed under toolbar; fields = Feed URL (required, http/https) + Auth method dropdown (none/basic/bearer/signed_url) + Auth secret ref (only when method != none) + Refresh interval seconds input + preset dropdown (1h/6h/24h/7d/30d); form validation runs on submit via `validateSourcesTabForm` (URL regex + non-empty secret-ref when auth != none + 60-2592000s range + no-whitespace secret-ref); on validation fail → inline form-error banner + onAdd not called; on submit success → form closes + reset; on backend error → inline form-error banner + form stays open; (4) **`useCatalogSources` hook** — REST poll on mount + manual `refresh()` + mountedRef guard (mirrors `useInstalledEntries` pattern); exposes `sources: CatalogSource[]` + `loading` + `error` + `refresh()`; no SSE subscription (sources mutate only on operator intent — caller-driven refresh after each action is enough); (5) **5 lib/api helpers** — `listCatalogSources` (GET, w/ optional `?enabled_only=true` query) / `createCatalogSource` (POST 201) / `patchCatalogSource` (PATCH, URL-encoded path) / `deleteCatalogSource` (DELETE 200) / `syncCatalogSource` (POST 200, no body); all walk `request<T>()` for CSRF / X-Tenant-Id / retry; (6) **4 validation helpers** — `normaliseCatalogSourceFeedUrl` (trim) / `validateCatalogSourceFeedUrl` (length + http/https scheme) / `validateCatalogSourceAuthSecretRef` (max 256 chars + no whitespace, mirrors backend `_no_whitespace_in_ref` field_validator) / `validateCatalogSourceRefreshInterval` (60s-30d integer range, mirrors backend `Field(ge=60, le=30*86400)`); (7) **每 row testid 規範**：`sources-tab` / `sources-tab-toolbar` / `sources-tab-count` / `sources-tab-add-button` / `sources-tab-empty` / `sources-tab-list` / `sources-tab-fetch-error` / `sources-tab-fetch-retry` / `sources-tab-error` / per-row `sources-tab-row-{id}` (帶 `data-source-id` + `data-enabled`) + `-url-{id}` / `-auth-{id}` / `-interval-{id}` / `-last-synced-{id}` / `-status-{id}` (帶 `data-status`) / `-disabled-{id}` (only when not enabled) / `-sync-{id}` / `-remove-{id}` / `-confirm-{id}` + `-confirm-cancel-{id}` / `-confirm-delete-{id}` / form: `sources-tab-form` / `-feed-url` / `-auth-method` / `-auth-secret-ref` / `-refresh-interval` / `-refresh-preset` / `-form-error` / `-form-cancel` / `-form-submit` / `-form-close`. **設計決策（為何加 backend sync route 而非純前端 stub）**：(a) "sync now" 是 operator 的明確 intent — 需要 audit log row (`catalog_source_sync_requested`) 證明何時何人按了；無 backend route → 前端按鈕無 effect、只是視覺安慰劑、是 hostile UX；(b) 用 `last_synced_at = NULL` + `last_sync_status='pending_manual'` 的 stamp 模式 — 既有 `idx_catalog_subscriptions_due` partial index 已 `NULLS FIRST` 排序，cron worker 落地時 free 拿到 manual-sync 優先；(c) 無同步 fetch in-request — 純 SQL UPDATE，request path < 10ms；feed worker (separate row) 才實際 fetch + parse + INSERT catalog_entries；(d) `pending_manual` discriminator 是 stable string、未來 worker 可 distinguish manual vs cron-driven sync source。**設計決策（為何 Sources tab 是 inline form not Dialog）**：(a) Add-source form 字段少 (4-5 fields)、不需要 Dialog 的 modal-overlay 隔離；inline form 讓 operator 在 add 同時看到既有 list；(b) Cleanup-unused / Disk-breakdown / Uninstall-confirm 都是 modal — 它們要 *阻塞* operator 注意力 (destructive 或 multi-step)；Add source 是 *additive*、不需要阻塞；(c) Future row (BS.8.6 Custom entry form) 字段更多 (10+) — 那一 row 會用 Dialog 是合理 escalation。**設計決策（為何 Remove 用 inline confirm overlay 而非 UninstallConfirmModal-style Dialog）**：(a) Subscription remove 沒有 dependency-check 需求 (subscription 是 catalog feed 來源、不被 catalog_entries 反向 reference)；(b) UninstallConfirmModal 的 two-stage gate 是因為 dependents 警告需要 explicit acknowledge；source remove 沒有 dependents 概念、一個 confirm overlay 足夠；(c) Inline overlay 比 modal 輕量 (無 portal mount / 無 backdrop) — 適合 per-row destructive 的操作 affordance。**設計決策（為何沒做 page-level admin gate）**：BS.5.x ship 的 page-level RBAC + `<ApiErrorToastCenter />` 已 cover non-admin 走進 sources tab 的場景 (按 button → 403 → toast 跳出 "admin role required")；本 row 不重新 invent admin gate；future row (BS.8.6 中 + 適當時) 可考慮 page-level conditional render 把 sources tab 從 nav 拿掉 for non-admin、本 row 範疇外。**Module-global state audit**（per `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md` Step 1）：(1) Backend `sync_source`: 純 SELECT-then-UPDATE 路徑、無 module-level 共享 state；每 worker 獨立 acquire `db_pool.get_pool()` conn、SQL 走 PG transaction、SQL UPDATE … RETURNING 在單 tx；Multi-worker model: 每 worker 看到相同 PG snapshot、tenant scope 透過 `WHERE tenant_id = $3` — Answer #2 (透過 PG 協調)。 (2) Frontend `useCatalogSources`: 內部 state 為 per-component-instance React state + useRef、無 module-level cache、每 tab 自己 fetch — Answer #1。(3) Frontend `<SourcesTab />`: 全 per-instance React state、無 cross-render mutation、`AUTH_METHOD_LABEL` / `SYNC_STATUS_TONE` / `REFRESH_PRESETS` / `FORM_INITIAL` 全 frozen const records — Answer #1。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) `sync_source` UPDATE … RETURNING 在單 tx; 同 request 收到的 row 必為 post-commit state — 無 R-A-W race。 (2) `createCatalogSource` / `deleteCatalogSource` / `syncCatalogSource` POST/DELETE 在 PG commit 之後 return HTTP 200/201、`refreshCatalogSources` 在 promise resolve 後 fire、新 GET 看 post-commit state via PG MVCC — frontend 與 backend 收斂同一 state 在一個 tick 內。 (3) Stale-list window: 兩 round-trips 之間另一 admin 可能 add/delete 新 source；T2 看到的 list 可能比上次看到的多/少；這是 race 不是 bug、refresh 自動 reconcile — 同 BS.8.4 stale-dependents window。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep**（`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`）對 10 個變動檔（catalog.py + 2 backend test desc；per-row layout = display_name + id + vendor + family + version + size + source-chip 一行 + Edit / Remove 按鈕；toolbar = entry count + Add custom entry button；(3) **Add / Edit dual-mode inline form** — `formMode = closed | create | edit:{entryId}`；id 在 edit mode disabled (id 是不變 PK)；source 在 edit mode disabled (operator vs override 是 row 創建時固定的 layer)；form 字段佈局走 2-column grid (id+source / vendor+family / display_name+version) + 單列 install_method / install_url+TestURL button / sha256 + 2-column grid (license+size); (4) **URL ping** — 「Test URL」按鈕呼叫 `pingUrlFn` (or `defaultPingCustomEntryUrl` HEAD no-cors fetch、5s timeout、CORS opaque → kind=skipped、DNS/TCP fail → kind=error、200 → kind=ok)；result 用 testid `data-ping-kind` 區分；URL 變動會 reset 為 `idle` (前一次 ping 結果不再相關); (5) **sha256 format** — `validateCatalogEntrySha256` 走 `^[0-9a-f]{64}$` regex (大寫 / 短少 / 多餘字元都 reject); (6) **唯一 id 檢查** — `validateCustomEntryFormFields` 在 create mode 拿 `existingIds` (從 `useCatalogEntries()` 的 in-memory snapshot 萃取)、若 id 在集合內 reject form 不 round-trip；edit mode skip 此檢查 (因為 id 必然在集合內 — 那就是被編輯的 row)；後端的 UNIQUE constraint 仍是最後一道防線 (兩 admin 同時 create 同 id 的 race 會被後端 409 catch); (7) **license 字段** — 不在 catalog_entries 表上、改 hijack `metadata.license` (alembic 0051 + seed 0052 已用此 key)；form `entryToFormFields` 從 `entry.metadata.license` 讀、`formFieldsToPayload` 把 license merge 回 `metadata.license` (空字串 = 刪除 key)、其他 metadata key 純 pass-through 不動 (避免 textarea round-trip JSONB 的資料損失風險); (8) **size estimates** — `parseSizeBytesInput` 接受純 integer (`100`, `100_000`) 或 suffix (`100MB`, `1.5 GB`, `1MiB`)、metric vs binary 雙語法都認、超過 1 TiB 或負數回 string 錯誤訊息；preset dropdown 5 段 (10MB / 100MB / 500MB / 1GB / 5GB) 一鍵 fill; (9) **depends_on 多選** — `pickAvailableDependsOnIds(allEntries, selfId)` 排除 self + 排除 hidden + 排序 ASC；UI 用 checkbox-grid (per-id chip + `data-checked` attr) + max-h-40 overflow-y-auto 防 list 過長 page 變超長；空集合顯示 hint「No other catalog entries to depend on yet」; (10) **每 row testid 規範**：`custom-entry-form` / `custom-entry-form-toolbar` / `custom-entry-form-count` / `custom-entry-form-add-button` / `custom-entry-form-empty` / `data-entry-source`) + `-name-{id}` / `-id-{id}` / `-vendor-{id}` / `-family-{id}` (帶 `data-family`) / `-version-{id}` / `-size-{id}` / `-source-{id}` (帶 `data-source`) / `-edit-{id}` / `-remove-{id}` / `-confirm-{id}` + `-confirm-cancel-{id}` / `-confirm-delete-{id}` / form: `custom-entry-form-form` (帶 `data-form-mode`={create/edit}) / `-form-close` / `-field-id` / `-field-source` / `data-checked`) + `-depends-on-checkbox-{id}` / `-form-error` / `-form-cancel` / `-form-submit`. **設計決策（為何 4 helpers 而非 5）**：替代 = 加 `getCatalogEntry(id)` 第 5 個 helper；問題：(a) 整個前端 form 不需要 single-entry GET — 用 `listCatalogEntries({limit:500})` 一次拉全部、edit 時直接從 in-memory snapshot 取對應 row、避免額外 round-trip；(b) 真實 single-entry refresh 場景 (e.g. operator 想看其他 admin 剛改的 row) 走 list refresh 自然 cover；(c) 留升級空間：未來若 form 需要 raw layer view (override + shipped 雙 row)、再加 `getCatalogEntry({id, raw:true})` 拉 layer-aware 視圖。**設計決策（為何 license 走 metadata.license 而非新增 column）**：替代 = alembic 0054 加 `license TEXT` column；問題：(a) catalog_entries.metadata 是 JSONB 開放 schema (alembic 0051 + ADR §3.4 forward-compat 規則)、license 是天然 vendor-specific metadata、不需要升 column；(b) 既有 seed 0052 已用 `metadata.license: "MIT"` (line 549)、本 row 只是 surface 它讓 admin 編輯、無 schema drift；(c) 若未來業務需要 license 走 SQL `WHERE license=?` 過濾、再加 column 是 correct evolution path、本 row 不投機升 schema。**設計決策（為何 URL ping 是 frontend HEAD vs backend proxy）**：替代 = 新增 `POST /catalog/entries/probe-url` 後端 endpoint 走 backend HTTP fetch 避開 CORS；問題：(a) 後端 endpoint = SSRF surface (admin 可呼叫 backend 去拉任意 URL、雖然 admin 是 trusted、但仍是 attack-surface); (b) 前端 HEAD no-cors 對 typical vendor CDN URL 是「DNS + TCP succeed」的 sanity check、不需要 read response body、CORS opaque response 視為 skipped (operator 知 URL DNS-resolvable 即足夠); (c) admin 可選擇 跳過 ping 直接 submit、後端 backend 真正下載仍 enforce sha256 + size 檢查、ping 不是最後一道防線; (d) 純前端 = 0 backend 改動、scope-minimal。**設計決策（為何不加 page-level admin gate）**：BS.5.x 既有 page-level 的 RBAC + `<ApiErrorToastCenter />` 已 cover non-admin 走進 custom tab 的場景 (按任一 button → 403 → toast 跳出 admin role required)；本 row 不重新 invent；future row 可考慮 page-level conditional render 把 sources + custom tab 從 nav 拿掉 for non-admin、本 row 範疇外。**Module-global state audit**（per `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md` Step 1）：(1) Frontend lib/api.ts: 4 helpers 為 stateless function wrappers around `request()`、validators 為 stateless pure functions、constants 為 frozen const records — 0 module-level mutable state；(2) Frontend `useCatalogEntries`: 內部 state 為 per-component-instance React state + useRef、無 module-level cache、每 tab 自己 fetch — Answer #1 (per-tab stateless derivation)；(3) Frontend `<CustomEntryForm />`: 全 per-instance React state、`FAMILY_LABEL` / `INSTALL_METHOD_LABEL` / `SIZE_PRESETS` / `FORM_INITIAL` 全 frozen const records、無 cross-render mutation — Answer #1; (4) Frontend page.tsx: `customCatalogEntries` 為 useMemo derive (純函式)、handlers 為 useCallback 閉包 — Answer #1; (5) Backend: 0 changes，純 reuse BS.2.1 既有 routes — pool conn 走 PG MVCC + tenant scope via `WHERE tenant_id = $1` — Answer #2 (透過 PG 協調)。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) `createCatalogEntry` / `patchCatalogEntry` / `deleteCatalogEntry` POST/PATCH/DELETE 在 PG commit 之後 return HTTP 200/201、`refreshCatalogEntries` 在 promise resolve 後 fire、新 GET 看 post-commit state via PG MVCC — frontend 與 backend 收斂同一 state 在一個 tick 內。(2) Stale-list / unique-id race window: 兩 admins 同時 create 同 id；frontend uniqueness 檢查在 in-memory snapshot 不抓得到、第二個 commit 拿後端 UNIQUE 409 throw、form-error banner 顯示 — 是 race 不是 bug、refresh 自動 reconcile。(3) URL ping 是純 read-only、無 R-A-W race。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep**（`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`）對 7 個變動檔（lib/api.ts + use-catalog-entries.ts + custom-entry-form.tsx + page.tsx + 3 frontend test files）0 命中。**測試** `npx vitest run test/lib/catalog-entries-api.test.ts test/hooks/use-catalog-entries.test.tsx test/components/custom-entry-form.test.tsx` → ✓ **50 passed** (23 lib + 6 hook + 21 component) / 1.05s。`npx vitest run` BS.6/7/8 frozen 17 test files (含本 row 3 新檔) → ✓ **320 passed across 17 files** / 1.63s — BS.6.x + BS.7.x + BS.8.1/8.2/8.3/8.4/8.5 frozen 零 regression。`npx tsc --noEmit` → 0 新錯誤 (僅 BS.6.x HANDOFF 紀錄過的 3 個 `integration-settings.tsx` GitForgeTokenTestResult pre-existing 仍在)。`npx eslint components/omnisight/custom-entry-form.tsx hooks/use-catalog-entries.ts app/settings/platforms/page.tsx lib/api.ts test/lib/catalog-entries-api.test.ts test/hooks/use-catalog-entries.test.tsx test/components/custom-entry-form.test.tsx` → 0 errors / 0 warnings。**Production status: dev-only** — 純前端 TS/TSX additive (4 helpers + 8 validators + 11 constants + 1 hook + 1 component + 1 page wrapper edit + 3 test files)、0 schema migration / 0 alembic / 0 pip dep / 0 npm dep / 0 prod image 變動 / 0 env knob / 0 feature flag / 0 backend route 新增；後端 worker restart 不需要 (本 row 不動後端) + Next.js dev/prod build 自動 carry 即啟用。**Next gate: deployed-active** — 前端打包進 master 後立即接通：Custom tab (`?tab=custom`) 從原本不存在變成 4-tab 排列 + 從 PG 拉真實 catalog_entries 過濾 operator/override (`GET /catalog/entries?limit=500`) + Add 按鈕開 inline form 走 `POST /catalog/entries` (admin only、409 dup / 422 bad sha256 / 404 missing shipped base 全 surface) + Edit 按鈕 in-place 走 `PATCH /catalog/entries/{id}` + Remove 經 inline confirm 後走 `DELETE /catalog/entries/{id}` 軟刪除 (operator/override 走 hidden=TRUE flag、shipped 走 tombstone override row)。**注意事項 / follow-up rows**: (a) 今天 Custom tab 對 non-admin 仍 render 但所有 action 會 403 — BS.5.x 既有 `<ApiErrorToastCenter />` 已 surface；future row 可考慮 page-level conditional render 把 sources + custom tab 從 nav 拿掉 for non-admin；(b) URL ping 對 typical 跨 origin URL 走 no-cors HEAD、return opaque response、視為 `skipped` (DNS+TCP 成功但無法 read status)；admin 真要驗證 URL 內容 (e.g. 看 tar.gz size 是否合理) 需走 backend probe-url endpoint、未來 row 範疇；(c) metadata 編輯只 surface license 一個 key、其他 metadata key 純 pass-through 不顯示／不修改；future row 可加 raw JSON textarea 編輯器、本 row 範疇外；(d) BS.8.7 unit test row 仍會補 ~14 cases 的 `<CustomEntryForm />` 加深測試 (本 row 落 21 component cases — 已超過 ~14 case TODO 預估、BS.8.7 可改補 bootstrap.py 既有 record_bootstrap_step / get_bootstrap_step / list_bootstrap_steps 100% reuse)。**核心 contract**：(1) **STEP_VERTICAL_SETUP 是 optional**（NOT in `REQUIRED_STEPS`；finalize 不卡此 step；test_step_vertical_setup_constant_is_not_required 鎖此 invariant、防未來 refactor 誤加入）；(2) **`_verticals_chosen()` 三種 False 情境**（row 缺 / payload 缺 / payload 空 list）+ 1 種 True 情境（list 含至少一個 vertical）— 走 payload-truthy 而非 row-existence 因 BS.9.2 wizard 必須在 operator 「打開 step 然後不選」時 re-render picker（不能把空意圖當作肯定）；(3) **PG JSONB metadata column**（alembic 0054）允許 `metadata @> '{"verticals_selected": ["mobile"]}'::jsonb` 容器查詢、未來 BS.9.5 batch enqueue 進 install_jobs 時可走 PG 索引；SQLite stays TEXT-of-JSON 因 SQLite 無 native JSONB；(4) **record_bootstrap_step `$3::jsonb` cast**——asyncpg 對 python str 預設 bind 為 TEXT、JSONB 欄位不接 TEXT 必須顯式 cast；test_record_bootstrap_step_writes_jsonb_metadata 走 round-trip 驗證 + JSONB containment query 確認 cast 工作正常。**設計決策（為何 `_verticals_chosen` 走 payload truthiness 而非 row existence）**：替代 = 純 row 存在即 True；問題：(a) operator 可能 click 「open vertical setup」之後不選任何 vertical 直接 close、留下一個 verticals_selected: [] 的 row、若用 row-existence 為信號就會 incorrectly skip wizard step；(b) BS.9.2 wizard 在 mount 時讀 `_verticals_chosen()`、True 時跳過 picker；要真的有 vertical 被選才應 skip。本 row 走 payload truthiness 對齊 wizard UX 預期。**設計決策（為何用 alembic 0054 而非 TODO 預定的 0053）**：TODO L2714 schema-migration 表規劃 0053 給 BS.9.1、但 BS.2.4 (catalog_override_nullables) 已先用 0053；本 row 用下一個 free slot 0054、TODO 預定的「0054 (buffer)」hence 順移。整個 alembic 鏈線狀 0039 → 0051 → 0052 → 0053 → 0054、單 head 不破壞 CI alembic-graph guard。**設計決策（為何 PG JSONB DROP DEFAULT → ALTER TYPE → SET DEFAULT 三步式）**：替代 = 一步 `ALTER COLUMN metadata TYPE jsonb USING metadata::jsonb`；問題：PG 報 22023 「default for column 'metadata' cannot be cast automatically to type jsonb」因為 column default 仍是 TEXT '{}', 需先 DROP DEFAULT 才能 ALTER TYPE、最後 SET DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb。本 row 三步式對齊 PG 標準 ALTER COLUMN 模式。**Module-global state audit**（per `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md` Step 1）：(1) bootstrap.py 既有 module-level `_BOOTSTRAP_MARKER` Path / `_gate_cache` dict / 本 row 加的 `STEP_VERTICAL_SETUP` const — 全部不變動 (`_BOOTSTRAP_MARKER` 透過 `_reset_for_tests` 走 monkeypatch、`_gate_cache` 走 `_gate_cache_reset` reset)；新增的 `_verticals_chosen` 純讀 PG，無 module-level state；STEP_VERTICAL_SETUP 是 const、所有 worker 從 source code 推導同樣的值——Answer #1（per-worker stateless derivation）；(2) alembic migration 純 DDL、無 in-memory cache、無 module-level singleton、cross-worker 由 PG 自身保證一致——Answer #1（DB-coordinated）。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) record_bootstrap_step 走 ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE 單 statement、無 R-A-W race；(2) alembic ALTER COLUMN TYPE 是單 transaction、ACCESS EXCLUSIVE lock、無 concurrent writes during migration window；(3) `_verticals_chosen()` 讀 metadata 欄位、不寫——無 R-A-W race。**Production readiness gate**：(a) 0 new Python / OS package — production image 不需 rebuild；(b) `scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_pg.py::TABLES_IN_ORDER` 無變動 (bootstrap_state 仍以名字列在 TABLES_IN_ORDER、column type 變動是 type-level 不需 migrator 改動)；(c) Production status of THIS commit: **dev-only**. Next gate: ``deployed-inactive`` once BS.9 全 epic 落地後 alembic chain (0051 + 0052 + 0053 + 0054) 在 prod PG 跑一次。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep**（`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`）對 4 個變動檔 0 命中（test 檔 line 27 + 114 兩處 hit 是 pre-existing comment、非 production code、本 row 未動）。**測試** `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=... PYTHONPATH=. pytest backend/tests/test_bootstrap_state.py` → ✓ **26 passed** (19 既有 + 7 新) / 7.23s。`backend/tests/test_bootstrap_finalize.py + test_bootstrap_reset.py + test_bootstrap_smoke_subset.py` → ✓ **24 passed** / 8.35s — 既有 bootstrap suite 零 regression。`test_alembic_pg_live_upgrade.py` 和 `test_migrator_schema_coverage.py::test_alembic_pg_matches_sqlite_column_by_column` 在本機 env 因 subprocess `module 'platform' has no attribute 'python_implementation'` env-level glitch 失敗——pre-existing 在 master 上同樣 fail（git stash 驗證），本 row 非 regression、env-level subprocess 啟動 alembic 命令的 Python compat 問題、與 migration 內容無關、CI runner 仍正確跑（實際 DDL 在 in-process pg_test_alembic_upgraded fixture 已 exercise）。**Production status: dev-only** — next gate `deployed-inactive` 待 BS.9 全 epic 落地後 alembic chain 0054 在 prod PG 跑一次（`alembic upgrade head`、~2 秒、無 maintenance window 需求）。**Next gate: deployed-inactive** — operator 在 BS.9 全 epic 完工後 (BS.9.2/.3/.4/.5/.6) 跑 `alembic upgrade head`、prod PG 之 `bootstrap_state.metadata` column 變 JSONB；BS.9.2 wizard frontend 寫入 STEP_VERTICAL_SETUP 後 `_verticals_chosen()` 即生效。**注意事項 / Follow-up rows**: (a) BS.9.2 (`app/bootstrap/page.tsx` 加新 wizard step + skip button) 是下一個 row、可在本 row 之後立即接手；(b) BS.9.3 / BS.9.4 (vertical multi-pick + Android API selector components) 依賴 BS.9.2 wizard frame、可平行開發；(c) BS.9.5 (batch enqueue → /installer/jobs) 需 BS.9.3 + BS.9.4 完成；(d) TODO L2714 schema-migration 表已更新標記 0053 → 0054 + 註明 0053 被 BS.2.4 先取走的歷史（本 row 在表底新增「0054 → BS.9.1」一行覆蓋舊「0053 → BS.9.1」的預定）。 -->

loop verticals_selected 走 `createInstallJob(entryId, {metadata})`、每個 install 通過既有 R20-A PEP HOLD coaching card；不在 backend 走批次 endpoint 因 PEP HOLD 流程已經逐筆 idempotent + 跨 install metadata 不同 (Mobile 帶 android_api、其他 vertical 純 vertical 標記)。(2) **vertical → primary entry_id 由 `BOOTSTRAP_VERTICAL_PRIMARY_ENTRY` 鎖**——每 vertical 一個 headline SDK；operator 安裝完整 family 走 `Settings → Platforms`；BS.9.6 將加 drift test 鎖此 map 對齊 alembic 0052 catalog seed。(3) **Android API config 走 metadata + body 雙路徑**——createInstallJob 的 `metadata.android_api` 給 install sidecar 用 (BS.7 install pipeline 讀此 payload 配 sdkmanager `--api X`)；recordVerticalSetup body 的 `android_api` 給 bootstrap_state.metadata 持久化、之後 re-open 步驟可 rehydrate 選擇。(4) **two-phase commit 失敗安全**——install jobs enqueue 失敗即停 (set commitErr、不寫 backend metadata)；install 成功但 recordVerticalSetup 失敗時 install jobs 已在 PG (operator 看 drawer 仍見進度) + step 仍 pending (operator 可 Confirm 重試 backend record；createInstallJob idempotency_key 不重用所以重試會多 N 個 install job — 接受作為 "operator chose to retry" 痕跡)。(5) **422 雙向防護鎖 android_api**——Mobile 必帶 android_api (`kind=android_api_required`)、非 Mobile 不能帶 android_api (`kind=android_api_unexpected`)；防 stale tab / hand-crafted payload 寫半完整 metadata。(6) **規範化排序 idempotent**——backend `_verticals_in_set` 走 BOOTSTRAP_VERTICAL_IDS canonical order 重排、re-commit 順序不影響 metadata 寫入內容。(7) **BS.7 drawer 全 reuse**——install drawer 已在 `components/providers.tsx` 透過 `<InstallProgressDrawerLive />` 全 app mount、SSE `installer_progress` 自動寫入 hook 的 jobs[]；BS.9.5 不需任何 drawer / SSE 額外 wiring。(8) **Skip 仍 client-only**——保 BS.9.2 既有契約、`_verticals_chosen()` 仍 return False、operator 可重開 wizard step。**設計決策（為何走 frontend loop 而非 backend batch endpoint）**：替代 = `POST /installer/jobs/batch [{entry_id, loop 走既有 createInstallJob client、每 vertical idempotency_key 獨立、PEP HOLD 提示 N 次 (operator 看到 N 個 vertical 各自 approve 比一次性 approve N items 透明)；(d) install 失敗時 partial-N 已 enqueued + drawer 顯示、frontend 可 surface 哪個 vertical 失敗。**設計決策（為何 recordVerticalSetup 寫 install_job_ids 而非 record per install_job）**：替代 = backend 在 `/installer/jobs` POST 內也寫 bootstrap_state？問題：(a) 違反 single responsibility (install endpoint 不該知 bootstrap_state schema)；(b) install 失敗時 bootstrap_state 寫了一半、回滾複雜；(c) recordVerticalSetup 一次 ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE 寫整 metadata 是 atomic、re-commit 安全。**設計決策（為何 onSelectionChange 而非 controlled selected state）**：替代 = parent 持有 selected[] 完全 controlled；問題：(a) BS.9.3 既有 component 已 ship + 15 tests 鎖、改成 controlled 要重寫；(b) onSelectionChange 是 readonly notification、parent 拿來決定是否 mount AndroidApiSelector、不需要 push selection 進 component；(c) Confirm 走 onCommit 帶 payload 已是契約承諾、parent 不需要 selected 來 commit。**Module-global state audit**（per `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md` Step 1）：(1) backend route handler 純 stateless、`_BOOTSTRAP_VERTICAL_IDS` / `_ANDROID_API_LEVELS` / `_ANDROID_EMULATOR_PRESETS` 都是 module-level frozen tuple、所有 worker 從 source code 推導同樣的 const——Answer #1 (per-worker stateless derivation)；route 透過 `record_bootstrap_step` 走 PG ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE、cross-worker 由 PG 自身保證一致——Answer #1 (DB-coordinated)。(2) frontend `VerticalSetupStep` 全 React component-local state (useState/useCallback)、無 module-level cache；`BOOTSTRAP_VERTICAL_PRIMARY_ENTRY` 是 const map、render 時讀同樣的值——Answer #1 (per-render stateless derivation)。(3) BootstrapVerticalStep 加的 `onSelectionChange` 走 useEffect on selected change、無 closure over module state、跨 instance 獨立。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) frontend handleCommit 走 sequential await — install job N 在 install job N-1 resolve 後才 fire、無 asyncio.gather race；(2) recordVerticalSetup 在所有 install enqueue 完成才 fire、走 ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE 單 statement、無 R-A-W race；(3) backend bootstrap_vertical_setup → record_bootstrap_step → audit.log 三 step 各自獨立 transaction、audit 失敗不阻 record (best-effort)、record 失敗 short-circuit 500；(4) BS.7 install drawer 走 SSE installer_progress 訂閱、與 bootstrap_state 寫入路徑解耦、無互相依賴。**Production readiness gate**：(a) 0 new Python / OS / npm package — backend 重用既有 audit / record_bootstrap_step / pydantic / fastapi 全 import；frontend 重用既有 lucide-react Loader2 / AlertCircle / Layers / Check icon；(b) 0 schema 變動 — `bootstrap_state.metadata` JSONB 已 BS.9.1 落地；(c) 1 new backend route `POST /bootstrap/vertical-setup` — 走既有 router prefix `/bootstrap/*`、bootstrap trigger、sorted output 確定性)；(2) 5 個 vertical primary entry 鎖在 `_TOOLCHAIN_KEYWORD_MAP` (android/esp-idf/nodejs/python-uv/arm-gnu)、新增 toolchain 是 code change 不是 catalog drift；(3) "current conversation" = INVOKE `command` query param、"expected to run" = backlog/assigned/in-progress tasks 的 title+description 加 running agents 的 thought_chain (completed/blocked 排除)；(4) "已 installed catalog" = install_jobs latest non-uninstall 'completed' (mirror /installer/installed canonical filter)；(5) suppress 機制 per-slug (`missing_toolchain:android-sdk-platform-tools` 是獨立 suppress key)、frontend sessionStorage tracking 避免重複 coach；(6) `installed_entries=None` 路徑保 BS.10.5 unit test 不需 PG fixture。**設計決策(為何 keyword map 寫死而非 catalog query)**：BS.10 路徑 hot path on every INVOKE、map lookup O(1)、catalog query 是 PG round-trip + dependency on schema；新增 toolchain 平均每月 < 1 次、是 code review 適合的節奏；catalog 失效 (PG down) 時 coach 仍可指出方向。**設計決策(為何 sync `_detect_coaching_triggers` + caller pre-load installed_entries)**：planner 一直是 sync function、改 async 會 cascade `_plan_actions` + 兩個 endpoint generator；caller 在 async 上下文 fetch installed_entries 一次、塞進 state 走 sync planner 是最小擴散；BS.10.5 test 可直接 drive sync function 不需 asyncio fixture。**設計決策(為何 priority-0 command 短路後 missing-toolchain 仍有意義)**：command 短路只發生在 operator 主動下指令時、coach 在 priority-4 (nothing-to-do); 但 backlog task 無 idle agent 可 assign 時也走 priority-4、此時 task title 帶 'esp32' 等關鍵字 → coach 觸發 missing_toolchain:espressif-esp-idf-v5 提示先安裝 toolchain。**Module-global state audit (per docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md Step 1)**：(1) `_TOOLCHAIN_KEYWORD_MAP` 是 module-level frozen const、所有 uvicorn worker 從 source code 推導同樣的值——Answer #1 (per-worker stateless derivation)；(2) `_load_installed_entry_ids` pure SELECT scoped by tenant_id、走 PG MVCC 跨 worker 一致——Answer #2 (DB-coordinated)；(3) `_detect_coaching_triggers` 純函式讀 state dict、無 module-level mutable state。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) install 完成 → install_jobs row state='completed' COMMIT → 下次 `/invoke/stream` 的 `_load_installed_entry_ids` SELECT 走 PG snapshot isolation 看到 committed row → trigger 不再發 (BS.7 install drawer 看到 100% 後下一次 INVOKE 自動下 missing_toolchain coach)；(2) 同一 INVOKE 內 state snapshot 與 installed_entries 拍照式一致、無 R-A-W race；(3) suppress set 是 frontend sessionStorage 同 request 內固定。**Production readiness gate**：(a) 0 new Python / OS / npm package — 重用既有 `backend.db_pool.get_pool` / asyncpg / json / logger；(b) 0 schema 變動 — install_jobs / catalog_entries 既有 columns；(c) 0 new backend route — 擴充既有 `/invoke/stream` + `/invoke` 100% reuse 不動）。**核心 contract**：(1) prompt 教 5 個 canonical vertical display name (Android SDK Platform Tools / ESP-IDF v5 / Node.js LTS 20 / Python toolchain (uv) / ARM GNU Toolchain 13)、deeplink URL 形狀、bilingual action label、「永不貼 slug」三項規則；(2) priority guidance 鎖 BS.10.2 templated 同優先級（missing_toolchain > stale_pep > empty_workspace；missing 在場時跳過 empty_workspace 框架；stale_pep co-fire 走單行 reminder 不擴張子列）讓 LLM-on / LLM-off 兩條路徑 UX 對齊；(3) `_build_coach_context` 給 LLM 完整 (display name, hint, install URL) — LLM 只負責措辭、不需要再從 slug 推導翻譯，降低 hallucination 機率；(4) 未知 slug 走 `_TOOLCHAIN_DISPLAY.get(slug, (slug, "toolchain"))` defensive fallback 但 import-time drift assert 推到 CI red、prod 不會走進 degraded UX；(5) trigger order 保留 — `_detect_coaching_triggers` 已 sorted output、`_build_coach_context` 走線性遍歷不重排、跨 run 確定性；(6) 中英 action label 寫進 prompt 本體（`[安裝 / Install](url)`）讓 LLM 默認生成此 shape、operator base 多語混合（CJK 默認 + 英文操作員）兩端都有清晰 CTA；(7) prompt 6-line output cap 維持、新增 priority 段是 system prompt 自身擴張不算 output；(8) prompt 不含任何 user-controlled 字串（triggers 是 planner-emitted 列表）— injection surface 維持 R20 Phase 0 的低風險 baseline、`INJECTION_GUARD_PRELUDE` 仍 prepended、`secret_filter.redact()` 仍 over output。**設計決策（為何同時擴 `_build_coach_context` 而不只是 prompt）**：替代 = 只擴 prompt、`_build_coach_context` 走 `else: parts.append(f"- {t}")` raw slug 路徑；問題：(a) prompt 教 LLM「不准貼 slug 給 operator」，但 context block 自己就是貼 slug 給 LLM、語意衝突（LLM 看到 `- missing_toolchain:android-sdk-platform-tools` 仍可能 echo）；(b) LLM 不知道 slug → display name 對應、必須自己「翻譯」、增加 hallucination 風險（萬一 LLM 把 `python-uv` 翻成 "Python venv tooling" 而非 "Python toolchain (uv)"、catalog headline 不對齊、operator paste 進 search 找不到）；(c) install URL 也不能放心要求 LLM 自行 derive — `/settings/platforms?entry=<slug>` 是 BS.10.4 收的 frontend 契約、字面對齊比 LLM 推導安全；(d) 同 row 一併擴契約對稱、後續維護不會「prompt 教了一件事但 context block 沒餵資料」失衡。**設計決策（為何 priority guidance 寫進 system prompt 而非 context block）**：替代 = `_build_coach_context` 動態算 priority 後只傳優先 trigger；問題：(a) priority rule 是 LLM 行為規範（「先安裝再跑」是 productive path）、寫 prompt 是教 LLM 思考方式、context block 應保純資料；(b) BS.10.2 templated fallback 已實現該優先級（missing_toolchain 主訊息 + stale_pep 順帶提醒），prompt 教同樣規則讓 LLM-on / LLM-off 兩路徑 UX 對齊；(c) 萬一未來新增第 4 個 trigger 不再是 missing_toolchain leads，prompt 改一行 vs context block 改邏輯，prompt 改更輕；(d) LLM 看完整 trigger 列表 + priority rule 比看 pre-filtered 列表更靈活（例：未來 stale_pep alone 可能有不同的 lead 措辭）。**設計決策（為何 prompt bullet 把 5 個 display name 列出而非外部 reference）**：替代 = prompt 寫「display name 來自 context block」；問題：(a) LLM 第一次讀 prompt 缺少具體例子、可能 hallucinate 不存在的 display name（catalog drift）；(b) 5 個 entry 短列表 + bilingual hint 在 prompt 內字數可控（< 200 token）；(c) prompt + context block 雙向冗餘是刻意設計、防 LLM 在 context block 過長被截時仍能依 prompt 推產生合規措辭；(d) 5-vertical 列表是 BS.10.1 `_TOOLCHAIN_KEYWORD_MAP` 的 mirror、新增 vertical 是 code change（連 prompt 一起改）、不是 catalog 動態 drift。**Module-global state audit**（per `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md` Step 1）：(1) `_COACH_SYSTEM_PROMPT` 是 module-level frozen const string、所有 uvicorn worker 從 source code 推導同樣的 prompt——Answer #1（per-worker stateless derivation）；(2) `_build_coach_context` 純函式、讀 input triggers + pending_count → 推導 output 字串、無 module-level mutable state、跨 instance 獨立；(3) 在 `_build_coach_context` 內讀 `_TOOLCHAIN_DISPLAY` 與 `_toolchain_install_url` 也是 frozen const + pure function、call-time late binding 無 import order 顧慮；(4) prompt 不含 secret / tenant-specific 字串、跨 worker 同等待遇。**Read-after-write timing audit**：純函式 + 純 string formatting、無 IO、無 PG / Redis / file system access、無 R-A-W race。LLM call (`_generate_coach_message`) 由 `redact()` 收尾走 secret-leak 過濾、與 BS.10.3 prompt 變更解耦。**Production readiness gate**：(a) 0 new Python / OS / npm package — 純 string literal 變動 + 既有 `_TOOLCHAIN_DISPLAY` / `_toolchain_install_url` 重用；(b) 0 schema 變動；(c) 0 new backend route；(d) `scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_pg.py::TABLES_IN_ORDER` 無變動；(e) Production status of THIS commit: **dev-only**. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep**（`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`）對 backend/routers/invoke.py → 0 命中。**測試**：18 個 inline smoke / drift checks（prompt 涵蓋 3 個 trigger / deeplink shape / bilingual label / priority rule / 永不貼 slug / 6-line cap / 既有路徑零 regression × 4 / 1-of-1 missing 渲染 / N-of-N missing 渲染 / 5 個 canonical slug 全覆蓋 / co-fire stale_pep / 既有 BS.10.2 drift assert 仍 hold / 未知 slug fallback / 跨 trigger 順序保持 / 未知 legacy trigger backwards-compat）→ all pass / < 1s；`pytest backend/tests/test_orchestrator_enhanced.py -x -q` → 8 passed / 0.56s 零 regression；`python3 -m ruff check backend/routers/invoke.py` → All checks passed；`python3 -c "from backend.routers import invoke"` clean import + drift assert 在 import-time 通過。BS.10.5 `test_invoke_coach_toolchain.py` 將涵蓋 LLM-driven path 的 prompt + context block 整合（~8 cases）。**Production status: dev-only** — next gate `deployed-active` 待 BS.10.4（frontend deeplink）+ BS.10.5（tests）收齊後 operator 在 prod 跑 INVOKE 看到 missing-toolchain coach card → LLM 走 prompt 規則生成 markdown link → 點 deeplink → Settings → Platforms → install。 -->

auto-scroll grid + auto-focus install button 完整收網（1 source file + 1 new test file + TODO.md row mark + HANDOFF entry / 0 schema / 0 new dep / 0 new backend route — BS.6.1 既有 `<CatalogTab />` 的 `data-testid="catalog-tab-card-slot-{id}"` 契約 + BS.6.2 既有 `<CatalogCard />` 的 `data-testid="catalog-card-action-{install|update|retry}"` 契約 100% reuse 不動）。**核心 contract**：(1) 5 個新 module-level export 鎖契約 — `PLATFORMS_DEEPLINK_ENTRY_PARAM = "entry"` (mirror backend `_toolchain_install_url` 字面)、`PLATFORMS_DEEPLINK_TIMEOUT_MS = 4000`、`PLATFORMS_DEEPLINK_POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 80`、`PLATFORMS_DEEPLINK_ACTION_TESTIDS = ["catalog-card-action-install", "catalog-card-action-update", "catalog-card-action-retry"]`、`buildPlatformsEntryDeeplink(id)` / `catalogTabCardSlotTestId(id)` 兩個 helper；(2) 1 個新 `useEffect` 含 4 步行為 — 讀 `?entry=` 段、`tab !== "catalog"` 時 `router.replace` 強制切到 catalog tab 不污染 back-stack、80ms 間隔輪詢 DOM 找 slot 達 4s budget、找到後 `scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth", block:"center"})` + `requestAnimationFrame` 內 `focus({preventScroll:true})` (按 install/update/retry 優先級拿第一個可 focus 按鈕) + `router.replace` 消費 `entry` 段 (refresh / re-render 不重觸發)；(3) `handledEntryRef` per-mount ref 防同 id 重觸發、跨 mount (refresh) 重置允許 operator 點同 deeplink 重觸發；(4) `block: "center"` 把目標卡放螢幕中央而非頂端、operator 一眼看到 hero 卡而非埋在 sub-tab nav 下；(5) `preventScroll: true` 防 focus 與 scrollIntoView 競爭 — 沒這個 flag 時某些瀏覽器會 re-snap 滾動到 focused element 頂端覆蓋我們選的中央位置；(6) jsdom + 老瀏覽器忽略 `behavior` / `preventScroll` 兩 option — try/catch + plain fallback 讓 test harness 不爆；(7) 4s timeout 之後仍標 `handledEntryRef` 防 catalog 永久空時無限輪詢 — operator 點 deeplink 再來會走新 navigation = ref ≠ id 重觸發 (已存在的 catalog 空狀態是上游 BS.6.5 `useCatalog()` hook 未實作的 pre-existing condition、BS.10.4 不擴大 scope 拉這條進來)；(8) test file 鎖 `_toolchain_install_url` (Python 端) ↔ `buildPlatformsEntryDeeplink` (TS 端) 字面同步、URL 編碼防 future entry id 帶空格 / unicode、testid 模板鎖 `<CatalogTab />` 對齊。**設計決策(為何 polling 而非 MutationObserver)**：替代 = MutationObserver 監聽 catalog tab 容器；問題：(a) MutationObserver 需要先選好 root，但 root 可能還沒 mount (`<Suspense>` fallback)、需先 polling root 再 observe — 兩層複雜度；(b) polling 80ms cadence 對 DOM 重 render 觸發性低、瀏覽器負擔可忽略；(c) polling 自帶超時邊界 (4s budget) 對 catalog 永久空狀態防無限懸掛；(d) MutationObserver 的 React 18+ batched render 有時會錯過中間幀、polling 一定會看到最終 commit。**設計決策(為何 router.replace 消費 entry param 而非 `lastHandledEntryRef` 單機制)**：替代 = 留 URL param 不動、只用 ref 防重觸發；問題：(a) URL 留著 `entry=` 段 → 即使已落地、再 share / paste URL 還是會觸發 scroll-to-entry、operator 中途滾走後 re-share 把人拉回 anchor 的 UX 不直覺；(b) refresh 後 ref 重置 + URL 仍有 entry → 重觸發 scroll、operator 在頁面工作時不期望被 re-anchor；(c) consume URL 是 web app 標準作法 (Linear / Notion / GitHub PR commenting 都是讀完即清)；(d) ref 仍保留是 same-render 多次觸發的防護 (router.replace 不是同步、entry 可能在 ref 設好之前還在 URL)、雙保險。**設計決策(為何 priority install→update→retry 而非單一 install testid)**：替代 = 寫死 `catalog-card-action-install`；問題：(a) 同一 catalog entry 在不同 installState 下顯示不同 button (available→install / update-available→update / failed→retry)、operator deeplink 時可能 entry 已是其他 state；(b) `PLATFORMS_DEEPLINK_ACTION_TESTIDS` 三個 testid 走 reduce 找第一個 mount 的 — operator 跑 INVOKE 時 espressif-esp-idf-v5 可能已是 update-available state、deeplink 仍能 focus update button、UX 不退化成 "deeplink 失效"；(c) installed / installing state 沒 actionable button — focus 步驟被 graceful skip、scrollIntoView 仍生效讓 operator 看到目標卡 + 該 state 的 badge / progress；(d) 三 state 是 BS.6.2 既有契約、reduce 是純函式無維護成本。**Module-global state audit**(per `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md` Step 1)：(1) 5 個 module-level export 是 frozen const / pure function、所有 Next.js renderer 從 source code 推導同樣的值——Answer #1 (per-render stateless derivation)；(2) `handledEntryRef` 是 React `useRef` 屬於 component-instance state、每個 `<PlatformsPageInner />` mount 各自擁有、跨 tab 各 React tree 獨立 (browser-only, uvicorn `--workers N` 不適用)；(3) effect 內所有 closure variable (`cancelled` / `elapsedMs` / `timeoutId`) 都是 effect-local、cleanup function 走 `cancelled = true` + `clearTimeout` 防 stale closure；(4) `searchParams` / `tab` / `router` 是 Next.js navigation hook 提供的引用、跨 worker 不共享 (browser-only)。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) 整個 effect 走 React `useEffect` deferred phase、commit 之後執行、無 SSR / hydration 競爭；(2) 內部 `router.replace` 是 deferred (Next.js push state)、不會 re-fire 同 effect 同步、searchParams 變化在下個 React tick 才觸發 effect 重跑、`handledEntryRef` 防同 id 二次處理；(3) consume URL 與 ref 設值是同 frame — 即使 router.replace 快路徑、ref 已標、下次 effect 立即 short-circuit；(4) `requestAnimationFrame` focus 路徑只在 cancel 之前執行、`cancelled = true` 是 cleanup 唯一 mutation 沒有跨 effect race；(5) install button click 走 BS.7.1 既有 `handleInstall` 路徑 (createInstallJob → /installer/jobs → R20-A PEP HOLD)、不在 BS.10.4 timing surface 內。**Production readiness gate**：(a) 0 new Python / OS / npm package — 純 React 19 / Next.js 15 既有 hook (`useEffect` / `useRef` / `useSearchParams` / `useRouter`) + DOM `querySelector` / `scrollIntoView` / `focus` / `requestAnimationFrame`；(b) 0 schema 變動 — frontend only；(c) 0 new backend route；(d) `scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_pg.py::TABLES_IN_ORDER` 無變動；(e) Production status of THIS commit: dev-only。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep** (`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`) 對 app/settings/platforms/page.tsx + test/components/platforms-deeplink.test.tsx → 0 命中 (全 frontend、無 PG SQL)。**測試**：7 個 test case (`PLATFORMS_DEEPLINK_ENTRY_PARAM` literal / `buildPlatformsEntryDeeplink` 兩 canonical id + 特殊字元 URL encoding / `catalogTabCardSlotTestId` 字面 / action testid 順序 / poll vs timeout 比例 / `coercePlatformsTab` 零 regression) → all pass / < 1s；49 cases (catalog-install-state-wiring / catalog-install-wiring / catalog-failure-wiring / catalog-tab / installed-tab / platforms-deeplink) → all pass / 1.3s 鄰居測試零 regression；`npx eslint app/settings/platforms/page.tsx` → 0 警告；`npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json` → 0 新錯誤 (15 個 pre-existing in integration-settings.tsx 與 BS.9.5 baseline 一致)。**已知非-row-scope 條件**：catalog tab 目前不接 `useCatalog()` 因為 BS.6.5 hook 未落地 — 此狀態下 BS.10.4 deeplink 4s 後 graceful timeout、operator 看到 hero / tab nav 但卡片區仍空。BS.10.4 的 deeplink hook 行為正確、forward-compatible — 一旦 BS.6.x 後續 row 把 entries 灌進 `<CatalogTab>`、deeplink 自動開始 land。Production status: dev-only — next gate deployed-active 待 BS.10.5 (backend tests) 收齊 + BS.6.5/6.x 把 `<CatalogTab entries=...>` 灌起來後、operator 在 prod 跑 INVOKE 看到 missing-toolchain coach card → 點 markdown link → Settings → Platforms → 自動 scroll + focus install button → Enter 觸發 R20-A PEP HOLD → install。-->

dev 機器無 PG 也能跑這條 row、CI 也不需要在這一個 file 上等 alembic upgrade。**設計決策 (為何 22 cases 而不是 8 cases)**：原始預估 ~8 case 是按 epic 個數估的；實際拆解每個 helper 的 contract 後、自然落到 22 cases（每個 helper 1–4 個 contract assertion）；單 case 跑時 < 50ms、22 cases 全跑 < 600ms、增加 test 完整性 vs 跑時間是合理 trade-off；spec 寫 `~8 cases` 不是上限、是粗估。**設計決策 (為何 inline 一個小 `_state()` helper 而不是 conftest fixture)**：替代 = pull 進 conftest 共享 fixture；問題：(a) 此 state 只在 1 個 TestClass 內用、conftest 是跨 file 共享面、scope 不對；(b) 4 個 sentinel task (backlog / in_progress / completed / blocked) + 1 個 running agent 是這個 contract 的閱讀重點、抽出去後讀者要兩處跳；(c) Pydantic 物件創建 < 1ms、不重用沒成本；(d) BS.10.5 是 lock contract 不是壓 throughput、可讀性 > DRY。**Module-global state audit (per docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md Step 1)**：(1) test 不修改任何 module-level mutable state、`_TOOLCHAIN_KEYWORD_MAP` / `_TOOLCHAIN_DISPLAY` 是 frozen const 只讀；(2) `monkeypatch` 走 pytest per-test scope、teardown 自動還原；(3) `db_pool.get_pool` 替換是 monkeypatch.setattr scoped to single test、不污染後續 test；(4) `Agent` / `Task` 是 BaseModel 物件、無共享 state。**Read-after-write timing audit**：所有純函式 + 單一 monkeypatch 替換、無 IO 並發、無跨 worker 路徑、無 R-A-W race。**Production readiness gate**：(a) 0 new Python / OS / npm package — 純 pytest + 既有 backend.models / backend.routers.invoke / backend.auth.User / backend.db_pool；(b) 0 schema 變動；(c) 0 new backend route；(d) `scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_pg.py::TABLES_IN_ORDER` 無變動；(e) Production status of THIS commit: dev-only。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep** (`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`) 對 backend/tests/test_invoke_coach_toolchain.py → 0 命中（純 unit test、無 PG SQL）。**測試**：22 個 cases → all pass / 0.50s（5 個 hint detect 涵蓋 5 vertical / 2 個 empty / 2 個 corpus / 3 個 tenant id / 4 個 detect / 1 個 backwards-compat / 2 個 templated / 1 個 LLM context / 2 個 PG fallback + 各 TestClass marker case）；neighbor `test_orchestrator_enhanced.py` + `test_pep_gateway_install_coaching.py` → 48 passed / 0.59s 零 regression；`python3 -m ruff check backend/tests/test_invoke_coach_toolchain.py` → All checks passed；`python3 -c "from backend.tests import test_invoke_coach_toolchain"` clean import。**Production status: dev-only** — BS.10 epic 5/5 收尾完成；next gate `deployed-active` 待 BS.6.5/6.x 把 `<CatalogTab entries=...>` 灌進去後、operator 在 prod 跑 INVOKE 看到 missing-toolchain coach card → 點 deeplink → Settings → Platforms → 自動 scroll + focus install button → Enter 觸發 R20-A PEP HOLD → install。-->

flag — 使用者在 Settings → Display 選 `off` 但 OS 沒開啟時、CSS 無條件生效、`animate-spin` 仍在跑、單 surface vs 多 surface 行為不一致；(b) Settings page 自己就在用 BS.3.5 hook 鏈 (`useEffectiveMotionLevel`) — 同一個 4-input resolver、Install drawer 卻不接 = 矛盾的 a11y 契約；(c) 全域 CSS 規則把 duration 設 0.01ms + iteration-count 1、技術上 spinner 仍跑一圈 (極快)、語意上不是「完全靜止」、對前庭敏感者不嚴謹；(d) BS.3 motion library 已 ship `useEffectiveMotionLevel()` 是 single source of truth、增加一個 hook call 比新增 CSS rule cheaper、不增加 CSS specificity 戰場。**設計決策(為何 Display Settings page 走 `reducedMotion || userPref === "off"` 而非 `useEffectiveMotionLevel()`)**：替代 = page 內也呼叫 `useEffectiveMotionLevel`；問題：(a) page 已經有 `usePrefersReducedMotion()` 拿 OS flag + 自己 maintain `userPref` state — 兩個 signal 已經夠；(b) page 不依電池規則 (因 page 不需要 motion 自身、只需要知道「動畫該關掉嗎」)、battery degrade 時 page 仍能正常運作；(c) `useEffectiveMotionLevel` 內部 100% 依賴 `usePrefersReducedMotion` 短路 + `useBatteryAwareMotion` 規則、page 自寫一行 `||` 比再呼一個 hook 少一個 hook chain layer + 在 component 樹較深時可避免 useEffect 重 render 串級；(d) `userPref === "off"` 是 page 自己的 source of truth (使用者剛剛在這頁選的)、用 `useEffectiveMotionLevel` 反而要等 BS.3.5 event bus round-trip 才回傳值、UX 慢一拍。**設計決策(為何 chip + panel + bar 三層都加 `data-motion-spin` 而非單一 root attr)**：替代 = 只在 chip / panel root 加；問題：(a) test 從 outer attr 推斷 inner 是否有 spin = inferring not asserting、未來 inner 改成 hard-coded `animate-spin` (繞過 motionOff) = silent regression；(b) 4 個動畫面是 4 個獨立 contract、每個都該 self-document、不要把推導交給讀者；(c) attr 不增加 React reconcile cost、純 string set、性能可忽略；(d) 同 surface 多個 attr 鎖各層、未來新增第 5 個動畫面也走同模式、保持 codebase 內一致性。**Module-global state audit (per docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md Step 1)**：(1) 4 個 surface (Install drawer / Settings Display / Catalog detail / Hero) 動畫狀態都是 per-component instance — `useEffectiveMotionLevel()` 走 `usePrefersReducedMotion` MQL listener (per-tab) + `useBatteryAwareMotion` (navigator.getBattery + per-session ref) + `useUserMotionPreference` (J4 round-trip + BS.3.5 event bus) — 三條 signal 全 per-tab、無 module-level mutable state、跨 worker 不適用 (browser-only)——Answer #1 (per-instance derivation)；(2) BS.3.5 event bus `omnisight:motion-pref-changed` 是 `window.dispatchEvent` per-tab、跨 tab / 跨 pollution；(4) test mock `vi.mock("@/hooks/use-effective-motion-level", ...)` 是 per-test scope、afterEach reset `mockLevel = "dramatic"` / `mockOsReducedMotion = false` 防 cross-test
