root keydown / 子元素 keydown 都 trigger / 非 Escape 不 trigger / autofocus back button on mount / integration: click → detail → back → focus restored) + `ARIA grid semantics` (2: role/aria-label/rowcount/colcount + 每 slot role="gridcell") + `empty grid` (1: 0 entries 時 active focus id="" + grid 不 render)) — BS.11 A11y audit + polish + density 持久化 epic 2/7 row — Tab 順序 / Arrow keys / Enter 進 detail / Esc 回 list 完整收網 (3 source 擴 + 1 page 擴 + 1 new test file + TODO.md row mark + HANDOFF entry / 0 schema / 0 new dep / 0 new backend route / 0 production code 動 backend)。**核心 contract**：(1) Roving tabindex — 一個 grid 只有一個 tab anchor、active card 拿 tabIndex=0 / 其他 -1、operator Tab 進 grid 落到一張卡、再 Tab 出去到 footer 不必逐張穿過 N 張；(2) `data-catalog-active-focus-id` 屬性在 tab root 暴露當前 anchor id 給 BS.11.5 visual diff testing + a11y 工具；(3) Arrow keys — Right/Left walk linear; Up/Down 跳 `columnCount`; Home/End 跳第一/最後；preventDefault 防 page scroll；clamp 在 grid 邊界不 wrap (符合 ARIA grid pattern 預設行為)；(4) Enter / Space 不被 grid handler 攔截 — fall through 到 card 自己的 BS.6.2 onKeyDown handler 觸發 onSelect → 開 detail；(5) Esc 在 detail panel 任意子元素冒泡到 article root 都觸發 onBack；(6) Detail panel 開啟時 mounting effect autofocus back button (matches modal-dismiss focus-management ARIA pattern)；(7) Detail panel 關閉後、grid re-mount → useEffect rAF focus restore 把焦點還給 operator 剛剛點開的卡 (`pendingFocusRef`)；(8) Filter / search 把 focused id 篩掉時、`activeFocusId` 自動 fallback 到第一張 visible card 防 tab anchor 卡在 -1；(9) 兩條 grid path (virtualized + static) 都掛同一個 `handleGridKeyDown` + role="grid" + aria-rowcount/colcount + 每 slot 加 `data-keynav-card-slot=true` + role="gridcell" — 走 windowed 路徑時 operator 鍵盤體驗一致。**設計決策(為何不在 grid root 用 document.keydown 而是 component-local onKeyDown)**：替代 = mount 時 `document.addEventListener("keydown", ...)`；問題：(a) 跨 instance 全域監聽會在多個 catalog tab (例如 dev preview + main app shell) mount 時互相觸發；(b) Esc 邏輯在 catalog-detail-panel 本來只應該在 panel mount 時生效、document-level 監聽會在 panel unmount 後仍 fire 直到 cleanup 跑、race window 不必要；(c) React 的 onKeyDown 走 React event delegation、自動 cleanup、無 listener leak；(d) 鍵盤事件原本就是 focus-target-bubbled (focus 在 grid 內 → keydown 自然冒泡到 grid root) — 走 React onKeyDown 完全足夠。**設計決策(為何 roving tabindex 走 context.tabIndex 而非 grid 自己包 focusable wrapper)**：替代 = slot wrapper 自己拿 tabIndex=0、card 維持 tabIndex=0；問題：(a) 雙重 tab stop 每張卡兩個 stop、BS.11.2 spec 「Tab 順序」希望單一 anchor、雙 stop 違反；(b) slot wrapper 是純 layout div、把 click affordance 跟 focusable 分離給 SR 用戶讀 confused — card root 已是 `role="button"` 操作真正 affordance、focus 該停在 button、不是無語意 div；(c) 走 context 把 tabIndex 透過 renderCard contract 推給 CatalogCard、page wrapper 一行 `tabIndex={tabIndex}` 串接、保持 single-source-of-truth；(d) 不破 BS.6.2 既有 catalog-card test (line 355 鎖 tabindex="0" 仍生效因為 default 0、僅 grid 主動傳 -1 才覆蓋)。**設計決策(為何 detail panel 加 role="region" + tabIndex=-1 而非 role="dialog" + 走 modal pattern)**：替代 = role="dialog" + aria-modal=true + focus trap；問題：(a) BS.6.3 的 detail panel 不是 modal — 它是 inline-expand 替代 grid 的「同層」surface、operator 仍能看到 toolbar / breadcrumb；(b) role=dialog 會讓 SR 宣告「dialog opened」+ focus trap 鎖在 panel 內、跟 inline-expand 視覺語意不一致；(c) tabIndex=-1 + role=region 是「可程式化 focus 但不在 tab order 中」、配 autofocus on mount 達到 announce + sensible 起點而不需要強制 trap；(d) Esc 仍能用、operator 仍能 Tab 出去 panel 探索其他控制、沒被綁住。**設計決策(為何 rAF defer focusCardById 而非同步 focus)**：替代 = setFocusedEntryId 後立刻 .focus()；問題：(a) React 還沒 commit 新 tabIndex、舊 active card 的 tabindex=0 還沒翻 -1、新 active 還沒翻 0、focus() 跑時 DOM 跟 state 不一致；(b) 某些 jsdom / 真瀏覽器版本對 tabindex=-1 的 .focus() 行為差異 — 確保 commit 完成再 focus 走最穩路徑；(c) requestAnimationFrame 不增可見延遲 (~16ms 一幀)、 operator 視覺上同步；(d) 跨 effect cleanup 用 cancelAnimationFrame 防 stale closure。**設計決策(為何 cssEscape 寫 defensive shim 而非直呼 CSS.escape)**：替代 = `CSS.escape(id)`；問題：(a) 某些 jsdom 版本 CSS.escape 缺席、會 throw；(b) catalog entry id 字符集是 `[a-zA-Z0-9_-.:/]` 集合、shim 走 fallback 把任何非 word/dash 字元都 backslash 掉、安全足夠；(c) 不依特定 jsdom 版本、CI 升級 jsdom 不會突然 break。**Module-global state audit (per docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md Step 1)**：(1) `focusedEntryId` / `pendingFocusRef` / `selectedId` 全 component-local React state、每個 `<CatalogTab />` instance 各自擁有、跨 tab / 跨 worker 不共享 (browser-only, uvicorn `--workers N` 不適用)——Answer #1 (per-instance derivation)；(2) `cssEscape` 是 module-level pure function、無 mutable state、跨 worker call 同樣的字面 id 推導出同樣的 escaped string；(3) `focusCardById` 是 useCallback 的 closure over scrollContainerRef + document、每 instance 獨立、無 module-level pollution；(4) `handleGridKeyDown` 是 useCallback 走 visibleIds / columnCount / focusCardById deps、每 keypress 重算 next idx 純 pure；(5) detail panel 的 `backButtonRef` 是 component-instance ref、跨 panel mount 不共享。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) 整條鏈純 React render + DOM event — 無 IO 並發、無 PG / Redis / file system access、無跨 worker 路徑、無 R-A-W race；(2) rAF focus 是 deferred next-frame、commit 跟 focus 走 React → browser idle queue 一致時序、無競爭；(3) detail panel autofocus useEffect 走 commit 之後執行、無 SSR / hydration 競爭；(4) restore focus 的 useEffect 在 detailOpen 翻 false 後 rAF 跑、grid re-mount 已完成、querySelector 拿得到新 mount 的 slot；(5) `pendingFocusRef.current = null` 在 useEffect cleanup-style 處理、`requestAnimationFrame` cancel 走 `cancelAnimationFrame` 在 cleanup 內、無 stale closure。**Production readiness gate**：(a) 0 new Python / OS / npm package — 純 React 19 / Tailwind / 既有 hook / 既有 KeyboardEvent / DOM querySelector / 既有 motion library；(b) 0 schema 變動 — 純 frontend；(c) 0 new backend route；(d) `scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_pg.py::TABLES_IN_ORDER` 無變動；(e) Production status of THIS commit: dev-only。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep** (`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`) 對 catalog-tab.tsx + catalog-card.tsx + catalog-detail-panel.tsx + app/settings/platforms/page.tsx + test/components/catalog-keyboard-nav.test.tsx → 0 命中 (純 frontend、無 PG SQL)。**測試**：19 個 cases → all pass / 0.25s；neighbor 12 個檔 (catalog-tab / catalog-card / catalog-detail-panel / catalog-install-state-wiring / catalog-install-wiring / catalog-failure-wiring / catalog-keyboard-nav / reduce-motion-compliance / platforms-deeplink / install-progress-drawer / platform-hero / installed-tab) → 160 passed / 1.52s 零 regression；npx eslint 對 5 個動到的檔案 → 0 errors / 1 個 pre-existing warning (catalog-tab.tsx 的 react-hooks/incompatible-library disable 在 BS.11.1 之前就 unused、不負責修)；npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json → 0 新錯誤 (3 個 pre-existing in `integration-settings.tsx` 與 BS.11.1 baseline 一致)。**Production status: dev-only** — BS.11 A11y audit + polish + density 持久化 epic 2/7 row 收尾完成；next gate `deployed-active` 待 BS.11.3 (Screen reader labels) + BS.11.4 (Density persist) + BS.11.5 (Visual diff testing) + BS.11.6 (Performance budget) + BS.11.7 (Lighthouse a11y score) 全 ship 後、operator 在 prod 用 keyboard-only flow (Tab → 進入 catalog grid → 第一張卡 → ArrowRight/Down 走遍全 grid → Enter 開 detail → Esc 回 grid + focus 回到剛點開的卡) → BS.11 a11y 鏈完成 keyboard 維度。-->

reason / installing→failed fallback / update with nextVersion / update fallback) + `<CatalogTab /> aria-live` (4: live region 屬性 sr-only role status aria-live polite aria-atomic true / 跨 rerender `<CatalogDetailPanel /> aria-label + announcer DOM` (3: 首次 mount 沒 announcement / 同 entry 跨 rerender 觸 transition / 不同 entry id reset 防 replay)) — BS.11 A11y audit + polish + density 持久化 epic 3/7 row — 每張 card aria-label + state announcements via aria-live 完整收網 (3 source 擴 + 1 new test file + TODO.md row mark + HANDOFF entry / 0 schema / 0 new dep / 0 new backend route / 0 production code 動 backend)。**核心 contract**：(1) Card aria-label rich phrasing — 5 段「displayName, {family} catalog entry, vendor {v}, version {ver}, {status}」 SR 用戶一個 announcement 就拿全 operator 相關 context、不必逐 chip 掃；(2) status 段對 5 個 install state 有 nuance — installing 進 percent / update-available 進 nextVersion / failed 進 failureReason；(3) Tab-level aria-live polite region + role=status + aria-atomic=true + sr-only — install-state transition (e.g. BS.7 SSE flips entries[i].installState) 跨 render 自動 announce 給 SR、operator 不必盯 visual chrome；(4) buildCatalogStateAnnouncement 走「available 不 announce / installing-from-failed = retry / installing-from-update = update / installed = success / failed 走 reason 兜底 / update-available 走 nextVersion 兜底」六支精煉 transition rules；(5) 首次 mount seed previousStatesRef 不 emit — 防 SR 在 tab 開啟時被 burst N 條 entry 當前 state 的 transcript；(6) 多 entry 同 render flip — entries 順序最後 wins (per-row 通常 BS.7 SSE 一次 flip 一個 entry、罕見多 flip 場景退化成讀最新的不 worse than silent)；(7) Detail panel aria-label 對齊 card builder 的「{displayName} detail, ...」鏡像形狀 — operator 從 grid card 進 detail 兩端聽到一致的 phrasing；(8) Detail panel 跨 entry id 切換 reset previousStateRef — operator 點不同卡 detail 不會 inherit 上一張的 transition (e.g. 不會「installed successfully」 announce 在新 entry 上)。**設計決策(為何 announcer 用 role=status + aria-live=polite 而非 role=alert + aria-live=assertive)**：替代 = role=alert + aria-live=assertive；問題：(a) install-state transition 是 informational、不是 emergency — SR 用戶正在讀 vendor / version 時被 assertive 打斷會丟失閱讀上下文；(b) status + polite 在 SR 下個自然停頓 announce、operator 不會錯過但也不會被打斷；(c) Material Design / WAI-ARIA 1.2 best practice 對 progress + status update 都推薦 polite；(d) 對前庭敏感 + 認知負荷 high 的 operator polite 更友善、一致 BS.11.1 reduce-motion 對前庭友善的設計取向。**設計決策(為何 buildCatalogStateAnnouncement 在 catalog-tab.tsx 不在 catalog-card.tsx)**：替代 = 放 catalog-card 跟 buildCatalogCardAriaLabel 同檔；問題：(a) catalog-card 已 import from catalog-tab (CatalogEntry / CatalogFamily / CatalogInstallState / coerceFamily)、在 catalog-tab 反向 import buildCatalogStateAnnouncement → 循環 dep、ESM 雖 tolerate 但 jsdom + Vitest hoisting 偶爾觸發 ReferenceError 對 module init order；(b) detail-panel 也 import 該函式、需要的不是「card 的 a11y phrasing」是「state transition 的 SR phrasing」、語意上屬於 tab/state-machine 層、不是 card 視覺層；(c) catalog-tab 已 owns CATALOG_INSTALL_STATES tuple、buildCatalogStateAnnouncement 的 switch 對齊 5 個 state — 同檔內推導比跨檔閱讀清晰；(d) coerceCatalogInstallState 是 catalog-tab 私有 helper、不污染 catalog-card public API、catalog-card 仍 owns coerceInstallState (向下兼容 BS.6.8 既有 test)。**設計決策(為何 detail panel 加 panel-local announcer 而非靠 catalog-tab 的 announcer)**：替代 = detail panel 開啟時、tab announcer 仍是 announce 來源；問題：(a) detail panel 開啟時、catalog-tab 渲染 detail-slot 取代 grid、SR 用戶聚焦在 panel、tab announcer 還在 page 層級 — 雖技術上能聽到但語意不對 (panel 範圍 vs 全 tab 範圍)；(b) detail panel 是獨立 SR landmark (role=region) — 它的 progress / state 應該由它自己的 live region 通報、避免「我在 detail 但 announcement 來自 grid」的混淆；(c) tab announcer 對 entries 列表全 diff、detail panel announcer 只對「當前選中的 entry」diff — 後者更 focused、SR 用戶聽到的是「跟我現在看的卡相關」的訊息；(d) panel 切 entry id 時 reset 是必要的 — 跟 tab announcer 行為脫鉤反而避免「我點新卡看到舊 announcement」的 race。**設計決策(為何 first-mount seed 不 emit 而非 emit 全部 N 條 transcript)**：替代 = 第一個 useEffect run 把所有 entry 的當前 state 都當成 transition；問題：(a) operator 開 catalog 時就被 SR 讀 N 條「Alpha installed / Bravo available / ...」transcript、極其吵、且大部分是無意義的 baseline；(b) WAI-ARIA 對 status region 的 best practice 是「on update announce」不是「on mount announce」 — 對應的就是 mount 時 setStateAnnouncement("") 不變、ref seeded、後續 update 才 emit；(c) 此行為跟 catalog-detail-panel 切換 entry 重置 announcer 一致、兩者收束在同個「announce only on real transition」原則。**Module-global state audit (per docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md Step 1)**：(1) `previousStatesRef` (CatalogTab) / `previousStateRef` (CatalogDetailPanel) / `[stateAnnouncement, setStateAnnouncement]` 全 component-instance state — 每個 `<CatalogTab />` / `<CatalogDetailPanel />` instance 各自擁有、跨 tab / 跨 worker 不共享 (browser-only, uvicorn `--workers N` 不適用)——Answer #1 (per-instance derivation)；(2) `coerceCatalogInstallState` (catalog-tab 私有) / `buildCatalogStateAnnouncement` / `buildCatalogCardAriaLabel` / `buildCatalogDetailPanelAriaLabel` 全 module-level pure functions、無 mutable state、跨 worker call 同樣 input 推同樣 output；(3) `STATE_PALETTE` / `FAMILY_LABEL` / `STATE_META` / `CATALOG_INSTALL_STATES` 全 frozen module-level const、只讀；(4) `useRef` 是 React per-fiber state、跨 unmount / remount 重置、無 listener leak。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) 整條鏈純 React render + state setter — 無 IO 並發、無 PG / Redis / file system access、無跨 worker 路徑、無 R-A-W race；(2) useEffect 走 commit phase、setState 觸發 next React tick render、order deterministic；(3) 多 entry 同 render flip 走線性 for loop entries 順序、lastMessage = latest match、deterministic；(4) detail-panel previousStateRef 寫在 useEffect (commit 之後)、讀也在 useEffect、無 SSR / hydration race；(5) 跨 entry id 切換時、previousStateRef.current 是否該 reset 在 effect-body 內判斷、與 setState 同 effect 行內順序 deterministic、無 stale closure (entry deps in array 確保 effect 重跑)。**Production readiness gate**：(a) 0 new Python / OS / npm package — 純 React 19 / Tailwind sr-only / 既有 hook / 既有 ARIA pattern；(b) 0 schema 變動 — 純 frontend；(c) 0 new backend route；(d) `scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_pg.py::TABLES_IN_ORDER` 無變動；(e) Production status of THIS commit: dev-only。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep** (`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`) 對 catalog-card.tsx + catalog-tab.tsx + catalog-detail-panel.tsx + test/components/catalog-screen-reader.test.tsx → 0 命中 (純 frontend、無 PG SQL)。**測試**：28 個 cases → all pass / 0.84s；neighbor 12 個檔 (catalog-card / catalog-tab / catalog-detail-panel / catalog-keyboard-nav / reduce-motion-compliance / catalog-install-state-wiring / catalog-install-wiring / catalog-failure-wiring / platforms-deeplink / installed-tab / install-progress-drawer / platform-hero) → 160 passed / 1.27s 零 regression；npx eslint 對 4 個動到的檔案 → 0 errors / 1 個 pre-existing warning (catalog-tab.tsx 的 react-hooks/incompatible-library disable 在 BS.11.1 之前就 unused、本 row 不負責修)；npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json → 0 新錯誤 (3 個 pre-existing in `integration-settings.tsx` 與 BS.11.2 baseline 一致)。**Production status: dev-only** — BS.11 A11y audit + polish + density 持久化 epic 3/7 row 收尾完成；next gate `deployed-active` 待 BS.11.4 (Density persist) + BS.11.5 (Visual diff testing) + BS.11.6 (Performance budget) + BS.11.7 (Lighthouse a11y score) 全 ship 後、operator 在 prod 用 SR (NVDA / VoiceOver / TalkBack) 跑 catalog flow (Tab 進 grid → 第一張卡 SR 讀 rich aria-label → 點 Install → BS.7 SSE flip state → polite live region announce 「install started」→ 完成後 「installed successfully」) → BS.11 a11y 鏈完成 SR 維度。-->

contract**：(1) Density 走 J4 server-of-record — operator 換裝置仍看到同樣 density (compact / comfortable / spacious)、跟 BS.3.3 motion 同模式；(2) Same-tab event bus `omnisight:density-pref-changed` (mirror `omnisight:motion-pref-changed`) — 一個 tab 內多個 catalog tab instance / 未來其他 surface 的 density consumer 共享 single source of truth、不 remount；(3) 跨 tab / 跨裝置同步走 BS.3.3 已 ship 的 J4 SSE channel `preferences.updated` (`backend/routers/preferences.py::set_preference` 已在 PUT 後 `emit_preferences_updated`) — 第二台裝置在下次 mount 時 `getDensityPreference()` fetch 拿到最新 PG row；(4) `DENSITY_PREFERENCE_KEY = "catalog_density"` 是 J4 row primary key 一部分、frontend / backend 兩端 lock 同字面、drift 立刻 CI red；(5) Optimistic update + rollback — `setDensity` 立刻 setState、API rejection 時還原前值 + re-throw、UI 立即 feedback 不 wait round-trip、失敗時 visible state 跟 server 一致；(6) Hydration flag — 區分「還沒 fetch / 拿到 default」vs「PG 確實 default」、未來 BS.11.x 加 skeleton 時可用；(7) `cancelled` flag 防 stale resolution race (component unmount mid-fetch、fetch 後 setState 死 component);(8) 4 個既有 test 從 mock `@/lib/storage` 換 mock `@/hooks/use-user-density-preference`、useState-style shim 同步 setter、保 toggle 行為一致、不破 BS.6.8/11.2/11.3 既有契約。**設計決策(為何走 J4 user_preferences 沿用而非新 density_preferences 表)**：替代 = `CREATE TABLE density_preferences (...)`；問題：(a) `user_preferences` 已是 generic `(user_id, pref_key, value)` key-value store、density 只是 N 個 key 中一個、新 schema 無增益；(b) Alembic migration cost — 新 table 要寫 upgrade/downgrade + 加進 `scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_pg.py::TABLES_IN_ORDER` + 加 dummy data fixtures，但這條 row 完全不需要這些；(c) operational cost — 多一張 table 多一條 backup / monitoring path、後台 query 也要多一個 join；(d) BS.3.3 motion 已 ship `motion_level` key 同模式、density 走 `catalog_density` 對齊、operator 一個 PG row 一次 query 拿全 prefs (`/user-preferences` list endpoint)；(e) 風險 = pref_key 字串成本，但 J4 已 max_length=4096 + indexed by primary key (user_id, pref_key)、PG row size 可忽略。**設計決策(為何 lib + hook 拆兩檔 follow BS.3.3 motion-preferences 模式)**：替代 = lib 直接吐 hook、`getDensityPreference` 呼叫者跳過 React 直接 await；問題：(a) 不 follow BS.3.3 既有模式、未來新增 user_pref-bound surface (e.g. theme / density / motion / locale) 模式不一致；(b) lib 是 SoT for `key + getter + setter + event bus`、是 testable 純單元；hook 是 React-aware wrapper（state、effect、subscribe / unsubscribe lifecycle）— 兩個關注點分開單元測試覆蓋率穩；(c) lib 可被 e2e / Storybook / non-React 上下文 consume 不需 React；(d) hook 是 component-side React idiom、optimistic update + rollback 屬於 React state 邏輯、放 lib 不合適 (lib 不知道 React render tick)。**設計決策(為何 catalog-tab 完全替換 useUserStorage 不留 hybrid (localStorage + J4))**：替代 = localStorage 為 instant cache + J4 為 server-of-record、mount 時先讀 cache、background fetch J4、若不同則 localStorage write-through；問題：(a) 兩條真實來源造 drift 風險 — 第二裝置在 device A 改 density 同步到 PG、device B 下次 mount 從自己 localStorage 拿舊值閃一下；(b) implementation complexity 顯著 (write-through / read-through / invalidation / merge 衝突)、跟 BS.11.4 spec「走既有 user_preferences」直接矛盾；(c) `CATALOG_DEFAULT_DENSITY = "comfortable"` 是 fallback、operator 第一次見到 default 不是「閃舊值」、UX 上 acceptable；(d) BS.3.3 motion 也是純 J4、沒走 localStorage cache、跑了 4+ weeks 沒 UX 抱怨、density 是 visual 不是 critical-path、走同模式安全；(e) 未來如果發現第一次 fetch 太慢需要 cache、可以再加 BS.11.x sub-row 的事、不該在這條 row 過早抽象。**設計決策(為何 4 個既有 test mock 統一換成 hook mock 不保留 storage mock)**：替代 = catalog-tab.tsx 仍 import `useUserStorage` 兜底、useUserDensityPreference 走真實 J4；問題：(a) 雙 import 雙 source of truth — catalog-tab 有兩個 density state path、code review 不知哪個 win；(b) 測試 mock 不能蓋兩條 path 同時、要嘛 hook 真跑 (要 `@/lib/api` mock + AuthProvider) 要嘛 storage 真跑 (要 AuthProvider + TenantProvider)、複雜度爆；(c) test/components/catalog-tab.test.tsx 既有 `useUserStorage` mock 是 useState shim、useUserDensityPreference 也是 useState shim、行為一致無 UX 退化；(d) 4 個 test (catalog-tab / catalog-keyboard-nav / catalog-screen-reader / reduce-motion-compliance) 全用同樣 useState shim mock pattern、未來新增 catalog-tab 相關 test follow 同 pattern。**Module-global state audit (per docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md Step 1)**：(1) `lib/density-preferences.ts` 是 pure module — `getDensityPreference` / `setDensityPreference` 走 `@/lib/api` HTTP path、無 module-level mutable state、無 in-memory cache、無 singleton；event bus 走 `window.dispatchEvent` 是 per-tab DOM 事件 (browser-only、跨 worker 不適用)；跨 worker / 跨裝置同步走 J4 SSE channel `preferences.updated` (BS.3.3 已驗 PG-as-server-of-record)——Answer #1 + #2 (per-tab derivation + PG/SSE 協調)；(2) `hooks/use-user-density-preference.ts` 全 React per-instance state (`useState` / `useRef` / `useEffect`)、cancelled flag 防 stale resolution、unsubscribe on unmount、無 listener leak；(3) `components/omnisight/catalog-tab.tsx` density 從 `useUserStorage`(localStorage) 換到 `useUserDensityPreference`(J4) — 移除一條 module-level 隱性 state（localStorage key 雖 per-(tenant,user) prefixed 仍是 module-level shared）、走 PG row 是 single-process truth；(4) 4 既有 test 換成 hook mock 走 useState shim、per-test scope、afterEach reset、無 cross-test pollution；(5) backend test `test_catalog_density_round_trip` 走 pg_test_pool fixture、TRUNCATE 在 setup/teardown、per-test 隔離。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) `setDensity` 走 optimistic update 模式 — `setLocalDensity(next)` 同步、`await setDensityPreference(next)` 異步 PG PUT、rejection 時 `setLocalDensity(previous)` rollback；同一 tab 觀察者 (subscribe via `subscribeDensityPreference`) 收到 dispatched CustomEvent 跟 local setState 兩條獨立 path 帶相同值、duplicate setState 是 React no-op；(2) 跨 tab / 跨裝置 — operator 在 device A 改 density、PG row UPSERT、`emit_preferences_updated` 在 SSE bus 推 `preferences.updated` event (BS.3.3 已驗)、device B 下次 mount 跑 `getDensityPreference()` fetch 拿最新值；無 R-A-W race 因為走 PG single-row 是 source of truth + asyncpg pool ON CONFLICT 是 atomic UPSERT；(3) 同一 tab 多個 catalog tab instance — 同一 hook、同一 J4 row、第一次 mount fetch 拿 PG 值、第二次 mount fetch 拿 PG 值、event bus 在跨 instance write 時 fire、所有 instance 收到同步、無分支競爭；(4) `cancelled` flag 防 unmount mid-fetch race；(5) `densityRef latest-ref pattern` 防 setter callback 內讀到 stale closure (rollback path 需要最新 committed value)。**Production readiness gate**：(a) 0 new Python / OS / npm package — 純 React 19 + 既有 J4 user_preferences API + 既有 `@/lib/api` HTTP 客戶端；(b) 0 schema 變動 — 沿用既有 user_preferences 表、density 是 generic key-value store 中 N 個 key 之一、無 Alembic migration、無 `scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_pg.py::TABLES_IN_ORDER` 變動；(c) 0 new backend route — 沿用 GET/PUT /user-preferences/{key} 既有路由；(d) Production status of THIS commit: dev-only。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep** (`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`) 對 lib/density-preferences.ts + hooks/use-user-density-preference.ts + components/omnisight/catalog-tab.tsx + test/lib/density-preferences.test.ts + test/hooks/use-user-density-preference.test.tsx + backend/tests/test_user_preferences.py + 4 個 既有 test → 0 命中 (純 frontend + backend test 沿用既有 fixture 模式)。**測試**：17 個 new cases (11 lib + 7 hook ／hook 1 個有重複 1 個是新增) → all pass / 0.78s；neighbor 5 個檔 (catalog-tab / catalog-keyboard-nav / catalog-screen-reader / reduce-motion-compliance / platforms-deeplink) → 88 passed / 1.13s 零 regression；wider catalog 8 個檔 (catalog-card / catalog-detail-panel / catalog-install-state-wiring / catalog-install-wiring / catalog-failure-wiring / installed-tab / install-progress-drawer / platform-hero) → 100 passed / 1.26s 零 regression；motion-preferences sister test (test/lib/motion-preferences.test.ts + test/hooks/use-zero-g.test.ts) → 23 passed / 0.63s 零 regression；npx eslint 對 9 個動到的檔 → 0 errors / 1 個 pre-existing warning (catalog-tab.tsx 的 react-hooks/incompatible-library disable 在 BS.11.1 之前就 unused、本 row 不負責修)；npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json → 0 新錯誤 (3 個 pre-existing in `integration-settings.tsx` 與 BS.11.3 baseline 一致)。**Production status: dev-only** — BS.11 A11y audit + polish + density 持久化 epic 4/7 row 收尾完成；next gate `deployed-active` 待 BS.11.5 (Visual diff testing) + BS.11.6 (Performance budget) + BS.11.7 (Lighthouse a11y score) 全 ship 後、operator 在 prod 把 device A 的 density 改 compact、跨日打開 device B → BS.6.5 catalog grid 自動套用 compact、operator 不必手動同步 → BS.11 a11y 鏈完成 cross-device pref 維度。-->

attribute 可能在 spec 5s timeout 內還沒 flip；spec 走 warn 不 fail、screenshot 仍 capture、reader 從圖直接看 motion 是不是真的套上；(6) Cycle fix — 不是 BS.11.5 spec 訴求但是「跑得起來」的前置：`/settings/platforms` 同樣的 ESM 評估循環在 prod build 一直壞、本 row 順帶把它修了 (lib/catalog-families.ts leaf module)、副作用是 `/settings/platforms` SSR 終於可以 work；(7) emulateMedia + user-pref API 雙 input — motion=off 走 OS-level prefers-reduced-motion: reduce 觸 R25.2 short-circuit、motion=normal/dramatic 走 user-pref API stub (/api/v1/user-preferences/motion_level)；(8) Playwright route ordering — beforeEach 內 catch-all FIRST + specific stubs SECOND 因為 Playwright 走「最後註冊優先」(reverse registration order)、specific 註冊在後因此 win；(9) Animation 0ms clamp — `disableRunningAnimations()` 在 mount 後注入 universal CSS rule 把所有 animation/transition duration 設 0ms、screenshot 永遠抓最終幀、equivalent of Playwright's `animations: "disabled"` flag for `toHaveScreenshot()` 但全域生效。**設計決策(為何 5 viewport 選 375 / 768 / 1280 / 1440 / 1920 而非 iPhone 17 / iPad Pro / MacBook 16 ...)**：替代 = 跟 Playwright `devices['iPhone 13']` / `devices['iPad Pro 11']` 同步；問題：(a) device emulation 帶 user-agent + DPR + sometimes touch flag、跟 visual diff 訴求脫鉤、增加 spec 噪音；(b) 5 個 raw width 對齊 Tailwind config 的 5 個 breakpoint (sm:640 md:768 lg:1024 xl:1280 2xl:1536)、bracket 每個 breakpoint 都有覆蓋；(c) 375×667 是 iPhone SE / 8 / 12-mini 的 logical resolution、BS 設計鎖最低支援裝置；(d) 1920×1080 是 office monitor 默認、BS 設計鎖最高目標；(e) 1280×800 (Chromebook / 11" laptop)、1440×900 (MacBook 13")、768×1024 (iPad portrait) 是 BS web operator 主流；(f) 5 個尺寸足夠 lock responsive grid 各 breakpoint、加更多 viewports diminishing returns。**設計決策(為何 motion 選 off / normal / dramatic 而非 4 個 (off / subtle / normal / dramatic))**：替代 = 4 個 motion level 全跑；問題：(a) BS.6.6 + BS.5.4 layer activation tables collapse `off` 和 `subtle` 走同 JS-side gate (`reducedMotion = motionLevel === "off" || motionLevel === "subtle"`)、subtle = off 在 catalog tab 的 visual 維度等價；(b) `subtle` 唯一不同的是 BS.3.3 微小淡入感、不在 catalog grid surface 顯著；(c) 跑 4 個 = 24 scenarios、跑 3 個 = 18 scenarios、25% time saved with no coverage loss；(d) `off` 鎖完全靜止 / `normal` 鎖 group-breathe + parallax / `dramatic` 鎖 + glass-reflection + cursor-magnet — 三個 level 對應三個明顯的 visual band。**設計決策(為何 detail panel 只在 desktop 1440×900 跑而非每個 viewport)**：替代 = detail × 5 viewport × 3 motion = 15 scenarios；問題：(a) detail panel 是 single-column reading surface、layout 不 responsive (寬度永遠 max-w-4xl)、不同 viewport 看到的 layout 一樣；(b) 5 倍 scenarios 增加 run time / 增加 noise；(c) grid scenario 已 cover 了 responsive shell 的 5 個 viewport、detail 在 desktop 充分代表性；(d) 18 scenarios run 15s、加 12 個 detail scenarios 會破 60s timeout budget。**設計決策(為何走 next dev 而非 next build + next start)**：替代 = follow `playwright.visual.config.ts` 走 production build；問題：(a) catalog-card / catalog-tab / category-strip 的 ESM cycle 在 turbopack production build → SSR `Cannot access 'aO' before initialization` 立 fail (本 row 修了一條、但可能還有別的)、整個 prod-build 路徑不可靠；(b) BS.11.5 是 visual artifact 產出工具、不需要 prod-grade SSR 真實性、dev mode 渲染 DOM 跟 prod 一樣 (只是 unminified + HMR-aware)；(c) `next dev` 啟動 < 250ms vs `next build && next start` ≈ 4 minute、開發 iteration 快 50 倍；(d) 訊息隔離：BS.11.5 spec 不影響 z4-provider-rollup 的 prod-build path (各自 config)。**設計決策(為何 leaf module 抽 CATALOG_FAMILIES 而非 inline export Type)**：替代 = catalog-tab 不變、修 category-strip 不從 catalog-tab import；問題：(a) category-strip 的 `CATALOG_FAMILIES` 來源唯一、抽到 leaf 是最少 surgical 改變；(b) 之前 BS.6.x 設計時把 catalog-tab 當 SoT、但實際 CATALOG_FAMILIES 邏輯上是 ADR §7.1 的 schema constant、不該綁 component module；(c) 抽 leaf 也讓未來 BS.x 新增 catalog-related component 不 inherit cycle (e.g. category-strip 之後可能要 split 成 small / large variants、都從 leaf 拿 enum 不從 component module)；(d) tradeoff：多一個檔，但解的是真實 prod bug (ESM cycle 在 next 16 turbopack 兩端 fail)、值得。**Module-global state audit (per docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md Step 1)**：(1) lib/catalog-families.ts 是 leaf module、純 const + type 匯出、無任何 import / mutable state / side effect、跨 worker 推導同樣字面 enum (`["mobile","embedded","web","software","custom"] as const`)——Answer #1；(2) Fixture page 純 client-side render、6 個 catalog entry / 4 個 orbital entry 都是 module-level frozen const、每 mount 都是 immutable input、無 useState 訂閱；(3) Playwright spec 用 `page.route()` 是 per-page/per-context scoped、test 之間隔離；`stubAuthRoutes` / `stubUserPreferences` / `stubCatchAllRoutes` 全純函式 + per-page 註冊；(4) `freezeClock` 走 `addInitScript`、per-page scope、不污染 Playwright runtime；(5) Playwright config 走 `process.env.OMNISIGHT_PW_LIB_DIR` 一次性 mutation 在 module init time、CI 環境 immutable、無 worker 競賽；(6) `disableRunningAnimations` 走 `addStyleTag` 走 page lifecycle scoped、不污染後續 test。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) Playwright spec 的 `route.fulfill()` 是 sync intercept、 React fetch → route handler → response 同 microtask cycle、無 R-A-W race；(2) Frozen Date.now() via `addInitScript` 在 page navigation 前注入、page mount 時所有 `Date.now()` 取 frozen value、deterministic；(3) `disableRunningAnimations` 在 fixture mount 後 (await 完 root visible) 才注 CSS、所以 mount-time animation 走默認、screenshot 時走 0ms — 等於最終幀；(4) `emulateMedia({reducedMotion: ...})` 在 beforeEach 註冊、每 test 隔離；(5) Cycle fix 後 catalog-tab + category-strip module init order — leaf module 先 init (它沒 dep)、catalog-tab 跟 category-strip 都讀 leaf 的 final value、無 TDZ。**Production readiness gate**：(a) 0 new Python / OS package — 純 Playwright 既有 / 既有 React 19 / 既有 Next 16；(b) 0 new npm package；(c) 0 schema 變動 — 純 frontend artifact + leaf module；(d) 0 new backend route；(e) `scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_pg.py::TABLES_IN_ORDER` 無變動；(f) Production config / spec、無 PG SQL)。**測試**：18 個 Playwright scenarios → all pass / 15.0s；neighbor 6 個 catalog vitest 檔 (catalog-tab / catalog-card / catalog-detail-panel / catalog-keyboard-nav / 1 new test file + 1 new runbook + TODO.md row mark + HANDOFF entry / 0 schema / 0 new dep / 0 new backend route / 0 production code 動 backend)。**核心 contract**：(1) BS.11.6 row 的字面 budget「FPS during heavy motion ≥ 50fps on mid-tier device」拆成 3 scenario：desktop hard gate (50/30 嚴) + mid-tier soft gate (50 軟、運用 STRICT env 變嚴) + off control 鎖 sampler 自身健康；(2) 取樣方式 = Playwright `page.evaluate` 注入 rAF loop 收 `performance.now()` 時間戳 → 純 helper `computeFpsStats` 推導 mean / minFps / p10Fps / maxFrameIntervalMs；(3) p10Fps 是 quantile(intervals, 0.9) 後反算 fps，代表「最慢 10% 幀的 fps」、不是最慢單幀 (minFps)；(4) 取樣窗 3.2s + 30 frame minimum frameCount floor → ≥ 96 幀 @ 30fps 才有效，避免短窗污染；(5) Mid-tier emulation = Lighthouse mobile preset 對應的 4× CPU throttle 透過 CDP `Emulation.setCPUThrottlingRate` 套；GPU compositor / 網路 / OS scheduler 不模擬，因此 row 真的 `[D]` flip 仍需 operator 在 docs/ops/bs11_6_perf_runbook.md 流程上做手動量測；(6) Settle delay 750ms 防 BS.3 hooks (useFloatingCard / useGlassReflection / useScrollParallax / useCursorMagneticTilt / useCursorDistanceGlow) bootstrap 早期 rAF 集中觸發污染均值；(7) Motion attribute hard-wait 15s timeout — 跟 BS.11.5 soft check 不同、BS.11.6 必須確認 motion=dramatic 真的套上才 sample，否則量到的不是 heavy motion；(8) STRICT env 雙模式：default mode = mid-tier soft warn 不 fail (CI runner CPU 變異大)、`OMNISIGHT_BS11_6_PERF_STRICT=1` 強制 hard gate (operator 跑真實 mid-tier 裝置時用)；(9) JSON report 透過 `testInfo.attach()` 串進 Playwright report bundle、運用既有 test-results 路徑、跟 BS.11.5 screenshot 同樣機制、不需新增 artifact 收集器；(10) Lib `formatFpsSummary` 一行 CI log，operator 不需開 report 檔就能在 console 看到 verdict。**設計決策(為何 3 scenario 而非單 scenario rolling threshold)**：替代 = 單一 motion=dramatic test 配 hardware-aware threshold (env detect)；問題 (a) 把 hardware spec coupling 寫進測試 = test 變脆 (CI runner 換型號要改 threshold)；(b) off-control scenario 鎖 sampler 自身健康 — 沒它則 dramatic fail 會 ambiguous (rAF 壞？motion library 壞？)；(c) mid-tier scenario 是 row 字面要求、desktop scenario 是 sanity floor、兩者都跑可三角驗證；(d) 3 scenario × 4s 每個 = 12s 總窗、配 90s timeout slack 充裕。**設計決策(為何 minFrameCount=30 而非 60 或 100)**：替代 = 30 太低、需要 100；問題 (a) 60fps × 3.2s ≈ 190 frames、30fps × 3.2s ≈ 96 frames、20fps × 3.2s ≈ 64 frames、10fps × 3.2s ≈ 32 frames — 30 是 10fps 下界、低於這值 sampler 嚴重 starve；(b) 60/100 frame floor 會把 4× CPU throttle + 10fps degraded scenario 誤判 sampling failure 而不是 perf finding、跟設計目標相反；(c) 30 frame floor 區分 sampling failure (rAF 沒跑) vs perf finding (rAF 跑但慢) 的最佳折中。**設計決策(為何 hard-wait motion attribute 15s 而非 BS.11.5 soft check)**：替代 = follow BS.11.5 走 console.warn、不 fail；問題 (a) BS.11.6 取樣 dramatic motion fps、若 motion 還停在 default 我們量到的不是 heavy motion → 整個測試 meaningless；(b) BS.11.5 是 visual artifact、operator 看 screenshot 就知道 motion 對不對、容許 soft；(c) 15s ceiling 等同 next dev hydration max wait、超過則屬於真的 race bug 該失敗；(d) 失敗訊息明確指出「motion-level=`x` ≠ requested=`dramatic`」協助 debug。**設計決策(為何 quantileSorted 走線性內插而非 nearest)**：替代 = sortedAsc[Math.floor(q * (n-1))]；問題 (a) nearest mode 在 length-100 array 上 q=0.9 永遠取 sortedAsc[89]、跨 sample 取整 jitter 大；(b) 線性內插 (C8 quantile method per R `quantile()` default) 對 perf measurement 是業界慣例、跟 Chrome DevTools / Lighthouse trace viewer 一致；(c) 無新依賴、純 9 行函式；(d) 邊界處理 (empty / length-1 / q out-of-range) 同樣鎖在 unit test 內。**Module-global state audit (per docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md Step 1)**：(1) `lib/perf/fps-budget.ts` 純 module — 全 `export function` / `export const` / 無 mutable state / 無 import / 無 side effect、跨 worker call 同樣 input 推同樣 output——Answer #1 (per-instance derivation)；(2) Playwright spec 全 per-test scope — `page.route` / `page.addInitScript` / `page.emulateMedia` / CDP session 全 per-test、test 之間隔離；(3) `STRICT` 是 module-level 唯讀 const 從 `process.env.OMNISIGHT_BS11_6_PERF_STRICT` 推導、worker 啟動時固定、跨 test 不變；(4) Spec 取樣是 per-page CDP session 走 `context.newCDPSession(page)`、test 結束 `client.detach()` 釋放、無 listener leak；(5) test/lib/fps-budget.test.ts 純 vitest happy-path 無 setup/teardown 共享、`vi` mock 0 個 (純函式不需 mock)。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) 純 Playwright 取樣 — 無 PG / Redis / file system access、無跨 worker 路徑、無 R-A-W race；(2) rAF 注入 sampler 走 `page.evaluate` 是 sync IPC + browser 內 microtask cycle、resolve 後 timestamps array 立即可讀；(3) CPU throttle 透過 CDP `Emulation.setCPUThrottlingRate` 是 sync command、設置後立刻生效、之後 750ms settle 確保 hooks 在 throttled cadence 下穩定；(4) JSON report `testInfo.attach()` 在 test body 內 sync 寫、test 結束時 bundle 拷貝、無時序競爭；(5) Motion attribute polling 走 Playwright `expect.toHaveAttribute` 內建 retry 機制、不需 manual retry 腳手架。**Production readiness gate**：(a) 0 new Python / OS / npm package — 純 React 19 / 既有 Playwright / 既有 next 16 / 既有 CDP；(b) 0 schema 變動 — 純 frontend artifact + 純 spec + 純 docs；(c) 0 new backend route；(d) `scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_pg.py::TABLES_IN_ORDER` 無變動；(e) Production status of THIS commit: dev-only。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep** (`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`) 對 lib/perf/fps-budget.ts + e2e/bs11-6-catalog-perf.spec.ts + playwright.bs11-6.config.ts + test/lib/fps-budget.test.ts + docs/ops/bs11_6_perf_runbook.md → **0 命中** (純 frontend / spec / config / docs、無 PG SQL)。**測試**：20 個 vitest cases → all pass / 0.57s；neighbor 7 個 BS.11 檔 (catalog-tab / catalog-card / catalog-keyboard-nav / catalog-screen-reader / reduce-motion-compliance / motion-preferences / density-preferences) → 122 passed / 1.15s 零 regression；npx eslint 對 4 個動到的檔 → 0 errors / 0 warnings；npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json → 0 新錯誤 (3 個 pre-existing in `integration-settings.tsx` 與 BS.11.5 baseline 一致)。**Production status: dev-only** — BS.11 A11y audit + polish + density 持久化 epic 6/7 row 收尾完成；next gate `deployed-active` 待 BS.11.7 (Lighthouse a11y score) ship + operator 在 prod 用真實 mid-tier 裝置 (per docs/ops/bs11_6_perf_runbook.md) 跑「Settings → Display → Motion → Dramatic + 進 Platforms 頁 + DevTools Performance recording → mean fps ≥ 50 / 95th worst-frame ≤ 33ms」→ 把 row 從 `[x]` flip 成 `[D]` (or operator-blocked `[O]` if 該 mid-tier 設備無法獲得)、整個 BS.11 a11y / perf 鏈完成 perf 維度。-->

Chrome 進程、跟 Playwright 已有 Chromium 重疊、CI image 增重；(b) Lighthouse a11y category 內部即用 axe-core、本式跑 axe-core + 同 weighted-avg 公式 = 等價；(c) Lighthouse-CLI 對 dev-server 行為 (stale Service Worker / CSP / non-200 favicon) 比較挑剔、跨 OS 不一致；(d) `docs/ops/bs11_7_a11y_runbook.md` 已 cover 真機 Lighthouse 走人手驗收、自動化只需提供 axe-equivalent baseline；(e) 0 new dep — axe-core 已透過 `eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y` 進 node_modules、不增 package.json。**設計決策(為何 fixture page 而非 /settings/platforms 真頁)**：替代 = playwright 對 `/settings/platforms?tab=catalog` 跑 axe；問題 (a) 真頁依賴 `useEngine`/`useAuth`/SSE event stream、tab counter / status chip 跨 run 變化、score 不 deterministic；(b) AppShell + 全域 nav + sidebar 是所有 admin 頁共用、a11y issue 在那層應該屬於 AppShell-level row、不是 BS.11 catalog 範疇；(c) fixture 渲染同樣的 `<PlatformHero>` + `<CatalogTab>` + `<CatalogDetailPanel>` 真組件、a11y regression in 那些組件本 spec 一樣抓得到；(d) 真頁的 Lighthouse 由 runbook 走 manual 走 [D] 真上線時 operator-locked。**設計決策(為何 evaluatedRuleCount floor 走 10 而非 1 或 30)**：替代 = floor=1 (任何 rule 都算數) 或 floor=30 (相當嚴)；問題 (a) floor=1 抓不到 axe 注入失敗 (空 DOM 仍可能 trigger 1 rule)；(b) floor=30 對小 surface 過嚴、detail panel 是 single-column reading surface、大概只 trigger ~15-20 rules、會誤判 sampling failure；(c) floor=10 是 BS.6.3 detail panel 預期 trigger 的下界 (heading-order / button-name / region / aria-required-children / focus-order-semantics / color-contrast / aria-roles / link-name / image-alt / label) — 任何 missing 即可疑；(d) 跟 Lighthouse 預設 audit count (~20-30 a11y audits) 同數量級、跨工具可比。**設計決策(為何 3 scenario 而非 1 個 grid)**：替代 = 只跑 grid scenario；問題 (a) BS.6.3 detail panel 是獨立 a11y surface (role=region + aria-live + autofocus + Esc handler) — BS.11.3 + BS.11.2 都覆蓋它、a11y score 該獨立鎖；(b) BS.11.1 reduce-motion path 在 5 個 surface 都改 render — 需要 separate scenario 鎖 motion=off 不會 inadvertently 注 hidden / mis-labelled 元素；(c) 3 scenario × 8s 每個 = 24s 總窗、跑得起；(d) 拆 3 個 verdict 分開報、 fail 時 operator 直接看到「哪個 surface 壞」不需 grep。**設計決策(為何 axe-core 不從 npm 直接 import 而走 readFileSync + eval)**：替代 = `import axe from "axe-core"` (Node 端) + `await axe.run(document)` 跨 page boundary；問題 (a) axe-core 設計成 browser-side 跑、Node import 得到 UMD 但 `document` 是 browser globals、跨 boundary 不工作；(b) 走 `addScriptTag({content})` 也行但 dev-server CSP 偶爾阻 inline；(c) `readFileSync` + `(0,eval)(axeSrc)` 在 page-context 跑、走 same-origin、bypass CSP、跟 axe 預期 use mode 一致；(d) axe.min.js ~1.2MB、`readFileSync` 跑 once、不重複 IO、不增 wall time。**Module-global state audit (per docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md Step 1)**：(1) `lib/a11y/lighthouse-score.ts` 純 module — 全 export function / export const / 無 mutable state / 無 import / 無 side effect、跨 worker call 同樣 input 推同樣 output——Answer #1 (per-instance derivation)；(2) `LIGHTHOUSE_IMPACT_WEIGHTS` 走 `Object.freeze()` — 跨 worker 不可被 mutated、frozen const；(3) Playwright spec 全 per-test scope — `page.route` / `page.addInitScript` / `page.emulateMedia` / `page.evaluate` 全 per-test、test 之間隔離；(4) `AXE_SOURCE` 是 module-level immutable string 從 `readFileSync` 讀 axe.min.js 一次、worker 啟動時固定、跨 test 不變；(5) Spec 注入的 `window.axe` 是 page-context global、per-page、test 結束 page close 自動 GC；(6) test/lib/lighthouse-score.test.ts 純 vitest happy-path 無 setup/teardown 共享、`vi` mock 0 個 (純函式不需 mock)。**Read-after-write timing audit**：(1) 純 axe-core DOM walk — 無 PG / Redis / file system access (除 spec 啟動時讀 axe.min.js)、無跨 worker 路徑、無 R-A-W race；(2) axe.run 是 sync axe internal traversal、await resolve 後 result 立即可讀；(3) JSON report `testInfo.attach()` 在 test body 內 sync 寫、test 結束時 bundle 拷貝、無時序競爭；(4) `(0,eval)(axeSrc)` 是 page-context sync execute、走完才 resolve evaluate、無跨 frame 競賽。**Production readiness gate**：(a) 0 new Python / OS / npm package — axe-core 已透過 eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y transitively 在 node_modules、不需動 package.json；(b) 0 schema 變動 — 純 frontend artifact + 純 spec + catalog-detail-panel / catalog-keyboard-nav / catalog-screen-reader / reduce-motion-compliance / density-preferences / motion-preferences / fps-budget) → 171 passed / 1.19s 零 regression；npx eslint 對 4 - 預估：**0.5 day**

**Priority BS 總預估**：**~10 day**（含 BS.0 ADR）

**建議切段交付**（6 sprint）：
1. **S1**：BS.0 + BS.1 + BS.2 + BS.3（**~3.25 day**）— 後端 + motion library 全通，UI 還沒
2. **S2**：BS.4 + BS.5（**~2 day**）— Sidecar 跑著、頁面骨架 + Hero 上線（read-only）
3. **S3**：BS.6（**~1.5 day**）— Catalog tab 完整、operator 能看到 catalog（不能裝）
4. **S4**：BS.7（**~1 day**）— **第一次能真的 install** — milestone
5. **S5**：BS.8 + BS.9 + BS.10（**~2.25 day**）— 完整三 tab + bootstrap wizard + coach hook
6. **S6**：BS.11（**~0.5 day**）— A11y / perf / polish + epic 收尾

### 平行分工建議

如果只有 1 條 AI agent track + operator：嚴格按 Sprint 1→6 順序、每個 phase 內 sub-checkbox 順序做。

如果有 2 人 / 2 條 track 可平行（例如 Agent-software-beta + 你自己），切法如下：

- **Track A (backend-heavy, 偏 architecture)**：BS.1 → BS.2 → BS.4 → BS.7 (sidecar/PEP/job pipeline 部分) → BS.10 → ~6 day
- **Track B (frontend-heavy, 偏 UX)**：BS.0 (ADR) → BS.3 (motion lib) → BS.5 (hero) → BS.6 (catalog tab) → BS.7 (drawer/card UI 部分) → BS.8 (installed/sources tab) → BS.9 (wizard step) → ~7 day

**Track 同步點**（兩 track 必須在這時對齊才能往下）：
- 同步點 1：BS.2 ship 後 → Track B 才能在 BS.5 開始接 backend API
- 同步點 2：BS.4 + BS.6 ship 後 → 兩 track 一起做 BS.7 (Track A 做 backend 半邊、Track B 做 frontend 半邊)
- 同步點 3：BS.7 ship 後 → Track B 接著做 BS.8 + BS.9，Track A 做 BS.10

Wall time 從 10 day → **~7 day**（Track B 是關鍵路徑、Track A 約 60% 時間 idle 可去做別的）。

如果有 3 人 / 3 條 track 平行：
- **Track A (PG + API)**：BS.1 → BS.2 → BS.10 backend → ~3 day
- **Track B (sidecar + install methods)**：BS.4 → BS.7 backend 半邊 → ~2 day
- **Track C (UI + motion)**：BS.0 → BS.3 → BS.5 → BS.6 → BS.7 frontend 半邊 → BS.8 → BS.9 → ~7 day

Wall time → **~7 day**（Track C 仍是關鍵路徑、UI 工作天然較重；A/B 提早完成可協助 Track C 收尾或 BS.11 polish）。

**最大平行度（4+ track 不再縮短時程）**：因為 BS.6 + BS.7 frontend + BS.8 + BS.9 都是同一個檔案集（catalog UI + install drawer + bootstrap wizard），同人寫比平行寫快、merge 衝突少。3 track 是 sweet spot。

### Alembic 編號精準預留

| Migration | 用途 | Phase |
|---|---|---|
| 0051 | `catalog_tables`（catalog_entries + install_jobs + catalog_subscriptions） | BS.1.1 |
| 0052 | `catalog_seed`（首批 ~30 shipped entries） | BS.1.2 |
| 0053 | `catalog_override_nullables`（drop NOT NULL on 5 catalog_entries override-only columns + add `ck_catalog_entries_override_nullable_columns` row check） | BS.2.4（**原 BS.9.1 預定、被 BS.2.4 取走**） |
| 0054 | `bootstrap_state_metadata_jsonb`（PG metadata TEXT → JSONB、SQLite no-op） | BS.9.1（**原 0053 預定、順移到 0054**） |
| 0055 | （buffer） | — |

**BS 開工前驗證指令**：
```bash
# 確認 Y 跑到哪、BS 從那之後 +1 開始
ls backend/alembic/versions/ | tail -3
# 預期：最後一號 ≤ 0050（Y 完工）；BS.1.1 寫成 ${last+1}_catalog_tables.py
```

---

## 🅐🅢 Priority AS — Auth & Security Shared Library（OAuth / Turnstile / Auto-gen 密碼 + 全套浮誇 UI）

> **背景**：OAuth + reCAPTCHA / Turnstile 不只 generated app 需要，OmniSight 自身 auth 也在用（既有 `git_credentials.py` / Phase 5b LLM credentials 是 ad-hoc per-integration 實作、無共用 abstraction）。AS 把核心 lib 抽出，OmniSight self + W/FS/SC template 全 reuse。
>
> **設計核心**：
> 1. **Shared library + 雙 twin（Python + TS）** — 一份 lib 兩 surface（OmniSight 自家 backend + emit 進 generated app workspace）
> 2. **Strict additive + 隨時 rollback** — AS.0 migration discipline 保證既有 password user 零影響
> 3. **OmniSight 自家 dogfood** — AS.6 backend 整合 + AS.7 UI/UX 全 8 頁重做
> 4. **8 層浮誇視覺**（AS.7.0）— 背景星雲 WebGL shader + floating glass card + brand wordmark 光弧 + field 通電 + OAuth provider energy spheres + 密碼 slot machine + warp drive transition + 場景化 dramatic
> 5. **Auto-gen 密碼 3 種 style** — Random（max 安全）/ Memorable（Diceware）/ Pronounceable（子音母音交替），Browser keychain 自動整合
>
> **排程**：Y → BS → AS（與 W11-W16 平行）→ FS → SC → BP
>
> **相依（硬前置）**：
> - **BS.3 motion library** — AS.7.0 視覺基礎建設 reuse
> - **BS 完工** — alembic 編號才能精準預留
> - **K-rest CF Access SSO** — AS.6 OAuth 與 K-rest 邊界釐清（CF Access = 網路層 SSO / AS OAuth = 應用層 OAuth）
> - **R20 Phase 0** ✅ — AS.7 OAuth coaching card 走 R20-A PEP HOLD
>
> **Alembic 編號預留**：**0056–0058**
>
> **總範圍**：**~21.75 day**（11 phase）

- [x] AS.1.5 Drift guard test：Python 跟 TS twin 對同 vendor 回傳一致 token shape — `backend/tests/test_oauth_token_shape_drift.py` (21 contract tests / 5 families: Family 1 per-vendor real-shape parity × 11 (one parametrized test per AS.1.3 catalog vendor — `github` comma-separated scope `read:user,user:email` + `bearer` lowercase token_type passthrough / `google` full OIDC shape with `id_token` + `refresh_token` + space-separated 4-scope OIDC URL / `microsoft` Entra ID v2.0 4-scope inc. `offline_access` / `apple` id_token-centric `name email` no scope echo so parser → `[]` / `gitlab` extra `created_at` int surfaced via `raw` / `bitbucket` Cloud shape with non-standard `state` echo surfaced via `raw` / `slack` v2 nested `authed_user` + nested `team` dict + `bot_user_id` extras all surfaced via `raw` byte-identical / `notion` workspace-scoped no-`expires_in` no-`refresh_token` so both sides → `expiresAt=None` `refreshToken=None` / `salesforce` 4 vendor extras (`instance_url` `id` `issued_at` `signature`) / `hubspot` no-`token_type` echo so parser default-fill `"Bearer"` matches between sides / `discord` standard RFC §5.1 shape) / Family 2 quirk fixtures × 5 (`scope_comma` 3-token comma-separated dedupe → `["read","write"]` / `scope_list` JSON-array passthrough preserves order / `scope_dedupe` 5-token mixed-comma-space duplicates dedupe to `["read","write","admin"]` / `string_expires_in` `"3600"` JSON-string coercion to number / `zero_expires_in` boundary `expires_in=0` accepted by both sides) / Family 3 negative parity × 3 (`error_shape` RFC 6749 §5.2 — both raise `TokenResponseError` / `missing_access` no `access_token` field — both raise / `negative_expires` `expires_in=-1` vendor bug — both raise / message-string comparison deliberately skipped because Python uses `repr()` and TS uses `JSON.stringify` for description but both error-class names == `TokenResponseError`) / Family 4 aggregate SHA-256 oracle (one hash over all 16 success-fixture parsed shapes — catches "many-tiny-drifts" failure mode that per-fixture tests can't summarise; `_normalize_numbers` recursive helper coerces integer-valued floats `1700003600.0` ↔ JS `1700003600` so JSON serialisation byte-identical across `_NOW + expires_in` Python float-add vs JS unified-number arithmetic) / Family 5 catalog-coverage guard (set-diff `ov.ALL_VENDOR_IDS` ↔ `VENDOR_FIXTURES.keys()` — fires red if AS.1.6/AS.1.7 add a 12th vendor to catalog without matching parity fixture). **TS execution mechanism**: Node 22+ ships `--experimental-strip-types` (stable in 23+, present in repo's Node 24.14.1 toolchain); test spawns single `node --no-warnings --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module --eval=<inline-driver>` subprocess that imports `templates/_shared/oauth-client/index.ts` directly — **no transpile step / no tsc invocation / no node_modules dependency / no generated build artefact** so test bench is hermetic. Driver script held inline as Python `_NODE_DRIVER` heredoc (parametrized via `%(twin_path)s` JSON-quoted absolute path) reads JSON via `readFileSync(0, "utf-8")` from stdin (16 success + 3 negative fixtures dispatched through `parseTokenResponse` in one batch), emits `{<key>: {ok: true, value: TokenSet} | {ok: false, errorName, message}}` JSON to stdout, exit-0 on driver-internal exception. Session-scoped `ts_parsed_shapes` pytest fixture caches one Node spawn for entire pytest session — amortises subprocess cost to single invocation across 21 tests. `TZ=UTC` env-pinned to seal any future clock-aware parser branch (none today). `_node_supports_strip_types()` Node-version probe `pytest.skip()` when `node` absent or major < 22; `pathlib.Path` skip when TS twin file absent — same gating posture as AS.1.2/AS.1.3/AS.1.4 cross-twin tests. **Why this complements AS.1.2 static drift guards**: AS.1.2 SHA-256 over 5 event strings + value-equality on 4 numeric defaults catches *constant* drift; AS.1.5 catches *behavioural* drift (regex change in scope splitter, off-by-one in `expires_at` arithmetic, default-fill divergence on missing `token_type`, dedupe-order regression — all invisible to source-text-grep oracle). 21 passed locally + zero regression in AS-family run (test_oauth_client + test_oauth_vendors + test_oauth_audit + test_password_generator + test_as_compat_regression: 315 passed + 9 skipped — exact match to AS.1.4 row baseline). Pre-commit fingerprint grep (`_conn()` / `await conn.commit()` / `datetime('now')` / `VALUES (?,...)`) 0 命中. Module-global state audit per SOP §1: fixtures are module-level `Mapping[str, Mapping[str, Any]]` literals containing only immutable scalars / nested immutable dicts (deterministic-by-construction across pytest workers — answer #1); cache lives on session-scoped pytest fixture (pytest manages lifecycle per worker); zero DB / network / env reads at import time. **Production status: dev-only.** Next gate: deployed-inactive once AS.6.1 wires `/api/v1/auth/oauth/{provider}/login` + `/callback` HTTP endpoints (this drift guard already runs in CI; new vendor additions in AS.1.6/AS.1.7 fail-fast via Family 5 catalog-coverage guard until matching fixture lands).

skip 0055) / 0 module-level mutable state, pure DDL migration, no in-memory cache → SOP §1 audit answer #1 every worker reads same DDL state from same DB / `downgrade()` drops index then table — until downgrade emits DROP INDEX before DROP TABLE — explicit ordering documents intent) / vault round-trip (`token_vault.encrypt_for_user('u-alice', 'google', plaintext)` → INSERT row with TS smoke-test exercised via Node 24.14.1 `--experimental-strip-types`: round-trip 4 providers + binding mismatch + provider whitelist + unknown key version + empty plaintext + empty userId + tampered + garbage + provider case normalisation + 20× per-row salt uniqueness + master-key export/import re-decrypt — all green. **Cipher-not-interchangeable-by-design**: server `secret_store._fernet` 與 client `TokenVault.masterKey` 各持各的 master key (AS.0.4 §3 hard invariant)；server-encrypted `oauth_tokens.access_token_enc` 與 client-side mirror 落不同 cipher container 由不同 vault 解開；contract surface (envelope keys + numeric constants + provider whitelist + 5 typed errors + fingerprint algo) byte-equal — that is what shape-drift test locks。**Path deviation note**: 本 TS twin 落 `templates/_shared/token-vault/` 對齊 sibling `templates/_shared/{oauth-client,password-generator}/` 既定 pattern; AS.2.1 Python core lib 的 docstring forward-reservation (`templates/_shared/token-vault/`) + AS.2.3 reference 已對齊。**Production status: dev-only.** Next gate: deployed-inactive once productizer template emit pipeline (W11-W16 / FS / SC scaffolds) wires `templates/_shared/token-vault/{index,README}.ts` into generated app workspaces (caller injects master key from per-app keystore — IndexedDB 為 web 預設 / vendor secure-storage 為 mobile shell). AS.2.4 refresh hook + AS.2.5 revoke endpoint 是後續 row。AS.6.1 OAuth router 落地後 server 側走 `backend.security.token_vault.encrypt_for_user(...)` (Fernet path); 任何 generated app 若需 client-side 鏡像 則在 app boundary 內走 `TokenVault.encryptForUser(...)` (AES-GCM path) — 兩 path 不相 round-trip。

WHERE version = old_version` survives concurrent refreshers) (7) audit emits `oauth.refresh` success + (if `rotated=True`) `oauth.token_rotated` (fingerprint-only invariant inherited from AS.1.4 Real runtime exercise: built `TokenVaultRecord.from_db_row` with vault-encrypted ciphertext → `is_due` False at now=900 / True at now=999 → `refresh_record` with fake async IdP returning rotated tokens → `outcome=success rotated=True new_version=11 new_expires_in=3600`, decrypt new ciphertext via `token_vault.decrypt_for_user` round-trips back to `access-NEW` + `refresh-NEW` byte-equal — full lifecycle exercised live (not just import). **Path deviation note**: 同 AS.1.1 / AS.1.3 / AS.1.4 / AS.2.1 / AS.0.10 既定 path-deviation precedent，路徑落 `backend/security/oauth_refresh_hook.py` 對齊 sibling `backend/security/{oauth_client,oauth_vendors,oauth_audit,token_vault,password_generator}.py` pattern；canonical `backend/auth/` 路徑因 `backend/auth.py` legacy session/RBAC namespace 占用、轉 package 是獨立 refactor row。**Production status: dev-only.** Next gate: deployed-inactive once AS.6.1 wires `/api/v1/auth/oauth/{provider}/login` + `/callback` HTTP endpoints (refresh hook 已可被任意 caller import; AS.6.1 will wire the per-request lazy-refresh path: SELECT `oauth_tokens` row → `TokenVaultRecord.from_db_row(...)` → `await refresh_record(rec, vendor_refresh_fn)` → if `outcome==SUCCESS` then `UPDATE oauth_tokens SET access_token_enc=?, refresh_token_enc=?, expires_at=?, scope=?, version=version+1, updated_at=? WHERE user_id=? AND provider=? AND version=old_version`). `deployed-active` requires AS.6.1 OAuth router (separate row) actually invoking the hook on each provider API call. AS.2.5 revoke endpoint 是後續 row（DSAR / GDPR right-to-erasure path 會呼叫 `oauth_audit.emit_unlink` + DELETE FROM oauth_tokens — 不會用本 row 的 hook，故獨立）.

`vault_failure` extra hook-side outcome — collapses onto `revocation_failed` in audit since AS.1.4 only ships 3 unlink outcomes) / `ALL_OUTCOMES` ordered tuple covers all 4 / 2 `TRIGGER_*` constants `TRIGGER_USER_UNLINK="user_unlink"` (Settings → Disconnect voluntary path) + `TRIGGER_DSAR_ERASURE="dsar_erasure"` (regulatory operator-driven path) / `REVOKE_TRIGGERS=frozenset({user_unlink, dsar_erasure})` disjoint from `oauth_audit.ROTATION_TRIGGERS` (cross-vocab collision防護) / `revoke_record(record, revoke_fn, *, revocation_endpoint, trigger="user_unlink", actor=None, emit_audit=True) -> RevokeOutcome` 6-step lifecycle: (1) trigger validate (2) `revocation_endpoint is None OR revoke_fn is None OR endpoint==""` 短路 SUCCESS-skipped + audit reflects no-attempt (vendors-without-endpoint path: GitHub / MS / Bitbucket / Notion / HubSpot 5 vendors per AS.1.3 catalog) (3) `_choose_token` 偏好 refresh > access (RFC 7009 §2.1 + OAuth 2.1 BCP §4.13: revoking refresh kills entire grant tree); empty record → SUCCESS-skipped (4) `token_vault.decrypt_for_user` `TokenVaultError` → OUTCOME_VAULT_FAILURE + audit collapses onto `revocation_failed` with `error="vault:<class>"` for grep selectivity (catches DB row-swap / unknown-key-version / corrupted-ciphertext) (5) `await revoke_fn(plaintext, hint)` 任何 exception → OUTCOME_REVOCATION_FAILED + audit + `error` truncated 500 chars (chain-row bloat 防護) (6) success → OUTCOME_SUCCESS + audit emits unlink success with `revocation_attempted=True` + `revocation_outcome="success"` / `emit_not_linked(*, user_id, provider, trigger, actor, emit_audit) -> RevokeOutcome` helper for caller's "no oauth_tokens row" branch — DSAR right-to-erasure compliance 要求 audit chain 記錄每個 erasure attempt 包括「無 row 可刪」(emits `oauth.unlink` outcome=`not_linked` 不碰 vault / IdP) / `RevokeCallable = Callable[[str, Optional[str]], Awaitable[None]]` async callable accepts `(token_plaintext, token_type_hint)` per RFC 7009 §2.1 / `is_enabled()` thin re-export of `oauth_client.is_enabled` 給 caller-facing gate symmetry — pure helpers (`revoke_record` / `emit_not_linked`) deliberately do NOT auto-gate per AS.0.4 §6.2 (DSAR 必須在 OAuth feature flag 關閉時也跑得起 — regulatory deadline 不等 feature flag; audit silent-skip 由 `oauth_audit._gate` 管) / **Actor defaulting**: caller 沒傳 actor → `user_unlink` defaults to `record.user_id` (用戶自己) / `dsar_erasure` defaults to `f"dsar:{record.user_id}"` (operator-as-actor convention; prefix lets admin filter pane 不需 audit-schema 改 column 也能分流 voluntary vs regulatory); caller-supplied `actor` always wins / 0 module-level mutable containers (no list / dict / set — only frozen dataclass + tuple + str constants + frozenset + classes) / no DB connections held / no env reads at import / SOP §1 audit answer #1: cross-worker consistency via DSAR being one-shot per-row destructive (caller's UPDATE是 serialisation 點 — 一旦 row 被 DELETE，第二 worker 的 revoke 看到「row not found」走 OUTCOME_NOT_LINKED branch; RFC 7009 itself idempotent 多次 revoke 同 token 不出錯) / SOP §1 read-after-write timing audit: hook 自身只動 in-memory data，DB read-then-DELETE race 在 caller (rowcount-check 解) / **TS twin out of scope by design** — generated apps 沒有 server-side oauth_tokens 表，其 token 落 caller-managed keystore (IndexedDB / mobile vendor secure-storage) revocation in that env 是 "drop keystore entry" 不需 server-mediated DSAR; AS.2.5 是 server-side mirror that AS.2.2's `oauth_tokens` table 才需要的 (與 AS.2.4 同 pattern)) + `backend/security/__init__.py` re-export of `oauth_revoke` submodule + AS.2.5 docstring entry + `backend/tests/test_oauth_revoke.py` (39 contract tests / 16 families: Family 1 happy path (1 顆: SUCCESS + revocation_attempted=True + audit row carries `entity_id="google:u-alice"` + actor=user_id + revoke_fn invoked with refresh_token plaintext + hint="refresh_token") / Family 2 no-endpoint short-circuit (3 顆: revocation_endpoint=None / revoke_fn=None / revocation_endpoint="" empty-string falsy 三種 short-circuit shape 一致) / Family 3 IdP failure (2 顆: revoke_fn raises RuntimeError → OUTCOME_REVOCATION_FAILED + revocation_attempted=True + audit revocation_failed + error contains class+msg; error truncated 500 chars defends against pathological vendor message bloat) / Family 4 vault failure (2 顆: concrete swap-rows attack ciphertext encrypted for u-alice but record claims user_id=u-bob → BindingMismatchError → OUTCOME_VAULT_FAILURE + revocation_attempted=False + audit collapses onto revocation_failed with revocation_outcome=None + revoke_fn never called fail-fast; manufactured EncryptedToken(key_version=99) → UnknownKeyVersionError → OUTCOME_VAULT_FAILURE) / Family 5 token preference (2 顆: refresh+access both present → revoke refresh per RFC 7009 §2.1; refresh None + access present → revoke access Apple-style) / Family 6 empty-record edge (1 顆: access_token_enc.ciphertext="" AND refresh_token_enc=None → SUCCESS-skipped) / Family 7 trigger validation (4 顆: rejects "bogus" with InvalidTriggerError; subclasses ValueError + RevokeError; accepts both user_unlink + dsar_erasure; emit_not_linked 同樣 validate trigger) / Family 8 actor defaulting (3 顆: user_unlink default actor=user_id; dsar_erasure default actor=`dsar:user_id`; caller-supplied actor wins) / Family 9 AS.0.8 single knob (3 顆: DSAR knob-off pure helper 仍跑 IdP 真被叫 outcome=success + audit silent-skips 0 events 對應 AS.0.4 §6.2 regulatory deadline 不等 feature flag; emit_not_linked knob-off silent-skip; is_enabled re-export tracks oauth_client.is_enabled) / Family 10 emit_audit=False opt-out (2 顆: revoke_record + emit_not_linked 都支援 caller 顯式關 audit fan-out) / Family 11 emit_not_linked helper (2 顆: emits audit row outcome=not_linked + revocation_attempted=False + entity_id 正確 + 預設 actor=user_id; caller-supplied actor wins) / Family 12 cross-module drift guards (5 顆: OUTCOME_* byte-equal oauth_audit; `_audit_outcome_for` 對 4 個 hook outcome 都 map 到 oauth_audit.UNLINK_OUTCOMES 內值 包含 VAULT collapse onto revocation_failed; `_audit_outcome_for` rejects unknown outcome; REVOKE_TRIGGERS disjoint from ROTATION_TRIGGERS; trigger 字串值 pin) / Family 13 SOP §1 module-state audit (5 顆: no module-level list/dict/set; importlib.reload constants stable; __all__ cross-check; pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn() / await conn.commit() / datetime('now') / VALUES (?,...)` 0-hit on prod code; import random absent; no top-level IO grep absent) / Family 14 integration smoke (1 顆: build record from raw vault-encrypted ciphertext via from_db_row → real revoke_fn → outcome=success rotated_token_attempted + captured.calls == [("ghp_END_refresh","refresh_token")] vault decrypt step 是 storage/network boundary 的橋, rev_fn 看到 OLD plaintext) / Family 15 AS.1.3 vendor catalog cross-check (1 顆: 對 token_vault.SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS 每 provider 跑一次 revoke_record，confirm orchestrator 對 every catalog provider 都產生乾淨 SUCCESS outcome real-revocation 或 skipped depending on vendor.revocation_endpoint — 防未來 vendor 加入時 hook 對某 provider 不對 path produce error)). 39 passed + 0 skipped. Pre-commit fingerprint grep (`_conn()` / `await conn.commit()` / `datetime('now')` / `VALUES (?,...)`) 0 命中 on new code (pure orchestrator / no DB shim / no SQL). AS-family run (test_oauth_revoke + test_oauth_refresh_hook + test_token_vault + test_token_vault_shape_drift + test_alembic_0057_oauth_tokens + test_alembic_0056_tenants_auth_features + test_alembic_0058_users_auth_methods + test_oauth_client + test_oauth_vendors + test_oauth_audit + test_oauth_token_shape_drift + test_password_generator + test_as_compat_regression + test_account_linking_helper + test_migrator_schema_coverage) **592 passed + 10 skipped** (zero regression vs AS.2.4 553 baseline; +39 new AS.2.5 tests; 10 skips 為 AS.0.9 forward-promotion guards 等 AS.3.1 + AS.1.4 PG-end-to-end skip + AS.1.1 skip + alembic-PG live skip when no `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL` 全 pre-existing). Real runtime exercise: 5 種 case 全 lifecycle live：(1) success path with Google revocation endpoint → audit row outcome=success/attempted=True/rev_outcome=success；(2) skip path with revocation_endpoint=None → outcome=success/attempted=False/rev_outcome=None；(3) IdP failure (RuntimeError) → outcome=revocation_failed + actor=`dsar:u-alice`(dsar trigger default actor)；(4) emit_not_linked → outcome=not_linked + actor=u-zelda；(5) vault binding mismatch → outcome=vault_failure / error=`vault:BindingMismatchError` / audit collapses onto revocation_failed — 全 5 case 真跑 asyncio + Fernet decrypt + audit emit chain. **Path deviation note**: 同 AS.1.1 / AS.1.3 / AS.1.4 / AS.2.1 / AS.2.4 / AS.0.10 既定 path-deviation precedent，路徑落 `backend/security/oauth_revoke.py` 對齊 sibling `backend/security/{oauth_client,oauth_vendors,oauth_audit,oauth_refresh_hook,token_vault,password_generator}.py` pattern；canonical `backend/auth/` 路徑因 `backend/auth.py` legacy session/RBAC namespace 占用、轉 package 是獨立 refactor row。**Production status: dev-only.** Next gate: deployed-inactive once AS.6.1 OAuth router 落 `POST /api/v1/auth/oauth/{provider}/unlink` HTTP endpoint 真用 `revoke_record` orchestrator + DELETE FROM oauth_tokens; 並 DSAR runbook script `scripts/dsar_erase_user.py` 落地 (operator-side artefact 循環呼叫 `revoke_record(trigger=dsar_erasure)` per linked provider + DELETE row). `deployed-active` 待 AS.6.1 上 prod + first real OAuth unlink flow 完成 + 第一次 DSAR ticket 真實處理. **AS.2 Token Vault epic 自此完成 5/5 row close** (AS.2.1 vault Python core / AS.2.2 alembic 0057 oauth_tokens table / AS.2.3 TS twin / AS.2.4 refresh hook / AS.2.5 revoke endpoint).

key, now=)` constant-time `hmac.compare_digest` + TTL `StateExpiredError` raise / `extract_user_identity(provider, userinfo, id_token_claims)` 4-vendor field-name dispatch table — google `userinfo["sub"]` / github `userinfo["id"]` numeric→str coerce / microsoft `userinfo["sub"]` (email fallback to `preferred_username`) / apple `id_token["sub"]` + email-verified `IdentityFieldMissingError` raise + name-fallback to email-local-part / `decode_id_token_claims_unverified(jws)` Apple id_token JWS payload b64u + JSON parse (sig verify reserved for follow-up hardening row) / `mask_email` PII-redacted error response helper + 3 async orchestrator — `begin_oauth_login(provider, base_url, settings_obj=, extra=, scope=, state_ttl_seconds=, now=)` knob check + `lookup_provider_credentials` + `resolve_signing_key` + `compute_redirect_uri` + AS.1.3 `begin_authorization_for_vendor` + `encode_signed_flow` (returns `AuthorizationStart`) / `exchange_authorization_code(vendor, code, code_verifier, client_id, client_secret, redirect_uri, http_client=, timeout_s=10.0)` POST-form `grant_type=authorization_code` + Accept: application/json (GitHub quirk) + `parse_token_response` returns `TokenSet` w/ absolute `expires_at` / `fetch_userinfo(vendor, access_token, http_client=, timeout_s=10.0)` Authorization: Bearer + JSON parse + Apple `_VENDORS_NO_USERINFO_ENDPOINT` raises / `complete_oauth_login(provider, flow_cookie, returned_state, code, settings_obj=, http_client=, now=)` knob → cookie verify → state verify → token exchange → userinfo (Google/GitHub/Microsoft) or id_token decode (Apple) → `extract_user_identity` returns `CallbackResult`. **HTTP endpoints**: `backend/routers/auth.py` extended with `GET /api/v1/auth/oauth/{provider}/authorize` (302 redirect + cookie) + `GET /api/v1/auth/oauth/{provider}/callback` (token exchange + AS.0.3 takeover-prevention link guard via `account_linking.METHOD_PASSWORD` check + 3 user disposition — subject-already-linked / oauth-only-email-link / new-user `auth.create_user(oidc_provider=, oidc_subject=, password=None)` + `add_auth_method` seed) + omnisight_session/csrf cookie issuance + flow-cookie clear + 302 to /. **Audit emissions**: AS.1.4 `oauth.login_init` at /authorize + `oauth.login_callback` at /callback (success outcome=`OUTCOME_SUCCESS` / failure outcome routes per state_mismatch/state_expired/token_error/callback_error/provider_error/account_link_conflict via `_emit_callback_failure`) + AS.5.1 `auth.oauth_connect` (outcome `connected`/`relinked` + scope + is_account_link) + `auth.login_success` (auth_method=`oauth`, provider, mfa_satisfied=False, ip+user_agent fingerprinted) on success / `auth.login_fail` (fail_reason `oauth_state_invalid` for state-family or `oauth_provider_error` for token/userinfo/provider-error) on failure — knob-off → all silent skips per `_gate()`. **10 new Settings fields** at `backend/config.py` — `oauth_{google,github,microsoft,apple}_client_id` + `..._client_secret` (8) + `oauth_redirect_base_url` (vendor-pinned callback URL precedence over X-Forwarded-Host fallback) + `oauth_flow_signing_key` (HMAC-SHA256 cookie signing key — falls back to `decision_bearer` SHA-256 derived if empty so existing prod deployments don't need a new env var). Module-global state audit per SOP §1: 0 mutable container at module level — `SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS` is `frozenset` + `_VENDORS_NO_USERINFO_ENDPOINT` is `frozenset` + `_TOKEN_EXCHANGE_HEADERS_BASE` is module-level dict (read-only — cookie-headers constant, not mutated; could promote to MappingProxyType in follow-up) + every signing/cred lookup reads Settings lazily so each worker derives identical keys/IDs from the same env source = answer #1 (deterministic-by-construction across workers); FlowSession is HttpOnly cookie state owned by the user-agent so cross-worker callbacks see the same cookie regardless of which worker hits the redirect. Read-after-write timing audit per SOP §1: N/A — per-user-agent flow has no shared mutable state crossing request boundaries; `users` row create + link writes share a single `get_pool().acquire()` conn so the lookup→link→create chain is naturally row-locked + the `users.email` UNIQUE index is the final guard against concurrent duplicate signups. AS.6.1 family run **82 passed** (14 family — supported_providers pinned + module no-mutable-state + export count + assert_provider_supported 5 cases + lookup_provider_credentials 4 cases + compute_redirect_uri 4 normalisation cases + signing-key 7 derivation cases + cookie 9 round-trip/tamper/expiry cases + extract_user_identity 9 per-vendor cases + exchange_authorization_code 5 mocked httpx cases + fetch_userinfo 4 cases + decode_id_token 4 JWS cases + begin_oauth_login 7 cases + complete_oauth_login 9 full-flow cases + module-reload + mask_email + Settings-drift guard 2 cases). Wider AS-family sweep (+ test_oauth_audit + test_oauth_client + test_oauth_revoke + test_oauth_refresh_hook + test_token_vault + test_password_generator + test_bot_challenge + test_bot_challenge_shape_drift + test_honeypot + test_honeypot_shape_drift + test_auth_event + test_auth_event_shape_drift + test_auth_dashboard + test_auth_dashboard_shape_drift + test_account_linking_helper) **1081 passed + 2 skipped + 2 pre-existing failures unrelated** (test_oauth_refresh_hook 2 cases fail under specific test-order pollution that reproduces on master without my changes — not AS.6.1-introduced). Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn() / await conn.commit() / datetime('now') / VALUES (?,...)` 0-hit on 4 modified/new files. Real runtime smoke: `from backend.security import oauth_login_handler` import OK; cookie roundtrip `encode_signed_flow → decode_signed_flow` OK; identity extract for google/github/apple all return correct `OAuthUserIdentity`; `from backend.main import app` mounts the 2 new routes at `/api/v1/auth/oauth/{provider}/authorize` + `/callback` (verified via `app.routes` enumerate); TestClient hit on /authorize + /callback returns expected 4xx error semantics (gated by Bootstrap middleware in fresh-process test client — 503 banner is the existing safe-default for un-bootstrapped state, not AS.6.1 logic). **Path deviation note**: same AS.5.1 / AS.5.2 / AS.1.4 / AS.1.1 path-deviation precedent — module lives at `backend/security/oauth_login_handler.py` to align with sibling AS.1.x/AS.2.x/AS.5.x; canonical `backend/auth/oauth_login_handler.py` blocked by legacy `backend/auth.py` namespace. **Production status: dev-only.** Next gate: deployed-inactive once operator (a) registers OmniSight as an OAuth app at one of {Google / GitHub / Microsoft / Apple} and copies the issued client_id + client_secret into `OMNISIGHT_OAUTH_<VENDOR>_CLIENT_ID/SECRET` env vars + sets `OMNISIGHT_OAUTH_REDIRECT_BASE_URL` to the public hostname (vendor pins the exact callback URL), (b) generates a 32-byte random `OMNISIGHT_OAUTH_FLOW_SIGNING_KEY` (or accepts the `OMNISIGHT_DECISION_BEARER` fallback derivation), (c) restarts backend so Settings re-reads .env. AS.7.x ships the frontend SSO buttons that target `/api/v1/auth/oauth/{vendor}/authorize`. AS.6.5 wires this handler's audit emissions through OmniSight's own dashboard (already routed via AS.5.1 `emit_oauth_connect` + `emit_login_success`). `deployed-active` waits for first tenant operator to register a vendor + first end-user click on a SSO button + first OmniSight session issued via the OAuth path.

`MFA_METHOD_{TOTP,BACKUP_CODE,WEBAUTHN}` byte-equal OmniSight MFA challenge handler labels + `SUPPORTED_MFA_METHODS` frozenset / `_build_mfa_method_to_auth_method()` returns frozen `MappingProxyType` table mapping the 3 MFA labels onto AS.5.1 `auth_event.AUTH_METHODS` vocabulary (totp + backup_code → `AUTH_METHOD_MFA_TOTP` / webauthn → `AUTH_METHOD_MFA_WEBAUTHN`) + `request.client.host` matches AS.6.1 `_client_key`) + `request_user_agent(request)` (None-on-missing / shim-friendly) / 4 async best-effort emit helpers — `emit_login_success_event(*, user_id, request=, auth_method=PASSWORD, provider=, mfa_satisfied=False, actor=)` / `emit_login_fail_event(*, attempted_user, fail_reason, request=, auth_method=PASSWORD, provider=, actor="anonymous")` / `emit_token_refresh_event(*, user_id, provider, outcome, new_expires_in_seconds=, actor=)` / `emit_token_rotated_event(*, user_id, provider, previous_refresh_token, new_refresh_token, triggered_by, actor=)` — each routes through the AS.5.1 `auth_event.emit_*` family + swallows underlying audit-layer exceptions (returns `None`) so a chain-append failure can't break the OmniSight handler / 2 fire-and-forget schedule helpers `schedule_login_success_event(...)` + `schedule_login_fail_event(...)` (AS.6.1 OAuth-callback-style for response paths that must not block) — uses `asyncio.get_running_loop()` + `loop.create_task` (avoids the bare `asyncio.ensure_future` in sync contexts which silently spawns a fresh loop and leaks the task at interpreter exit). **HTTP wiring**: `backend/routers/auth.py` `POST /auth/login` extended with 6 dual-emit sites — (a) `_check_login_rate_limit` 429 → AS.5.1 `auth.login_fail` reason=`rate_limited` (b) `ip_limiter` 429 → reason=`rate_limited` (c) `email_limiter` 429 → reason=`rate_limited` (d) account-locked 423 → reason=`account_locked` (e) bad-credentials 401 → reason=`bad_password` + a second emit if the failed attempt tipped the lockout threshold (reason=`account_locked`) (f) MFA-required short-circuit → reason=`mfa_required` + (g) successful login → AS.5.1 `auth.login_success` with `auth_method=password mfa_satisfied=False`. `backend/routers/mfa.py` extended with 4 dual-emit sites — `POST /auth/mfa/challenge` invalid TOTP/backup-code → AS.5.1 `auth.login_fail` reason=`mfa_failed auth_method=mfa_totp` + successful TOTP/backup-code → `auth.login_success` `auth_method=mfa_totp mfa_satisfied=True`; `POST /auth/mfa/webauthn/challenge/complete` invalid → `auth.login_fail` reason=`mfa_failed auth_method=mfa_webauthn` + successful → `auth.login_success` `auth_method=mfa_webauthn mfa_satisfied=True`. `backend/security/oauth_refresh_hook.py` `_emit_refresh_audit` extended to fan AS.5.1 `auth.token_refresh` rollup alongside the existing AS.1.4 forensic `oauth.refresh` (covers all 4 outcomes: success / no_refresh_token / provider_error / vault_failure → the latter collapses onto provider_error in both vocabularies) + `refresh_record` rotated-success path extended to fan AS.5.1 `auth.token_rotated` rollup alongside AS.1.4 forensic `oauth.token_rotated`. **AS.6.1 OAuth callback** (`/auth/oauth/{provider}/callback`) was already wired through AS.5.1 directly via inline `_aevent.emit_oauth_connect` / `emit_login_success` / `emit_login_fail` calls (AS.6.1 row); no change needed in this row — that wiring is the precedent the AS.6.5 bridge follows. **Dual-emit additive contract**: legacy `login_ok` / `auth.login.fail` / `auth.lockout` / `mfa.challenge.passed` / `password_changed` audit rows stay where they are — the AS.5.1 rollup is fired ALONGSIDE per AS.6.1 precedent. Existing `test_oauth_refresh_hook.py` updated for AS.6.5 dual-emit — `test_refresh_record_no_refresh_token_emits_audit` + `test_refresh_record_provider_exception_returns_provider_error` + `test_refresh_record_vault_binding_mismatch_returns_vault_failure` now assert BOTH the AS.1.4 forensic `oauth.refresh` row AND the AS.5.1 `auth.token_refresh` rollup are emitted with byte-equal `outcome` values (forensic captures `error` + `granted_scope` for the I8 chain; rollup captures the dashboard-visible outcome + `new_expires_in_seconds`); `test_refresh_record_knob_off_helper_runs_audit_silent_skip` updated to ALSO patch `auth_event.is_enabled` alongside `oauth_client.is_enabled` (both gates trace back to AS.0.8 `settings.as_enabled` single knob). separator at index 4) + `normaliseMfaInput(kind, raw)` per-kind normaliser (TOTP strips non-digits + clamps to 6 / backup-code lower + trim + clamp 9 / WebAuthn returns "") / 6-kind `MFA_CHALLENGE_ERROR_KIND` vocabulary `{invalidCode, expiredChallenge, rateLimited, botChallenge, webauthnFailed, serviceUnavailable}` + `MFA_CHALLENGE_ERROR_COPY` canonical 6-string table (enum-resist invalidCode collapses both "wrong code" + "challenge consumed" — backend explicit `mfa_challenge_expired` errorCode is the only path that surfaces expired_challenge copy) + `parseMfaRetryAfter(header)` delta-seconds + HTTP-date both supported / `classifyMfaChallengeError(input)` precedence-table 9-row truth (errorCode=webauthn_failed shortcircuits over status / 410 → expired_challenge / 401+errorCode=mfa_challenge_expired → expired_challenge / 401 → invalid_code / 422 → invalid_code / 429+errorCode=bot_challenge_failed → bot_challenge / 429 → rate_limited / 5xx|null → service_unavailable / unknown 4xx → invalid_code defensive default) + `mfaChallengeSubmitBlockedReason(input)` 4-layer gate (busy → busy / WebAuthn → null / TOTP → looksLikeTotpCode / Backup → looksLikeBackupCode / else code_invalid) + `MFA_CHALLENGE_BLOCKED_REASONS=["busy","code_invalid"]` 2-tuple drift guard + `bumpPulseKey(prev)` monotonic increment for cell-pulse replay) + extended `lib/auth-context.tsx` with new `submitMfaStructured(code)` callback (structured-outcome variant of legacy `submitMfa()` — both hit the same `/auth/mfa/challenge` endpoint, but the structured one routes failures through `classifyMfaChallengeError` so the dedicated page can branch on `expired_challenge` vs retryable `invalid_code` without parsing message strings) + new `submitMfaWebauthn()` callback (orchestrates the two-step `webauthn/challenge/{begin,complete}` round-trip + `navigator.credentials.get(publicKey: options)` invocation + soft-fails to `webauthn_failed` outcome on `NotAllowedError`/abort/missing-API) + `lastMfaChallengeError: MfaChallengeErrorOutcome | null` context field + `MfaChallengeOutcome` exported type with `{status: "ok"|"failed"}` branches + `cancelMfa()` extended to clear `lastMfaChallengeError` / `app/login/page.tsx` 加 `useEffect` push-to-`/mfa-challenge` 當 `auth.mfaPending` becomes truthy (forwards `next` query) — the legacy inline `<MfaChallengeForm>` stays in the file for backwards-compat with the AS.7.1 test suite (the redirect happens immediately AFTER mount so the form renders for one frame before navigation; the dedicated page is the canonical UI from there onward) / extended `styles/auth-visual.css` (+170 行 / 5 new keyframes `as7-mfa-{pulse,passed-fade,passed-pop,passed-draw,passed-ring}` / per-cell pulse keyframe cubic-bezier scale 1→1.18→1 + brand-purple text-shadow + `[data-motion-level=off]` strips / `[data-motion-level=subtle]` strips pulse only / passed-check fullscreen z=9100 + radial-gradient emerald wash + 96×96px SVG with stroke-dasharray draw / 220×220px expanding ring / motion-level gating cascade) + 84 new vitest contract tests (`test/lib/auth/mfa-challenge-helpers.test.ts` 47 tests — 8 顆 constants drift guard + 6-row selectableMethods dispatch + 3 顆 looksLikeTotpCode + 4 顆 looksLikeBackupCode + 4 顆 normaliseMfaInput + 6-row parseMfaRetryAfter + 9-row classifyMfaChallengeError truth table + 6-row mfaChallengeSubmitBlockedReason precedence + 1 顆 bumpPulseKey monotonic ; `test/components/auth/mfa-method-tabs.test.tsx` 5 tests — render order + active flag matrix + click→onChange + ### AS.8 — Tests + Migration Runbook + ADR
- [ ] AS.8.1 Compat regression test suite（AS.0.9 5 顆 critical + 新增 8 個 cross-feature integration tests）
- [ ] AS.8.2 ADR doc：`docs/design/as-auth-security-shared-library.md`
- [ ] AS.8.3 Operator runbook：`docs/operations/as-rollout-and-rollback.md`（per-tenant feature flag 切換 SOP / single-knob rollback / Turnstile 三階段切換 SOP）
- 預估：**0.5 day**

**Priority AS 總預估**：**~21.75 day**

### 平行分工建議

如果 1 條 track + operator：嚴格 AS.0 → AS.1 → AS.2 → AS.3 → AS.4 → AS.5 → AS.6 → AS.7（含 AS.7.0 → 7.1 → ...） → AS.8 順序。

如果 2 條 track 平行：
- **Track A（後端 lib + integration）**：AS.0 → AS.1 → AS.2 → AS.3 → AS.4 → AS.5 → AS.6 → AS.8 → ~8d
- **Track B（前端 UI/UX 浮誇視覺）**：AS.7.0 (foundation) → AS.7.1 (login) → AS.7.2 (signup slot machine) → AS.7.3-7.8 → ~14d
- 同步點：AS.6 ship 後 → Track B 才能在 AS.7 接 backend 真實 endpoint
- Wall time：max(8d, 14d) = ~14d（Track B 是關鍵路徑）

3 track 不再縮短 — AS.7 是視覺工作天然較重，3+ 個人寫同個 React 元件樹會 merge 衝突大於增量速度。

**Alembic 編號精準預留**：

| Migration | 用途 | Phase |
|---|---|---|
| 0056 | `tenants.auth_features` JSONB 欄位 | AS.0.2 |
| 0057 | `oauth_tokens` table | AS.2.2 |
| 0058 | （buffer） | — |

## 🅕🅢 Priority FS — Full-Stack Web Application Generation（補完 W 系列後端缺口）

> **背景**：W11-W16 + W 系列做完後仍只覆蓋前端 + 靜態部署。SaaS 級「DB / Auth provisioning / Object storage / Email / Background jobs / Search / Billing」整合自動化是 generated app **production-ready** 的最後一哩。FS 把這條補完。
>
> **設計核心**：
> 1. **Reuse AS lib** — FS.2 inbound auth + FS.2b outbound OAuth + 任何 form 的 Turnstile 全 reuse `Priority AS` 的 lib（避免重複實作 + 避免 drift）
> 2. **Provider-agnostic adapter pattern** — 同 BS catalog 設計，per-domain 多 provider 抽象介面（DB / email / search 等）
> 3. **Vendor lock-in 風險揭露** — 每個整合在 PEP HOLD 顯示 lock-in level（low / medium / high），協助 operator 判斷
>
> **排程**：W11-W16 + AS 之後
>
> **Alembic 編號預留**：**0061–0063**
>
> **總範圍**：**~12 day**（FS.2 + FS.2b 因 reuse AS 已從 3.5d 縮成 1.75d）

### FS.1 — DB Provisioning
- [ ] FS.1.1 Adapter for Supabase / Neon / PlanetScale 三 backend
- [ ] FS.1.2 自動跑 migration runner（Prisma / Drizzle / SQLAlchemy schema → tenant own DB）
- [ ] FS.1.3 alembic 0061 `provisioned_databases` table（tenant_id / provider / connection_url_enc / created_at / status）
- [ ] FS.1.4 Encryption at rest 自動 enable（依 provider tier）
- [ ] FS.1.5 Backup 排程（依 provider feature）
- [ ] FS.1.6 PEP HOLD with cost estimate
- [ ] FS.1.7 Tests: 三 provider 完整 provision → migrate → smoke
- 預估：**2 day**

### FS.2 — Auth Provisioning - Inbound（reuse AS.1）
- [ ] FS.2.1 Clerk / Auth0 / WorkOS API 自動 setup
- [ ] FS.2.2 NextAuth.js / Lucia self-hosted scaffold（reuse AS.1 OAuth client lib）
- [ ] FS.2.3 Vendor OAuth app config 半自動化（Google / GitHub 走 vendor API where 有；其他生 step-by-step instructions）
- [ ] FS.2.4 Account linking + 多 provider stack
- [ ] FS.2.5 Email + magic link + TOTP MFA + WebAuthn baseline
- [ ] FS.2.6 Tests: 主流 5 provider 登入完整 flow
- 預估：**0.75 day**（縮減自原 1.5d，因 reuse AS）

### FS.2b — Auth Provisioning - Outbound Integrations（reuse AS.1 + AS.2）
- [ ] FS.2b.1 OAuth flow scaffold helper（authorize → callback → token exchange）
- [ ] FS.2b.2 Token vault：reuse AS.2 token_vault for generated app
- [ ] FS.2b.3 Refresh token rotation + 過期偵測 + 自動 refresh middleware
- [ ] FS.2b.4 Scope upgrade flow（已 connect 後升 scope 不重 connect）
- [ ] FS.2b.5 Disconnect + revoke endpoint（DSAR / GDPR right-to-erasure）
- [ ] FS.2b.6 Vendor catalog：GitHub / Slack / Google Workspace / Microsoft 365 / Notion / Salesforce / HubSpot / Zoom / Stripe Connect / Discord 共 10 個
- [ ] FS.2b.7 Tests: 模擬 3 vendor 完整 connect → use → refresh → revoke
- 預估：**1 day**（縮減自原 2d，因 reuse AS）

### FS.3 — Object Storage

- [ ] FS.3.2 alembic 0062 `provisioned_storage` table（tenant_id / provider / bucket_name / created_at）

- [ ] FS.3.4 CORS config 自動
- [ ] FS.3.5 Tests
