接受 raw dict / JSON string / `{"content":[{type:"text",text:"..."}]}` 三種 MCP 封裝、screenshot 接受 bytes / data-URL / base64 / 拒絕 `@@not b64@@` 降級為 `screenshot_invalid` warning stashed 到 `metadata["_parse_warnings"]`；missing fields 降級為 empty tokens，不 raise。**Extraction 規則** — 複用 V1 figma_to_ui 的 regex 引擎（hex / rgb / hsl / oklch / oklab / CSS var / px / rem / arbitrary spacing `p-[32px]` / Tailwind scale `gap-6` / rounded utilities + arbitrary / box-shadow utility+CSS+JSX / text-{xs..9xl} / font-{thin..black} / font-size/weight/family CSS+JSX / JSX open tag / import from），**sorted + de-duplicated** 保證 prompt-cache 決定性；variables map 的 `{"r":0.043,"g":0.070,"b":0.118}` Figma colour 結構自動 round-trip 為 `#0b1220` hex token。**Prompt 構造** — 8 段顯性 sections (header / target platforms / figma source / figma extraction / figma reference code / **mobile registry block** (`render_agent_context_block` from `backend/mobile_component_registry.py` 注入全三平台或 `platforms=(...)` 過濾後子集) / **design tokens block** (`render_agent_context_block` from `backend/design_token_loader.py` 載入 project globals.css live) / brief / generation rules)；reference code > 8 KB 顯性 truncate 附 `(truncated N bytes)` tag；Generation rules 8 條硬約束：(1) 三段 fenced code blocks 順序 `swift → kotlin → dart`、(2) 三平台語義等價、(3) 禁 hex/pt/dp/sp 硬編碼必走 `MaterialTheme.colorScheme.*` / `Theme.of(context).textTheme.*` / SF Symbols / design token 常數名、(4) React/Tailwind 絕對定位→平台 idiomatic VStack/Column/Stack + size-class、(5) touch target 44×44 pt / 48×48 dp、(6) a11y label/contentDescription/Semantics(label:) baseline、(7) dark-mode parity 禁 `Color(red:green:blue:)` / `Color(0xFF…)` / `Color(int)`、(8) output shape 三段 fence 無 prose。**byte-stable prompt** — 同 inputs 兩次 call 輸出 byte-identical，支援 Anthropic prompt-cache。**Response parser** — `extract_mobile_code_from_response()` 接受 3+ 背 tick / 3+ tilde (`~~~`) fence、不同 fence-length、swift/swiftui/kotlin/kt/compose/dart/flutter 7 種 alias、first-block-wins on duplicate、unknown fence (```text) 靜默忽略、unterminated fence 靜默停止；partial response (e.g. 只有 swift block) 輸出 `MobileCodeOutputs(swift=..., kotlin="", dart="")` + `missing_platforms()` 返 `("compose","flutter")`。**Pipeline 兩入口** — (a) `generate_mobile_from_figma(context, ...) -> MobileFigmaGenerationResult` 主 pipeline，LLM unavailable → `warnings=("llm_unavailable",)` + empty outputs 不 raise、partial → per-platform `<plat>_missing` warning 非致命、`platforms=("swiftui",)` narrow 時只對指定平台判 missing；(b) `run_figma_to_mobile(file_key, node_id, mcp_response|context, ...) -> dict` agent-callable JSON entry、`(mcp_response is None) == (context is None)` → `ValueError`、context.file_key / node_id 不一致 → `ValueError`。**Default invoker wiring** — `_default_invoker()` partial-apply `backend.llm_adapter.invoke_chat(provider,model,llm)` + try/except 網路錯誤降級為空字串；DEFAULT_FIGMA_MOBILE_MODEL=`claude-opus-4-7` / PROVIDER=`anthropic`（Opus 因三平台 reasoning task 需深度模型）。**Contract tests** — `backend/tests/test_figma_to_mobile.py` **134 test pass**：`TestModuleInvariants` (6) / `TestNormaliseNodeId` (9) / `TestNormaliseFileKey` (5) / `TestCanonicalSource` (1) / `TestMobileFigmaToken` (4) / `TestMobileFigmaDesignContext` (6) / `TestFromMcpResponse` (12) / `TestExtractFromContext` (14) / `TestGenerationPromptDeterminism` (13) / `TestMultimodalMessage` (2) / `TestExtractMobileCodeFromResponse` (10) / `TestMobileFigmaGenerationResult` (2) / `TestGenerateMobileFromFigma` (9) / `TestRunFigmaToMobile` (5) / `TestDefaultInvokerWiring` (2) / `TestSiblingIntegration` (3) — 含 platform narrowing（`platforms=("swiftui",)` 不發 compose/flutter missing）、alias table 完整覆蓋、tilde fence 支援、deterministic byte-identical prompt、target_platforms 與 registry 同步 invariant。**Sibling tests 無退** — test_figma_to_ui (192) + test_mobile_component_registry (597) + test_design_token_loader + test_ui_component_registry + test_vision_to_ui 合計 1043 test 全 pass。**檔案位置決策** — top-level `backend/figma_to_mobile.py` 對齊 web sibling `backend/figma_to_ui.py` 平輩位置，不放 `backend/mobile/` 子目錄。**Scope - [x] `backend/mobile_sandbox.py`：per-session build server——Android: Docker + Gradle build → .apk → Android emulator 截圖；iOS: macOS remote delegate + xcodebuild → .app → Simulator 截圖 *(done: V6 #1 / `test_mobile_component_registry` + `test_figma_to_mobile` + `test_mobile_toolchain`) 零回歸。**核心契約 — 雙 pipeline 共 1 個 manager** Android 走 Docker 容器 → Gradle build → `.apk` → `adb install -r -g` → `adb shell screencap` 拉回 PNG；iOS 走 ssh remote macOS → `xcodebuild build` → `.app` → `xcrun simctl install` + launch → `xcrun simctl io <udid> screenshot` → scp 拉回。**Schema** — `MobileSandboxConfig`(26 欄 frozen: session_id + platform + workspace_path + android 7 欄 + ios 10 欄 + timeouts 4 欄 + env/build_args) / `MobileSandboxInstance`(16 欄 frozen: lifecycle + container_id/delegate_handle/screenshot_port + BuildReport/InstallReport/ScreenshotReport + created_at/started_at/built_at/ready_at/stopped_at/last_active_at) / `BuildError`(message+file+line+column+severity+tool) / `BuildReport`(status+artifact_path+tool+duration_ms+exit_code+stdout_tail+stderr_tail+errors+detail) / `InstallReport`(status+launched+detail) / `ScreenshotReport`(status+path+format+width+height+detail) 全 frozen + `to_dict()` JSON-safe + `MOBILE_SANDBOX_SCHEMA_VERSION="1.0.0"` semver bump gate。**8 個 lifecycle 狀態** — `pending → building → built → installing → running → stopping → stopped`（+ `failed`）；executor 錯誤永遠記錄到 sandbox 不 propagate 中斷 ReAct loop。**依賴注入 executor 協定** — `AndroidExecutor` / `IosExecutor` Protocol (`build/install/screenshot/stop`)；測試用 `FakeAndroidExecutor` / `FakeIosExecutor` 記錄 calls 返 deterministic reports，零 docker / adb / ssh / 網路 touch。**生產級 glue** — `SubprocessAndroidExecutor`（docker + adb 外殼）+ `SshMacOsIosExecutor`（ssh + scp 到 macOS runner）；兩者當工具鏈缺席（`docker` / `adb` / `ssh` 不在 PATH 或 `ios_remote_host` 空）時**degrade 為 `mock` status**（agent 可區分「工具沒有」vs「build 失敗」）。**純 argv builder** — `build_android_build_argv(config)` 產出 `docker run --rm --name <sandbox-name> -v <ws>:<workdir> -w <workdir> -e KEY=V (sorted) <image> ./gradlew :<module>:<task> --no-daemon --console=plain <extra>` / `build_ios_build_argv(config)` 產出 `xcodebuild build -workspace|-project X -scheme Y -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=... OR id=<udid>' -derivedDataPath <ios_workdir>/DerivedData CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY= CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO <extra>`；byte-identical 兩次 call 同輸入支援 prompt-cache。**Install/screenshot argv** — `build_android_install_argv(config, apk)` → `adb install -r -g <apk>`（`-r` 保留 data / `-g` 自動 grant runtime perm 免去 prompt dance）；`build_android_screenshot_argv(remote_path)` → `adb shell screencap -p <remote>`；`build_ios_screenshot_argv(output, udid="booted")` → `xcrun simctl io <udid> screenshot <output>`。**Artifact locator** — `locate_android_apk(workspace, module, variant="debug")` 查 `<module>/build/outputs/apk/<variant>/*.apk`（fallback rglob `outputs/**/*.apk`）；`locate_ios_app_bundle(derived, configuration, platform="iphonesimulator")` 查 `Build/Products/<Configuration>-<platform>/*.app`（fallback rglob）；兩者 missing/non-dir 返 None 不 raise。**Build-error parser `parse_build_error(stderr, tool)`** — Gradle 抓 `e:|w: file:line:col: message` kotlinc/javac 診斷形式 + `FAILURE: Build failed` / `* What went wrong` / `Execution failed for task` / `Could not resolve` trigger 後拉下一行非空作 message；Xcode 抓 `/path.swift:line:col: error|warning: message`；去重 (message,file,line,severity) key；永不 raise；unknown tool 返空 tuple。**工具鏈 wiring 細節** — Android 容器走 `docker run --rm`（build 一次性 ephemeral，Gradle cache 透過 bind-mount 寫回 workspace）；Android 工作目錄 `/workspace`（不與專案自有 `/app` 模組名衝突）；Android 預設 image `gradle:8.10-jdk21`（JDK 21 + Gradle 8.10 對齊 V1 scaffolder 期待）；iOS DerivedData 固定在 `<ios_workdir>/DerivedData`，Xcode code-signing 全關（`CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY=` + `CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO` + `CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO`）；ssh 走 `ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new <host> -- <shlex.quote 過的 argv>`。**Port allocator** — `allocate_screenshot_port(session_id, in_use, port_range=(41000,41999))` hash-based + linear-probe 同 `ui_sandbox.allocate_host_port` 風格；同 session 永遠拿到同 port 方便 ops debug。**Manager 公開 API 8 支** — `create/build/install/screenshot/touch/stop/remove/get/list/snapshot`；thread-safe (`threading.RLock`) 單 session 單 sandbox 嚴格一對一 (`MobileSandboxAlreadyExists` raise)。**Event callback** — 每次狀態轉換 emit `mobile_sandbox.<state>` event (created/building/built/failed/installing/ready/screenshot/stopped)；callback 內部 raise 不殺 manager (`pragma: no cover` warning log)。**Error 階層** — `MobileSandboxError`(RuntimeError) + `MobileSandboxAlreadyExists` + `MobileSandboxNotFound` + `MobileSandboxConfigError` 四顆；router 可一捕 base。**安全/注入防護** — session id 正則白名單 `[A-Za-z0-9_.\-]{1,64}` 強制、workspace absolute 強制、workdir absolute 強制、xcode action/configuration enum 強制、timeouts >0 強制、env/build_args type-checked、ssh argv 經 `shlex.quote` 全量 quote、無 subprocess shell=True、`DEFAULT_SCREENSHOT_PORT_RANGE=(41000,41999)` 避開 adb server port 5037。**測試 110 顆分桶** — 模組 invariants 6（`__all__` 完整 + schema semver + SUPPORTED_PLATFORMS stable + SUPPORTED_SCREENSHOT_FORMATS stable + defaults sane + status enum 8 狀態完整）+ MobileSandboxConfig 16（happy android/ios + frozen + 10 reject + env normalise + build_args tuple-normalise + to_dict JSON-safe）+ pure helpers 14（format_sandbox_name 5 + validate_workspace 4 + allocate_screenshot_port 4 + in-range 1）+ build_android_build_argv 8（deterministic + docker run + workspace bind + gradle task + build_args + ios reject + non-config TypeError + env sorted）+ build_ios_build_argv 7（deterministic + workspace flag + project flag + udid destination + device-name destination + code-signing disabled + android reject）+ install/screenshot argv 8 + locate_android_apk 4 + locate_ios_app_bundle 3 + parse_build_error 9（gradle diag + gradle warn + what-went-wrong + xcodebuild diag + xcode alias + empty safe + None safe + unknown tool + dedup）+ dataclass to_dict 5 + manager lifecycle 18（require executor + create + dup raise + missing executor + build transitions + build failure + install running + install rejects + install fail + screenshot requires running + screenshot happy + stop + stop idempotent + remove requires terminal + remove after stop + touch updates + list/snapshot + require unknown raise + event callback transitions + event callback isolation）+ markdown 2 + subprocess executors 6（android mock-without-docker + ios mock-without-remote-host + ios mock-without-ssh + ios install mock + ios screenshot mock + android runner injection fail parsing）。**Zero regression** — `test_ui_sandbox`（父 sandbox pattern）+ `test_mobile_simulator` + `test_mobile_component_registry`（V5 #2）+ `test_figma_to_mobile`（V5 #3）+ `test_mobile_toolchain` 共 988 顆 sibling test 全綠。**LangChain firewall** — 0 新依賴（stdlib only: dataclasses/enum/hashlib/json/logging/os/pathlib/re/shlex/shutil/subprocess/threading/time/types/typing）。**Scope 自律** — 只新增 2 檔（`backend/mobile_sandbox.py` + `backend/tests/test_mobile_sandbox.py`）；零改動 V2 `ui_sandbox.py` / V5 sibling 4 row 任一檔 / `backend/mobile_simulator.py` / `backend/mobile_toolchain.py` / `backend/mobile_component_registry.py` / `backend/figma_to_mobile.py` / `requirements.txt` / `package.json` / CLAUDE.md / SOP / docs / frontend 任一 `.tsx`；V6 後續 5 row（`mobile_screenshot.py` / device-frame.tsx / device-grid.tsx / agent visual context injection / build-error auto-fix）屬不同 row 不在本回合 scope)
- [x] `backend/mobile_screenshot.py`：iOS `xcrun simctl io booted screenshot` + Android `adb shell screencap` → PNG 回傳 *(done: V6 #2 / issue #322 / TODO row 1549 — `backend/mobile_screenshot.py` (~860 行) + `backend/tests/test_mobile_screenshot.py` 120 顆契約測試全綠 0.21s + 1192 顆 sibling tests (`test_mobile_sandbox` + `test_mobile_simulator` + `test_mobile_component_registry` + `test_mobile_toolchain` + `test_figma_to_mobile` + `test_ui_sandbox` + `test_vision_to_mobile`) 零回歸。**核心契約 — ad-hoc 截圖原語（非 sandbox lifecycle）** 任何 agent / HTTP endpoint / 測試只要一個 `ScreenshotRequest` + `capture()` call 就拿回 PNG；V6 #1 `mobile_sandbox` 負責「build+install+screenshot 完整生命週期」，本 row 負責「已開機的 emulator/simulator → 截一張」這個 primitive（V6 #5 agent visual context 每輪 ReAct 呼叫、V6 #3/#4 device-grid fan-out、diff-screenshot CI step 全部重用這顆）。**Schema** — `ScreenshotRequest`(13 欄 frozen: session_id + platform + output_path + timeout + android_remote_path/android_serial + ios_udid/ios_remote_host/ios_remote_tmp_dir + attach_bytes + format + env MappingProxyType) / `ScreenshotResult`(12 欄 frozen: session_id + platform + status + path + format + width/height + size_bytes + duration_ms + captured_at + detail + png_bytes inline) 全 frozen + `to_dict()` JSON-safe（`png_bytes` 刻意 drop + 輸出 `has_bytes` / `ok` 布林旗）+ `MOBILE_SCREENSHOT_SCHEMA_VERSION="1.0.0"` semver bump gate。**4 個 status** — `pass` / `fail` / `skip` / `mock`；`mock` = 工具鏈不在（adb / xcrun / ssh / scp 任一缺 PATH）、`skip` = 預設未發送、`fail` = rc!=0 或 timeout 或 bad PNG、`pass` = PNG 落盤 + IHDR 正常；`has_real_capture` 性質把 `skip`/`mock` 濾掉方便 agent 餵 multimodal context。**依賴注入 runner** — 簽名對齊 `subprocess.run`（keyword: `capture_output` / `text` / `timeout` / `check` / `env`）；測試用 `FakeRunner` 記錄 argv + 服 canned `CompletedProcess` 或拋 canned 例外（`subprocess.TimeoutExpired` / `RuntimeError` / `OSError`），零真 adb / xcrun / ssh / scp 觸碰。**純 argv builder 5 支** — `build_android_capture_argv(remote_path, serial="")` → `adb [-s <serial>] shell screencap -p <remote>`；`build_android_pull_argv(remote, local, serial="")` → `adb [-s <serial>] pull <remote> <local>`；`build_ios_capture_argv(output, udid="booted")` → `xcrun simctl io <udid> screenshot <output>`（與 V6 #1 `build_ios_screenshot_argv` byte-identical shape 保持 agent 抄 argv 互通）；`build_ios_remote_capture_argv(host, remote_path, udid)` → `ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new <host> -- "<shlex.quote 過的 xcrun argv>"`（避免 host 帶空白/引號被 remote shell 拆開）；`build_ios_scp_argv(host, remote, local)` → `scp <host>:<remote> <local>`。兩次 call 同輸入 byte-identical 支援 prompt-cache。**Capture entry points 3 支** — `capture_android(request, runner, clock, monotonic)` 走 adb shell screencap → adb pull → IHDR sniff；`capture_ios(request, ...)` dispatch 到 `_capture_ios_local`（xcrun 本機）或 `_capture_ios_remote`（ssh+scp 到 mac runner，用 `<remote_tmp>/omnisight-screenshot-<session_id>.png` 避免並發衝突）；`capture(request, ...)` 是平台 dispatcher + `TypeError` on non-Request。工具鏈全在 → 跑真 subprocess；工具鏈缺 → 降級 `mock` 不 raise；rc!=0 / timeout / 任意 `Exception` 全部吞成 `ScreenshotResult(status=fail, detail=...)`，永遠不讓 agent ReAct loop 因 IO 異常斷掉。**PNG sniff `parse_png_dimensions(bytes)`** — stdlib `struct` 讀 IHDR chunk（magic 8B + `\x00\x00\x00\x0dIHDR` + width/height big-endian uint32）；bad magic / 短 bytes / 非 bytes / None 全返 `(0,0)` 不 raise；零 Pillow 依賴（mobile pipeline 不引入 imaging lib）；width/height 用來驅動 V6 #3 device-frame 選型（iPhone 15 Pro = 1179x2556、iPhone SE = 750x1334、Pixel 8 = 1080x2400…）。**Bytes-inline 模式** — `ScreenshotResult.png_bytes` 預設攜 PNG 全量 bytes 方便 agent 直接塞 Opus 4.7 multimodal context 免再讀硬碟；`ScreenshotRequest.attach_bytes=False` 時 `png_bytes=b""` 僅保 path（CI diff step 串流到 blob store 用）。**錯誤階層** — `MobileScreenshotError`(RuntimeError) + `MobileScreenshotConfigError` + `MobileScreenshotToolMissing` + `MobileScreenshotTimeout` + `MobileScreenshotCaptureError` 五顆；router 可一捕 base。**安全/注入防護** — session id `[A-Za-z0-9_.\-]{1,64}` / android serial `[A-Za-z0-9_.:@\-]{1,128}` / iOS udid = `"booted"` 或 `[A-Za-z0-9\-]{3,64}` 全走 regex 白名單；output_path 強制 absolute (`os.path.isabs`)；android_remote_path + ios_remote_tmp_dir 強制 `/` 開頭；env 必須 `Mapping[str,str]` → 深拷到 `MappingProxyType` 防 caller 改；ssh argv 內層走 `shlex.quote` 全量 quote；無 `shell=True`；timeout>0 強制。**測試 120 顆分桶** — 模組 invariants 8（`__all__` 完整 25 支 + schema semver + SUPPORTED_PLATFORMS/FORMATS stable + defaults sane + PNG_MAGIC 8B + status enum 4 狀態 + 錯誤 5 類 hierarchy）+ ScreenshotRequest 22（happy android/ios + is_remote_ios 3 + frozen + 15 reject + case normalise + env readonly + to_dict JSON-safe + round-trip）+ ScreenshotResult 11（default skip + frozen + 6 reject + ok/has_real_capture 性質 3 + to_dict drops bytes + 含 dimensions on pass）+ pure argv builders 18（android capture 5 / android pull 4 / ios capture 5 / ios remote capture 5 / ios scp 3）+ parse_png_dimensions 9（happy + small + none + empty + short + bad magic + bad IHDR + non-bytes + bytearray）+ capture_android 13（reject ios + mock + happy + attach_bytes=False + capture rc fail + pull rc fail + capture timeout + pull timeout + 2 generic exception + empty file → fail + bad PNG → fail + 巢狀 parent mkdir）+ capture_ios local 5（reject android + mock + happy + rc fail + timeout + generic exception）+ capture_ios remote 9（missing ssh → mock + missing scp → mock + happy + ssh rc fail + scp rc fail + ssh timeout + scp timeout + ssh generic exception + scp generic exception + session_id 入 remote path）+ capture dispatch 4（android + ios + TypeError + runner passthrough）+ markdown renderer 3 + 整合 smoke 7。**Zero regression** — `test_mobile_sandbox` + `test_mobile_simulator` + `test_mobile_component_registry` + `test_mobile_toolchain` + `test_figma_to_mobile` + `test_ui_sandbox` + `test_vision_to_mobile` 共 1192 顆 sibling test 全綠 1.50s。**LangChain firewall** — 0 新依賴（stdlib only: dataclasses/enum/logging/os/pathlib/re/shlex/shutil/struct/subprocess/time/types/typing）。**Scope 自律** — 只新增 2 檔（`backend/mobile_screenshot.py` + `backend/tests/test_mobile_screenshot.py`）；零改動 V6 #1 `backend/mobile_sandbox.py` / V5 sibling 任一檔 / `backend/mobile_simulator.py` / `backend/mobile_toolchain.py` / `backend/mobile_component_registry.py` / `backend/figma_to_mobile.py` / `backend/vision_to_mobile.py` / `backend/ui_sandbox.py` / `requirements.txt` / `package.json` / CLAUDE.md / SOP / docs / frontend 任一 `.tsx`；V6 後續 4 row（device-frame.tsx / device-grid.tsx / agent - [x] Device frame renderer（`components/omnisight/device-frame.tsx`）：iPhone 15 / SE / iPad / Pixel 8 / Fold / Samsung tablet 外框 → 截圖套入 *(done: V6 #3 / issue #322 / TODO row 1550 — `components/omnisight/device-frame.tsx` (~360 行) + `test/components/device-frame.test.tsx` 46 顆契約測試全綠 1.41s + 658/660 sibling component tests 綠（剩 2 顆 bootstrap-page 失敗為 master 既存 flake，與本 row 無關）。**核心契約 — 純 CSS/SVG 無外部 PNG bezel asset** 任何 caller 給 `device` preset id + `screenshotUrl` 就拿到一個帶硬體外框的 `<figure>`；零外部 image asset（V6 #4 device-grid 渲染 6 個 frame 不會多 6 個網路請求）；deterministic 在 jsdom 不依賴 layout pass，視覺迴歸 pipeline 可直接 snapshot。**Schema** — `DeviceProfile`(11 欄: id + label + platform + form + screenWidth/screenHeight 原生像素 + bezel{top/right/bottom/left} 4 邊獨立 + frameRadius/screenRadius + cutout{kind+width+height+offsetY} + homeButton + frameColor/frameStroke) frozen via `Object.freeze`；`DeviceFrameProps`(11 欄: device + screenshotUrl + alt + width + className + showLabel + loading + empty + onClick + data-testid 全 optional 除 device)；`DEVICE_PROFILES` + `DEVICE_PROFILE_IDS` 兩個 frozen const export 供 V6 #4 grid lay out 不需 instantiate DOM 即可算 grid cell 大小。**6 個 preset 完整覆蓋 row 要求** — `iphone-15`(1179×2556 native + Dynamic Island cutout 380×110 + dark frame) / `iphone-se`(750×1334 + 物理 home button + 上下大 chin + 銀色 frame) / `ipad`(1640×2360 + 對稱 120px bezel + 細 hole-punch + 銀色 frame) / `pixel-8`(1080×2400 + 中央 hole-punch + dark frame) / `galaxy-fold`(904×2176 outer cover display + 細長比例 + dark frame) / `galaxy-tab`(1600×2560 + 對稱 110px bezel + 中央 hole-punch + dark frame)；六個 preset 直接覆蓋 row 列出的 「iPhone 15 / SE / iPad / Pixel 8 / Fold / Samsung tablet」六機型。**幾何 helper 3 支** — `getDeviceProfile(id)` 防禦性查表（unknown id 拋 `Unknown device profile`）；`getDeviceOuterSize(profile)` = screen + bezel 計算 outer 框大小（V6 #4 grid 用來決定 cell 寬高）；`computeDeviceScale(profile, renderWidth)` = renderWidth / outerWidth 算 scale factor，輸入 ≤0/NaN/Infinity 一律返 0 防爆；三支 helper 純函式 byte-identical 重複呼叫。**Render pipeline** — caller 給的 `width`(CSS px) → 用 outer width 算 scale → 所有 native-pixel 維度（screen、bezel、cutout、home button、corner radius）統一 scale 至 CSS px → 螢幕區用 `position: absolute` + `bezelTop` / `bezelLeft` 偏移；screenshot `<img>` 走 `object-fit: cover` + `object-position: top center` 不變形（V6 #1/#2 截圖已是原生解析度，wrong-aspect 只 crop 不 distort）；cutout 永遠浮在 screenshot 上方 (`zIndex: 2`) 模擬硬體相機遮擋 status bar。**3 個 mutually exclusive state** — `loading=true` 渲染 shimmer placeholder + `role=status` + `aria-label="loading screenshot"`（V6 #4 grid 等截圖時不破版）；`empty=true` 渲染 "no screenshot" 字樣（agent 還沒截過時的初始狀態）；都不為 true 且 `screenshotUrl` 給了 → 渲染 `<img>`；loading 優先級 > empty（同時為 true 時 shimmer 勝出）。**Cutout 4 種 kind** — `island`(iPhone 15+ Dynamic Island，膠囊形 borderRadius=height/2) / `notch`(老 iPhone X-14，膠囊形) / `hole`(Android hole-punch + 細 iPad hole，圓形 borderRadius=min(w,h)/2) / `bar`(iPhone SE 頂端 listening grille，淺 radius)；`none` 完全跳過 render；尺寸/位置全用 `offsetY`(離螢幕頂 native px) 配合 scale 動態計算。**Width 安全網** — caller 給 NaN → fallback 到 280 default；給 ≤0 / 微小值 → clamp 到 MIN_WIDTH=48（V6 #4 grid resizer 拖到 0 時 frame 不消失也不變 0 寬）。**A11y + 互動** — 沒給 onClick → `<figure>` 純展示（無 role / 無 tabindex）；給 onClick → `role=button` + `tabIndex=0` + Enter / Space 觸發 (`e.preventDefault()` 避免 page scroll)；不論 click/keyboard 一律呼叫 onClick 一次；其他鍵 (Tab / Escape / 其他) 忽略；`aria-label="<Label> device frame"` + `figure > figcaption` 走 semantic HTML。**Stable data-attr 給 V6 #4 / V6 #5 hook** — `data-device=<id>` / `data-platform=ios|android` / `data-form=phone|tablet|foldable` 在 `<figure>` 上；testid passthrough 全 6 個 sub-region (`{testId}-bezel`/`-screen`/`-screenshot`/`-label`/`-home`/`-cutout`)；agent visual context（V6 #5）可直接 query data-device 對應到 `DEVICE_PROFILES[id]` 的 native px 維度餵 multimodal LLM "this is what an iPhone 15 user sees"。**Style 自閉合** — keyframes (`omnisight-device-frame-shimmer`) inline `<style>` 在 component 內不依賴 globals.css；className 用 `cn()` merge 支援 caller 客製。**測試 46 顆分桶** — 模組 invariants 7（DEVICE_PROFILE_IDS 順序 + 6 preset native dims/bezels positive/portrait + homeButton flag 只 iphone-se / iphone-15 island + pixel-8/galaxy-fold hole / ipad+galaxy-tab tablet form / galaxy-fold foldable / Object.isFrozen）+ getDeviceProfile 2（同物件 + unknown raise）+ geometry helpers 4（outer = screen + bezel / 6 preset deterministic / scale 公式 0.5x/1x/3x / scale 拒絕 0/負/NaN/Infinity）+ render 11（基本 figure + bezel + screen + label + data-attrs + screenshot src/alt + alt fallback + loading shimmer role=status + empty placeholder + loading > empty 優先 + 全 missing 純 bezel + 等比 scale + width clamp + width=NaN 走 280 default + home button only on iphone-se + 6 preset bezel/screen 都有非 0 尺寸且 screen 在 bezel 內）+ interaction 5（onClick → role=button + tabIndex=0 / 沒 onClick → 純 figure / click 觸發 / Enter+Space 觸發 / Tab+Escape 不觸發 / className merge）。**Zero regression** — `test/components/` 全套 660 顆中 658 顆綠，剩 2 顆是 master 上的 bootstrap-page flake (Step 1 form rotates / Step 1 form surfaces server error)，本 row 增量為 +46 顆全綠（614 → 660）。**Scope 自律** — 只新增 2 檔（`components/omnisight/device-frame.tsx` + `test/components/device-frame.test.tsx`）；零改動 V6 #1 `backend/mobile_sandbox.py` / V6 #2 `backend/mobile_screenshot.py` / V5 sibling 任一檔 / `backend/mobile_simulator.py` / `backend/mobile_toolchain.py` / `backend/mobile_component_registry.py` / `backend/figma_to_mobile.py` / `requirements.txt` / `package.json` / CLAUDE.md / SOP / docs / 任一既存 `.tsx`；V6 後續 3 row（device-grid.tsx / agent visual context injection / build-error auto-fix）屬不同 row 不在本回合 scope)

`test/components/device-grid.test.tsx` 54 顆契約測試全綠 1.31s + 850/852 sibling component tests 綠（剩 2 顆 bootstrap-page failures 為 master 既存 flake，V6 #3 row 已紀錄，與本 row 無關）。**核心契約 — 把 V6 #3 `DeviceFrame` fan 成 responsive grid** 任何 caller 一個 `screenshotUrl` 就拿到「同一頁面 × 六機型」grid，零外部 asset（六個 frame 全靠 V6 #3 純 CSS bezel）；V6 #5 agent visual-context injector + V7 mobile visual annotator + Mobile Workspace dashboard 三個下游消費者全部 key 在 `data-device` + `data-testid` hook。**Schema** — `DeviceGridItem`(5 欄: device + screenshotUrl + loading + empty + alt 全 optional 除 device) / `DeviceGridProps`(18 欄: devices + screenshotUrl + loading + empty + frameWidth + minColumnWidth + columns + gap + showLabels + platforms + forms + selectedDevice + onSelectDevice + emptyLabel + title + description + className + data-testid + aria-label)；`DEFAULT_DEVICE_GRID_ITEMS` frozen const 鏡射 `DEVICE_PROFILE_IDS` 順序（iPhone 15 / SE / iPad / Pixel 8 / Fold / Galaxy Tab 六機型）。**純 helper 4 支** — `normaliseDeviceGridItems(input)` 接受 `DeviceProfileId` string 或 `DeviceGridItem` object 混合 list → 升級 string 為 item、drop unknown id（防禦 agent 傳未來預設）、dedup 保留首次出現、falsy 跳過，永不拋；`filterDeviceGridItems(items, {platforms, forms})` 交集過濾（空 array = 不過濾）；`buildDeviceGridStyle({columns, minColumnWidth, gap})` 產 CSS grid template — `columns>0 finite int` → `repeat(<cols>, minmax(0, 1fr))`、否則 → `repeat(auto-fit, minmax(<min>px, 1fr))`；min 自動 clamp 到 48px 防 0；fractional columns `Math.floor` 成整數；0/負/NaN/Infinity 全 fallback auto-fit；`nextSelectionIndex(current, total, key, columns)` 鍵盤導航純函式（ArrowLeft/Right wrap / Up/Down jump column 數 clamp 在第一/末行 / Home=0 / End=total-1 / empty → -1 / current=-1 視為 0）。**Per-cell override 優先級** — 每 cell 的 `screenshotUrl`/`loading`/`empty`/`alt` 若 `!== undefined` beat grid-wide default；讓 V6 #5 可以「三個 frame loading 中 + 另三個保留前一張截圖」做視覺 diff。**Filter** — platforms=['ios'] 剩 iphone-15/iphone-se/ipad；forms=['phone'] 剩 iphone-15/iphone-se/pixel-8；platforms+forms 交集；filter 到 0 → empty placeholder；only-unknowns 也是 empty placeholder（agent 亂傳不 crash）。**Selection UI** — `selectedDevice` 套 `aria-selected=true` + ring-2 highlight；`onSelectDevice` 時 cell 才 carry `aria-selected`（沒 handler → 無）；click frame → `onSelectDevice(id)`；ArrowLeft/Right/Up/Down/Home/End 鍵盤導航走 `nextSelectionIndex` 公式；無 onSelectDevice 時 arrow 鍵靜默 no-op（不拋、不 preventDefault）；unrelated key (Tab, 字母) 不觸發。**Empty state** — `resolvedItems.length===0` → `role=status` placeholder + `data-testid={testid}-empty`；否則 → `role=list` grid + cell 走 `role=listitem`；customisable `emptyLabel`（default "No device previews to display"）。**Header slot** — 可選 `title`/`description` → `<header>` 渲染；兩者都空跳過；`data-testid={testid}-header` hook。**Memoised layout** — `resolvedItems` / `gridStyle` / `selectedIndex` 全 `React.useMemo`，`handleKeyDown` `React.useCallback`；避免 V6 #5 每輪 ReAct 重 render 6 個 frame rebuild grid。**A11y** — section `aria-label="Multi-device preview"`（default）+ grid `role=list` + cell `role=listitem` + `data-device-count=<n>`（let agent query grid 看渲染了幾個機型不用 deep traverse DOM）。**Testid convention** — `{testid}` on section / `{testid}-header` / `{testid}-empty` / `{testid}-grid` / `{testid}-cell-<device>` / `{testid}-frame-<device>`（後者 spread 進 DeviceFrame 觸發 V6 #3 內部的 `-bezel`/`-screen`/`-screenshot`/`-label`/`-home` testid fan-out）。**測試 54 顆分桶** — defaults 2（DEFAULT_DEVICE_GRID_ITEMS 順序 + frozen）+ normaliseDeviceGridItems 6（undefined/empty + string 升級 + per-item override 保留 + unknown 靜默 drop + dedup 首次勝 + falsy 跳過）+ filterDeviceGridItems 5（no-filter copy + platforms=ios + forms=tablet + 交集 + empty array = 不過濾）+ buildDeviceGridStyle 7（auto-fit default + columns override + zero/負/NaN/Infinity fallback + minColumnWidth 自訂 + clamp 48 + gap + floor fractional）+ nextSelectionIndex 7（ArrowLeft wrap + ArrowRight wrap + ArrowUp clamp row 0 + ArrowDown clamp 末行 + Home/End + empty → -1 + current=-1 視為 0）+ default rendering 3（六 preset 渲染 + 順序 DEVICE_PROFILE_IDS + aria-label default）+ custom devices + per-cell 6（caller-supplied list + 每 cell screenshotUrl beat grid + loading 混合 state + grid-wide loading → 6 shimmer + empty placeholder + alt 到 img）+ filtering 3（platforms=ios / forms=phone / 交集 0 → empty）+ selection 8（aria-selected / click / no handler no aria-selected / ArrowRight advance / ArrowDown 跳 row / Home+End / no handler no-op / unrelated key 不觸發）+ empty state 3（devices=[] placeholder + customisable emptyLabel + only-unknowns empty）+ header + layout 4（title+description 渲染 + 無 title 無 header + className merge + frameWidth+columns+gap style 套用）。**Zero regression** — `test/components/` 全套 852 顆中 850 顆綠，剩 2 顆是 V6 #3 row 已記錄的 bootstrap-page master flake (Step 1 form rotates / Step 1 form surfaces server error)，本 row 增量 +54 顆全綠（660 → 852，包含 V7/V8 sibling 測試檔也已存在）。**Scope 自律** — 只新增 2 檔（`components/omnisight/device-grid.tsx` 下純單元測試。**Schema 5 顆 frozen dataclass** — `MobileDeviceTarget`(6 欄: device_id + platform(ios|android) + udid_or_serial + label + screen_width + screen_height) / `MobileBuildErrorSummary`(4 欄: media_type + source_kind + captured_at) / `MobileAgentVisualContextPayload`(15 欄: session_id + turn_id + built_at + device_matrix + images + missing_devices + device_results + text_prompt + device_status_summary + error_summary_markdown + auto_fix_hint + has_blocking_errors + active_error_count + was_skipped + skip_reason + warnings) / `MobileAgentVisualContextBuilder`；全 frozen + `to_dict()` JSON-safe（payload 含 base64 images 因為訊息本身就是要送 pixels；event envelope 不含 base64 防 SSE frame 爆量）+ `MOBILE_AGENT_VISUAL_CONTEXT_SCHEMA_VERSION="1.0.0"` semver bump gate。**事件 namespace 4 顆** — `mobile_sandbox.agent_visual_context.{building,built,failed,skipped}`；與 V6 #1 `mobile_sandbox.<state>` (single-segment after `mobile_sandbox.`) + V2 #6 `ui_sandbox.agent_visual_context.*` 完全 disjoint，contract test 強制鎖（`set.isdisjoint`）。**5 個 pure helper** — `encode_screenshot_to_image(target, result, max_bytes)` 把 V6 #2 `ScreenshotResult.png_bytes` base64 編碼，只接受 `status=passed`（mock/fail/skip 統一拋 `MobileAgentVisualContextError` 由 builder 收 → missing_devices）+ result.width/height 為 0 時 fallback 到 `parse_png_dimensions(png_bytes)` IHDR sniff + 超過 per-device cap 拋 + 未 attach_bytes 拋；`apply_image_byte_budget(images, max_total_bytes)` greedy 在 cap 下塞最多、永遠保留首張（text-only 比一張 + 警告差）+ matrix-order 維持 + drops 一律掛 `image_dropped_budget:<device>:<bytes>` warning；`render_device_status_summary(targets, results_by_id)` 渲染 `### Device capture status` markdown 區（per-device 一行 status + dimension + size + detail）；`render_visual_context_text(...)` 用 `str.format` 命名 placeholder 渲染 8 段 + `{image_count}/{image_plural}` 智慧單複數；`build_text/image_content_block` + `build_content_blocks(payload)` + `build_human_message(payload)` 產 Anthropic 文檔 base64-source shape (`{"type":"image","source":{"type":"base64","media_type":"image/png","data":"<b64>"}}`)，HumanMessage lazy-import LangChain 不污染模組依賴。**Builder 公開 API** — `build(session_id, output_dir, turn_id=None, devices=None, failure_mode=None, attach_bytes=True, include_errors=True)` 主入口（output_dir 強制 absolute、session_id 非空、devices 非空、failure_mode∈{collect,abort}）；`build_skipped(session_id, skip_reason, ...)` text-only payload；`build_message(...)` 同 `build` 但返 `(payload, HumanMessage)` 一併；4 個 counter accessor (`build_count/skipped_count/failed_count/last_payload`)；`snapshot()` JSON-safe operator dashboard（**不 inline base64** 防 SSE 流量）。**dependency injection 4 個** — `capture_fn=mobile_screenshot.capture` (default)、`error_source=None` (caller 接 `MobileSandboxInstance.snapshot()` → `MobileBuildErrorSummary` 或回 None)、`request_factory=_default_request_factory` (caller 可 override 例如改 output_path naming / 改 timeout 注入)、`event_cb=None`；4 個全 type-checked。**`_default_request_factory(session_id, target, output_path, attach_bytes)`** 平台 dispatch — iOS → `ScreenshotRequest(platform="ios", ios_udid=target.udid_or_serial or "booted")`、Android → `ScreenshotRequest(platform="android", android_serial=target.udid_or_serial)`，`attach_bytes=True` 預設讓 encoder 直接讀 bytes 不用再開檔。**Per-device crash isolation** — capture_fn raise / 回非 ScreenshotResult → 自動 fold 為 synthetic `ScreenshotStatus.fail` result + 警告 `capture_crashed:<device>:<exc>`，剩下 device 繼續跑（agent ReAct loop 不會因單一 emulator 死掉就拿不到任何視覺）；request_factory raise / 回非 ScreenshotRequest 同樣處理。**Failure mode 兩態** — `collect`(default) 全程不 raise，per-device fail 走 missing_devices + status detail；`abort` 任何 device fail (包括 mock/skip) → `MobileAgentVisualContextError` raise 給 CI 用。**Status routing** — V6 #2 `ScreenshotStatus` 4 態到 multimodal 的 routing：`pass` → image_block 進 payload；`mock`(工具鏈缺) / `fail`(rc!=0/timeout/IO) / `skip`(caller 主動跳過) 一律 → `missing_devices` + `device_status_summary` markdown 解釋為什麼，agent 讀到「pixel-8: mock — adb not on PATH」就知道工具鏈問題不是 code 問題。**Error source contract** — `error_source(session_id) -> MobileBuildErrorSummary | None`；caller 通常 wire 成 `lambda sid: build_summary_from(manager.get(sid))`；返 None → 渲染 "No build errors reported."；返非 `MobileBuildErrorSummary` → 警告 `error_source_bad_type:<type>`；raise → 警告 `error_source_failed:<exc>`；無論哪一種 build 都繼續，agent 永遠拿到 well-formed payload。**Default device matrix** — `DEFAULT_DEVICE_TARGETS = (iphone-15(ios, "booted", 1179×2556), pixel-8(android, "", 1080×2400))`；deliberately 2 顆而非 6 顆，因為 (a) 多 device parallelism 本是 V6 #4 device-grid 的職責不是 multimodal context、(b) Opus 4.7 multimodal token cost 對 6 張 1.5MB PNG 痛、(c) `device_id` 鏡射 V6 #3 `DEVICE_PROFILE_IDS` 讓前端 device-frame 不用翻譯就能 key。**安全/注入防護** — device_id 正則白名單 `[A-Za-z0-9_.\-]{1,64}`、platform 限 `{ios, android}` 強制、output_dir absolute 強制、screen_width/height 非負強制、所有 entry 走 type-check (target/image/result 都 isinstance) + frozen dataclass `__post_init__`。**測試 206 顆分桶** — 模組 invariants 17（`__all__` 完整 + schema semver + media_type/source_kind/byte caps/failure_modes/default_failure_mode/template placeholders/event namespace disjoint from V6 #1+V2 #6/default_targets/error hierarchy）+ MobileDeviceTarget 9（happy ios/android + platform 大小寫 + label fallback + frozen + 11 reject + to_dict）+ MobileBuildErrorSummary 5（default + frozen + to_dict + 5 reject）+ MobileAgentVisualContextImage 5（happy + frozen + 13 reject + to_dict + content_block shape）+ encode_screenshot_to_image 11（happy + dims trust result first + IHDR fallback + 4 status reject + missing bytes + oversized + zero-dim no-sniff + non-target + non-result + non-positive max）+ apply_image_byte_budget 7（empty + under cap + drop until + always keep first + reject 0 cap + reject non-image + matrix order）+ render_device_status_summary 5（empty + pass metrics + no result + fail detail + deterministic）+ render_visual_context_text 7（all sections + empty fallback + deterministic + reject empty template + custom template + plural singular + plural multi）+ content block builders 5（text happy + 3 reject + image shape + reject non-image）+ Payload 13（happy + frozen + 12 reject + non-target + non-image + non-result + skipped no images + skipped requires reason + to_dict + content_blocks text-first + image order + skipped state）+ Builder construction 9（default capture wired + 3 callable rejects + 5 kwarg rejects + non-target default + accessors + counters）+ Builder.build happy 12（2 device + paths carry session+device+turn + ios udid routed + android serial routed + auto turn_id + emit building→built + envelope no base64 + counters/last_payload + custom devices + 8 input rejects + non-target devices）+ Builder.build failure 6（collect fail → missing + collect mock → missing + all fail → 0 image + capture crash → synthetic fail + abort raises + abort no-raise on all-pass）+ byte budget 2（max total drops + per-device cap drops）+ error source 6（no source placeholder + summary renders + None clean + raise warning + bad type warning + include_errors=false bypass）+ build_skipped 4（happy + reject empty reason + reject bad sid + reject empty devices）+ build_message 3（happy + reject non-payload + content_blocks reject non-payload）+ snapshot 3（no payload + with payload no base64 + error_source_wired flag）+ event safety 1（callback raise no-kill）+ thread safety 1（8 thread parallel build）+ custom request factory 3（custom factory used + bad-return → crash warning + capture returning non-result → crash warning）+ end-to-end golden 1（capture+error_source 全 wire + multimodal message ready + JSON-safe）+ sibling alignment 3（mobile_sandbox/mobile_screenshot importable + schema versions independent + default targets match V6 #3 ids）。**Zero regression** — `test_mobile_sandbox` + `test_mobile_screenshot` + `test_ui_agent_visual_context`（V2 #6 父模式）+ `test_mobile_simulator` + `test_mobile_component_registry` + `test_mobile_toolchain` + `test_figma_to_mobile` + `test_ui_sandbox` + `test_vision_to_mobile` + `test_ui_responsive_viewport` + `test_ui_preview_error_bridge` 共 1777 顆 sibling test 全綠 2.22s。**LangChain firewall** — 0 新依賴（stdlib only: base64/dataclasses/logging/os/re/threading/time/typing）；HumanMessage lazy import 不污染主模組。**Scope 自律** — 只新增 2 檔（`backend/mobile_agent_visual_context.py` + `backend/tests/test_mobile_agent_visual_context.py`）；零改動 V6 #1 `backend/mobile_sandbox.py` / V6 #2 `backend/mobile_screenshot.py` / V6 #3 `components/omnisight/device-frame.tsx` / V6 #4 - [x] Build error → agent auto-fix：Xcode / Gradle build error 攔截 → 注入 agent → 修 → 重 build → 重截圖 *(done: V6 #6 / issue #322 / TODO row 2684 — `backend/mobile_build_error_autofix.py` (~1100 行) + `backend/tests/test_mobile_build_error_autofix.py` 132 顆契約測試全綠 0.36s + 1677 顆 sibling tests (`test_mobile_sandbox` + `test_mobile_screenshot` + `test_mobile_agent_visual_context` + `test_mobile_simulator` + `test_mobile_component_registry` + `test_mobile_toolchain` + `test_figma_to_mobile` + `test_ui_sandbox` + `test_vision_to_mobile` + `test_ui_agent_visual_context`) 零回歸 2.03s。**核心契約 — V6 #1 + V6 #5 orchestrator** 把「build → 攔 BuildError → 注入 agent → patch → 重 build → 重 screenshot」整條 ReAct loop 收攏成一個 `MobileAutoFixLoop.run(session_id, config, output_dir)` 入口，回 deterministic `MobileAutoFixOutcome` 紀錄每次 attempt；對齊 V2 #8 `test_v2_sandbox_autofix_integration.py` 的 fix-loop 模式但 swap V2 hot-reload 為 mobile rebuild（Gradle/Xcode 沒 HMR 必須整輪重 build）。**Schema 4 顆 frozen dataclass + 3 顆 enum** — `MobileAutoFixRequest`(11 欄: session_id + attempt_index + workspace_path + platform + build_errors + error_summary + visual_payload + sandbox_snapshot + previous_attempts + requested_at) / `MobileAutoFixResponse`(4 欄: action + summary + files_touched + raw_response) / `MobileAutoFixAttempt`(15 欄: attempt_index + started_at/finished_at + status + build_status/error_count/errors + install_status + screenshot_status/path + agent_action/summary/files_touched + visual_payload_built/image_count + detail + warnings) / `MobileAutoFixOutcome`(13 欄: session_id + platform + workspace_path + final_status + started_at/finished_at + attempts + initial/final_error_count + final_build/screenshot_status/path + detail + warnings)；`AutoFixStatus`(5 態 pending/succeeded/failed/exhausted/skipped) + `AutoFixAttemptStatus`(9 態 pending/build_passed/build_failed/agent_patched/agent_no_op/agent_give_up/agent_error/sandbox_error/skipped) + `AgentFixAction`(3 態 patched/no_op/give_up)；全 frozen + `to_dict()` JSON-safe + `MOBILE_BUILD_ERROR_AUTOFIX_SCHEMA_VERSION="1.0.0"` semver bump gate。**事件 namespace 10 顆** — `mobile_sandbox.autofix.{started, attempt_started, build_passed, build_failed, fix_applied, attempt_finished, succeeded, failed, exhausted, skipped}`；contract test 強制鎖 `set.isdisjoint(V6_1_topics)` + `set.isdisjoint(V6_5_topics)`，SSE bus 可走 prefix subscribe 不互撞。**3 個 pure helper** — `summarise_build_errors(errors, platform)` 把 `tuple[BuildError]` → `MobileBuildErrorSummary`（含 `### Build errors (Android|iOS)` markdown + `**error/warning** [tool] file:line:col — message` 逐行 + 自動 auto_fix_hint 智慧複數 "Patch the N blocking build error(s)…"）；`render_autofix_outcome_markdown(outcome)` operator-readable summary（status+platform+attempts+errors+duration+per-attempt detail）；`format_autofix_attempt_id(session_id, idx)` deterministic id（`autofix-<safe-sid>-<idx:03d>`，session_id 走字符白名單轉 `-`、attempt 走 zero-padded）三件純函式。**Loop public API** — `run(*, session_id, config, output_dir, max_attempts=None, failure_mode=None, attempt_devices=None) -> MobileAutoFixOutcome` + 7 個 counter accessor (`run_count/success_count/failure_count/exhausted_count/skipped_count/agent_invocations/last_outcome`) + `current_error_summary(session_id) -> MobileBuildErrorSummary | None` 給 visual builder error_source wire-up + `snapshot()` JSON-safe operator dashboard。**Composition 注入點 4 個** — `sandbox_manager` (V6 #1 `MobileSandboxManager`，必填) + `agent_fix_fn` (callable，必填) + `visual_context_builder` (V6 #5 `MobileAgentVisualContextBuilder`，可選 — 不給則 agent 拿 text-only request、跳過 base64 encode 成本) + `event_cb` (可選 SSE bus emit)；4 個全 type-checked、ctor 全 reject bad input。**8 步 attempt loop** — (1) `_reset_for_rebuild` (manager.get → if not terminal manager.stop → manager.remove → manager.create) 用 public API 把 sandbox 拉回 `pending` ；(2) `manager.build()` ；(3) `mock` status → AttemptStatus.skipped + 整 loop skipped (跳 agent)；(4) `pass` → 可選 install + screenshot + AttemptStatus.build_passed + loop.succeeded；(5) `fail` → 解 build_report.errors → `summarise_build_errors` → 走 visual builder 拿 multimodal payload (with cache transient publish for builder.error_source 取用 + 用完清空 thread-safe) → 組 `MobileAutoFixRequest` 餵 agent ；(6) agent raise → AttemptStatus.agent_error + loop.failed (continue mode) 或 propagate (abort mode)；(7) agent 回 patched → AttemptStatus.agent_patched + 進下一輪；(8) agent 回 no_op/give_up → AttemptStatus.agent_no_op/agent_give_up + loop.failed；max_attempts 到頂仍 fail → loop.exhausted。**Failure mode 兩態** — `continue` (default) 永不 raise，所有狀況 fold 進 `MobileAutoFixOutcome`；`abort` agent callback 例外 + `MobileAutoFixSandboxError` 直接 propagate、適合 CI hard-fail。**Per-attempt sandbox 隔離** — 每 attempt 重新 create sandbox 確保 build 從 fresh state 跑、不被前 attempt 的 build cache 影響；用 public API 不動 `MobileSandboxManager` 內部狀態。**Agent visual context wire-up 文檔化模式** — caller 用 `MobileAgentVisualContextBuilder(error_source=lambda sid: loop.current_error_summary(sid))` 把 builder 的 error_source closure 連回 loop 的 in-flight error cache，讓 multimodal text 區塊跟 `request.error_summary` 一致；不耦合不 mutate builder 私屬 `_error_source` (前一版設計過耦合，rejected for cleaner public-API contract)。**錯誤階層** — `MobileAutoFixError`(RuntimeError) + `MobileAutoFixConfigError` (ctor / run input 驗證) + `MobileAutoFixSandboxError` (manager 拒絕 op 不可恢復) 三顆；router 可一捕 base。**安全/注入防護** — session_id non-empty 強制、config.session_id == session_id 強制、output_dir non-empty 強制、max_attempts ≥ 1 強制、failure_mode enum 強制、attempt_devices type-checked、agent_action enum 強制、attempt timestamps monotonic 強制、所有 dataclass `__post_init__` 全量驗證。**測試 132 顆分桶** — 模組 invariants 11（`__all__` 30 支完整 + schema semver + max_attempts 預設 + failure_modes stable + event_types 10 個完整且唯一 + namespace disjoint from V6 #1 + V6 #5 + agent_fix_actions stable + AutoFixStatus 5 態完整 + AutoFixAttemptStatus 9 態完整 + 錯誤階層）+ summarise_build_errors 11（empty Android/ios + 含 errors blocking + warnings only + no location + custom hint + reject non-BuildError + reject unknown platform + reject empty platform + reject non-string hint + 智慧複數）+ format_attempt_id 6（happy + padding + sanitises + reject empty session + reject zero/負 attempt）+ Request 13（happy + frozen + to_dict round-trip + 11 reject empty session/zero attempt/unknown platform/non-tuple errors/non-BuildError/bad summary/bad payload/bad snapshot/non-tuple previous/negative requested_at）+ Response 13（3 happy action + file_count + frozen + to_dict round-trip + 5 reject unknown action/non-string summary/non-tuple files/empty file/non-string raw）+ Attempt 13（happy + did_call_agent + 9 terminal states + frozen + to_dict round-trip + 7 reject zero attempt/negative started/finished<started/bad status/unknown agent_action/empty agent_action accept/negative error_count/empty warning/non-tuple files）+ Outcome 7（happy + frozen + to_dict round-trip + 4 reject finished<started/unknown platform/bad status/bad attempt + total_files_touched 聚合）+ render markdown 4（smoke + attempts + reject non-outcome + warnings）+ ctor 12（10 reject + accessors initial state + visual builder None default）+ run happy paths 7（first build pass + capture_after_success=False + fail→patch→pass + agent no_op→failed + agent give_up→failed + exhausted after max + mock skipped）+ run input validation 8（empty session + bad config + session config mismatch + empty output_dir + zero max + unknown failure_mode + bad attempt_device + empty attempt_devices）+ run agent error 4（continue mode + abort mode propagates + non-response continue + non-response abort）+ run sandbox state 2（resets between failed + recovers pre-existing sandbox）+ run sandbox raise 4（create raise continue + create raise abort + build raise continue + install fail recorded as warning）+ events 5（succeeded path + patch then pass + skipped + exhausted + callback raise no-kill）+ visual context 6（wires payload + error_source wire-up + cache clears after attempt + unknown session None + builder failure no-kill + attempt_devices override）+ snapshot 3（initial + after run + visual_builder_wired flag）+ E2E 2（multi-attempt full trace 2→1→0 errors + render markdown after run）+ thread safety 1（4 thread distinct sessions）+ sibling alignment 2（schema versions independent + default devices align V6 #5）。**Zero regression** — `test_mobile_sandbox` + `test_mobile_screenshot` + `test_mobile_agent_visual_context`（V6 #5 父模式）+ `test_mobile_simulator` + `test_mobile_component_registry` + `test_mobile_toolchain` + `test_figma_to_mobile` + `test_ui_sandbox` + `test_vision_to_mobile` + `test_ui_agent_visual_context`（V2 #6 父模式）共 1677 顆 sibling test 全綠 2.03s。**LangChain firewall** — 0 新依賴（stdlib only: dataclasses/enum/logging/threading/time/typing），HumanMessage 走 V6 #5 lazy import 不污染本模組。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` 0 命中 — FINGERPRINT-CLEAN。**Module-global state 稽核（SOP Step 1）**：本模組 0 個 module-level mutable global；所有狀態（counters、last_outcome、error_summary_cache）皆 per-instance 的 `MobileAutoFixLoop._lock` (RLock) 保護；多 worker 進程下 per-process 各自一份 loop 的設計屬「故意每 worker 獨立」(SOP 合格答案 #3)；對 sandbox manager 跨 attempt 的狀態管理走 public API (stop/remove/create) 確保 manager 自己的 lock 同步。**Read-after-write 稽核**：本模組無 SQL / 無 cross-process state；attempt 內 build → agent fix → rebuild 序列嚴格序列化 (loop 內單線程跑)、不會有 concurrent A write/B read race。**Production status:** dev-only。**Next gate:** deployed-active —— 本模組單純是 orchestrator、無 image rebuild、無 env knob、無 feature flag；要 deployed-active 需要 (a) `backend/agents/mobile_dev_loop.py` (或對應 agent role 的 ReAct loop) 把 `MobileAutoFixLoop` wire 進 LangChain agent invoker、(b) HTTP endpoint 暴露 `POST /api/v1/mobile/sandbox/{session_id}/autofix` 觸發 + `GET /api/v1/mobile/sandbox/{session_id}/autofix/snapshot` 觀察、(c) SSE bus 加 `mobile_sandbox.autofix.*` prefix subscribe，三件留給後續 row。**Scope 自律** — 只新增 2 檔（`backend/mobile_build_error_autofix.py` + `backend/tests/test_mobile_build_error_autofix.py`）；零改動 V6 #1 `backend/mobile_sandbox.py` / V6 #2 `backend/mobile_screenshot.py` / V6 #3 `components/omnisight/device-frame.tsx` / V6 #4 `components/omnisight/device-grid.tsx` / V6 #5 `backend/mobile_agent_visual_context.py` / V5 sibling 任一檔 / `backend/mobile_simulator.py` / `backend/mobile_toolchain.py` / `backend/mobile_component_registry.py` / `backend/figma_to_mobile.py` / `backend/vision_to_mobile.py` / V2 `backend/ui_agent_visual_context.py` / `backend/ui_sandbox.py` / `requirements.txt` / `package.json` / CLAUDE.md / SOP / docs / 任一既存 `.tsx`；V6 epic 至此 6 row 全 `[x]` — 整個「Mobile — Device Preview + Sandbox 渲染」epic 收尾)
- 預估：**6 day**

### V7. Mobile — 視覺迭代 + Workspace UI + 輸出 (#323)

`backend/tests/test_mobile_iteration_timeline.py` 173 顆契約測試全綠 0.33s + 1347 顆 sibling mobile tests 零回歸 1.60s + 713 顆 V2/V5/V7 sibling tests 零回歸 1.10s。**核心契約 — 每次 agent / operator 修改存成一個 IterationEntry** 把 V6 #1 `mobile_sandbox` + V6 #2 `mobile_screenshot` + V6 #3 `device-frame` 連到 V7 Mobile Workspace 的版本歷史邊 bar——每條 record 帶「unified code diff + 多機型 emulator/simulator 截圖 + 監督元資料」三件，單一 `MobileIterationTimelineBuilder` 以 session 分桶。**Schema 4 顆 frozen dataclass 全 to_dict JSON-safe + 1.0.0 semver**：`IterationDiffStats`(3 欄 + 2 derived properties net_change/total_lines_touched) / `IterationScreenshot`(12 欄 device_id + platform + label + status + path + format + width/height/byte_len + captured_at + detail + image_base64 全 frozen) / `IterationEntry`(13 欄 session_id + version + entry_id + created_at + code_diff + diff_stats + screenshots + summary + author + parent_version + tags + warnings + metadata) / `IterationTimeline`(6 欄 session_id + created_at/updated_at + entries + dropped_count + next_version + 4 derived properties)。**事件 namespace 4 顆**：`mobile_workspace.iteration_timeline.{recording, recorded, reset, record_failed}`；contract test 強制 `set.isdisjoint` against V6 #1 `mobile_sandbox.<state>` + V6 #5 `mobile_sandbox.agent_visual_context.*` + V6 #6 `mobile_sandbox.autofix.*` + V7 #1 `ui_sandbox.mobile_annotation_context.*` 四組 topic。**5 個 pure helper**：`parse_diff_stats(text)` 容忍 empty / non-diff / CRLF / binary-diff markers / 非 hunk 區域 +/- 字元、嚴格識別 `diff --git` + `+++ b/<path>` + `@@ hunk` 邊界；`format_iteration_entry_id(session_id, version)` deterministic id (`iter-<safe-sid>-<version:04d>` 對齊 V6 #6 CSS column)；`screenshot_from_result(target, result)` V6 #2 鴨子型別 adapter 免 top-level import；`render_iteration_entry_markdown` + `render_timeline_markdown` byte-stable。**Builder public API 9 支**：`record` 主入口（trim oversize diff/screenshots/summary 走 warnings 不 raise、version 從 1 monotonic + parent_version 指向前一個）、`record_from_screenshot_results(targets, results)` 1:1 convenience wrapper、`timeline(sid)` 未知 session 回空 timeline 不 raise（workspace UI 可直接 bind）、`list_entries` / `get_entry` / `latest_entry` / `reset` / `sessions` / `snapshot`（snapshot 永不 inline image_base64 + code_diff 防 SSE 爆量）。**Ring-buffer 4 個 cap**：`DEFAULT_MAX_ENTRIES_PER_SESSION=100` / `DEFAULT_MAX_DIFF_CHARS=200_000` / `DEFAULT_MAX_SCREENSHOTS_PER_ENTRY=12` / `DEFAULT_MAX_SUMMARY_CHARS=2_000`；version counter 持續遞增 across drops——operator 引用 "iteration #37" 的 semantic 永遠不會被重指。**Version monotonicity 契約**：parent_version < version 強制、version < 1 reject、entry.session_id != timeline.session_id reject。**Thread safety**：單一 `threading.RLock`；測試驗 4 thread × 25 record 同 session → versions unique + monotonic。**錯誤階層 3 顆**：`MobileIterationTimelineError` + `MobileIterationTimelineConfigError` (FastAPI 422) + `MobileIterationTimelineNotFoundError`。**安全/注入防護**：session_id + device_id `[A-Za-z0-9_.\-]{1,64}` fullmatch、platform 限 `{android, ios}`、status 限 `{pass, fail, skip, mock}` 鏡射 V6 #2 enum。**image_base64 opt-in 3 層**：`IterationScreenshot.to_dict()` 預設 drop、`IterationEntry.to_dict(include_image_base64=True)` 才帶、`snapshot()` 永不 inline。**測試 173 顆分桶**：模組 invariants 9 + parse_diff_stats 9 + format_iteration_entry_id 7 + IterationDiffStats 6 + IterationScreenshot 16 + screenshot_from_result 7 + IterationEntry 16 + IterationTimeline 8 + render_entry 8 + render_timeline 3 + Builder construction 8 + Builder.record happy 11 + Builder.record validation 15 + Builder trimming 4 + Ring buffer 2 + record_from_screenshot_results 6 + Builder queries 9 + Builder reset 4 + Builder snapshot 4 + Builder events 4 + Thread safety 2 + E2E golden 4。**Zero regression**：1347 mobile sibling (V6 #1-#6 + V7 #1) 全綠 1.60s + 713 V2/V5/V7 sibling 全綠 1.10s (含自家 173)。**LangChain firewall**：0 新依賴 stdlib only。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep**：0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN。**Module-global state 稽核（SOP Step 1）**：0 個 module-level mutable global；per-instance `RLock` 保護；per-worker 各自一份 builder、屬「故意每 worker 獨立」(SOP 合格答案 #3) ——iteration timeline 是 operator-observable view 不是 source of truth（真正 SoT 是 sandbox / git / filesystem）；意圖寫進 class docstring。**Read-after-write 稽核**：無 SQL / cross-process state；單 builder 內 record/reset/get 全 RLock / `buildStatusColorVar`（傳統 emerald/amber/red/blue CSS var）/ `isTerminalBuildStatus`（succeeded+failed+cancelled）/ `formatBuildDuration`(h m s／負數+NaN 降級 "—") / `formatBuildByteSize`(B/KB/MB/GB 一位小數) / `shortenBuildPath`(尾部保留 + 前綴 …) / `clampBuildProgress`([0,100] + null for NaN) / `classifyBuildPhase`(Xcode `CreateBuildDirectory`+`CompileSwift`+`Ld`+`CodeSign`+`Export` + Gradle `configure`+`compileKotlin`+`assembleRelease`+`signingConfig` 全部歸入 queued/configuring/compiling/linking/packaging/signing/exporting/other 七桶 + 大小寫容忍 substring match) / `pushRingBuffer`(dedupe by id + cap at N + existing-first preserving) / `elapsedBuildMs`(finishedAt for terminal / now for in-flight / null without startedAt) / `emptyBuildRun` / `matchBuildEvent`(session_id 或 sessionId 匹配 + build_id 過濾 queued-allowed-without-prior-buildId)。**Reducer `applyBuildEvent` 9 case + unknown no-op**：queued 重置 buffers + 帶 tool/variant override、started flip 到 running + classify phase + startedAt、progress auto-promote queued→running + clamp + phase/detail 更新、log 走 ring buffer coerce（id/ts/text/level）、error 走 severity="warning" 分流進 warnings 桶、artifact 走 filename 推 kind（ipa/apk/aab/dsym/mapping/other）+ 明示 kind 覆蓋、completed flip succeeded + exit 0 + progress 100 + finishedAt、failed 帶 exit_code + reason、cancelled 帶 default "Cancelled by operator"。**Ring-buffer 3 個 cap**：`DEFAULT_MAX_LOG_LINES=200` / `DEFAULT_MAX_ERRORS=50` / `DEFAULT_MAX_WARNINGS=50` + artifacts cap 32。**Test seam 完整**：`initialRun` seed / 完全 `run` controlled（bypass 內部 reducer）/ `eventTransport` 注入（測試不打到 `subscribeEvents`）/ `onStart`/`onCancel`/`onRetry`/`onDownloadArtifact` callback 全部可選 / `maxLogLines`/`maxErrors`/`maxWarnings` 可覆蓋 / `nowImpl` 給 elapsed 測試 / `testId` prefix 可改。**ref-based buildId 過濾**：`buildIdRef` 保留最新 build id、effect 只 depend on `sessionId` + `controlledRun` + `eventTransport` + caps——避免每次 progress tick 觸發 effect 撤銷重建 orphan 正在路上的 SSE listener（React 19 strict-mode double-render 抓到）。**SSE 鎖定於 session**：`matchBuildEvent` 拒絕跨 session event、空 buildId 時只過濾 session（queued event 可以建立 buildId 不先有）；V0 #6 workspace-scoped SSE routing 契約完整繼承。**Safe close**：`h?.close?.()` 防 mock 沒回 handle 炸（vitest `vi.fn()` 預設 return undefined）；測試 transport 對 onDownloadArtifact callback vs `<a download href>` 兩模式皆驗證。**測試 53 顆分桶**：defaultToolForPlatform 1 + expectedArtifactKinds 3 + buildStatusLabel 1 + buildStatusColorVar 1 + isTerminalBuildStatus 1 + formatBuildDuration 2 + formatBuildByteSize 2 + shortenBuildPath 3 + clampBuildProgress 2 + classifyBuildPhase 2 + pushRingBuffer 2 + elapsedBuildMs 2 + emptyBuildRun 1 + matchBuildEvent 4 + applyBuildEvent 12 + MOBILE_BUILD_EVENT_NAMES 2 + rendering contracts 7 + ARTIFACT_KIND_LABELS 1。**Zero regression**：TypeScript 檢查 0 新 error (既有 integration-settings.tsx 的 3 顆 preexisting 無關); 146 sibling mobile tests 全綠 1.49s。**LangChain firewall**：0 新依賴，只用 lucide-react + 既有 @/components/ui 元件（Badge / Button / Progress / Separator）。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep**：0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN（frontend `.tsx` 不適用 SQLite/asyncpg fingerprint、但仍跑過 sanity check）。**Module-global state 稽核（SOP Step 1）**：N/A —— 純 React client component、per-instance useState / useRef / useEffect、SSE 透過 lib/api `subscribeEvents` 的 shared EventSource（已在 48A-Fix P0 做過 single-origin fan-out 稽核）；本檔 0 個 module-level mutable global。**Read-after-write 稽核**：無 SQL / cross-process state；reducer 純函式 + setState 串接。**Scope 自律**：只新增 2 檔（`components/omnisight/mobile-build-status-panel.tsx` + `test/components/mobile-build-status-panel.test.tsx`）；零改動 V7 #1/#2/#3 的 `mobile-visual-annotator.tsx` + `backend/mobile_iteration_timeline.py` + `app/workspace/mobile/page.tsx` 任一檔 / mobile workspace sidebar 或 workspace-shell extra pane 不必 reshape 現有 composition)

`components/omnisight/store-submission-dashboard.tsx` (~1130 行) + `test/components/store-submission-dashboard.test.tsx` 74 顆契約測試全綠 1.12s + 205 顆 sibling mobile/H3 tests (V6 #3/#4 + V7 #1/#4 + H3) 零回歸 1.62s。**三塊 operator-visible 表面**：(1) header strip (target badge + review status badge idle/draft/submitted/in_review/pending_release/approved/rejected/released/removed 九態 + version/build + bundle id + Submit/Re-submit/Withdraw action buttons + 提交/審核 relative-time + reviewer notes inline when rejected)；(2) screenshot manager (required device classes per target surface as slots，每 slot 顯示 expected dimensions + locale count + missing/invalid/ok badge + 一鍵 Upload/Remove callback，狀態 missing→dashed border，invalid→amber，valid→emerald)；(3) dispatch panel (TestFlight / Firebase channel + audience text input + one-click Dispatch button + 失敗時 error inline + 最近 dispatch history collapsible details)。**SSE namespace 9 顆**：`mobile_workspace.store_submission.{queued, submitted, review_updated, screenshot_uploaded, screenshot_removed, withdrawn, dispatch_started, dispatch_completed, dispatch_failed}`；`STORE_SUBMISSION_EVENT_NAMES` frozen 常數、contract test 強制 `set.isdisjoint` against V6/V7 sibling 14 組 topic (iteration_timeline 4 + build 8 + mobile_sandbox 2 + ui_sandbox 1)。**17 個 pure helper exportable for tests**：`storeTargetToChannel`(app-store→testflight / play-console→firebase-app-distribution) / `storeTargetToPlatform`(ios|android) / `requiredScreenshotDeviceClasses`(app-store 3 類：iphone-6.7/iphone-5.5/ipad-13 / play-console 3 類：android-phone/android-tablet-7/android-tablet-10) / `reviewStatusLabel` + `reviewStatusColorVar`(emerald/red/amber/muted/blue 5 色) / `isTerminalReviewStatus`(released+removed+rejected) / `dispatchStatusLabel` + `dispatchStatusColorVar` / `formatStoreByteSize`(B/KB/MB/GB 一位小數) / `formatStoreRelativeTime`(just now / Nm ago / Nh ago / Nd ago / Nw ago) / `shortenStoreId`(bundle id 尾部保留 + 前綴 …) / `pushRingBuffer`(dedup by id + cap) / `validateScreenshotDimensions`(與 7 類 `SCREENSHOT_EXPECTED_DIMENSIONS` 對齊、orientation-agnostic 自動 swap w/h、3% ratio 容錯) / `groupScreenshotsByDeviceClass` / `screenshotCoverage`(required/provided/missing/invalid 四桶) / `canSubmitSubmission`(bundle+version+build+screenshot 全綠 + status 非 in-review) / `canDispatchSubmission`(buildNumber + status 非 idle + dispatch 非 in_progress) / `matchStoreSubmissionEvent`(session+target 雙軌過濾) / `emptyStoreSubmission`。**Reducer `applyStoreSubmissionEvent` 9 case + unknown no-op**：queued 重置 screenshots + bundle/version/build/buildId 可 override (history 保留 — 跨 submission 仍可追 TF/Firebase 過往)；submitted 帶 submittedAt；review_updated 驗證 status 是否合法 `REVIEW_STATUS_LABELS` key (未知 status 忽略不污染) + 自動 stamp reviewedAt/releasedAt；screenshot_uploaded 走 `coerceScreenshot` (dedup by id → replace-by-id + auto-validate dimensions + device class whitelist 防 galaxy-fold-42 此類新 class 亂入)；screenshot_removed 走 filter; withdrawn flip 回 draft + 清 submittedAt + 帶 reason 進 reviewerNotes；dispatch_started/completed/failed 走 `coerceDispatchChannel` (backend override or target fallback) + history 自動 push ring-buffered `DEFAULT_MAX_DISPATCH_HISTORY=10`。**Ring-buffer 2 cap**：`DEFAULT_MAX_DISPATCH_HISTORY=10` + `DEFAULT_MAX_SCREENSHOTS=80`。**Test seam 完整**：`initialSubmission` seed / 完全 `submission` controlled (bypass 內部 reducer) / `eventTransport` 注入 (測試不打 `subscribeEvents`) / `onSubmit/onResubmit/onWithdraw/onDispatch/onUploadScreenshot/onRemoveScreenshot/onChangeAudience` 七 callback 全可選 / `maxHistory/maxScreenshots` 可覆蓋 / `nowImpl` 給 relative-time 測試 deterministic / `testId` prefix 可改 (同頁面多 dashboard 不衝突，app-store / play-console 並列可行)。**Target re-bind safety**：effect deps 含 sessionId+target、`lastBindRef` 變動時 re-seed 成 empty submission，防 iOS→Android 切換留 stale rejected notes。**SSE 鎖定於 (session, target)**：`matchStoreSubmissionEvent` 雙軌過濾，`target` 在每 event `data` 必填 — backend 必須 key 到具體 store；cross-target event 一律 drop (test 有驗：app-store dashboard 收到 play-console event → data-status 仍 idle)。**Safe close**：`h?.close?.()` 防 mock 沒回 handle 炸 (繼承 V7 #4 修正經驗)。**測試 74 顆分桶**：storeTargetToChannel 1 + storeTargetToPlatform 1 + requiredScreenshotDeviceClasses 2 + reviewStatusLabel/ColorVar 2 + isTerminalReviewStatus 1 + dispatchStatusLabel/ColorVar 2 + formatStoreByteSize 2 + formatStoreRelativeTime 2 + shortenStoreId 3 + pushRingBuffer 2 + validateScreenshotDimensions 5 + groupScreenshotsByDeviceClass 1 + screenshotCoverage 3 + canSubmitSubmission 4 + canDispatchSubmission 3 + emptyStoreSubmission 1 + matchStoreSubmissionEvent 5 + applyStoreSubmissionEvent 17 (queued/submitted/review_updated×3/screenshot_uploaded×4/screenshot_removed/withdrawn/dispatch_started/dispatch_completed/dispatch_failed/history cap/unknown no-op) + STORE_SUBMISSION_EVENT_NAMES 2 (prefix + sibling disjointness) + rendering contracts 13 (idle empty / target-catalogue swap app-store↔play-console / reviewer-notes / submit-disabled-with-reason / Submit/Resubmit/Withdraw wiring / upload+remove wiring / dispatch wiring / dispatch-gate-reason / history / SSE live-wire / cross-target drop / unmount cleanup / in-progress badge / dispatch-error) + DEVICE_CLASS_LABELS+DISPATCH_CHANNEL_LABELS+STORE_TARGET_LABELS 2。**Zero regression**：TypeScript 檢查 0 新 error (既有 integration-settings.tsx 3 顆 preexisting 無關); 205 sibling tests 全綠 1.62s (V6 #3/#4 device-frame/device-grid + V7 #1 mobile-visual-annotator + V7 #4 mobile-build-status-panel + H3 host-pressure-threshold/host-device-panel)。**LangChain firewall**：0 新依賴，只用 lucide-react + 既有 @/components/ui 元件 (Badge / Button / Separator)。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep**：0 命中 FINGERPRINT-CLEAN。**Module-global state 稽核（SOP Step 1）**：N/A — 純 React client component、per-instance useState / useRef / useEffect、SSE 透過 lib/api `subscribeEvents` 的 shared EventSource (48A-Fix P0 single-origin fan-out 已稽核)；本檔 0 個 module-level mutable global；`STORE_SUBMISSION_EVENT_NAMES` / `STORE_TARGET_LABELS` / `REVIEW_STATUS_LABELS` / `DISPATCH_CHANNEL_LABELS` / `DEVICE_CLASS_LABELS` / `SCREENSHOT_EXPECTED_DIMENSIONS` / `REQUIRED_SCREENSHOTS_APP_STORE` / `REQUIRED_SCREENSHOTS_PLAY_STORE` 全是 `Object.freeze()` 常數、每 worker 從同一 source module import 推導同值 (SOP Step 1 合格答案 #1)。**Read-after-write 稽核**：無 SQL / cross-process state；reducer 純函式 + setState 串接。**Scope 自律**：只新增 2 檔 (`components/omnisight/store-submission-dashboard.tsx` + `test/components/store-submission-dashboard.test.tsx`)；零改動 V7 #1/#2/#3/#4 的 `mobile-visual-annotator.tsx` +   - [x] Web：NL「做一個 SaaS landing page」→ agent 自主寫完 → preview 渲染正確 → 標註「把 hero 背景改深藍」→ agent 修改 → 重渲染 → deploy → Lighthouse ≥ 80
  - [x] Mobile：NL「做一個 todo app」→ agent 寫 SwiftUI → emulator 截圖 → 標註「加個 dark mode toggle」→ agent 修改 → rebuild → 截圖正確

- 預估：**5 day**

**Priority V 總預估**：**48 day**（4 stage 切段交付：基建 6d → Web 23d → Mobile 15d → Software+CLI 9d）

**建議切段交付**：
1. **V0**（6d）— Workspace foundation：三個工作區 route 可訪問 + 共用 layout + chat + bridge card
2. **V1 + V2 + V3 + V4**（23d）— Web 完整體驗：AI 生成 → preview → 標註迭代 → 輸出。此時 Web 工作區達到 v0.dev parity
3. **V5 + V6 + V7**（15d）— Mobile 完整體驗：AI 生成 → device preview → 標註迭代。此時 Mobile 達 Codex parity
4. **V8 + V9**（9d）— Software 工作區 + CLI + image gen + E2E tests。此時三個 vertical 全面就位

---

## 🅡 Priority R — Enterprise Watchdog & Disaster Recovery（全維度守護 + 災難復原 + UI 強化）

> 背景：`docs/design/enterprise_watchdog_and_disaster_recovery_architecture.md`（2026-04-17 新增）提出五層防護：PEP Gateway（工具執行網關）、冪等性重試、語意監控、自動續寫、階梯式部署。審計結果顯示 ~55% 與既有模組重疊（sandboxed tools / L1-L4 notifications / M1 cgroups / worktree isolation / startup cleanup），但有 5 項真正新增能力填補 critical gap：PEP 攔截 middleware、ChatOps interactive approve/inject、semantic entropy 偵測、scratchpad 持久化 + 斷點續傳、Serverless PaaS adapter。
>
> **設計覆寫**：白皮書 §三.2 建議重試前 `git clean -fd` + `git checkout .`——**本路線拒絕此設計**，改用「discard worktree + create fresh worktree」維持既有 WorkspaceManager 的安全隔離（R8 詳述）。白皮書 §四 的 `<system_override>` 標籤——**不採用**，改走 agent state machine 的 `human_hint` slot，避免 prompt injection 權限溢出（R1 詳述）。
>
> **UI 策略**：既有 47 個 FUI 元件中，toast-center（approve/reject 按鈕）、decision-dashboard（審批佇列）、audit-panel（審計追蹤）、orchestration-panel（O9 觀測性）可直接延伸。新增 2 個全新元件（`pep-live-feed.tsx`、`chatops-mirror.tsx`）+ 擴充 3 個既有元件（agent-matrix-wall / run-history-panel / integration-settings 或 ops-summary-panel 加 deployment topology tab）。
>
> 相依（硬前置）：**O0-O3**（CATC + Worker pool + Redis + MQ）、**G2**（reverse proxy）、**G5**（K8s manifests）、**I10**（Redis HA）、**L**（Bootstrap wizard）。建議排在 O 之後。

### R0. PEP Gateway Middleware（工具執行網關）(#306)
- [x] `backend/pep_gateway.py`：PEP (Policy Enforcement Point) middleware，intercept 所有 tool_executor node 的 tool call
- [x] 毀滅性命令 pattern 表（`rm -rf /`、`chown`、`chmod 777`、`dd if=/dev/zero`、`mkfs`、`:(){:|:&};:`…）→ 自動 DENY + audit
- [x] 生產部署攔截：`deploy.sh prod`、`kubectl apply --context production`、`terraform apply` 等 prod-scope 命令 → 自動 HOLD，等人工 approve
- [x] T1/T2/T3 sandbox tier 整合：PEP 在 tool call 前查 sandbox tier policy，T1 只放行白名單工具，T3 允許 sudo 但仍攔截 prod-deploy
- [x] Circuit breaker：PEP down 時 fallback 到 sandbox-tier 本機 rule（degraded but alive）；恢復後自動切回
- [x] SSE event：`pep.decision`（action / agent / tool / command / decision: auto_allow | hold | deny）
- [x] Metrics：`pep_decisions_total{decision}` / `pep_hold_duration_seconds` / `pep_deny_total`
- [x] 整合測試：mock tool call → auto_allow、hold、deny 三條路徑 + PEP down fallback
- [x] **UI — PEP Live Feed 面板（新元件 `pep-live-feed.tsx`，獨立 panel 掛進 mobile-nav/page.tsx）**：
  - [x] 即時顯示所有 tool call decisions（SSE `pep.decision` 驅動）
  - [x] 每行：timestamp / agent name / tool name / command（truncated） / decision badge（✅ auto / 🟡 HELD / 🔴 DENY）
  - [x] HELD 的行展開後顯示完整 command + impact_scope + 「Approve」/「Reject」按鈕（複用 toast-center 的 approve/reject 機制，經 `/decisions/{id}/approve|reject`）
  - [x] Filter bar：by agent / by decision / by tool name
  - [x] Header 統計：auto_allowed count / held count / denied count（自動刷新）
- [x] **UI — decision-dashboard 延伸**：PEP HELD 項目自動出現在 decision queue（kind=`pep_tool_intercept`，列掛 PEP chip）
- [x] **UI — audit-panel 延伸**：新增 kind filter tabs（`All Actions | PEP | Decisions | Auth`），PEP 篩選過濾 `action.startsWith("pep.")`
- [x] **UI — toast-center 延伸**：PEP HOLD 事件透過 DE 的 `decision_pending` 自動上浮（severity=risky/destructive），並顯示 PEP chip；approve 後 toast 自動消失
- 預估：**3.5 day**（backend 2d + UI 1.5d）**✅ AI completed 2026-04-17**

### R1. ChatOps Interactive Integration（Discord / Teams / Line 雙向互動）(#307)
- [x] `backend/chatops_bridge.py`：統一 ChatOps interface（`send_interactive(channel, message, buttons)` / `on_button_click(callback)` / `on_command(cmd, handler)`）
- [x] Discord adapter：Webhook + Interaction endpoint（Button / Select Menu）
- [x] Teams adapter：Adaptive Card + Bot Framework webhook
- [x] Line adapter：Flex Message + Postback action
- [x] PEP approve/reject 按鈕回路：ChatOps button click → `POST /api/v1/pep/decision/{id}` → PEP gateway 放行/拒絕
- [x] `/omnisight inspect [ID]` — 回傳 agent 最後 3 輪 ReAct 日誌（markdown 格式）
- [x] `/omnisight inject [ID] "hint"` — 將 human hint 寫入 agent state machine 的 `human_hint` slot（**不用 `<system_override>` 標籤**，改走 debug blackboard 機制）；hint 內容強制 sanitize（strip XML/HTML tags + 長度上限 2000 chars）+ rate limit（每 agent 每 5 min 最多 3 次）+ audit log
- [x] `/omnisight rollback [ID]` — 觸發 worktree discard + recreate（R8 機制）
- [x] `/omnisight status` — 回傳系統 KPI snapshot（active agents / queue depth / PEP held / entropy alerts）
- [x] Hot Resume 機制：inject hint 後不重啟 sandbox，agent state machine 從 `suspended` → `running`，hint 注入 context 的 `human_hint` slot（非 system prompt 尾端）
- [x] 安全：ChatOps inject 只接受 Gerrit `non-ai-reviewer` group 對應的 ChatOps user（防止非授權人員注入指令）；所有 inject 進 hash-chain audit_log
- [x] **UI — ChatOps Mirror Panel（新元件 `chatops-mirror.tsx`）**：
  - [x] 即時雙向鏡像：ChatOps 頻道的對話（bot 發出 + human 回覆）顯示在 dashboard
  - [x] SSE event `chatops.message`（direction: outbound | inbound, channel, author, body, buttons_state）
  - [x] Dashboard 側也能 inject hint / approve PEP（不一定要開 Discord）——form input + submit 按鈕
  - [x] Channel selector（multiple channels 支援：#omnisight-alerts / #omnisight-dev / custom）
  - [x] Connection status indicator（● Connected / ○ Disconnected per channel）
  - [x] 歷史捲動 + 搜尋（最近 100 條 ChatOps 訊息快取在前端 state）
- [x] **UI — notification-center 延伸**：P2 severity 通知裡加 inline text input 讓 operator 直接 inject hint 而不用切到 ChatOps Mirror
- [x] 整合測試：mock Discord webhook → button click → PEP approve → agent resume；inject hint → agent picks up hint → audit recorded
- 預估：**4 day**（backend 2.5d + UI 1.5d）**✅ AI completed 2026-04-17**

### R2. Semantic Entropy Monitor（語意熵值偵測）(#308)
- [x] `backend/semantic_entropy.py`：每 N 輪（預設 3）對 agent 最近 output 做 embedding similarity 計算
- [x] Embedding backend：sentence-transformers（本地 MiniLM）或 Anthropic embedding API（可插拔）
- [x] Entropy 指標：rolling window 5 輪的 pairwise cosine similarity 平均值；threshold 0.7 → `cognitive_deadlock` event
- [x] 整合 debug blackboard：entropy 超標寫入 `debug_findings` 表
- [x] 與既有 loop detection 協作：entropy check 在 loop detection 之前觸發，可更早抓到「措辭不同但語意空轉」
- [x] SSE event：`agent.entropy`（agent_id / entropy_score / threshold / verdict: ok | warning | deadlock）
- [x] Metrics：`semantic_entropy_score{agent_id}` gauge / `cognitive_deadlock_total` counter
- [x] 成本控制：MiniLM 本地推理 ~5ms / 輪；不用 LLM 評估 LLM（避免成本翻倍）
- [x] **UI — Agent Cognitive Health Card（擴充 `agent-matrix-wall.tsx`）**：
  - [x] 每個 agent 卡片新增「Cognitive Health」區塊
  - [x] Semantic entropy sparkline（最近 20 輪的 entropy 趨勢，微型折線圖）
  - [x] Entropy 當前值 + 閾值 badge（✅ < 0.5 / ⚠️ 0.5-0.7 / 🔴 > 0.7）
  - [x] ReAct loop counter（loop N / max M，auto-escalate at max）
  - [x] 當 entropy > threshold 時卡片邊框變紅 + 脈衝動畫（FUI scan-line 風格）
  - [x] 點擊 entropy sparkline 展開「最近 5 輪 output 摘要」popover（方便人工判斷是否真的卡住）
- [x] **UI — ops-summary-panel 延伸**：加「Highest Entropy Agent」badge（即時顯示 entropy 最高的 agent 名 + 分數）
- [x] 整合測試：mock 5 輪相似 output → entropy > threshold → deadlock event 發出 + UI sparkline 變紅
- 預估：**2.5 day**（backend 1.5d + UI 1d）**✅ AI completed 2026-04-17**

### R3. Scratchpad Memory Offload + Auto-Continuation（心智卸載 + 自動續寫）(#309)
- [x] `backend/scratchpad.py`：per-agent persistent scratchpad file（`data/agents/<agent_id>/scratchpad.md`）
- [x] 自動寫入觸發：每 10 輪 ReAct 循環、每次 tool call 結束後、agent 切換子任務時
- [x] Scratchpad 格式：structured markdown（`## Current Task` / `## Progress` / `## Blockers` / `## Next Steps` / `## Context Summary`）
- [x] 加密 at-rest：沿用 `backend/secret_store.py` Fernet（scratchpad 可能含 code snippet + 設計決策）
- [x] Auto-continuation：`stop_reason=max_tokens` 偵測 → 自動發送「請從上次截斷處繼續輸出」→ 拼接結果 → 記 `token_continuation_total` metric
- [x] Scratchpad reload on resume：agent restart / crash recovery 時自動載入最新 scratchpad.md 到 context head
- [x] 清理策略：任務成功完成 → archive scratchpad（move to `data/agents/<agent_id>/archive/`）；失敗 → 保留供 debug
- [x] SSE event：`agent.scratchpad.saved`（agent_id / turn / size_bytes / sections_count）
- [x] Metrics：`scratchpad_saves_total` / `scratchpad_size_bytes` / `token_continuation_total`
- [x] **UI — Scratchpad Progress Indicator（擴充 `agent-matrix-wall.tsx` Health Card）**：
  - [x] Progress bar：scratchpad 持久化佔比（已寫入的 turn 數 / 總 turn 數）
  - [x] 最後寫入時間（relative，如「2 min ago」）
  - [x] 點擊展開 scratchpad 內容 preview（read-only，markdown rendered）
  - [x] 若 agent crash 且有 scratchpad → 卡片顯示「Recoverable ●」badge
- [x] **UI — Auto-Continuation Indicator**：在 agent message stream 中，auto-continued 的訊息標注「↩ auto-continued」小 tag
- [x] 整合測試：10 輪循環 → scratchpad 自動寫入；mock crash → reload scratchpad → agent 接續；max_tokens truncation → auto-continue → 拼接正確
- 預估：**3 day**（backend 2d + UI 1d）**✅ AI completed 2026-04-17**

### R4. CATC State Snapshot 斷點續傳 (#310)
- [ ] O0 `TaskCard` dataclass 擴充：新增 `state_snapshot: Optional[str]`（BASE64 encoded JSON，含 scratchpad + tool_call_history + partial_output + turn_counter）
- [ ] Worker claim 任務時：若 `state_snapshot` 存在 → hot-resume from checkpoint（跳過已完成的 tool calls），否則 cold-start
- [ ] Snapshot 生成時機：scratchpad save 時同步生成 snapshot → 寫入 CATC payload → 存入 queue backend
- [ ] Snapshot 大小限制：≤ 512 KiB（超過則只保留最新 scratchpad + turn_counter，drop tool_call_history）
- [ ] 安全：snapshot 加密 at-rest + 簽名防竄改（HMAC-SHA256 with CATC-specific key）
- [ ] **UI — Checkpoint Timeline（擴充 `run-history-panel.tsx`）**：
  - [ ] 任務詳情頁新增水平時間軸，顯示所有 checkpoint 點（● = scratchpad save / ✕ = crash / ▶ = resume）
  - [ ] 每個 checkpoint 可點擊查看當時的 scratchpad 內容
  - [ ] crash → resume 之間用虛線連接，標註「resumed from checkpoint #N」
  - [ ] Checkpoint 間距顏色編碼：綠色 = 正常進展、黃色 = entropy 升高中、紅色 = 接近 deadlock
  - [ ] Timeline 末尾顯示「total recovered time」（= 從 checkpoint resume 省下的時間 vs. cold-restart 的預估時間）
- [ ] 整合測試：task running → 3 checkpoints → crash → worker re-claim → hot-resume from checkpoint#3 → task continues → done；checkpoint timeline UI 正確顯示 5 個點
- 預估：**2.5 day**（backend 1.5d + UI 1d）

### R5. Active-Standby HA 具體方案（Keepalived + Redis M-S）(#311)
- [ ] `deploy/ha/keepalived.conf.example`：VRRP instance 配置範本（VIP / priority / auth / health check script）
- [ ] `deploy/ha/redis-sentinel.conf.example`：Redis Sentinel 3-node 最小配置
- [ ] Health check script `scripts/ha_health_check.sh`：檢查 FastAPI `/healthz` + Redis ping + queue depth；失敗 → Keepalived 降權 → failover
- [ ] Consul leader election 替代方案（雲端 VPC 無 L2 multicast 時）：`backend/ha_leader.py` 用 Consul session + KV lock
- [ ] Failover runbook `docs/ops/ha_failover_runbook.md`：手動 / 自動 failover 步驟、驗證清單、回切流程
- [ ] Redis replication lag monitoring：SSE event `ha.redis_lag`（lag_bytes / lag_seconds）
- 預估：**2 day**

### R6. Serverless PaaS Adapter（Fargate / Cloud Run）(#312)
- [ ] `backend/deploy/fargate.py`：AWS ECS + Fargate task definition 生成 + 佈署
- [ ] `backend/deploy/cloud_run.py`：GCP Cloud Run service 生成 + 佈署
- [ ] 統一 `PaaSAdapter` interface：`provision()` / `deploy(image_uri)` / `scale(min, max)` / `teardown()` / `get_url()`
- [ ] Cold-start mitigation：pre-warm（Fargate 的 minimum task count / Cloud Run 的 min-instances）
- [ ] Task-queue bridge：PaaS container 啟動後自動連接 O2 Message Queue，pull CATC 任務
- [ ] Scale-to-zero 支援：idle timeout 後 PaaS 自動縮 → queue consumer 斷線 → 新任務入隊時自動 scale-up
- [ ] 成本估算 helper：依 vCPU/hour + memory/hour 計算 burst 成本 vs. always-on 成本
- [ ] 整合測試：mock Fargate API → provision + deploy + scale + teardown 四步流程
- 預估：**2.5 day**

### R7. Deployment Topology View UI + Bootstrap Wizard Extension (#313)
- [ ] **UI — Deployment Topology View（新元件 `deployment-topology.tsx`）**：
  - [ ] 偵測當前部署模式（Single Node / Active-Standby / K8s / PaaS）——呼叫 `GET /api/v1/system/deploy-topology`

  - [ ] Active-Standby 模式：雙節點拓撲圖（primary / standby）+ VIP 歸屬 + Redis replication lag + heartbeat latency
  - [ ] K8s 模式：pod count / ReplicaSet status / node health / HPA current/target replicas
  - [ ] PaaS 模式：service URL / active instances / cold-start p99 / scale-to-zero countdown

  - [ ] 模式切換建議：依當前 load 自動建議升級路徑（Single → HA / HA → K8s），呈現為 info banner
- [ ] `backend/routers/system.py` 新增 `GET /api/v1/system/deploy-topology`：回傳 deploy mode + 各模式特定指標
